C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
▌「美梦与圣杯」活动开启后，可以参与开拓续闻以及联动活动玩法。联动角色<color=#f29e38ff>不支持英语配音</color>，您可以切换至其他语音语言进行体验。

▌「命运/驻足梦国之夜」
◆ 简介 ◆
● 实现一切梦想的万能许愿机——「圣杯」，降临逐梦之星。

▌「命运/今晚留下来」
◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「命运/今晚留下来」中，开拓者将与7位模拟角色共同参与圣杯战争，经过多轮一对一作战，决出最终胜者。

▌「命运赠礼」
● 活动期间，开拓者在<unbreak>3.4</unbreak>版本任意跃迁活动中，累计消耗<unbreak>200</unbreak>张「星轨专票」，即可于联动跃迁开启后领取奖励。
● <unbreak>3.4</unbreak>版本所有跃迁活动共享「星轨专票」累计消耗数量。
● 奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。

▌「命运契约」
● 活动期间，所有开拓等级达到3级的开拓者，登录后即可直接获得联动限定5星角色「Archer」
E:
▌ After the event "Sweet Dreams and the Holy Grail" begins, Trailblazers can participate in Trailblaze Continuance and the collaboration event gameplay. The collaboration characters have <color=#f29e38ff>no English voiceovers</color>. You may switch to another voiceover language if preferred.

▌ Fate/Night in Dreamland
◆ Introduction ◆
● An omnipotent wish-granting chalice that can fulfill all dreams — the Holy Grail — has descended upon the planet of dream-chase.

▌ Fate/stay night
◆ Event Rules ◆
● In Fate/stay night, the Trailblazer will participate in the Holy Grail War alongside 7 simulated characters. After multiple 1v1 showdowns, a final victor will be decided.

▌ Fate Gift
● During the event, Trailblazers who consume a cumulative total of <unbreak>200</unbreak> Star Rail Special Passes across any Version <unbreak>3.4</unbreak> Warp event can claim the reward after the Collaboration Warp begins.
● The total number of "Star Rail Special Passes" consumed is shared across all Warp events in Version <unbreak>3.4</unbreak>.
● This reward can only be claimed once during the event.

▌ Fate Contract
● During the event, all Trailblazers at Trailblaze Level 3 or above can immediately receive the limited collaboration 5-star character Archer after logging in.

E:
The final trial's combat format consists of multi-tiered consecutive battles.
● Combat for the final trial have a 6-Cycle countdown.
● Each wave of battle counts as 1 tier. As the tier increases, the enemies will become stronger, and the Boss Enemy will have a special battle mechanic.
● Dealing damage and defeating enemies will earn you trial points.
● Additional trial points can be earned if there are Cycles remaining when passing the stage.

C: 你的开拓第一站，是名为「雅利洛-Ⅵ」的冰雪星球。\n怀着激动的心情，你将与三月七、丹恒共同踏上这段旅程。
E: Your first stop as a Trailblazer is an icy planet called Jarilo-VI.\nFilled with anticipation, you embark on your journey alongside March 7th and Dan Heng.

C: 砂金即将在克劳克影视乐园的舞台上完成他计划的最后一步。途中，他见到了来自「过去」和「未来」的幻影……
E: Aventurine was about to complete the final step of his plan on the Clock Studios Theme Park stage. Along the way, he met phantoms from the past and future...

C: 在离开怪梦后，你与伙伴们正式踏入折纸大学的校园。但先前梦中的猴子仍阴魂不散，校内四处都能看到这个名为「睡蕉小猴」的流行迷因，甚至连作为代理校长「普利蒙蕉授」都扮成了猴子的模样。而从梦中追来的还有那位言行古怪的忍者乱破，而她也向列车组的成员揭示了自己的真实身份——逐恶而来的巡海游侠。
E: Having left the bizarre dream, you and your companions formally arrive at Paperfold University. However, the monkeys from the previous dream haunt you still, with the popular meme Slumbernana Monkey appearing prominently throughout the campus. Even the acting dean, Professor Primon, is garbed in monkey costume. Rappa, the unconventional ninja from the dream, follows you here from the dream and discloses her true identity — A Galaxy Ranger who had arrived to eliminate evil.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了展览顺利进行，妙手仁心的娜塔莎大夫主动向博物馆投递了简历，并顺利通过面试。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a shortage of guides. To ensure a smooth exhibition, Natasha, a compassionate doctor, submits her resume to the museum and passes the interview, becoming a guide.

C: 狂热的粉丝为了与桂乃芬见面，多次用假情报骗桂乃芬到实地调查…\n桂乃芬的处理方式也许值得参考。
E: Guinaifen's passionate fans repeatedly provide her with false information, hoping to meet her during field investigations...\nObserving how Guinaifen handles such situations may provide valuable insights.

C: 赎珠阁
E: Jeweler's Pagoda

C: 在钟表小子的劝说下，哈努兄弟饶了他一命。「滴答，留他一命吧，还能拉去填线。」
E: Brother Hanu decides to spare his life, thanks to the exhortation of Clockie.\n"Tick-tock, let him have his life. Our forces could use him."

C: 钟表小子将种子藏入野花姐姐家的花田中，然后将一颗石子画成种子的模样。\n「滴答，如果石头老板真的认不出来，那我以后就叫他种子老板吧！」
E: Clockie hides the seeds in Sister Wildflower's fields, then paints a stone to look like a seed.\n"Tick-tock, if I really do manage to fool Boss Stone, then we'll have to call him 'Boss Seed' instead!"

C: 钟表小子在小镇中巡游，为产生争执的镇民化解矛盾。
E: Clockie is patrolling through the town, resolving disputes between townsfolk.

C: 钟表小子要保护小树，准备独自把野兽赶走。\n「滴答，现在保护植物比保护动物重要！」
E: Clockie wants to protect the small tree and is ready to chase the beasts away on his own.\n"Tick-tock, at this very moment, the protection of the plants outweighs that of animal protection!"

C: 在他的广告里，汽水先生才是美梦小镇的英雄，钟表小子和哈努兄弟都是他的小弟。\n「咕噜噜，故事营销最好用了。」
E: In his advertisement, Mr. Soda is the true hero of Dreamville, while Clockie and Brother Hanu are his underlings.\n"*gurgle* Narrative marketing is the most effective."

C: 钟表小子没有等来援兵，他的钱都被劫匪抢走了。\n「滴答，美梦小镇的治安太不好了……」
E: No one came to Clockie's aid, and all his money was robbed.\n"Tick-tock, Dreamville security's in such bad shape..."

C: 钟表小子在宾馆里放了好多石头老板的气球，告诉大家——这就是吃人的怪物。\n「滴答，反倒是给咱们做广告了！」
E: Clockie placed a lot of balloons in Boss Stone's shape within the hotel, telling everyone that Boss Stone was the man-eating monster.\n"Tick-tock, thanks for the free advertisement!"

C: 木头老爷一人冲入了火场，浓烟遮蔽了他的背影……\n「咳咳，老树我要燃起来了！」
E: All by himself, Old Man Wood ran into the blazing hotel, his silhouette obscured by thick smoke...\n"Cough, cough! This old tree is about to catch fire!"

C: 木头老爷拿走他的欲望，美梦小镇不能有不满足。\n「滴答，看开点，黄金街上有免费的苏乐达可以喝个够！」
E: Old Man Wood took away the person's desires. No dissatisfaction should be in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, buck up and enjoy free SoulGlad on the Golden Street!"

C: 木头老爷让这个「商品」找回了自尊。
E: Old Man Wood helps the "merchandise" to rediscover their dignity.

C: 钟表小子与哈努兄弟暂时打败了石头老板，但鳄鱼们不离开，噩梦小镇就永远会活在噩梦之下……
E: Clockie and Brother Hanu temporarily defeat Boss Stone, but if the crocodiles don't leave, Nightmareville will always remain locked in nightmares...

C: 为了建设这十二条街道，原本有些荒凉的小城要逐一拆除，许多镇民不愿就此放弃自己原本的家园……
E: To make way for the construction of the twelve streets, some buildings in the deserted town had to be demolished. Many townsfolk were reluctant to lose their homes...

C: 美梦小镇里有人思考不出人生的答案，钟表小子问：「滴答，木头老爷，该怎么办呢？」
E: Someone couldn't figure out the meaning of life in Dreamville. "Tick-tock, what should we do, Old Man Wood?" Clockie asks.

C:
追寻圣杯的骑士，往往是冒险故事不可或缺的一环。总会在奇怪场合出现的男人，也毫不意外地误入了圣杯战争当中。

虽然对众人为何与自己交战一事一头雾水，但能与寰宇闻名的英雄们进行对决，如此荣光交加的时刻，何尝不是一种纯美的赐福！沉浸在遐想里的男人，一路过关斩将，所向披靡。

只是，毫无欲念的他，若真取得了圣杯，恐怕就连那万能的奇迹也会被用于他人的幸福吧。
E:
Knights in pursuit of the Holy Grail are often an essential part of any grand adventure. This man, who always shows up in the strangest of places, unsurprisingly stumbled into the Holy Grail War as well.

Though completely baffled as to why everyone is fighting him, having the chance to duel heroes renowned across the cosmos — a moment so glorious, so radiant — isn't that just another blessing from Beauty!? Immersed in his daydreams, he cuts through every challenge, unrivalled.

Yet, with no desires of his own, even that all-powerful miracle would likely be used for someone else's happiness should he truly claim the Holy Grail.

C:
基于圣杯的奇迹得以参赛的谜之治疗师。拥有出众的耐心，说话又好听，有办法拉住任何人促膝长谈，改善大家心理与身体上的问题。

据说参加比赛的原因是想认识更多的朋友。

……嗯？有人疑神疑鬼、不愿相信？那她也只好和伙伴们一起「劝说」对方相信啦！
E:
A mysterious healer granted entry to the tournament by the miracle of the Holy Grail. Gifted with exceptional patience and great conversation skills, she has a way of drawing anyone into heartfelt conversation, helping to ease both mental and physical ailments.

It's said she joined the tournament simply to make more friends.

...Hmm? Someone's being paranoid and won't believe her? Well, in that case, she and her companion will just have to "convince" them together!

C: 规则说明
E: Rules

C:
◆ 「冬去煦至」时装说明 ◆
● 获得时装「冬去煦至」后可以在【角色-时装】界面查看。
●「冬去煦至」仅限「三月七•存护」使用。
●获得时装的同时会额外赠送头像「三月七•节日」。
●更换「冬去煦至」后，在探索、战斗时三月七将穿着对应时装。
●无论是否更换时装，不会影响三月七在剧情演出中的穿着。
E:
◆ Nascent Spring Outfit Details ◆
● After obtaining the Nascent Spring outfit, it can be viewed at the "Character — Outfit" interface.
● Nascent Spring is available only for March 7th: Preservation.
● The avatar "March 7th: Festival" will be gifted together with the outfit.
● After changing into Nascent Spring, March 7th will be equipped with the corresponding outfits during exploration and battles.
● Changing the outfit will not affect March 7th's appearance during story scenes.

C: 规则说明
E: Rules

C:
◆ 终末视界•地图◆
● 开启「终末视界」后，会以临时开放的形式解锁活动涉及的地图，包括尚未在正式剧情流程中解锁的地图。
● 在「终末视界」的临时地图中，仅可体验当前活动必要的内容。
● 如果切换追踪至另一个通过「终末视界」接取的任务，当前「终末视界」中的临时地图将暂时关闭，无法进入，直到该任务的「终末视界」状态被重新激活。
● 通过导航界面右上角的开关选项，可以在<color=#f29e38ff>「终末视界」</color>与正常地图之间切换
E:
◆ Finality's Vision: Map ◆
● After activating Finality's Vision, you will temporarily be able to explore the maps related to the unlocked game mode, including maps yet to be unlocked through the main story's progression.
● In maps temporarily accessed via Finality's Vision, you can only experience the content essential to the current event.
● If you switch your navigation to another mission accepted via Finality's Vision, the temporary map for the current Finality's Vision will close and become inaccessible until this mission is reactivated via Finality's Vision.
● Use the selectable option in the upper right corner of the Navigation interface to switch between the normal map and maps accessed through <color=#f29e38ff>Finality's Vision</color>.

C: 合成机
E: Synthesizer

C:
◆ 玩法规则 ◆
● 「饼干对对乐」是「饼干翻翻烘焙台」的一种玩法模式。
● 开拓者可在「饼干翻翻烘焙台」上，选择翻开心仪的饼干。每块饼干背后印有不同的图案。
● 当翻开的饼干中出现3个相同的图案时，选择结束。开拓者将会获得3个图案组合对应数值的「开拓券」奖励。
● 随着游玩进程的推进，将会解锁「加注」功能。开拓者可通过消耗额外的「开拓券」，激活指定倍数，使游戏结算时的奖励倍数增加。
E:
◆ Gameplay Rules ◆
● "Cookie Bingo" is one of the gameplay modes for Cookie Bakery.
● Trailblazers can select and flip over their preferred cookies in the Cookie Bakery. A different image is printed on the back of each cookie.
● The selection process ends when 3 cookies that have the same image are flipped over. And you will receive Trailblaze Funds based on the numerical value associated with the specific 3-image combination.
● As the game progresses, the "Add Stake" function will be unlocked. Trailblazers can pay extra Trailblaze Funds to activate specific multipliers and obtain more rewards when the game ends.

C: ◆ 后备开拓力 ◆\n当开拓力全部恢复时，会开始存储后备开拓力。\n后备开拓力有独立的恢复速度及存储上限。
E: ◆ Reserved Trailblaze Power ◆\nWhen Trailblaze Power is fully restored, the surplus will be stored as Reserved Trailblaze Power.\nReserved Trailblaze Power has its own recovery rate and storage limit.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《逐鹿》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Deerstalker."

E: Decorative items obtained during your trailblazing expedition. Can be used to spruce up your room.

E: Decorative items obtained during your trailblazing expedition. Can be used to spruce up your room.

C: 阔不盈一指的锋镝，装入电磁弩或是热寻弓作为飞矢弹药，其力道足以一击贯穿孽物们坚如金石的躯壳。\n\n「天上谪仙来，乘槎渡星海。飞矢坠疾雨，明盔映月白。」
E: An arrow narrower than a finger's width. It can be loaded into an electromagnetic crossbow or a thermal seeking bow as ammunition. Its power is enough to penetrate the tough shells of abominations with just one strike.\n\n"The celestial banished arrives from afar, great distances journeyed 'twixt oceans of stars. Like rain falls a cloudburst of arrows below, in a helmet reflected the bright lunar glow."

C: 银鬃铁卫间偶尔会进行一场比斗——在规定时间内带回怪物残躯的一部分。这支冰冷的断角想必就是某场比试的战利品。\n\n「波瓦大臣，这不是雪鹿角，它也不适合挂在地髓壁炉的上边。」
E: The Silvermane Guards would host contests where the winner must take a body part from a monster and bring it back within a set time limit. This cold broken horn must have been a trophy of one such contest.\n\n"Sir Bova, this is no moose horn and is certainly not fit for decoration above the Geomarrow furnace."

C: 纷争眷属仅以军功的高低来划分位阶，这轮圆刃便象征着卓越的勇气与荣耀，以及无可匹敌的战斗能力。\n\n「投身死亡的冥河之中，用不朽的名声为我们的神加冠。」
E: Strife Titankins ascend through their ranks only via military achievements. This blade symbolizes exceptional courage, honor, and martial prowess.\n\n"Plunge into death's River of Souls, and honor our god with your eternal fame."

C: 就像孳生恶瘤的病灶，引致罪行的冲动，它是裂界扭曲的源头。 在沉重的打击下，这颗心脏已然停止搏动，失去了光泽。 「初步判定它是某种杂交产物：一半原体，另一半的数据与星核高度拟合——生物科，莎拉•卡斯特罗」
E: It is a lesion that breeds evil, the impulse to sin. It is the source of the Fragmentum distortion. A heavy blow has caused this heart to stop beating and lose its luster. "Preliminary tests indicate it's some kind of hybrid: One half is primordial, and the other half is something very similar to Stellarons." — Department of Biology, Sarah Castro

C: 「水晶花跌落时那真挚的颤抖，就是『生命的因』。」
E: "That genuine shiver when crystal flowers fall... That's the 'mover of life.'"

C: 允许佩戴者进入铁卫禁区的临时凭证。\n\n「戴着它的临时工人可以在三小时内出入军事禁区——严禁外借，违者重罪。」
E: A temporary pass allowing entry into the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\n\n"Temporary workers in possession of this temporary pass may enter the restricted zone within three hours. Lending this pass to others is a felony, and offenders will suffer serious consequences."

C: 跨越时间的宝物。\n\n「九成的时间胶囊都不是自己挖出来的。」
E: Treasure across time.\n\n"I didn't dig out ninety percent of the time capsules."

C: 工造司中用于制造金人的标准零件套组，适用于不同型号金人开发。\n\n「都说了几百遍了，我们要工业化！工！业！化！」
E: Standard parts set from the Artisanship Commission used to assemble different aurumatons.\n\n"I've told you a hundred times before that we want to industrialize. In. Dus. Tri. Al. Ize!"

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，这张纸是记录着天火熔金位置的藏宝图。但在你的眼中，这就是一张随便画了个圈的丹鼎司地图。 「所谓『邦之利器，不可以示人』，他在系狱之前，已将『天火熔金』秘藏了起来，以防宵小觊觎。」 「出现了！寻宝故事特有的存在了几百年都没被发现的藏宝图！」
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, this is a treasure map recording the location of the Ignis Aureliae. But in your eyes, this is just an Alchemy Commission map with a random circle drawn on it. "It is said that 'A Sword Is Mightier When Hidden.' He therefore hid the Ignis Aureliae away from potential thieves before he was incarcerated." "There it is! The classic adventure story trope where a century-old treasure map just gets discovered out of nowhere!"

C: 花火大人贴心地为你标记了（九百九十九枚中的五枚）虚数中子弹所在地——她太善良了！\n你问剩下的在哪？在这艘豪华游轮上多转转吧～
E: Miss Sparkle thoughtfully marked the locations of (five of the <unbreak>999</unbreak>) imaginary neutron bombs for you — she's just too kind!\nWhere are the rest of them, you ask? Just take a few strolls around on this luxury airship~

C: 形似钟表的披萨，以绝对精确的刀法切成12块大小相等的面饼，完美解决了聚会上的分配问题。\n\n「这种食物独特的形制是何含义？有人说是为了纪念某位神秘的富翁，有人则说是为了提醒大家珍惜当下。」
E: Resembling a clock, this pizza is precisely divided into twelve equal-sized slices, making it the perfect food for parties.\n\n"What is the meaning behind the unique shape of this food? Some believe it pays homage to a mysterious wealthy individual, while others see it as a reminder to cherish each passing moment."

C: 我从小就不是个优秀的小孩。用勉强够用的分数考上大学，再用勉强够用的学分拿到学位。如今我坐在案前，思考该对你说些什么，来阐释我对「迷茫」的理解。可我真的有资格向你展示我的浅薄吗？你真的有必要读这些琐碎的唠叨吗？我不知道。\n\n「无论如何，希望你玩得开心。」
E: I've never been outstanding since I was a kid. I barely met the requirements to get into college, and I barely earned enough credits to obtain my degree. Now, I'm sitting at my desk, contemplating how to explain my understanding of "confusion" to you, but am I really worthy of showering you with my superficial understanding? And do you really need to listen to all this broken gibberish of mine? I don't know the answer.\n\n"Anyway, I hope you enjoy yourself."

C: 以人类的尺度而言，天才俱乐部#29丝丝喀尔只活了短暂的二十九天；但她在短暂蛛生中的发明创造，却将整个蜘蛛文明的发展加速了数千年。在其成果中，最为世人熟知的无疑是「相位变换」技术。 但少为人知的是：这种技术首先被用于离子实验；丝丝喀尔成功创造出了「相位灵火」，紧接着它就变换到了另一个相位。等灵火回到丝丝喀尔的相位时，这位受人尊敬的天才蜘蛛已经寿终正寝，无法将之捉拿捕获了。于是，相位灵火就这样不断变换相位，燃烧诸界，在各处留下火焰的后裔。 「丝丝喀尔…她是位了不起的天才，聪明，善良，而且谦卑。她在生命的最后一天还在向俱乐部的成员提问，那是一个至今没有人能够解答的问题。」
E: Sserkal, #29 of the Genius Society, only lived 29 days by human measures of time. Despite that, she put her short life as a spider to good use, inventing new technologies that would have taken the spider-kind thousands of years to develop. Of all her inventions, the most famous must be the technique known as Phase Change. What people don't know is that this technique was first applied to experiments with ions. She successfully created Phase Flame, which almost immediately changed to another phase. By the time the Flame returned to the Sserkal Phase, our genius had already passed away. She tried to harness the Flame but had too little time to do so. Thus, the Phase Flame continued to change between phases across different worlds, leaving behind the seeds of flame. "Sserkal's life was remarkable. She was smart, kindhearted, and above all, humble. She remained curious and inquisitive, asking her final question in the club on the last day of her life, the answer to which has not been found to this day."

E: "Welcome to Penacony, the Planet of Festivities!"\n"We wish you a wonderful holiday in the Dreamscape!"

E: A leader's secret at work: Never let others know what you are up to.

E: Print money when there's a need, and print money for fun when there isn't.

C: 「只让你的敌人听到一声犬嚎。」
E: "Only let your enemies hear a howl."

C: 「离开仙舟之后我才知道，原来宇宙里不是所有人都喜欢毛绒绒的耳朵和尾巴的…很不幸，我遇上的那位评委就对狐人的毛发过敏。」
E: "It was only after I left the Xianzhou that I discovered not everyone in the universe likes fluffy ears and tails... Unfortunately, the judge I encountered was allergic to a foxian's fur..."

C: 今天，映红的天空也格外美好。
E: The crimson sky is looking beautiful today, too.

E: A tactical beverage brand that often sponsors extreme sports.\n\n"Under Blu Bull's dome, go big or go home!"

C: 脑中一闪而过的灵光，亦是改造现实的燃料。
E: A fleeting spark of inspiration is also fuel for reshaping reality.

E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 「为我而哭吧。」垂死的宇宙大亨躺在床上，「我拼搏一生，却没享受过真正的爱…只要为我流下一滴泪，你就能得到我的全部遗产。」 柴火般的气氛在房间里蔓延，仆人们恨不得亲自跪到床前痛哭。年轻的女儿沉默着转身，头也不回地离开了。 「有些错误，仅靠悔悟无法挽回。」
E: "Weep for me." The dying cosmic tycoon lies on his bed. "I've toiled all my life but never experienced true love... Just shed a tear for me, and my entire inheritance shall be yours." The air in the room carries the aroma of firewood. The servants long to kneel before the bed and cry their eyes out themselves, but the young daughter silently turns and leaves without looking back. "There are mistakes that cannot be undone by repentance alone."

C: {NICKNAME}在「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」上贩卖的饮品。灵感来源于爱德华医生对{F#她}{M#他}进行的精神分析学诊断。 品尝者会立刻感受到「翻垃圾桶的极致幸福感」。不过爱德华医生刻意调整了适口度，以避免这种极致幸福感对于普通人来说太过刺激。 「啊，我翻垃圾桶好幸福…啊，垃圾桶好幸福…啊，我好幸福啊…啊，我是垃圾桶…」 「完了，大眼仔，这人魔怔了，怎么办？」 「我早就提醒过您，不能用原版配方！要相信精神分析学！」
E: A beverage that {NICKNAME} sells on The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand. The inspiration came from the psychoanalysis that Dr. Edward performed on {NICKNAME}. The one consuming this drink will immediately feel the "supreme joy of digging through trashcans." However, Dr. Edward did adjust the flavoring to ensure that normal people aren't overwhelmed by such extreme levels of happiness. "AHHGHGHH! I LOVE DIGGING THROUGH TRASHCANS! TRASHCAN IS HAPPINESS! I AM HAPPINESS! I AM TRASHCANNNNN!" "Uh-oh, big eyes. This one's completely gone off the rails. What now?" "I told you before to not use the original recipe. You have to believe in the science of psychoanalysis!"

C: {NICKNAME}在「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」上贩卖的纪念品。灵感来源于{F#她}{M#他}的亲身经历。每当谈及关于这枚勋章的过往，{NICKNAME}的眼中都泪光闪动。\n\n「他是我等的王，也是世间一切废料的牧人。他立于王座上，扶持谦卑的桶，压制强暴的桶…」
E: A souvenir that {NICKNAME} sells on The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand. The inspiration came from {F#her}{M#his} personal experiences. Every time {NICKNAME} talks about the history of this medal, {F#her}{M#his} eyes shimmer with tears.\n\n"He was my king, and the shepherd of all existence's waste. Upon his throne, he aided the humble cans and humbled the vile cans..."

C: 煦日节的招牌小吃，曾经贝洛伯格的家家户户都知道它的做法。甜腻的程度连三月七都难以接受。\n\n「人越是缺什么，就越会惦记什么；用『太阳』为这种食品取名大概也是这个理由。」
E: The signature snack of the Solwarm Festival, once known by every Belobogian household. Its sweetness is too much for even March 7th to handle.\n\n"The more people lack something, the more they yearn for it. Using 'sun' to name the snack is probably for this reason as well."

C: 黑 塔 科 员 档 案 —— 基础信息 ——  【姓名】何塞•拉萨罗 【性别】男 【种族】灵长目人科人属 【身高】173 厘米 【体重】80 公斤 【健康状况】十分健康 【派系面貌】前无名客、博识学会•武装考古学派 【原籍星球】利玛星 【遴选方式】自荐 —— 研究信息 ——  【员工编号】研-地-009 【档案编号】2147-009 【科室】寰宇地概科 【身份权限】高级科员 - 权限IV级（2154纪曾遭降级处理） 【研究课题】星域导影 【定分评估】绩优 【聘用形式】长聘 【是否续聘】否 【紧急联系人】温天翁 【联系方式】站内呼叫 —— 研究成果 ——  陈年老事不必提，只星域导影这一条就够了吧？ 这东西给谁不能靠它吃一辈子。 —— 研究计划 ——  其他都是虚的。 先把星域导影复制个几百份，分发给寰宇地概科所有年轻人，这是一切研究的基础，从此以后我们便不必提着壁灯在黑河中摸索，银河在我们面前将亮如白昼！ —— 自我评价 ——  毫无疑问，何塞•拉萨罗是「黑塔」不世出的天才。这条板上钉钉的结论，只有黑塔本尊来了才会让我有所动摇。 只可惜选择大于努力，在一系列重大历史节点，何塞•拉萨罗选择终身效力的寰宇地概科都不幸落于科室争斗的下风。正如同再优秀的船长也无法驱使一艘沉船穿越风暴，天才如何塞•拉萨罗在空间站内也面临着前所未有的不公。怪只怪我们没有二道贩子的财力、政客的嘴皮子、生物学家的多种族拥趸，又或是占卜师的神眷。 我们有的只是对银河未开垦处女地的无限向往，以及一双深入泥土的手。 但任何一个想看何塞•拉萨罗笑话的人都会失望而归！因为我绝不会因同僚的草包转而怀疑自我生存的价值。在每纪一度的自我评估中，我都将写下这段话，写他个三百遍，三千遍，三万遍，那就是—— 何塞•拉萨罗才是「黑塔」不世出的天才！ *1. 定分评估采纳多次考核的加权平均数。 *2. 「黑塔」依照银河通行的隐私安全法收集、储存和使用科员信息。特定权限身份者可阅览或使用科员档案。未经授权，相关人员不得向第三方披露任何档案，违者将受到严厉制裁。
E: Herta Researcher Archive —— Basic Information —— Name: Hosea Lazaro Sex: Male Race:Homo sapiens Height: 173 cm Weight: 80 kg Physical Condition: Very healthy Faction Affiliation: Former Nameless, Intelligentsia Guild: Armed Archaeologists Planet of Origin: Rima Method of Selection: Self-recommended —— Research Information —— Staff Number: R-GGRA-009 Profile Number: 2147-009 Department: Department of Cosmic Geography Access Permissions: Advanced researcher - Access Lv. IV (demoted in 2154 AE) Research Topic: Cosmos Guide Evaluation Score: Distinction/Outstanding Employment: Tenure Further Employment: Negative Emergency Contact: Wen Tianweng Contact Details: Station call —— Research Findings —— That's all ancient history now. The Cosmos Guide is good enough on its own, right? Anyone with that sort of finding will have the rest of their lives sorted out. —— Research Plan —— Everything else is just vanity. First of all, make a few hundred copies of the Cosmos Guide and distribute them to all the young people in the Department of Cosmic Geography. This is the foundation for all future research, and from now on, we no longer have to stumble around a dark tunnel with a dim lantern, and the cosmos will be as bright as day before us! —— Self-Evaluation —— There is no doubt, Hosea Lazaro is the inimitable genius of Herta Space Station. This near-absolute conclusion will only be swayed when Herta herself makes an appearance. It's a pity that choice far outweighs effort. In a series of major historical events, the Department of Cosmic Geography that Hosea Lazaro chose to dedicate his life to has fallen foul of interdepartmental struggles. Just as even the best captain can't drive a sinking ship through a storm, the genius Hosea Lazaro faces unprecedented injustice on the space station. It's all because we don't have the financial power of a scalper, the diplomatic capacity of a politician, the multiracial support of a biologist, or the divine favor of a fortune-teller. All we have is an infinite yearning for the uncultivated lands within the cosmos and hands that dig deep into the earth. However, those who want nothing more but to watch as Hosea Lazaro embarrasses himself will be disappointed! I will never doubt my own raison d'être because of my peers' incompetence. In all of my annual self-evaluations, I have written, and will continue to write the following sentence: Hosea Lazaro IS the inimitable genius of Herta Space Station! *1. The weighted average of multiple assessments is adopted for the evaluation score. *2. Herta Space Station abides by the cosmic regulations and laws of privacy and security when collecting, storing, and using researcher information. Personnel with specific access authorizations are allowed to view or use researcher files. Relevant personnel are not permitted to disclose any files to third parties without prior authorization, failing which will result in severe punishment.

Can you guess what I'm experiencing right now!? Rocky Herta Space Station System Time 08:56:05 What I mean is... If possible... From now on, I'd like to always stay by your side. Rocky Herta Space Station System Time 08:56:15 Do you understand what I'm trying to say?

C: 挂在柜台边上常年被油烟所熏陶，纸张边缘已经油迹斑斑。 最近准备研发一些新菜，有什么意见尽管提。 ——歌蒂 本周新品：杂菜汤 【食客评价】 1、卖相有点糟糕啊，黏黏糊糊一大团，实在让人倒胃口。 ——道恩 2、说是「杂菜」，其实是洞穴里的苔藓。虽然口感挺好的，苔藓被炖煮得足够绵软，浸润了汤汁的酸甜味，浓稠但不厚重，非常开胃。但我同意楼上的意见，这道菜还是换个名字吧，不然以后端出去肯定会被其他顾客投诉的。 ——桑德斯 【主厨回复】 知道啦，口感上没问题就行，菜名的我以后再想一个吧，因为苔藓的货源不太稳定，我也不确定这道菜到底要不要对外供应了。 本周新品：铁罐焖螈肉 【食客评价】 1、 铁罐是从什么废弃机械上拆下来的吗，虽然洗得很干净了不过边缘有点斑驳，还是让人倒胃口啊。 ——道恩 2、 也不能怪道恩吹毛求疵，里面的肉汁收得很不错，但我在吃的时候下巴被铁皮烫到好几次了。歌蒂你为什么一定要执着于用铁罐来做菜呢，换个别的容器吧。 ——桑德斯 【主厨回复】 抱歉抱歉，用铁罐是因为我最近从一本旧书上看到说「铁罐适合煨汤和焖炖，能最大限度地保留食物本身的鲜美感」。我想想能不能改进一下吧，烫到你实在是不好意思。 本周新品：改良版铁罐焖螈肉 【食客评价】 1、 这层面包皮有点意思，铁罐子看上去高级多了。歌蒂你能在面包皮上面裱花吗？ ——道恩 2、这是在铁罐边上加了一层面包皮吗？这道菜唯一的缺点被逆转成优点了，被余热加温到酥脆的面包皮，配合软嫩的洞螈肉，再沾点铁罐里的肉汁，我敢说仅凭这一手，铁罐焖螈肉就应该是饭店的「镇店之宝」。 ——桑德斯 【主厨回复】 道恩，你别再问我了，不能！你就算问一万遍我也不可能在面包皮上裱花！ 桑德斯，谢谢你的建议，你要不说我都没发现到铁皮的过热问题。铁罐焖螈肉明天就开始对外供应了，你来吃的话算我的，别客气！ 本周新品：蜜饯菇托辣椒 【食客评价】 1、 开胃，但不管饱，还不够我塞牙缝的，害我回家之后馋得干吃了六片黑面包。 ——道恩 2、 居然是冷菜啊，挺稀奇的。烤好的蜜饯菇上搭配着切好的铁锤辣椒碎…层次感分明，甜味儿刚刚过去，辣椒的劲头就上来了，作为餐前冷菜，看起来分量挺少，但一不留神就会全部吃光。 ——桑德斯 3、 有不辣版吗？好吃是好吃，但我吃不了太辣的菜呜呜。 ——伊蕾恩 【主厨回复】 不辣的？我目前还没找到铁锤辣椒的替代品，估计短时间内是没办法做到的，抱歉啦。后天开始对外供应的也只有辣味版。至于道恩，你牙缝这么大的话是不是该去看看牙齿了？ 本周新品：鼠肉冻 【食客评价】 1、 居然是肉冻，童年的味道，但你能不能别在菜名上告诉我这是「鼠肉」，我心理比较脆弱，怕童年的味道变成童年阴影。 ——道恩 2、 肉冻应该算是不是磐岩镇本地人不会知道的特色菜了。疯地鼠的肉一点也不腥，和蒜末一起切碎，这种满嘴是肉的扎实感真爽啊。用来蘸着吃的酸奶油口感绵软，但又不会太腻，吃起来远比传统的鱼肉冻美味。 ——桑德斯 3、 不愧是歌蒂师傅呀，吃下去就像是回到那个家家户户都会自制肉冻的小时候了。 ——伊蕾恩 【主厨回复】 那把名字改成「风味肉冻」好了，下周开始正式对外供应。 本周新品：烤蘑菇 【食客评价】 1、 为了追求食材的新鲜度，歌蒂你在这条路上走得太超前了。市面上能买来吃的蘑菇永远都是那几种不是没有道理的，你烤的这几种蘑菇都是不能食用的品种。 ——桑德斯 2、 我还没见过这么「多彩」的蘑菇，这真的能吃吗？ ——安东尼娜 3、 分量挺足的，口感还行，就是吃了会拉肚子，比较考验顾客的消化能力。 ——道恩 【主厨回复】 不会吧？真的很抱歉，希望大家都没事… 本周新品：炸岩居蟹 【食客评价】 1、 岩居蟹本身肉质极其鲜美，但并不适合于油炸的烹饪手法，这样炸过之后蟹壳很难咬得动。我是用石头直接砸开才吃到蟹钳里的肉的。 ——桑德斯 2、 歌蒂，你是不是没能清理干净岩居蟹身上的碎石，油炸之后碎石和蟹壳裹在一起，根本看不见，石子差点把我牙给崩了。 ——安东尼娜 【主厨回复】 卖螃蟹的跟我说不要冲洗得太干净，不然在做菜的时候会丢失一部分鲜味。是我没把握好这个尺度，还是跟大家说声迟来的抱歉。
E: *Due to being hung over the counter and continually exposed to cooking fumes, the edges of the paper have been stained with oil sprays.* I'm planning to develop some new dishes. If you have any ideas, let me know. — Gertie New Item of the Week: Wild Herb Soup Customer Comments: 1. It looks kind of bad. It's all goopy and stuff, so it turned me off a bit. — Don 2. It's called "Wild Herb" soup, but it's actually moss from the cave. The texture is refreshingly nice! The moss is cooked to the point of melting-in-your-mouth, and it took on the broth's sweet-and-sour taste. It's hearty but not heavy, such a wonderful palate cleanser. I do agree with the comment above though. Maybe change the name, or other customers may complain. — Saunders Chef's Response: Understood. I'm okay as long as its taste is good. I'll think of a new name, but because the moss supply is not stable, I'm not even sure I want to put it on the menu. New Item of the Week: Iron Pot Braised Olm Customer Comments: 1. Did you get the iron pot from some decommissioned machines? It's cleaned, but some parts of the edge are a little rusty. It kills my appetite a little. — Don 2. I can't blame Don for being fussy. The gravy was nicely done, but I got burned a few times by the metal while trying to eat it. Gertie, is there a reason you insisted on using the iron pot? Please consider switching to a different container. — Saunders Chef's Response: I apologize. I recently read in an old cookbook that "iron pots are perfect for simmered soups and stewed dishes because they can maximize the deliciousness of the food itself." Let me think on how to improve on it, I'm so sorry that it burned you. New Item of the Week: Improved Iron Pot Braised Olm Customer Comments: 1. The addition of crust is interesting, makes the tin can look much classier. Gertie, will you decorate the crust? — Don 2. Is that crust added on top of the iron pot? The only weak spot of the dish has now become its feature! The crust is warmed by the residual heat until it is crispy, coupled with the tender Olm meat, dipped into the gravy in the pot. I daresay this can be the restaurant's pièce de résistance just from this little tweak! — Saunders Chef's Comment: Don, stop asking, I said no! Even if you ask me ten thousand times, I will not decorate the crust! Saunders, thank you for your constructive criticism. If it wasn't for you, I might not have realized the overheating issue with the pot. This dish will start being on the menu tomorrow onward. If you're coming over to eat, it's on the house, no worries! New Item of the Week: Candied Mushrooms with Pepper Customer Comments: 1. Appetizing but not filling enough. It's not even large enough to get stuck in my tooth gap. I had to go home and have about six pieces of rye bread. — Don 2. It's a cold dish, this is unusual. The roasted candied mushroom paired with the hammer pepper flakes makes the sensations come in layers. The spice kicks in just as the sweetness fades. As an appetizer, its portion looked a little small, I finished it before I noticed. — Saunders Is there a non-spicy version? It tastes great, but I don't do well with spicy food *sobs* . — Elaine Chef's Response: A non-spicy version? I have yet to find a replacement for hammer peppers, so I'm sorry but I probably won't be able to make it on short notice. Only the spicy version will be on the menu two days from now. As for Don, if your tooth gap is so wide, I advise you to have your teeth looked at. New Item of the Week: Rat Jelly Customer Comments: 1. Meat jelly, my childhood favorite! But is it possible to not say "rat" in the name of the dish itself? I'm a little squeamish, I worry my childhood favorite will become my childhood trauma. — Don 2. Jelly can be considered a featured dish only locals would know of. The Mad Mole meat doesn't taste gamey at all. Mixed in with minced garlic, there's something indescribably satisfying in having my mouth stuffed full of meat. The yogurt dip is soft and airy, and at the same time not too creamy, making it taste way better than the traditional fish jelly. — Saunders 3. As expected of Chef Gertie! This reminds me of the era when each and every family made their own meat jelly. — Elaine Chef's Response: I'll change the name to Flavorful Jelly then. Putting on the menu next week onward. New Item of the Week: Grilled Mushrooms Customer Comments: 1. Gertie, you have been toeing the line in your pursuit for ingredient freshness. There's a reason why the mushrooms on the market have always been those few species. The ones you're using are all inedible. — Saunders 2. I have never seen mushrooms this colorful, can they really be eaten? — Antonia 3. The portion is quite filling and the taste is okay, but it will cause diarrhea after eating, it's quite a challenge for the customer's digestive system. — Don Chef's Response: Really? I apologize, I hope everyone's doing okay... New Item of the Week: Deep-Fried Rock Crab Customer Comments: 1. Rock Crabs themselves are extremely tasty, but are not suitable for deep-frying, which makes it difficult to bite into the shell. I had to smash it with a rock to get the meat inside the pincers. — Saunders 2. Gertie, are you not able to clean out the gravel on the crab? The tiny rocks coated the shell and are pretty much indistinguishable from the shell after deep-frying, it almost cracked my teeth while eating. — Antonia Chef's Response: The seller told me not to wash it too well, or some of the freshness would be lost when cooking it. I have yet to master the balance of this, so I do give my apologies, however late it may be.

C: 作者：艾米 【前言】 感谢歌德宾馆的老歌德提供的故事原型，还有你热腾腾的茶，伴我度过了灵感枯竭的夜。 谨以此书献给老歌德、托尼和凯瑞。 「我点燃了宾馆里所有的壁炉，第二天，整座城市都起了雾。」 【一】 歌德走的那天是夏夜，繁星如水，天上却飘着雪。有人告诉莱斯丽，他可能还有未了的心愿。她知道是什么，但她做不到。 莱斯丽记得她第一次见到歌德，是在歌德宾馆。衣着得体的绅士眼带笑意看着自己，她在他焦糖色的眼眸中清晰地看见了自己的倒影。但自己在逃亡的路上风尘仆仆的，实在是见不得人。莱斯丽慌乱地移开视线，但柜台前那位五官深邃的绅士却并不嫌弃，反而为她倒上了一杯热茶。 「这位美丽的女士，有什么可以帮到你？」那是歌德对莱斯丽说的第一句话。 【二】 歌德宾馆果然和传言中的一样，是这个纷乱世界中的庇护所。在从矿场一路逃过来的路上，瘸了一条腿的好心老爷爷告诉莱斯丽，「歌德宾馆是道上唯一的庇护所，因为这里的规矩是与其他地方格外不一样的。」 事实也的确如此，宾馆附近的所有人都知道，歌德老板虽然看起来为人和气，但他年轻的时候却曾名震一时。在宾馆里不问出身高低贵贱，任谁都要给老板几分薄面，绝不能在宾馆里惹事。这条规则虽然没有被写出来挂在宾馆墙壁上，但是十几年来它已经成为这座边陲小镇里无人不从的铁律了。 「歌德先生，是个仗义人。」懂行的人对宾馆的主人赞不绝口。看上去总是很和气的歌德先生经营着这座豪华宾馆，谁也不知道他的资金是从何而来。但大家都知道，他对真正有需要的住客收费其实极其低廉，多年来，他就这样默默庇护着那些无路可逃的可怜人。 ——比如莱斯丽。 【三】 莱斯丽本来在某个以矿业闻名的地方工作，那附近到处都是矿场，谁也不知道到底还有多少条矿脉没被人发现。那里总是流传着某某人发现矿脉然后一夜暴富的传言，莱斯丽曾听自己打工时的工友说过，这家矿场的老板当年就是这么一位幸运儿。依靠大大小小的矿场的支撑，城市里有不少工作机会，莱斯丽在这里打了几年工，倒也攒了一小笔钱。她托人将这笔积蓄带给家里，但在连日等待后，迎接她的却是母亲病逝的噩耗。 莱斯丽想不明白，母亲为什么会突然病倒。但莱斯丽更想不明白的是，为什么自己只是想回一趟家，路上却总是被面相凶狠的人一路追打。很奇怪，自幼生长的家，庇护着她的家，给她带来无数温暖的家，倏忽之间却成了某种禁地，莱斯丽想去母亲的坟前献上她最爱的花束，而现在，却连回家都做不到。 除了风雪，没有人迎接她回家。 *后续书页似乎是被人用力撕扯而去，仅存的纸页上留着某个人愤怒的书评： 「没有天赋就不要学人家写东西！」 「净写点酸不拉几的东西，不会真有人看吧？」
E: Author: Amy Foreword Thank you, Old Goethe from the Goethe Hotel, for providing the origin of this story. Your steaming hot tea had accompanied me through nights when inspiration ran dry. For Old Goethe, Tony, and Kerry. "I lit up all the fireplaces in the hotel. On the next day, the entire city was covered in fog." One Goethe left on a summer night. The stars glittered like water, but snow fell from the sky. He had told Lesley that he might still have unfulfilled wishes. She knew what it was, but she couldn't manage it. Lesley remembered that the first time she saw Goethe was at the Goethe Hotel. The well-dressed gentleman looked at her with a smile, and she saw her own reflection clearly in the caramel depths of his eyes. However, she was disheveled from her escape and was not presentable. Lesley hurriedly shifted her eyes away but the gentleman with the chiseled features did not despise her, instead offering her a cup of hot tea. "Beautiful lady, how can I be of assistance?" That was the first sentence Goethe said to Lesley. Two Goethe Hotel was indeed as the rumors said, a shelter in this world full of strife. A kind older man with a bad leg had told Lesley as she escaped here from the mines: "Goethe Hotel is the only shelter in the entire road, because the rules here are a lot more different from everywhere else." And that was indeed true. Everyone in the hotel knows that while Mr Goethe appears kind, he was very famous when he was young. No matter who you are, everyone has to respect the boss and do not cause a fight in the hotel. Even though this was not a rule written out and displayed on the hotel walls, it was a hard rule obeyed by all in this border town for the past decade or so. "Mr Goethe is an honorable man." People in the know found it hard to stop praising the owner of the hotel. Mr Goethe, the manager of this luxury hotel, always seemed very kind. Nobody knew where his funds came from, but everyone knew he actually charged very little with guests who are in need. For years, he had silently sheltered the poor with nowhere to go. People like Lesley. Three Lesley was originally working at a place famous for its mining industry. There were mines everywhere, and nobody knew just how many veins were still undiscovered. There were always rumors about someone discovering a vein and becoming rich overnight. Lesley had heard her work colleagues say that the owner of their mine was one such lucky soul. Thanks to the support of the various mines, the city also offered plenty of job opportunities. Lesley worked there for a few years and managed to save up some money. She sent the money home, only to receive the terrible news of her mother's death from illness a few days later. Lesley couldn't understand how her mother could suddenly become so ill. She was even more confused with how she was hunted down by a tough-looking thug when she was heading home. It was so strange. The home she grew up in, the home that sheltered her, the home that gave her so many memories — it was suddenly a forbidden place. Lesley had wanted to offer a bouquet of flowers loved by her mother at her grave, but now she couldn't even get home. The only thing that welcomed her home was the blizzard. *The following pages seem to have been forcibly torn off. The remaining paper scraps contained some angry comments: "Don't try to copy others' writing if you haven't got the talent!" "You're writing all sorts of pitiful stuff. You think anyone's gonna read it?"

C:
<align="center">《白衣之后》三十年纪念版开演，盘点三大不容错过的名场面</align>
<align="right">作者：奥尔森，《贝洛伯格周刊》记者</align>

近日，黄金歌剧院以前所未有的豪华阵容，掀开了三十周年纪念版《白衣之后》震撼公演的序幕。据悉，排队买票的市民们多到数次堵塞了行政区的几条交通要道，最后更引来银鬃铁卫亲自维持秩序。

这部享誉贝洛伯格的悬疑音乐剧《白衣之后》系黄金歌剧院历史上开演时间最长的作品，三十年来留下了太多经典的名场面。在等待三十周年特别纪念版演出之前，就让我们来回顾一下历史上《白衣之后》三大不容错过的名场面：

1、从五号包厢飘落的神秘白纱与冰晶花瓣
在「白衣夫人」初次出场时，五号包厢的看台上会有看上去极为神秘的精美白纱飘落至座位上方，与白纱共同飘落的还有手工制成的冰晶花瓣。在过去较为常见的版本中，白纱通常以每秒两米半的速度下降。手工制作的冰晶花瓣经过特殊染色，在灯光下会折射出动人的光芒。值得一提的是，比起剧院中官方发售的《白衣之后》周边产品，冰晶花瓣才是最受观众欢迎的纪念品——而《白衣之后》剧组也并未禁止观众们将飘落的花瓣带走的行为。三十年来，这已然成为了《白衣之后》观众与剧组之间的某种默契。以至于本次三十周年特别纪念版的《白衣之后》剧组宣布，他们在每场都准备了多达六千片的冰晶花瓣。

2、大卫伯爵的求婚现场：无处不在的「白衣夫人」
在剧情推进到大卫伯爵向拉瑞娜当众求婚一幕时，最为吸引人的却并不是男女主角看似浪漫的爱情故事，而是「白衣夫人」变幻莫测的再度出现。在最初版演出中，「白衣夫人」是从人群中突然出现。但随着黄金歌剧院技术能力的飞跃提升，「白衣夫人」的再次登场变得更具传奇与神秘色彩。她既会在舞台上无数面镜子的折射中走出，也会随着观众席中央吊灯在发出巨响与烟雾后，在地板之下徐徐升起。歌剧院的技术部门为了营造「白衣夫人」的神秘色彩，设计了至少需要二十个人才能抬得动的舞台装置。这使得近十年来《白衣之后》的观众们大饱眼福，同时，在观众之间也流传着这样的小游戏——你能猜中每次演出时「白衣夫人」是在哪个方位再度登场的吗？

3、众星云集，新老交替的最终合唱
结尾的大合唱在剧情中是剧场中所有演员的谢幕式，而主角拉瑞娜只是一位初入舞台的演员，瑞贝卡则在观众席中与她遥遥相望。在剧情中，主角们在剧院台柱子们的携手合唱中悄然退场。但在过去的三十年里，《白衣之后》影响了一代又一代的音乐剧从业者。在故事结尾中，作为谢幕表演的曲目《无眠之夜》原本只是全体演员的合唱。但如此广泛的受众让《白衣之后》逐渐成为了几代人共同的回忆。以至于结尾的合唱中，出现在舞台中央的「临时演员」们大多是老牌演员，甚至就是前几代的《白衣之后》主演。音乐剧圈中有不少大牌演员更时不时会应邀特约出演结尾片段。对于观众来说，这是值回票价且绝对不容错过的璀璨场面——谁能拒绝在结尾数一下台上到底有多少知名演员的快乐呢？
E: The Thirty-Year Commemorative Performance of Beneath the White Cloak Is About to Start! Here Are the Three Unmissable Moments in the Show Author: Olsen, Journalist of Belobog Weekly With a dazzling cast never before seen, the Golden Theater recently drew up the curtains for the powerful thirty-year commemorative performance for Beneath the White Cloak! Apparently, the number of citizens queuing up for tickets had repeatedly blocked key roads in the Administrative District, ultimately getting the Silvermane Guards to come out to maintain order. The suspense musical Beneath the White Cloak, famous throughout Belobog, is the longest running show in the history of the Golden Theater. As we anticipate the thirty-year commemorative performance, we review the three unmissable famous scenes in the history of this show. 1. The mysterious white silk and crystal petals that fall from box number five When the Lady in White first appears, a very mysterious and delicate white silk will fall from on top of box number five. Hand-made crystal petals will also fall with the silk. In previous and popular versions of the show, the silk usually falls at a speed of 2.5 meters per second. The hand-made flower petals are specifically dyed to reflect marvelous colors under the light. Importantly, out of all the official merchandise sold in the theater for Beneath the White Cloak, the crystal petals are the most popular — The cast also do not prohibit the audience from taking the petals with them. For over thirty years, this had been the unspoken agreement between the audience and the production cast. In fact, the thirty-year commemorative production had declared they had more than six thousand crystal petals prepared for every performance. 2. Count David's Proposal: The Omnipresent Lady in White When Count David publicly proposes to Lareina, the most fascinating part is not the seemingly romantic love story between the lead characters, but the unpredictable re-appearance of the Lady in White. In the initial version of the performance, the Lady in White suddenly appeared in the audience. As the Golden Theater became more technically advanced, the Lady in White's re-appearance became more mysterious and epic. She could walk out from the reflections of countless mirrors on the stage, and could also rise slowly from beneath the floor boards under the candelabra in the middle of the audience after a loud bang and copious amounts of fog. The technical department of the Theater designed a set that can only be moved with twenty people in order to create the mystery of the Lady in White. This had satisfied the audience for the past decade, and also gave rise to a minigame popular amongst theater-goers — can YOU guess where the Lady in White is going to appear during a particular performance? 3. An all-star finale sang by established and upcoming actors The final chorus is the closing act for all actors in the theater within the show. The protagonist Lareina is only an upcoming character, while Rebecca stands in the audience and they gaze at each other. In the story, the protagonist silently leaves the stage as the leading actors sing together. However, Beneath the White Cloak had influenced generations of musical talent in the past thirty years. At the end of the story, the final song "Sleepless Night" was just meant to be a collective performance, but the wide appeal of the show gradually became the collective memory of generations. Nowadays, the "temporary actors" appearing on stage at the final song are usually very established actors, or even past leads in older renditions of Beneath the White Cloak. Various famous actors in the musical scene would also make sudden appearances in this ending show. For the audience, this is an absolutely must-see moment, a sparkling scene that will get you your money's worth — who can say no to the joy of trying to count how many famous actors are on the stage at the end?
