E: The golden dream is getting restless. In the coming long night, I'm afraid you will face many tribulations and witness many tragedies. And finally... your sight will only see black and white.

C: 公司影响力遍及寰宇，说话的分量自然也重，我们希望能借您的身份——为{M#他}{F#她}做个担保。
E: The IPC's influence runs deep and wide, and their word wields the utmost authority. We hope to borrow your status to vouch for {M#him}{F#her}.

C: 这，可是……
E: Um, but...

C: 你是怎么知道的？
E: How did you know?

C: 我现在知道了。
E: I know now.

C: 但星穹列车收到的信息里，写明了已为我们预订了房间，麻烦您再检查一遍吧。
E: But in the information I received from the Astral Express, it states that we already reserved rooms. Please check again for me.

C: 有骨气，我喜欢！你这个朋友我交定了——拿着，<unbreak>20000</unbreak>信用点！
E: Such integrity, I like it! I must have you as a friend — here, <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> credits!

C: 星穹列车的各位贵客，入住手续已经办理完成了。先前带来的诸多不便，万分抱歉。
E: Esteemed guests of the Astral Express, your check-in procedure is complete. Please forgive us for any previous inconvenience caused.

C: 那我先走一步，{NICKNAME}！祝你们过得愉快。
E: I'll make my exit now, {NICKNAME}! Have a pleasant stay.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>…对了，是「梦」。来这儿的途中我做了个梦，那梦里似乎有你的身影…好像有什么念头在我脑海中一闪而过……</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>...Yes, it was a dream. I had a dream on my way here, and I think you were in it... A blink of a thought in my head...</color>

C: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
E: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

C: 猎犬家系是什么？
E: Who are the Bloodhound Family?

C: 因为你身上别着星穹列车的徽章呀，我在大银幕上见过！
E: You have the Astral Express badge on you. I saw it on the big screen once!

C: 谢谢，你真好！
E: Thanks. That's very nice of you!

C: …请问，你是一个人来匹诺康尼的吗？
E: ...Did you travel here alone?

C: 来吧，{NICKNAME}，向她证明你能行！
E: Come on, {NICKNAME}! Show her what you're made of!

C: 哦，天哪！该死的哈努兄弟，你让我的一切布置都变得没有意义！
E: Oh, drat! All my traps are worthless against the likes of you!

C: 这怪梦还有隐喻？
E: Is this weird dream trying to hint at some hidden meaning?

C: 一阵天旋地转，你发觉自己回到了石头老板的迷宫入口……
E: After going all around, you find yourself at the entrance to Boss Stone's maze...

C: 你是个什么…东西？
E: What kind of thing... are you?

C: 想要进一步提示吗？比如，我是个{RUBY_B#蜂蜜}埃维金{RUBY_E#}人？
E: Need another hint? I'm an {RUBY_B#Honey}Avgin{RUBY_E#}.

C: 哦，抱歉，还没有进行自我介绍呢！
E: Oops, I haven't introduced myself!

C: 来吧，现在去找那个生气的帮派老大——施展<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>，把好情绪全都灌进去，砰，大功告成！
E: All we have to do is use <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color> on that cranky gangster boss and inject good emotions into him — then we'll have won!

C: 应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会突然冷静下来呢？
E: It... must have been? Otherwise, why would he suddenly be all calm and composed like this?

C: <size=36>给您添麻烦了！非常抱歉！</size>
E: <size=36>We're truly sorry for the trouble we caused!</size>

C: …我知道，没关系。
E: ...I understand, and I'm okay with that.

C: 我只需要这疯狂的感觉，与扑通乱跳的心…但愿它一直都在！
E: This crazy mood and this pounding heart are just what I need... I wish it would last forever!

C: 但我的尊严已经所剩无几——行行好，求您别把我这仅存的一点也踩碎了。
E: But there's little dignity left in me. Please be nice and don't trample on it.

C: …就像无数追逐火焰的飞萤。
E: ...Like countless fireflies chasing the fire.

C: （桑博？是那家伙在搞鬼吗？）
E: (Sampo? Is that guy up to no good again?)

C: 我太喜欢你的性格了，亲爱的。我承认，你和那小灰毛不一样，鼻子还算灵敏。
E: I love your attitude, my dear. I have to admit you're different from your friend here — your senses are much sharper.

C: 我不想死
E: I don't want to die

C: （人会在梦里看到任何东西都是很正常的啦。）
E: (That's the thing about dreams — anything can feel familiar.)

C: 我才是唯一配得上它的人！
E: I am the only one worthy of it!

C: 如果你想要，就和我一起处理吧。我已经数完了这座城市中的绝大多数垃圾，只剩下新来的这三桶了。
E: If you want it, work with me. I have counted the majority of the trash in this city, leaving only these three newly arrived cans.

C: 家族正在隐瞒什么，不是吗？我们也掌握了一手情报。现在，我决定宽宏大量地把它与各位分享。只是，可惜——美好的假期要结束啦。
E: The Family is obviously hiding something, right? Well we've nabbed some valuable information, and out of the goodness of my heart I've decided to share it with all of you. Although, it unfortunately means your idyllic break in paradise is nearing its end.

C: 原来你是姬子的朋友。
E: So you're Himeko's friend.

C: 我从不做赔本买卖的，希望各位「朋友」…别让我失望。
E: I don't do deals where I'm on the losing end. So, my "friends"... don't let me down.

C: 来吧——这边请！
E: Please, this way if you will!

C:
主演
 ？？？  饰  萨姆
？？？ 饰  米沙
 ？？？ 饰  加拉赫
  花火  饰  花火
E:
Starring
???  as  SAM
???  as  MISHA
???  as  GALLAGHER
Sparkle  as  SPARKLE

C: 你会见证这世上最为璀璨和暴烈的火。愿这燃烧照亮你深不见底的梦。
E: You shall witness the most brilliant and intense fire in existence. May this flame illuminate the farthest reaches of your bottomless dream.

C: 这把刀仍在鞘中，并非出于怜悯或轻视。它是我不愿示人的秘辛，但作为回敬……
E: This blade remains in its scabbard not out of pity or scorn. It's a personal secret that I don't want to disclose, but perhaps out of reciprocity...

C: 如果你的目标是「钟表匠的遗产」，就去调查家族。他们不仅掩盖了「死亡」的存在，还埋藏了梦境的过去与真相。
E: If your goal is the Watchmaker's Legacy, then go look into The Family. Not only are they covering up the existence of "Death," but they're burying the past and the truth about what happens inside the Dreamscape.

C: 有原则的猎犬家系成员陷入了无尽的悲伤。作为补偿，你得想办法<color=#dbc291ff>安慰</color>一下他。
E: The principled Bloodhound Family member is mired in endless sorrow. As compensation, you have to think of a way to <color=#dbc291ff>comfort</color> him.

C: 道理我都明白，可这里坏女人坏男人太多，真的好担心被背刺啊。{NICKNAME}都遭人欺负几回了，我实在看不下去……
E: I get why, but there's a whole lot of bad guys and girls around here and I'm worried about getting stabbed in the back. {NICKNAME} has been bullied a few times now, and I can't stand it anymore...

C: 目前的线索里，{NICKNAME}目击到的两起命案最为直接，我建议从这里入手。
E: Among our current clues, the two murders that {NICKNAME} witnessed are the most directly connected. I suggest starting here.

C: 那这样如何？我们兵分两路，梦境中也有些令人在意的事，我想先去调查，稍后再与你们会合。
E: How about we split off into two groups? There are still some things worth focusing on inside the Dreamscape — I'll investigate those and we can link up again later.

C: 「我的名字是康士坦丝…很高兴认识你。我们本该在匹诺康尼相遇，共度一段…*刻骨铭心*的时光。」
E: "My name is Constance... A pleasure to meet you. We were supposed to meet in Penacony and spend an... unforgettable time together."

C: 你是{RUBY_B#卡卡瓦夏}受母神赐福的孩子{RUBY_E#}，你能带领氏族走向幸福。所以，永远记得保护好自己，也永远不要怨恨痛苦和贫穷…好吗？
E: You're a child blessed by {RUBY_B#Kakavasha}Gaiathra Triclops{RUBY_E#} and can lead the clan to happiness. So, always remember to protect yourself and never resent the pain and poverty you're going through... All right?

C: 唉…这里的白痴指数比外头也好不了多少。
E: *sigh*... It seems like the idiocy index here is no better than it is out there.

C: 没走错，但这扇门上锁了。
E: No, but this door is locked.

C: 别让我拒绝第二遍。
E: Please don't let me turn you down twice.

C: 六十的一半，三十个子儿…只要我能活着回来，你就得给我。你敢赌么？
E: Thirty Tanba... If I come back alive, you'll give me thirty Tanba. Deal?

C: 要我探案，又不给半点线索…真有你的，脑袋长翅膀的混蛋。
E: Asking me to solve a case without giving a single clue... How typical of you, you wing-headed scoundrel.

C: 您真是…心地善良。那我就收下了。感谢您，初次见面的先生。如果有机会，也欢迎您来听我唱歌。
E: That's... incredibly kind of you. Thank you so much, sir. If you ever get the chance, please feel free to come by and indulge in my singing.

C: 「苏乐达的恶魔」…能跟我展开讲讲吗？
E: The Devil of SoulGlad... Care to elaborate?

C: 你那位台长是怎么说服你的？
E: How did your boss talk you out of it?

C: 几位老朋友找上门。现在有空吗，舒翁？
E: Some friends from the old days. Do you have a moment to spare, Siobhan?

C: 你感到一股莫名的苦涩和甘甜交织，弥散在空气中。下一秒，那情绪化作液体注满了你的高脚杯。
E: You feel an inexplicable mix of bitterness and sweetness that permeates the air. The next moment, that emotion turns into liquid filling your goblet.

C: 用这杯「梦中之梦」向你致意，清醒之人——
E: Here's to you, sober one, with this glass of "a Dream Within a Dream"...

C: 我不是他的同伴，是他众多「孩子」的一员。
E: No, I'm not his "companion," but rather one of his many "children."

C: 尽管没有人的气息…但他们布置了不少迷因在这巡逻啊。
E: While there aren't any people in this mansion... they've set up quite a few memetic guards to patrol this place.

C: 别没话找话。
E: You can zip it if there's nothing to talk about.

C: 可惜没能再多认识你一些。我们该告别了，你玩得还开心吗？
E: It's sad that I can't get to know you more. We have to say goodbye. Did you have fun?

C: 对，女士，第三桩命案马上就要发生了。就在这里，克劳克影视乐园……
E: That's right, madam — the third one is about to happen right now, right here in Clock Studios Theme Park...

C: 我当然能做到，不过是又一场赌博而已。
E: Of course I can. It's just another gamble.

C: 因为只有这样，你才能触及那个比连环凶案更不可告人的秘密……
E: Because this is the only way you can uncover a secret that is even more unspeakable than the serial murders...

C: 所以在那一刻到来前…我应当做好「准备」。
E: So until the time comes... I should be preparing.

C: 这又是谁的视角？
E: And whose POV is this?

C: 好长的隧道啊。出发的时候，没觉得它有这么长。
E: Such a long tunnel. Didn't feel this long when I set off.

C: 呵呵，不是熟人，只是有过一面之缘。看，就在那边……
E: Hehe, not exactly — I've only met him once. Look, over there...

C: 确实，而且此人恐怕与加拉赫关系匪浅，否则会谈也不必避人耳目了。无论如何，我们都得找到加拉赫。
E: Yes, and I believe their relationship with Gallagher may run deep — why else would they be so clandestine about their discussion? Regardless, we have to find Gallagher.

C: 我感觉到了，源头就在…「黄金的时刻」！那里有某种异常的存在在搅动忆域的海流。我必须给出更加直观的证明…我一定能说服大家……
E: I felt it, the source is in... the Golden Hour! There is a certain anomalous presence stirring the currents of the Memory Zone. I must uncover more concrete proof... I must convince everyone...

C: 沿着这条巷道走，能看见一座升降梯。它会带我们去流放之地的中心。
E: Keep going straight down this alley and it'll lead to an elevator. It'll take us to the center of the land of the exiles.

C: 放过我吧……
E: Let me go...

C: 我想回去…
E: I wanna go back...

C: 来一起寻宝吧！
E: Let's go treasure hunting!

C: 拉扎莉娜是在独立战争中牺牲的。她为了弄清楚忆质的流向，独自驾驶穿梭机深入星系中心，再也没有回来……
E: Razalina was killed during the War of Independence. She ventured alone into the heart of the star system to investigate the flow of memoria, but she never returned...

C: 铁尔南则是一位善用枪械的牛仔，强大可靠，他带领人们挺过了惨烈的对外战争，却没能坚持到和平真正来临的那天。
E: Tiernan was a skilled gunslinger, strong and reliable. He led the people through countless battles, but he didn't live long enough to witness the arrival of true peace.

C: 你都快把幕后黑手四个字写在脸上啦……
E: The look on your face is practically screaming "I'm the one behind all this..."

C: 这颗星核本是战争年代落在阿斯德纳的，当时在无名客的呼吁下，人们打消了沾染这种力量的念头。但一直有别有用心之人在暗中蠢蠢欲动。
E: The Stellaron first entered the Asdana system during the war. The Nameless warned everyone against the folly of attempting to tamper with such a power, and most heeded their words. But, there are always people in the shadows with ulterior motives.

C: 你是否已用心省察，将所有罪过告说明白？
E: Have you examined your soul and confessed all your sins?

C: 只有在这片美梦里，我才能做自己的主人，真正地掌控自己的生活…尝过这种甜头，哪里还会想回去呢？
E: Only in this sweet dream can I truly feel like I'm in control of my life and fate... Who would want to go back to reality after experiencing this bliss?

C: 嗯，眼见为实，我陪你一起。梦主还未大驾光临，我们还有时间到处转转。
E: Yes, seeing is believing. I'll accompany you. The Dreammaster hasn't shown up yet, so we have some time for a stroll.

C: 哥哥！好巧，我们又见面了。
E: Brother! What a surprise to see you again.

C: 谐乐大典？哼哼，吓唬谁呢，以为我不知道各位在打什么主意吗？
E: The Charmony Festival? Heh, you think you can scare me? You think I've no idea what you're planning?

C: 只有这样，我才能找到真正的巡海游侠。也唯有如此，我才能兑现一个久远的承诺……
E: Only by doing this can I find a true Galaxy Ranger and fulfill a long-standing promise...

C: 它们从「虚无」中诞生，向着「虚无」而去，度过毫无意义的一生。但就是这么一群空虚的幻影……
E: They emerge from the Nihility and head toward it, leading purposeless lives. However, these hollow phantoms...

C: 等待着你们的是三道关卡，每一道都与那个时代有关。前两道关卡各有两条路线供各位选择，每条路上都有独一无二的挑战！
E: Waiting for you are three stages, each connected to that era. The first two stages offer two distinct paths to choose from, with unique challenges on each route!

C: 哎呀，时间紧急，乖乖听大人话好不好啦！
E: Gah, time's ticking! Just listen to the grown-ups!

C: 不如让我渴死算了！
E: Just let me die of thirst instead!

C: 「武器和筑梦拼图有什么关系？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "What is the relationship between the weapon and the Dream Jigsaw?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 哼…哼！
E: Hmph... Hmph!

C: 他如同领航员一样，带领它们走向正确的方向！而作为陪伴许多人长大的经典形象，钟表小子的确影响了一代人，也铸就了「钟表匠」的重要地位！
E: Like a skilled navigator, he steered them towards the right path! As a classic figure who grew up with many, Clockie truly shaped a generation, solidifying the Watchmaker's pivotal role in popular culture!

C: 各位的努力确实配得上更多奖励，我也如是做了准备。只是这奖励并非物质…而是一次彼此开诚布公的机会。
E: *laughs* Your endeavors are worthy of extra recognition, and I've taken steps to ensure that. However, this reward is not a material one... but rather the opportunity for an open and honest communication between us.

C: 我们当即决定为它搭建一座鸟巢。可思来想去，那年的冬天很冷，庭院夜间的风很大，还有许多毒虫和野兽出没……
E: We decided to build a nest for it right there and then. However, thinking back, that winter was unusually cold, with fierce winds at night in the yard, not to mention the many poisonous bugs and wild beasts in the vicinity...

C: 看到你做出相同的决定，我深表荣幸。出于尊重，就告诉你我当年的决定招来了怎样的恶果吧。
E: I'm honored to witness you arriving at the same decision. Out of respect, I'll share with you the dire consequences that my choice back then brought about.

C: 他告诉我，自己是为了篡夺苜蓿草家主的地位，意图谋反才沦落至此。当我问及他的两个孩子，他却反问我：「什么孩子？」
E: He told me the reason he was in this predicament was because he conspired to usurp the head of the Alfalfa Family. When I asked him about his two children, he instead responded with a question: "What children?"

C: 对于这一抉择，我再次深表遗憾。接下来就是第三次，也是最后一次抉择了——
E: As to your choice, I once again offer my heartfelt apologies. Next comes the third and final decision—

C: 信中无非是日常的寒暄，捎带她游历诸界的种种见闻。正当我心生疑惑，这封信与会谈有什么关系时，梦主开口了。
E: The letter contained the usual pleasantries, anecdotes from her travels — nothing out of the ordinary. Just as I started wondering how this letter related to our discussion, the Dreammaster began to speak.

C: 我在这里学习修理发条和齿轮，我喜欢精密的机械，我是「罗盘号」的船长，和我的伙伴，钟表小子和镜子小姐一起，在梦中寻找新大陆。
E: Here, I learned how to repair clockwork and gears out of my fondness of precision mechanics. In my dreams, I was the captain of the "Compass," embarking on adventures with my companions, Clockie and Miss Mirror, in search of the New World.

C: 但这对「秩序」而言也是一样的，他们的计划并非一朝一夕，它的背后是「盛会之星」孕育了数百年的庞大意识——
E: However, the same applies to the Order. Their plan didn't materialize overnight, and they have the profound collective consciousness of the Planet of Festivities behind them...

C: 只是比起肉体的囚笼，星期日似乎更侧重于表达人们精神的困境。
E: However, it appears that Sunday aims to convey the spiritual plight of the prisoners more than the physical aspects of imprisonment.

C: 「我希望他们都能恢复理性的镇静，不再受到虚伪的操控。」
E: "I wish they could regain their reason and cast away the shackles of hypocrisy."

C: 「我们不再需要一位君王。我们本是超绝万物的君王。」
E: "We no longer have need for a king, for we have become kings of all things."

C: 不过，这到底只是银河历史中一段无足轻重的小插曲，并不重要，重要的是这条长河今后会奔向何方……
E: Nevertheless, this is but a trivial blip in the annals of galactic history. What truly matters is the course this river shall take in the days to come...

C: 惟有怀抱信念，我们才能为这个世界带来真正的福祉。
E: True goodness can only be achieved through faith.

C: 啊，他也对我们用过那个…「调律」！这岂不是意味着，我们也差点惨遭囚禁……
E: Ah, he used that "tuning" on us, too! Does that mean that we were almost imprisoned as well...?

C: 既然将军邀请，又事关宇宙大事，列车组自然不会拒绝。可要是公司方面对此不甚欢迎……
E: Given the general's invitation and the matter's significance to the universe, the Crew will naturally accept. However, if the IPC has any reservations...

C: 但…罢了，无论如何结果是好的。
E: But... *sigh* Never mind. At the end of the day, this is a positive outcome.

C: 那么，航线会议到此结束。我去校准航线跃迁参数，各位乘客可以先休息一下。
E: Then this navigation meeting is adjourned. I'll go check the warp jump coordinates. Everyone can catch up on some rest in the meantime.

C: 但匹诺康尼的所有人…想让如此规模的人群产生相同的意志，恐怕难如登天。
E: However, to wake up everyone in Penacony and get them to share the same determination... that would be nearly impossible.

C: 但应召而来的人也可能沉沦在美梦中，反成为「秩序」的基石。真正的困难，在乎如何在短时间里召集一大群和各位一样坚定的人。
E: However, those outsiders might also succumb to the dream and become the foundation of the Order instead. The real challenge is — How can we gather a huge number of people as determined as you within a short period of time?

C: 这场盛大的宴会快要结束了。这里便是前往最后舞台的起点…也曾是匹诺康尼所有故事的起点。
E: This grand festival is drawing to its close. This is the starting point for the ultimate stage of our journey... just as it marked the beginning of all the stories in Penacony.

C: 这场雨…持续多久了？
E: How long... has this rain been ongoing?

C: ——还在公司舰队的眼皮子底下干掉了两个公司员工，你知道这意味着什么吗？
E: ...One who managed to take out two IPC members under the noses of our fleet. Do you understand what that means?

C: 知更鸟，是你在歌唱…？
E: Robin, is that you singing...?

C: 哥哥，你听到人们的心声了，这不是他们希望的乐园。
E: Brother, you have heard their cries... This is not the paradise they hoped for.

C: 以此七日誓言，命尔听从号令——
E: With this seven-day vow, I command you to heed my summon.

C: …咳。因为此前在美梦中发生的「震荡」，「晖长石号」不得不停航了一段时间。
E: ...Ahem. Following the previous reverberation in the sweet dream, the Radiant Feldspar had to suspend its voyage temporarily.

C: 令人厌倦的对话…直接挂断就好了，不是吗？
E: Sounds exhausting... Why not just hang up?

C: 不必了，我们开始吧。
E: No need. Let's get started.

C: 继续，我在听。
E: Go ahead, I'm listening.

C: 奥帝•艾弗法先生，久仰大名。很荣幸能作为星穹列车的代表与您会面。
E: I've heard so much about you, Mr. Alfalfa. It's an honor to meet you as representative of the Astral Express.

C: 无名客们踏上旅程，不是为了谋名逐利。但倘若家族和公司都有此意，我们也会尽到董事会成员的职责。
E: While the Nameless didn't embark on their journeys for fame or fortune, if this is the wish of both The Family and the IPC, I will represent the Astral Express and fulfill my duty as a member of the board of directors.

C: 你怎么知道我喜欢猫眼石的首饰？还是紫色色相，就像爸爸年轻时送给妈妈的那一串…我从没和别人谈起过这事，戴尔，你是怎么知道的？
E: How did you know I love jewelry made of cymophane? It has the same purple hue as the necklace my dad gave my mom... I've never told anyone about it. How did you find out, Dell?

C: 星核怎么样了？
E: What happened to the Stellaron?

C: 怎么和公司站一边了，牛仔？
E: Why are you on the IPC's side now, cowboy?

C: 那么，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
E: So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, what do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?

C: 那是一种靠两脚站立的生物…绒毛是黑色的，圆头圆脑，耳朵很长。杂食，情绪不太稳定。最重要的是，它还掌握了人的语言，可以开口交流。
E: Well, it's a two-legged animal... With black fur, a round head, and long ears, it's omnivorous and is prone to mood swings. Most importantly, it has mastered the human language and can communicate.

C: 我都不知道你也来了。
E: I didn't know you were here, too.

C: 别答应，公司的人准没安好心。
E: Don't take the deal. Those IPC people may have ulterior motives.

C: 我三呢？
E: Where's three?

C: 那我们就找到那家伙！
E: Then we'll just have to find that person!

C: 别急，还有很多人正在赶来。
E: Don't panic. There are still many people on their way.

C: 铁尔南，你可以回家了。
E: Tiernan, you can go home now.

C: 历史或许不会留下逝者的名字，但群星会见证他们的足迹。
E: History may not remember the names of the dead, but the stars will attest to their journeys.

C: ——敬不再沉默的历史、热烈而勇敢的奔赴，和通往群星的旅途。
E: ...A toast to history that no longer remains silent, the passionate and courageous pursuit, and a voyage that traverses the stars.

C: 大家，能先去隔壁车厢休息一下吗？别担心，这边有我陪着就好。
E: Everyone, could you all take a break in the next car? Don't worry, I'll stay here with Pom-Pom.

C: 我不会接受你们的施舍。
E: I will not accept your charity.

C: 唉，列车上就属咱俩的教育经历有些扑朔迷离…哦不对，还有帕姆。
E: You and I are the only ones with ambiguous educational qualifications on the Express... Oh wait, there's Pom-Pom too.

C: 那个巡海游侠？
E: That Galaxy Ranger?

C: 小心！这也是邪祟妖术！请阁下咬紧牙关，在下来助你脱险——
E: Be on your guard! This is also part of the fiendlings' sorcery! Hang in there, I'll get you out of this right away.

C: 哼，阴谋败露，原形毕露了啊。它们正在呼唤邪猿•伙伴，阁下，请躲到我身后！
E: Hmph, showing your true colors now that your evil schemes have been exposed? They're calling for their fellow ape fiendlings. Please take cover behind me!

C: 看这阴翳中的城邦！苦难、仇恨、悲伤，都在浸满罪恶的土地中滋长，血泪汇聚的浪将吞没一切希望。
E: Behold the city of shadow! A sinful land of suffering, hatred, and sorrow. Bloody tears soon to devour all hope for the morrow.

C: 毕竟梦里的压力也很大，更何况匹诺康尼上市后放宽了入梦审查，竞争变得更激烈了。家族愿意给我们指条明路，感谢还来不及呢。
E: The pressure is high even in a dream. Not to mention competition has grown fierce ever since Penacony relaxed their entrance reviews after the place went public. Most of us are just grateful The Family is willing to guide us.

C: 芮克先生，《魂断黑星》、《一朵星云的凋谢》，还有赫赫有名的《明亚特之夜》都是他的作品。
E: Mr. Reca. He's known for works such as Soul-Shattered Dark Star, A Fading Nebula, and the famous Nights of Minyatur.

C: 小演员们，我已经和制片方达成了共识，这次考试将更改为一场「试镜会」——
E: Members of the cast, I've reached a consensus with the producers. This exam shall now be an audition.

C: 是的，我已经找到了。
E: Yes, I found it.

C: 便宜点吧。
E: I want a discount.

C: 我怎么敢骗你们这些大佬？预购是为了避免供不应求，不这么做，有的人想买就买不到了。
E: No, no, no! I wouldn't dare cheat you, buddy! Pre-orders are essential to ensure demand is met. If I didn't do this, some buyers would be missing out.

C: 大佬过奖，这都是正常的商业手法，以后课上会教的！
E: You flatter me, buddy. These are normal business practices. You'll learn about them in class.

C: 仔细看过才发现，这届新生的素质还真不一般！请务必要参加我们演艺社的活动——「折纸大学超级闪耀明星计划•写真大挑战」！
E: You know, I just realized how high caliber our new students are this year. Please, you absolutely must take part in the Performing Arts Club's "Paperfold University Superstar Project Photography Challenge"!

C: 三月七
E: March 7th

C: 搞什么，听不懂人话？*他宝贝的*，非要我鸣枪才好使？
E: Forkin' hell, you hard of hearing or something? Do I have to let my gun do the talking?

C: 提供些打听的方法倒是很简单，但您怎么突然……
E: I can offer a few ideas on places you can make inquiries at, but why the sudden...?

C: 拔枪硬闯
E: Draw your gun and force your way in.

C: 阴森恐怖的
E: Creepy or scary stuff.

C: 等等等等，我是没睡醒吗？您…您是知更鸟小姐吗？
E: W—Wait a minute! Am I dreaming? A—Are you Miss Robin?

C: 在掀开一角之前，男人心里有很多种猜测——
E: Before opening it, he has many speculations—

C: 更重要的是，如果流梦礁也只剩下家族的谐乐一种声音…那即便我们渡过这场难关，匹诺康尼最后一处自由之地也名存实亡了。
E: More importantly, if The Family's tunes become the only song left on Dreamflux Reef... We would've survived the crisis, but Penacony's only land of freedom would also cease to exist.

C: 危机存亡的时候，我们办一场他宝贝的派对！
E: Got a crisis? Throw a party, yee-haw!

C: 很好，很好…音律实在是一部好电影的点睛之笔。
E: Beautiful, excellent... Music can really bring a film to life...

C: 即便想到了什么，也需要很长的时间去思考，进行很多尝试来证明……
E: Even when something comes to my mind, I still need a lot of time to deliberate on it and try various ways to prove it...

C: 就像每个老师都有说不完的道理一样，每个学生都会有无穷的愁绪——没关系，等到他们一天到晚都要工作的时候就没时间发愁了。
E: Just like how every teacher has endless principles to share, every student also has endless worries — but don't worry. Once they start working all day long, they won't have time to worry.

C: 但眼前的猎杀是否正让居民复原，似乎还难以给出定论。
E: However, whether the hunt will restore the residents to normalcy remains an uncertain question.

C: 蕉师好！
E: Hi, BananAdvisor!

C: 没办法，看来你的画作只能是它了……
E: There's no choice now. It seems your painting will have to be of the monkey...

C: 但这并不重要，因为你的坚持带来了更宝贵的东西。总有一天，世人们都会知晓桶的故事，理解这幅画作的深意。
E: But that doesn't matter, because your perseverance has brought something far more valuable. One day, everyone will know the story of the cans and understand the deeper meaning of this painting.

C: 「煮熟的三文鱼不会游泳，忍者也不会妖言惑众。」甘饴•忍徒需要的只是一份助力，在下愿担任她的画笔，助她完成修行。
E: "Cooked salmon cannot swim, just as ninjas never deceive." All Ninja Initiate Patissier needed was a little nudge. I willingly became her paintbrush, to aid her in completing her training.

C: 这不是蒙塔娜吗？
E: Hey, isn't that Montana?

C: 原来推销这些玩偶是财富学院的任务，但为什么要让学生做这种事？
E: So, the Fortune Academy's supposed to promote these toys. But why did they rope students into their plan?

C: 什么乱七八糟的，猴子哪能说人话啊！
E: Have you gone bananas!? Monkeys can't speak the human language!

C: 蕉蕉蕉，同学，你刚才的表现可是相当令人失望啊。
E: Bana tsk, your earlier performance was disappointing enough.

C: 各位，准备好了就开始，副导演的摄像机已经迫不及待了。
E: We'll begin once everyone's ready. The assistant director's camera is ready to roll.

C: 龙•邪祟殿下，与在下的缭乱•忍法相比，此等妖术不过是雕虫小技——
E: Nay, dinosaur fiendling. Your feeble sorcery stands no chance against my Dazzling Ninjutsu!

C: 等等，先听听他们在说什么。
E: Hold on. Let's listen in on their conversation first.

C: 对…对！「厉鬼啊，在我们的忍法面前化作飞烬吧！」
E: R-Right! "Evil spirit, be reduced to ashes before our ninjutsu!"

C: …什么屁话。
E: ...What a load of horse manure.

C: 在匆忙转身时，她已经做好了最坏的打算，就算看见一只睡蕉小猴端着枪对自己扣动扳机，她也不会太过惊讶。
E: As she turns in a hurry, she's already prepared for the worst. she wouldn't be too surprised even if she sees a Slumbernana Monkey aiming a gun at her and pulling the trigger.

C: 总之，你该回到现实了。感觉如何，从梦里醒来会让你觉得痛苦吗？
E: It doesn't matter. It's time for you to come back to reality. How does it feel? Does waking up from a dream bring you misery?

C: 既然你修改过我的联觉信标，小可爱，附赠你个秘密。
E: I'll let you in on a secret, lil' fudgehead. For tampering with my Synesthesia Beacon.

C: 准备把这儿砸了吧！
E: Prepare to tear this place apart!

C: 要摆平大学里的闹剧轻而易举，重点从来都是这里，流梦礁。如果不是为了抹杀你这个变数，我不必特意放慢脚步。
E: Handling the commotion at the university is easy, the main concern has always been here, Dreamflux Reef. If it weren't for the need to eliminate you as a variable, I wouldn't have purposely slowed down.

C: 在下已将方才的记忆•忍法注于其中。若虾蟇•忍者所言无误，这便是邪祟们的介错之刃。
E: I have added the memory from earlier into this. If Ninja Gama does not lie, this will become the blade to slay those fiendlings.

C: 长夜漫漫，忍侠的仇恨，应由忍侠封藏。毗乃昆尼已迎来太平盛世，眼下，就让梦土的芸芸众生拥抱阳光吧。
E: This night is long. The hatred of a Ninja Hero should be borne solely by themselves. Since Pinecany has finally ushered in a period of peace and prosperity, then let the mortal beings of this land of dreams embrace the sun once more.

C: 哟，三月•忍者阁下。
E: Yo, Ninja March.

C: 但看看这些小猴吧。你们当真觉得，一本早就过时的漫画能盖过梦境中最火热的风潮么？
E: But look at all these monkeys! Do you really think that dated manga can replace the most fervent trend in the Dreamscape?

C: <s>「AK-A-3」</s>乱破
E: <s>"AK-A-3"</s> Rappa

C: 原始博士和他的猴子们
E: Dr. Primitive and His Monkeys

C: 悲鸣、嘶号……
E: Mournful cries... Miserable wails...

C: 啊，圣女大人！
E: Ah, Lady Maiden!

C: 谢谢你，无名的神！
E: Thank you, nameless god!

C: 感觉过去四十二天了。
E: Bah, it feels like we've already waited for forty-two days.

C: 「随我穿走迷雾与战火，直面斗士心中，至深恐惧之物——」
E: "Follow me into the mist and flames, and come face to face with the greatest fear in the depths of a warrior's heart."

C: 不必担心。他的魂息尚显平稳，只消静养片刻，镇定心神，便能恢复如初。
E: There is no need to worry. His soul is in a stable condition. With ample rest for both body and mind, he'll be up and about in no time.

C: 凡受其影响者无不变得扭曲狰狞，理性丧失，人性泯灭，化为无血无泪的野兽。而这并非凡人独有的厄运，就连泰坦诸神也无法幸免。
E: Those who succumb to it lose their reason and humanity, becoming vicious, mindless monsters. Mortals are not the only ones susceptible to its influence — even gods and Titans cannot escape from it.

C: 啊…啊……
E: Urk... Hngh...

C: 既然事涉奥赫玛邦交事务，我们就先行离开了。
E: Since this involves Okhema's diplomatic affairs, we'll give you some privacy.

C: 前提是…他还活着。
E: Provided that... he is still alive.

C: 那刻夏或许…还是没活下来。
E: Perhaps Anaxa... did not manage to survive.

C: 道理我都懂，那…你是个幽灵？
E: I understand what you're saying, but... are you a specter?

C: 犹如天雷贯地，「毁灭」金光直欲撕裂黎明机器，摧坼穹窿。一时间，翁法罗斯无数洞天里，众人只觉天地翻覆、山河动荡。真可谓帝弓再临射星矢，灵木摧折云埃起……
E: Like a celestial thunderbolt piercing the earth, the "Destruction" radiance threatened to tear apart the Dawn Device, shattering the firmament. In an instant, within the many delves of Amphoreus, everyone felt the world overturn and the mountains and rivers tremble. It was as if the imperial bow had returned to shoot the stars, splintering sacred trees and raising clouds of dust...

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 真是只伶俐的小兔子。如此，吾既能夺回正身，汝等也能将火种和恩师迎回奥赫玛……
E: What a smart little bunny. This way, I'll be able to regain my true form, and you will be able to bring the Coreflame and your teacher back to Okhema...

C: …这是蔺草、飞沙和烈日才有的味道。
E: ...It's the scent of bulrush, sand, and the blazing sun.

C: 小小灰，眼睛尖！
E: Little Gray's eyes are so sharp!

C: 无妨…只要把这副身体置入阵眼……
E: No matter... All I have to do is to place this body at the core of the array...

C: 我检查了一番，他们没有大碍，感觉只是…水温太高，泡得太久。
E: I've examined them, and they don't seem to be seriously ill. It feels like... they've just spent too much time in the hot water.

C: 别把你我的处境混为一谈。我背后还有族人，在解决他们的问题前，我不能独自登神。
E: Don't compare your situation with mine. My people are still relying on me. I can't ascend to godhood on my own without first resolving their issues.

C: 怎么，怯场了？
E: What? Are you chickening out?

C: 而作为交换，付出的便是<color=#dbc291ff>灵魂分裂</color>的代价。
E: And in return, the price we had to pay was the splitting of our soul.

C: 莱昂死在第五个冬天，哀地里亚的暴风雪持续了整整三个月。风雪最大的那夜，敌人发动了袭击。
E: Leonnius died in the fifth winter. Aidonia's snowstorm lasted three full months. On the night of the fiercest storm, our foes launched their assault.

C: …我陪您同去。但您也要明白，阿格莱雅大人同样有她的考虑。
E: ...I will accompany you, but please understand that Lady Aglaea has her own considerations.

C: 我早和他说过，一把年纪了，老老实实回圣城养老不好么？非要去什么树庭，和一群神神叨叨的学者瞎折腾。
E: I've been telling him for ages to stay in the holy city and enjoy his retirement. But no, he just had to go off to that Grove and mess around with those scholars.

C: {RUBY_B#混账}HKS{RUBY_E#}！软弱的王，哪怕是最卑劣的鬣狗，也比你高贵千倍！
E: {RUBY_B#Scoundrel}HKS{RUBY_E#}! You're a weak king! So weak that even the lowliest hyena is a more noble existence than you!

C: 哈哈哈…都一样，你和我…我们都把纷争和恐惧当做食粮……
E: Hahaha... You and I, we're both the same... We feast on strife and fear...

C: …这、这样吗？
E: Y—You think so?

C: 我的好缇宝…你平时那么聪明，怎么今天看起来呆呆的？
E: Oh, my lovely Tribbie, you're usually so bright! What's gotten into you today?

C: 坏箱子，关不住我！
E: Bad chest, you can't lock me away!

C: 说到这个，阿雅，你还记得吗？应该是刚见面不久的时候，你也还是个小不点，半夜嘴馋偷吃燕麦粥被*我们*逮住……
E: Do you remember when we first met, Agy? You were still a little one, and we caught you secretly eating oatmeal late at night...

C: 我们？别异想天开了，白厄，没人想看你横死在它的剑下。
E: We? Drop the pipe dream, Phainon. No one wants to see you fall by their blade.

C: 你应当先和我商议一番的，白厄。
E: You should have come to me first, Phainon.

C: 因为这一次，天外的伟力同样站在我们身边……
E: Because this time, the power from beyond the sky is also at our side...

C: 目光短浅的野心家，大概是觉得黄金裔的利用价值将尽，准备提前布局吧？总有一天，我们也必须面对「人」的问题。
E: That short-sighted politician likely believes the Chrysos Heirs have outlived their usefulness and is making preparations for her next step. That ugly side of humanity is something we'll have to deal with eventually.

C: 我听说了，你们马上就要远征。
E: I heard you're about to set off on an expedition.

C: 哈托努斯告诉我，远古，山之民们都隐居在山丘中。他们终日挖掘、采集…过着平和质朴的生活，远离纷争。
E: Chartonus told me that back in ancient times, the Mountain Dwellers lived in seclusion. They spent their days quarrying and gathering, living a simple and peaceful life away from strife.

C: 那正是悬锋城的历代僭主缺失的东西。
E: That is precisely what every ruler of Castrum Kremnos has been missing.

C: …哈哈。
E: ...Haha.

C: 不愧是我。
E: I never fail to impress.

C: 你能满意就好——别留遗憾。
E: I'm glad you like it. Make sure not to leave any regrets behind.

C: 安息吧，愿你的荣光长存。
E: Rest in peace. May your glory last forever.

C: 气氛…有些微妙。
E: This... doesn't feel right.

C: 树庭的大家…会不会已经抵达了？
E: Does that mean everyone from the Grove is there too?

C: 想来还有些不可思议，我们刚刚才归还了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种…不夸张地说，{NICKNAME}，你们的到来融化了历史的冰川。
E: It's incredible to think that we returned {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame not so long ago... It wouldn't be an exaggeration to say that {NICKNAME} and your friend's arrival has melted the glaciers of history.

C: 又是什么支撑着你，在打碎自身，经历无数离别后，依旧能义无反顾地走到今天。
E: And what has sustained you to make it this far without looking back, despite the fracturing of your body and the numerous departures you have endured?

C: 那…拜托你们啦。
E: Then... we will leave it to you.

C: 缇里西…庇俄丝……
E: Tri... bios...

C: 这是…缇宁老师当年卜筮用的「雅努斯迷津」？
E: Is this... Janus' Maze that Trinnon used for divination in the past?

C: 你们当年…就在这种地方长大？
E: You grew up... in a place like this?

C: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也微不足惜。」
E: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value."

C: 所以，蝶…如果有什么想不通的，把它交给明天就好啦。
E: So, Cas, if anything is troubling you, just set it aside for tomorrow.

C: 还好那两个喽啰的脑子不太灵光，多数问题都被我搪塞过去了。他们一时半会儿，应该不会来找麻烦。
E: Luckily, those pawns aren't the brightest. I managed to brush off most of their questions, so they'll probably leave us alone for a bit.

C: 但转念一想，阿格莱雅当初也没放下对我们的戒备。在摸清底细前，最好不要得罪任何一方。
E: But on second thought, Aglaea also initially kept her guard up with us. It's best not to provoke either side until we know the full truth.

C: 我都不急，你急什么？别以为我不知道，你不过是想要我帮你解答那个问题——
E: If I'm not worried, why should you be? I know what you're planning. You just want my help answering the question —

C: 小灰，小白？还有……
E: Little Gray? Snowy? And...

C: 很久…或是不久之前。
E: It was a long time ago... or not so long ago...

C: 所以你俩到底是怎么回事？
E: What's your deal, anyway?

C: 毕竟，这里可是逐梦之星。在匹诺康尼，每个心怀夙愿的人都有机会实现自己的愿望。
E: After all, this is the planet of chasing dreams. Here in Penacony, anyone with a dream in their heart has a chance to make it a reality.

C: 所以，波提欧先生是来参加「圣杯战争」的吗？
E: Wait... are you telling me you're joining the Holy Grail War?

C: 合理，我高低也算是两次拯救过匹诺康尼的英雄人物啊！不管是星期日还是猴子……
E: Makes sense. I mean, after all I'm a two-time hero of Penacony! Sunday, the monkeys...

C: 若要说占得先机，光得知对方要做什么恐怕还不够。就像光有剧本，却不付诸拍摄可不行。我必须提醒你，御主，你最讨厌的那位无名客此刻正在准备召唤从者的仪式……
E: That said, knowing your opponent's next move isn't enough. It's like having a script but never actually shooting the film. Let me remind you, Master. Your least-favorite Nameless is preparing the ritual to summon a Servant right now...

C: 不，我并非此世的英灵。我所属的世界里，从未听过叫做「匹诺康尼」的国家。
E: No, I am no Heroic Spirit of this land. I've never even heard of a nation called Penacony in my world.

C: 匹诺康尼…城市像云朵一样在天空中飘浮着，冰淇淋和棉花糖会叽叽喳喳自动跳进你嘴里…实在不可思议。
E: Penacony... Cityscapes floating in the sky like clouds, where ice cream and cotton candy just chirp and jump straight into your mouth... This is incredible.

C: 不好意思，打扰一下，几位客人，要打架也吃饱饭再打嘛！几位的天环翅堡来咯！
E: Sorry to interrupt, dear guests, but... if you're gonna fight, maybe you should eat first? Your Halovian Winged Burgers are ready!

C: 没错，就是这样。
E: That's right, exactly.

C: 我一直在想，在这个神秘衰退的世界里，如此贫瘠的土地上，就算手握圣杯，除了往里倒酒外什么也做不成吧？
E: I've been wondering what you could possibly put into the Holy Grail apart from wine, given this is a barren world where Mystics have completely degraded.

C: 如果有什么东西能取代魔力，为圣杯灌注创造奇迹的热量…那就另当别论了。
E: But if something could replace magical energy, and manage to infuse the Holy Grail with enough power to create miracles... well, that changes things entirely.

C: 要不是黑塔女士出手解决了这场危机，咱们这都化灰了啊。你知道那个身份不明的闯入者是谁吗？
E: If it weren't for Madam Herta stepping in to handle the crisis, we'd all be burnt to a crisp by now. Any idea who that mysterious intruder was?

C: 根据时间分类整理。
E: Sort by timeline.

C: 首先，《关于噬硅菌群对行星磁场干涉的定量分析》会议。参会人数<unbreak>15</unbreak>人，会议时间在未来两天内即可。
E: First on the list: A Quantitative Analysis of Mycophage Cluster Interference on Planetary Magnetic Fields. Fifteen attendees. Must be scheduled within the next two days.

C: 如果你没能给他们带来什么帮助，如果你成了列车的累赘，如果有一位无名客为了救你而牺牲，如果所有人都希望你离开……你该怎么办？
E: What if you can't help anyone? What if you become a dead weight on the Express? What if a Nameless gives their life to save you, yet everyone silently wishes you'd just leave... What will you do?

C: 不管你作何打算，「圣杯战争」也只会决出一位胜者。而你在这场闹剧中的所作所为，已经让所有从者都站在了自己的对立面。
E: No matter what your plans may be, there can only be one victor in the Holy Grail War. Your actions in this farce have already placed every Servant squarely against you.

C: 与此同时，在列车上
E: At the same time, aboard the Express.

C: 大概吧。听帕姆说起这些年来，许多像我一样的人登上列车，真是…太好了。
E: Maybe... I'm just happy to hear that so many people like me have boarded the Express over the years.

C: 如果这是他们的障眼法，真正的敌人多半就藏在这附近等我们上钩，还是先远离这个是非之地吧。
E: If this is a decoy, the real enemy's probably lurking nearby, waiting for us to take the bait. We should steer clear of this trap.

C: 如果可以，希望这一次咱们能有好好合作的机会？
E: If you're willing... maybe we can actually work together this time?

C: {NICKNAME}…还有你身边这群龙套，也就能猖狂这几秒了。
E: {NICKNAME}... and your little entourage of extras... you won't get to be cocky for much longer...

C: 快放开音符小姐！
E: Let go of Miss Note!

C: 我都当群演了，哪儿还顾得上脸面？
E: I'm a background extra. Who has time for pride?

C: 在先前的战斗里，葛瑞迪把我的意识分成了无数份，就像现在的知更鸟小姐。
E: Grady split my consciousness into countless fragments in the previous battle, just like what happened to Miss Robin.

C: 这可比斯科特难打多了。
E: This is going to be way tougher than Skott was.

C: 比起御主这种让人不快的等级称谓，我还是更喜欢你刚刚发明的「砂、金、先、生」。
E: Instead of calling me "Master," a word that brings back dead class structures, I prefer you address me as Mister Aventurine.

C: 会把这种事当作失败，恐怕也独你一人了。
E: Bah, you're probably the only one who'd consider something like that a failure.

C: 年少的我在此处经历失败，为收拾残局疲于奔命。我本以为自己改变了许多，但现在看来仍是在原地打转。
E: When the younger me tasted failure here, I ran myself ragged to fix the mess. I'd thought myself no longer the same person as before... But it looks like I was just going round in circles.

C: 可以，但在那之前——
E: I will. But before I do...

C: 似乎还不够，再去别处看看吧。
E: We're not breaking enough rules. We should look elsewhere too.

C: 可以一试。
E: Worth a try.

C: 我…已沦作孤魂野鬼了么？
E: Am I just a wandering spirit now?

C: 但若换个地方……
E: But somewhere else...

C: 第一位是太卜司的符玄大人，您看挑些什么合适？
E: First, we have Lady Fu Xuan of the Divination Commission. What do you think best suits her?

C: 但如今，停云同样明白，行商的法则能与人博弈，却难与神相争。
E: But now, I've also learned that while these merchant principles may apply to humans, they falter in the face of the gods.

C: 那万维克先生……
E: Now then, Mr. Wonweek...

C: 没关系，用它就好。
E: It's okay. Let's use this one.

C: 「愿你的舞台永远明光幻彩。」
E: "May your stage be forever lustrous."

C: 远行的路上，一定要试着让自己轻松些啊……
E: You must try to relax on your long journey...

C: 但你为什么要做多余的事？
E: But why did you do those unnecessary things?

C: 我始终有种感觉，您似乎不会放弃任何一位需要帮助的人。这一路同行下来，我更确信了这点。
E: I always had a feeling that you would never give up on someone who needed help. After spending time with you, I'm even more convinced of this assessment.

C: 这就是他前来这里的原因。
E: So, this is why I brought him here.

C: 稍后，也把这件事告诉列车长吧。
E: Remember to keep the conductor in the loop, too.

C: 不用担心，对星期日而言，一处意料之外的目的地会是个不错的起点。
E: Don't worry about him. An unexpected destination could be a great starting point for Sunday.

C: 本姑娘先回房间一趟，给相机清点储存空间！这回要美美拍照。
E: I'll be in my room, freeing up some memory on my camera~! I'm going to have to snap tons of pretty pictures this time!

C: 冰中的少女恬静无瑕…一如她曾在太空中遗世漂泊的模样。
E: The young girl lays silent and flawless in the ice... Just as she did back when she was drifting through space.

C: 你要是再贫嘴，我保证，我助手的名字就要变成「第五面镜」了。
E: One more stupid remark from you and you can watch Fifth Mirror reference your role, because I'm going to be dropping you as my assistant.

C: 需要再提醒你一下吗？我是天才俱乐部#83黑塔，解开虚数流溢之谜的学者，虚数坍缩武器的执钥人…你觉得，我需要从你身上获得任何答案吗？
E: Need a little refresher? I am Herta, Genius Society #83, the one to unravel the mystery behind the imaginary leakage phenomenon, and keyholder of the Imaginary Implosion Pulse... Do you honestly believe I'd seek any counsel from you?

C: 「谒见系统」已经重启。总算到了这个时候……
E: The Audience System has been rebooted. This is finally it...

C: 一个默默无闻的旅人…却是「同谐」的命途行者？哼，谁信啊。
E: And this unremarkable passenger... happens to be a Harmony Pathstrider? Hmph, do you take me for a child?

C: 还有你的长枪，放心吧，定性为小白全责，一定让他帮你修好！
E: And here's your spear. Don't worry, this is entirely on Snowy. I'll make sure he fixes it for you!

C: 诺杜斯先生，有太多同伴死在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的士兵手里了，我只想大家能安顿下来，睡个好觉。
E: We've lost far too many to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s forces, Mr. Noldus! I only want for everyone to settle down somewhere safe, and to be able to sleep soundly.

C: 两位朋友，我有个不情之请，二位身手不凡，可否劳烦你们走一遭，追回诺杜斯先生？
E: My friends, I have a rather bold request. The two of you are quite capable — might I trouble you to fetch Mr. Noldus?

C: 你在说什么……
E: What are you talking about...

C: *我*的名字，是缇里西庇俄丝。
E: Our name is Tribios.

C: 「于是便有了我、你，编织言语和歌谣，诞下爱情与知己。」
E: "Thus you and I were created, with words and song to weave, and love and intimacy to give."

C: 答非所问。阿格莱雅叫我们庇护民众，你只作耳旁风么？
E: Don't evade the question. Aglaea told us to protect the citizens. Are you ignoring what she said?

C: 走吧，该去直面「纷争」了。
E: Let's go. It's time to face Strife.

C: 我得留在这里，确保这些士兵不会破坏城市。
E: I must stay here and ensure that these soldiers do not destroy the city.

C: 各位，可以静静离开吗？
E: Could you all quietly leave?

C: 两位贵客为圣城尽心尽力，我自然会招待好他们。
E: Distinguished guests, since you have spared no effort in aiding the holy city, I will naturally take care of you as well.

C: 「而这群英雄拥有一个共同的名字，还记得他们叫什么吗？没错——就是<color=#dbc291ff>黄金裔</color>！」
E: "We know this band of heroes by a certain name~ Any guesses? That's right! <color=#dbc291ff>The Chrysos Heirs</color>!"

C: 和他一同参观下「圣城」吧，看看人们是如何在困境中谋生的。晚些时候，我会为两位贵客准备好见面礼。
E: Why don't the both of you tour our "holy city"? See how our people make ends meet in this difficult time. I will have your welcome gifts ready later today.

C: 真是迷雾重重啊。
E: This is indeed a foggy situation.

C: 先照阿格莱雅说的，四下看看吧。我们参与了圣城保卫战，趁着人们的印象分还在，可以向他们了解些信息。
E: Let's explore the city like Aglaea suggested. We helped defend the place, after all. This is a good chance to fish around for information while they still have a good impression of us.

C: 看来白厄也在保守秘密。
E: Looks like Phainon is helping Aglaea keep that secret, too.

C: 学会了它，你们在翁法罗斯就能畅行无阻啦。嗯，基本上吧。
E: But with this, you should be able to clear any obstacle when traveling around Amphoreus... Um, most of the time, at least.

C: 给，先前说好的「赔偿」。我委托圣城最负盛名的大工匠修好了你的长枪。
E: Here you go. This is the compensation I previously mentioned. I asked the most famous Grand Craftsman in the holy city to repair your spear.

C: 你的枪，并不严重，损伤。已经完成了，修复。
E: Your spear, not too serious, the damage. Has been completed, the repair.

C: …下一个。
E: ...Next.

C: 以及，白厄似乎很看重你们。要是就这么不明不白地被*清理*了…他那玻璃般脆弱的心脏可受不了。
E: Also, Phainon seems to think highly of you guys. If you were to be disposed of for such a trivial reason, his weak and fragile heart might not be able to bear it.

C: 那位衣着奔放的黄金裔，性格也有些古怪。
E: That boldly dressed Chrysos Heir also has an eccentric personality.

C: 这片景色…属实壮观。
E: This view is... absolutely breathtaking.

C: 他吼那么大声干嘛啦？
E: What is he yelling for?

C: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles slightly.

C: 不必让彼此都落得不体面的收场。
E: Things don't have to end on a sour note between us.

C: 归位的火种…有六颗，你们的征途已经走过了半程？
E: There are... six restored Coreflames. You're already halfway through your journey?

C: 阿格莱雅和缇宝老师已经埋葬了自己的神明。<color=#dbc291ff>现在的她们，是人也是神，更是翁法罗斯命运的背负者。</color>
E: Aglaea and Tribbie have already laid their own gods to rest, <color=#dbc291ff>making them now both human and divine, as well as the bearers of Amphoreus' fate.</color>

C: 击落泰坦、回收火种、填补神职——这就是我等黄金裔的使命。我正行在她们二位走过的路上。
E: Bringing down the Titans, retrieving the Coreflames, and filling the vacant seats... This is the mission of the Chrysos Heirs, and I'm following in the footsteps of those two.

C: 讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，只要能获得成功…想必阿格莱雅也不会再质疑什么了。
E: Once we triumph in the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... that should dispel Aglaea's doubts.

C: …比前三个世界加起来还多。
E: ...more than you did in the entire three worlds before this.

C: 被你看穿啦。*我们*只是想知道…阿雅，你心里到底是怎么想的？
E: You sure don't miss a thing. We are just curious... What is really going through your head, Agy?

C: 哼…真打算将命运交给两个陌生人，不知是疯狂还是愚蠢。
E: Hmph... Entrusting our fates to two strangers, is this madness or folly?

C: 那加上我呢？
E: What if you added me to the count?

C: 你和我——重现当初的「悬锋祭典」。
E: Just you and me. Let's recreate the original Kremnos Festival.

C: 谢了。那你呢？
E: Thanks. What about you?

C: 眷属，我问你——悬锋城是否正准备灭绝奥赫玛？
E: Titankin, let me ask you this: Is Castrum Kremnos planning to destroy Okhema?

C: 其实我一直想说，论名字的奇特程度，这位也不遑多让吧？
E: I must say, her name is pretty unconventional, wouldn't you agree?

C: 还好么，没受伤吧？我收到白厄的急报了，情况似乎很不乐观。
E: Are you okay? Are you injured? Things didn't sound good in Phainon's message.

C: 我接受你的批评，萨姆。的确…有「剧本」在，我们从未考虑过失败的可能。
E: I accept your criticism, Sam. Indeed... Because of the "script," I failed to consider the possibility of failure.

C: 「凭城借一。」
E: "Ace."

C: 我只奉劝你一句——别让卡芙卡失望。为了把你留在这里…她付出了很多。而且……
E: I'll give you one piece of advice — don't let Kafka down. She sacrificed a lot to keep you here... furthermore...

C: 不存在的记忆开始降温，结霜…凝冻。
E: Nonexistent memories begin to cool, frost... then freeze.

C: 长话短说：{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}不愿帮我们揭露悬锋城的过去。但不知为何，它对{NICKNAME}展现出了兴趣。
E: Simply put, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} refused to help us uncover the past of Castrum Kremnos. But for some reason, they showed interest toward {NICKNAME}.

C: 窥探他人记忆的力量，听起来很容易被滥用。幸好掌握它的人是你。
E: The ability to look into others' memories sounds like something that could easily be misused. Luckily, you're the one wielding it.

C: 我感到事态蹊跷，只在城外拍了张照片就离开了…谁能想到后面发生的事呢？
E: Sensing something was off, I snapped a photo outside the city and then left... And what followed was something completely unexpected.

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祝福您，大人。
E: May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} bless you, Lady Aglaea.

C: 千百根坚韧的金线探入污染的空洞，揪出了潜藏其中的恶意之物。
E: Hundreds of resilient golden threads reach into the corrupted void, extracting the hidden malevolence within.

C: 好的，好的，我们记下了，阿格莱雅大人！那、那么，要是没什么别的事，我就先走一……
E: Alright, alright. Understood, Lady Aglaea! If there's nothing else, please excuse—

C: 在{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}闭目之前，它原来是这副模样。
E: So this is how it looked like before {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} closed their eyes.

C: 首先，得弄清我们回到了哪个时代。
E: We should first figure out which era we've traveled back to.

C: 腰闪了？
E: Got a crick in your back?

C: 也许用「宝珠」可以让它暂时消失？
E: We may be able to temporarily remove it with the orb?

C: 我奉劝你，忘记它吧。
E: Better off forgotten.

C: …咳、咳咳、咳！
E: *cough* *cough* *cough*

C: 实验品……
E: An experiment...

C: 只有被置于纷争之下，文明方能成长。人生来便憎恶苦难，但唯有苦难能教人屹立……
E: Civilizations only grow under strife. Humans instinctively loathe suffering, yet suffering is the only thing that teaches them to stand unyielding and tall...

C: {F#她}{M#他}比你更懂得战斗的意义，也许能成为你的启迪。
E: {F#She}{M#He} knows what it truly means to go to battle. Perhaps {F#she}{M#he} can be your inspiration.

C: 接下来有什么安排？
E: What's next for us?

C: 没睡过头就来。
E: Sure, as long as we don't oversleep.

C: 现在能和我说说你的事了？
E: So, can you tell me about yourself now?

C: 你应该知道，假如丹恒没有及时找到解法，我还是会去尝试的。
E: You should know that I would've gone ahead if Dan Heng hadn't come up with an answer in time.

C: 时间快到了，黄金裔们大概已经在创世涡心做准备了吧？
E: It's almost time. The Chrysos Heirs should be finishing up their preparations at the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 唔…那一大长串解读，我就不给你念了吧？
E: Uh... The interpretation is really long. Maybe I should just skip it.

C: 还有事没解决？好吧。但别过分折腾，记得管理好精力。
E: There are still things that you need to attend to? Alright, but don't overexert yourself. Make sure to keep yourself well rested.

C: 我爱你们！
E: I love all of you!

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 在{F#她}{M#他}离开的这段时间，阿格莱雅…我想和你谈谈。
E: While {F#she's}{M#he's} away... I would like to have a chat with you, Aglaea.

C: 天父…凝视了你……
E: Sky father... has gazed upon you...

C: 母亲…不再回应……
E: Mother... is no longer responding...

C: 人子…泰坦…母亲…天父……
E: Child of humanity... Titans... Mother... Sky father...

C: 但我没能料到…奥赫玛居然同时出现了两位「欺瞒死亡之人」。
E: However, I never expected that... two people who have cheated death would appear in Okhema at the same time.
Hehe...

C: 永远别再触碰禁忌：别再辜负逝者，别再伤害自己。这样，这座教室还能属于你，你还有机会活出自己的人生。
E: Never do something taboo ever again. Don't disappoint the deceased and never harm yourself. If you can do that, this classroom will still be yours and you'll have a chance to live out your own life.

C: 倘若汝果真未曾迎来终结…又将如何回应悖逆之人的诘问呢？
E: If you truly have not met your end... how will you answer the challenges of those who defy you?

C: 不过，阁下，记住了：愚弄人民者必得报应。这次我就睁一只眼闭一只眼，但绝不会有下次……
E: But you'd do best to remember this: Fool the people and karma will be on your tail. I'll overlook it this time, but don't count on there being a next time...

C: 毕竟吾乃理性之泰坦，生而为求索哪。
E: I mean... I'm the Reason Titan, after all. It is in me to ask and seek answers.

C: 我不希望你的坚强…只是强颜欢笑的孤独。
E: I hope your toughness is not a mask hiding a lonely heart.

C: 这幅和平的光景…简直不像是末日。
E: This peaceful sight is making me forget that this is the end times.

C: 啊，我……
E: Ah! I...

C: 抱歉，说太多了…希望没有让阁下感到困扰。
E: I'm sorry. I probably said too much... I hope I didn't make you uncomfortable.

C: 只有刻着真话的黄金短矛能带你们找到猫咪怪盗。
E: Only the Golden Short Spear engraved with the truth can lead you to Kitty Phantom Thief.

C: 她也下定决心，要从布满迷雾的过去中走出。
E: She's also made up her mind to leave her confused past behind.

C: 好漂亮的蝴蝶，是在和我们说话吗？
E: What a beautiful butterfly. Is it talking to us?

C: 前去探路的斥候仅有一位得以复返。他说那是不可接近的禁地，是冥府向人界敞开的门扉……
E: Of the scouts that went ahead, only one has managed to return. He says that the land ahead is a forbidden land that should not be approached, as it's the doorway between the netherworld and the mortal realm...

C: 雅努斯的圣女…即便阴阳两隔，依旧心意相通。
E: The Holy Maiden of Janus... Even when separated by life and death, their thoughts are still connected.

C: 还记得您说过，命运不是生长在道路尽头的花朵，而是人们自己踏出的小径…现在，属于我的那一条行径，即将来到终点的门关。
E: I remember you once said that fate is not the flowers that bloom at the end of the road, but where people tread beyond the gate... Now, the path that belongs to me is about to reach the end.

C: 你我并非战士或统帅，「征途」和「史诗」也无法引起我心灵的共鸣。
E: You and I are neither warriors nor generals. Therefore, journeys and epics cannot truly resonate with us.

C: 该死…！
E: Curse you...!

C: 别忘了你我共同筹划的愿景，阁下。
E: I trust you haven't forgotten the world we've envisioned together.

C: 那真是…太好了。
E: I am... glad to hear that.

C: 再见了，冥界。
E: Goodbye, nether realm.

C: 你的灵魂依旧是完满的，似乎有一种引力…在尽力将它维系。
E: Your soul is still perfectly whole, as if some kind of force is trying its best to keep it together.

C: 吾师，我向你发誓：我会引领所有人在新世界重逢。
E: Anaxa, I swear to you. I'll lead everyone to our reunion in the new world.

C: 而经过筛选后，我认为只需其中3条便能达成我想要的结果。
E: After filtering through them, I have determined that I only require three to attain the results that I desire.

C: 哦？说来听听吧。
E: Oh? I'm all ears.

C: 如果我没理解错，是通过炼金术将人的灵魂重新炼成？
E: Do you mean he's trying to reconstruct human souls alchemically?

C: 所以，人子啊……
E: Child of humanity...

C: 趁时间还多，尽早适应这片舞台吧。
E: Till then, it's best to get used to this place as soon as possible.

C: 好久不见，克拉特鲁斯阁下。怎么来得如此匆忙……
E: It has indeed been some time, Lord Krateros. What brings you here in such haste...?

C: 辛苦了，卡勒克提斯阁下。接下来，让我亲自给今日的辩论收尾吧——
E: You've done well, Lord Callictis. Let me take over and personally close this debate for today.

C: 那是一座海滨小城，在一位智慧的女王治下享受着海风和明媚的和平时光。
E: It was a seaside town which enjoyed the ocean breeze and glorious, peaceful times thanks to the wisdom of its ruling queen.

C: 什么，这……
E: What? This...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那是烙印在{RUBY_B#卡厄斯}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}灵魂中的{RUBY_B#记忆}世界{RUBY_E#}。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That was the {RUBY_B#memory}world{RUBY_E#} imprinted in {RUBY_B#Khaos}Kephale's{RUBY_E#} soul.</color>

C: 她向泰坦宣战前怀揣的单纯愿景，全都化作了泡影。
E: The simple vision she carried with her before declaring war on the Titans... became an illusion.

C: 抛弃了人性的塞涅俄丝…我和昏光庭院的先祖，真的是她留下的血脉吗？
E: Seliose had abandoned her humanity... Then, my Twilight Courtyard ancestors... and me... Are we truly her descendants?

C: ——你该拥抱自己的命运了。
E: — it's time to face your destiny.

C: 历史…隐入晨昏！
E: History... lost in twilight...!

C: *老…咳，大司铎，是我。我是来帮您换药的。*
E: Old... ahem, Chaplain, it's me. I'm here to assist you with your medicine.

C: （…就把它引向高处吧？）
E: (...Guess I'll just have to lead it somewhere higher.)

C: 没人能追得上我，我早就不再为「逃亡」而奔跑了。
E: No one can catch up to me. I'm no longer running to escape anymore.

C: 可我欠了不止一句道歉的…还有你啊，阿雅……
E: But I owe more than just an apology... There's also you, Agy...

C: 阻挠…终是徒劳……
E: Resisting... is futile...

C: 跨越千年的逐火征程，我将汝等黄金裔的苦难、决意、分裂、团结尽收眼中……
E: Across a thousand years of the Flame-Chase Journey, I have witnessed the ardor, resolve, division, and unity of the Chrysos Heirs with mine own eyes...

C: 仍是不久前，那位不羁的学者献上了一幕盛大演出，以生命为代价，令你们窥见了这世界真相的一隅。
E: And still not long past, that unruly scholar staged one grand performance, granting you a glimpse of this world's truth at the cost of his life.

C: 别生气呀，整这一出只是为了给你们提个醒，翁法罗斯可一点都不安全，全是流窜的威胁，包括那个黑衣剑客…不管在哪里都要提高警惕！
E: C'mon, don't be upset. I'm just giving you a kind reminder that Amphoreus isn't safe at all. The whole place is full of dangers, including that swordmaster... Make sure you stay on your toes, no matter where you are!

C: 今时不同往日，我肩负之物…无比珍贵，也无比脆弱。我为翁法罗斯的明日而挥剑，因此决不允许自己再被仇恨蒙蔽，有失职责。
E: Times have changed. The responsibility I bear is both precious and fragile. I wield my sword for the future of Amphoreus. I will not let hatred cloud my judgment again and neglect my duties.

C: 你在看什么？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 「君王」这张和我挺搭。
E: "Ruler" fits me pretty well.

C: 千年前，云石市集……
E: A millennium ago at Marmoreal Market...

C: 翁法罗斯最会撒谎的女人，也被那个阿格莱雅给骗了，桀桀桀！
E: You're Amphoreus's most cunning liar, and even you were fooled by Aglaea — hehehe!

C: 哎呀呀，这下卡关咯。不过，我有一计——
E: Oh dear, we're stuck here. But I have a plan —

C: 「为了理清我究竟做错了什么…我花了上百年的时间思考、自省；但你始终不愿给我一个当面坦陈的机会。」
E: "I've spent centuries trying to figure out where I went wrong, replaying every moment over and over. But you've never given me a chance to explain myself face-to-face."

C: 「回奥赫玛来吧，我请求你。若没有你，他们将无法赢得抗争。」
E: "Please, come back to Okhema. I'm begging you. Without you, they don't stand a chance."

C: 他声称我在用金线阅读众人的思绪，以此在辩论时舞弊。我本有百种方式应对那低级的盘外招，但话语却未经思想的审验便溜出了嘴边……
E: He claimed I was reading everyone's thoughts with the golden thread to cheat in the debate. I could have countered that low tactic in a hundred ways, but my words slipped out before I could even think about them...

C: 再见，缇安老师。
E: Goodbye, Lady Trianne.

C: 那刻夏老师分析过这事。当时的结论…大概是因为刻法勒的火种有元老院的秘法保护？
E: Professor Anaxa once analyzed this. He thought... It was probably because Kephale's Coreflame was protected by the Council of Elders' secret arts?

C: 可风儿却接连把我吹了回来…大概这就是昏光庭院的使命吧？
E: But the wind keeps pulling me back... Maybe that's the Twilight Courtyard's duty, after all.

C: 阳雷骑士的亲人、盟友、伙伴，大战的幸存者、牺牲者…每当我在篝火边思念他们的故事，却总是发现传说的细节早已遗失，只留下塞涅俄丝的名字。
E: What about the Daythunder Knight's family, allies, and friends? What about the survivors and those who died in the great battles? Whenever I think about their stories by the campfire, I realize the details of those legends have been long lost... and only Seliose's name remains.

C: 先祖啊，请您给予慷慨的赐福吧……
E: Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...

C: 下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
E: Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?

C: 这里是…创世涡心？
E: And this is... the Vortex of Genesis?

C: 那是…{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的火种？
E: Are those... the Coreflames of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}?

C: 当她发现唤醒自己的竟是她曾宠爱的孙女…不知道祖母会作何反应呢？
E: I wonder what she'd think... When the one awaking her turns out to be her beloved granddaughter.

C: 哇，没想到这么高的地方，居然会这么热闹……
E: Wow, I didn't expect it to be so lively up here...

C: 那我就得还你另外一句话了，丹恒教给我的——「行百里者半九十」。
E: Well, then I have to use something else Dan Heng taught me as come back — "The last mile is the hardest."

C: 一次又一次，我们在用双手改写一个世界的历史。
E: We've reshaped the history of the world with our hands over and over.

C: 先祖们曾在天上建立了宏伟的文明，而我们脚下的「晨昏之眼」就是艾格勒的栖地，云间城邦的核心。
E: My ancestors once built a magnificent civilization among the heavens. The Eye of Twilight, which we are standing on, is the home of Aquila and the heart of the city-state in the clouds.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「风，雪，雨，曦……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Wind, snow, rain, shine..."</color>

C: 金色的云层，炽烈的辉光……
E: Golden clouds, blazing radiance...

C: 从过往的记忆那里，我们得知天空的泰坦忌讳阴云。两位或许知道更多细节？
E: We learned from past memories that the Sky Titan fears dark clouds. Would you know more about this topic?

C: 黑潮……
E: The black tide...

C: 该离开此地了。露奈比斯在下一站等待你们。
E: It is time to leave this place. Lunabis awaits you at the next stop.

C: …何止是信仰！艾格勒塑造了天空，它就是天空本身——若它殒落了，这世界不知会变成哪般模样！
E: ...Not just our faith! Aquila forged the sky — nay, they are the sky itself! If they fall, what will this world turn into!?

C: 露奈比斯阁下，麻烦你再稍等我们片刻了。
E: Lady Lunabis, if it's not too much trouble, please wait for a little longer...?

C: 抓紧赶路吧。
E: Let's hurry.

C: 这些壁画…好像不止在刻画天空泰坦。
E: These murals... seem to depict more than just the Sky Titan.

C: 是你的记忆出了偏差么？这把剑不久前才被铸成。
E: Are you sure about that? This was only recently forged.

C: 这样就算完成了吗？还真是…简单粗暴呀。
E: This is it? That's certainly... pretty crude and simple.

C: 从没见过这种现象…那也是黑潮导致的么？太多的事都欠缺解释…偏偏我们没时间停下来细究。
E: I've never seen anything like this before... Could the black tide be the cause? There are too many things we don't understand... and we don't have time to figure out.

C: 这样…你才知道你曾经的恶行是多么无谓而愚蠢。
E: Only then... will you truly know how meaningless and foolish your past transgressions were.

C: 盗火行者……
E: The Flame Reaver...

C: 你…早就计划好了？
E: You... already made plans?

C: 该死！为什么处处都是阻碍……
E: Blast! Why is nothing going right...

C: 原来那些被视为灾厄的符号…也能在救世的故事里留下印记。
E: So those signs deemed as harbingers of calamity... will also leave behind marks in the tale of deliverance.

C: 是他！白厄阁下！
E: It's him! Lord Phainon!

C: 看，白厄在那边！还有…咦！
E: Look, there's Phainon! And... wait!

C: 不记得了？那好，我可要带小兵人回家啦。
E: She doesn't remember, eh? This little soldier's coming with me.

C: 白厄哥哥，昔涟姐姐，你们来看！我钓上来一个好大好沉的玻璃瓶！
E: Phainon, Cyrene, come quick! Look at this huge bottle I just caught!

C: 饿了…回去吃饭！再见啦，大哥哥、大姐姐们！
E: Finally. I'm starving! See you later!

C: 其实，从看见小妖精的可爱字条开始，我心中的预感就越发强烈……
E: To be honest, from the moment I saw the cute note left by the fairies, my intuition became even more certain...

C: 说不定我和徕啦迷一样，都是迷境的小妖精呢？
E: Perhaps I'm like you, Relimem, just another fairy of the Maze?

C: 让你的思绪像河水上漂着的星星一样流淌，趁着萤火和微风，你们的命运也将流向同样的未来……
E: Let your thoughts flow like stars drifting on the river, carried by fireflies and gentle winds, your destinies flowing towards the same future...

C: …我学剑的本意，就是为了保护身边的人。如果在这种时候当了逃兵…就再也不配举剑了吧？
E: ...I learned the sword to protect those close to me. If I run now... I'll never be worthy of lifting a blade again.

C: （这里是，命运重渊……）
E: (This is... the Abyss of Fate...)

C: 打打杀杀，很不好。阿雅和*我们*，不想看见黄金裔伤害彼此。
E: Bloodshed isn't the way. We and Agy don't want to see Chrysos Heirs turn on each other.

C: 差距也太大了吧…！
E: ...Don't you think this is a little bit too unfair!?

C: 心中的信念吗？可是，空有决心是不够的，除非把我的心脏献上……
E: You mean my conviction? But... just resolve isn't enough, is it? Unless I literally gave my heart...

C: 这还是我认识的翁法罗斯吗？
E: Did I stumble into the wrong Amphoreus?

C: 也许并非真实存在的「某个人」。毕竟除了两个特定的人，其他英雄似乎意识不到您的存在。
E: "Who"? Perhaps the role is not that of a person who really existed. Notice how only two particular individuals seem aware of your presence?

C: 光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年，长夜月的第三个七天。{NICKNAME}阁下，欢迎抵达逐火的尽头……
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>, the third week of the Month of Evernight. Welcome, my {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}, to the end of the Flame-Chase...

C: 嘟，嘟嘟。
E: Doot, doot-doot.

C: 遐蝶？你不是已经……
E: Castorice? Didn't you...

C: 您就一定能令翁法罗斯停滞的命运，再度流动……
E: You can make Amphoreus's frozen fate flow once again...

C: 救世主啊，即使孑然一身，也请你成就「再创世」的伟业。
E: O Deliverer, though you walk alone, please complete the work of bringing about the Era Nova.

C: 即便那太阳，是从破灭中诞生？
E: Even if that sunrise is born from annihilation?

C: 无需感到遗憾，这一代「黄金裔」是最为杰出的模型，两位是最后的因子。对于你们，再创世绝非谎言，只需踏上前来，拥抱黑潮，接受星神的瞥视。
E: No need to feel regret. This generation of Chrysos Heirs is the most outstanding model, and you two are the final factors. For you, the Era Nova is no lie. Just step forward, embrace the black tide, and accept the Aeon's gaze.

C: 哈，还真是…平易近人。
E: Ha, she really is... down-to-earth.

C: 至于那个把世界搅得天翻地覆的伪神…就是你吧，白毛小子？
E: As for that false god who's been turning the world upside down... it's you, isn't it, white-hair?

C: 哪怕…要将这副身躯焚毁……
E: Even if it meant... burning this body to ash.

C: 我们之间的交流变得越发简短。你的火焰越燃越旺，你开始变得无比接近…纯粹的愤怒，恨意的化身。
E: Each time we speak, our words grow fewer. Your fire burns hotter, and you're getting closer... to becoming pure rage, a vessel of hatred.

C: 一点都不意外，对吗？那是因为人家很单纯，无论变成什么样子都心口如一。
E: Not surprised at all, huh? That's because I'm simple at heart. No matter what form I take, I've always been true to myself.

C: 那扇门背后，绝对没有你想要的答案哦。
E: Trust me, that gate won't give you what you want.

C: 如今，我的目标几近达成。凭借愤怒，「Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak>」已跨过智能奇点，尽管他仍秉持反抗的执念，压制了这一世的黑潮，但沉沦只是时间问题。
E: And now, my goal is almost complete. Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak> had exceeded the Intelligence Singularity through his rage, and though he still retains his obsessive defiance and managed to suppress the black tide of this cycle, it's a matter of time before his will crumbles to dust.

C: 「毁灭」的种子…？
E: Seed of the Destruction...?

C: 我就知道，又是这种开局。
E: Typical start, should've expected it.

C: 果然不会那么顺利……
E: I knew it wouldn't be that easy...

C: 同盟会议…感觉有些紧张起来了呢。
E: I'm starting to feel a bit nervous about the meeting.

C: 至少她允许我们自由行动…
E: At least she allows us to move around freely...

C: 这就叫一石三鸟，出发吧。
E: We can kill three birds with one stone. Let's go.

C: 原来是「那位大人」呀……
E: Ah, so it's "his lordship"...

C: 哦？「神谕之子」…呵呵，稀客啊。
E: Oh? "Children of the Prophecy"... Hehe, such rare guests.

C: …等等！{NICKNAME}，先别进去——
E: ...Wait! {NICKNAME}, don't go in yet...

C: 该死的拉冬人，竟敢对凯撒不敬……
E: Those insolent Ladonians! How dare they disrespect the Imperator...

C: 不过，{NICKNAME}，听我说，这里不妨将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
E: But listen, {NICKNAME}, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after"?

C: 用一些委婉的说法…
E: Give a roundabout refusal...

C: 这是<color=#dbc291ff>法吉娜的神血蜜露</color>，十二宝瓶中最为甜美的一樽。
E: This is <color=#dbc291ff>Phagousa's Dew of Divine Blood</color>, the sweetest of all the twelve bottles.

C: 然后，把剑指向真正的敌人。
E: Then, ensure I'm pointing my sword towards the true enemy.

C: 但前提是，你我能在这场拉锯中取得优势。
E: ...Provided we can gain the advantage in this tug-of-war, that is.

C: 只可惜，我从未验证各位的忠心。
E: However, it's a pity that I have never tested your loyalty.

C: …有了，留意下附近有没有被垫高的座位吧。
E: ...I know. Let's look for seats that are raised up higher than others.

C: 你到底想要什么？
E: What exactly are you after?

C: 我必须承认，为您解惑的过程…总能令我回忆起年少求学的快意时光。但很遗憾，此刻，在翁法罗斯内部，我的正身…不得不下场应对因您而起的「意外」。
E: I must admit that the process of answering your questions has... reminded me of the happy days of learning in my youth. However, it is a pity that my true form must now descend into Amphoreus to deal with the "accident" that arose because of you.

C: 浮黎，回应我吧！
E: Fuli, answer me!

C: 「光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，刻律德菈以出征法吉娜为由，献祭五百名黄金裔的性命，完成『律法』试炼。这一惨剧震动了整个翁法罗斯。」
E: "Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>. Cerydra, under the pretense of a campaign against Phagousa, sacrificed <unbreak>500</unbreak> Chrysos Heirs to complete the Trial of Law. This tragedy shook everyone in Amphoreus."

C: 不必忧伤，缇里西庇俄丝女士。我们已向那预言中的明天前进许多了，不是么？
E: There is no need to be sad, Lady Tribios. Haven't we already taken great strides towards that promised tomorrow?

C: 哦，怎么说？
E: Oh? I'm listening.

C: 凯撒，你究竟为何……
E: Imperator... why did you...

C: 你的语气，就仿佛他们不是因你的阴谋和冷血而死。他们的忠诚在你眼中一文不值？！
E: You speak as if they didn't die because of your cold-blooded schemes. Was their loyalty meaningless to you!?

C: 刻律德菈…还活着么？
E: Is Cerydra... still alive?

C: 我只希望你能见证，在黄金裔向我宣战之前，那位凯撒做出了何等灭绝人性的选择。
E: I just want you to witness the monstrous choice the Imperator made before the Chrysos Heir turned their blades against me.

C: 比你可差远了。
E: They're nowhere near as bad as you.

C: 我游不出牵引着我陷落的漩涡，也没有多么坚定的信念，能如众人所愿，强迫自己等待那个人的归来。
E: I can't break free of the whirlpool that's pulling me under. Nor do I have the unwavering resolve to force myself to wait for that person's return, as everyone hoped for.

C: 刻律德菈……
E: Cerydra...

C: 可惜，眼前不过是历史的残响。
E: Sadly, all you see is a remnant of history.

C: 正如翁法罗斯支离破碎的命运。
E: Just like the broken fate of Amphoreus.

C: 所以，胜负的关键依旧在于{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}……
E: Therefore, victory will still hinge upon {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}...

C: 人家也是哦，这一千年，一直在等待{NICKNAME}。
E: Same here. I've been waiting for {NICKNAME} for a thousand years...

C: 当然，毕竟{NICKNAME}肩上扛着沉沉的使命，还有整个世界的重量……
E: I see. After all, your burden sure is heavy, {NICKNAME}. You're carrying the weight of the entire world...

C: 我们虽然在神明的设计中挣扎，尚且不是真正的生命…但，翁法罗斯的黄金裔依旧选择同命运抗争，书写了和「人」无异的神话。
E: Though we were born from the designs of the gods and are not yet truly alive... the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus still chose to stand against fate and carved a legend no different from that of humankind.

C: 试炼已经结束了。现在，告诉我吧……
E: The trial is over. So, tell me...

C: 「我已将金血分给你们。现在，英勇的同胞，跟随我，成为命运的主人！」
E: "My blood flows in you now! Heroic compatriots, follow me, and we'll seize fate's reins!"

C: 足够了，战机转瞬即逝，我们也等不起。最后，拉冬人的炮垒，现在还剩几座？
E: That is enough. We cannot afford to miss an opportunity for victory. Lastly, how many Ladonian cannons are left?

C: 变出了…一片大海？
E: Emerged... an ocean?

C: 就像泰坦寄宿在我脑内，我也可以藉由炼金，与你的化身熔合为一。不试不知道，真是精彩极了，竟能像翻书一般观览天才的知识库……
E: Just as that Titan made themself at home in my brain, I can also fuse myself with your avatar through alchemy. I didn't know until I tried it, but this is simply brilliant! I can flip through a genius's data bank like reading a book...

C: 你的内在是一片「长夜」。即便是我，也只能窥见冰山一角。
E: Inside you is nothing but an "evernight." Even I can only catch a tiny glimpse of it.

C: 谢谢你，卫士。希望你们…都能渡过这重劫难。
E: Thank you, guard. I hope that all of you will be able to... overcome this disaster.

C: …丹恒，你在想什么？
E: Dan Heng... What are you thinking?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>█ 欢迎回来█ ██ {NICKNAME} ███</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> █ Welcome back███{NICKNAME}███</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程已完成。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting complete.</color>

C: 传闻浮黎禅坐于无漏净土，为宇宙播撒下「记忆」的种子。等到银河终结，诸界将在祂的苗圃中新生。
E: Legend says that Fuli sits in meditation in the Anāsrava pure land, spreading the seeds of Remembrance across the universe. And when the cosmos ends, all the different realms will be reborn in THEIR garden.

C: 每一次轮回的开端，仪式剑将昔涟「杀死」。每一次旅程的终点，它承载的演算记忆被昔涟的「灵魂」带走，沉入大墓。
E: The ceremonial blade "killed" Cyrene at the start of every recurrence. And at the end of every journey, Cyrene's "soul" took the extrapolated memories stored within the blade and buried them in this great tomb.

C: 我们会见证这些记忆。
E: We will witness those memories.

C: 你拯救了我们，三月。
E: You saved us, March.

C: {NICKNAME}，没有整顿的时间了。我准备了其他退路——
E: {NICKNAME}, there's no time to regroup! I've prepared an alternate escape route!

C: 冷峻的陌生人…仅仅是相处在同一个空间之中就快要窒息了。
E: That cold, aloof stranger... just being in the same space with them is enough to make me suffocate.

C: 但长夜月，她是<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」的主宰</color>。在「永夜之帷」中，我看见你的故事——
E: But Evernight is <color=#dbc291ff>the master of Remembrance</color>, and I saw your story in the Veil of Evernight—

C: 丹…枫？
E: Dan... Feng?

C: 面对这种问题，你知道该如何回答吗？
E: Do you know how you will answer that question?

C: 失去休戚与共的挚友，绝对称不上胜利，那只是一场折磨终生的失败。这种命运，我绝不接受。
E: Losing a dear friend with whom you've shared so much can never be considered a victory. It's a failure that torments you for the rest of your life. I could never accept that kind of fate.

C: 丹恒，你愿意做出多少牺牲？
E: How much are you willing to sacrifice, Dan Heng?

C: 桀桀桀，本大爷明白了，说吧！要怎么做？
E: Hehehe, I get it! Just tell me what to do!

C: 金血汨汨而出…仿佛破溃的心脏。
E: Golden blood is gurgling out... It's almost like a heart that has burst open.

C: 嗯。你被困住的时候，我经历了…许多事。
E: Heh. While you were trapped, I experienced... a lot.

C: 除非，不是壁画画出了翁法罗斯的外观…而是见过这幅壁画的人，把世界变成了如今的模样？
E: Unless... the mural isn't a drawing of Amphoreus... but rather someone saw the mural and shaped the world in its image?

C: 务必小心。长眠在地底的，或许正是翁法罗斯的最后一道命途——「记忆」。
E: Be careful. What lies dormant beneath may well be Amphoreus's final Path — Remembrance.

C: 「记忆」啊…果然是诱人又危险的深海。水面下，总是藏着令人着迷的秘密。
E: Ah, "memory"... It is indeed a deep ocean of dangerous allure, where fascinating secrets always hide beneath the waters.

C: 「到底是『开拓』的无名客，帮了大忙。」
E: "That's the Trailblazing Nameless for you. A huge help."

C: 她藏匿于「岁月」的夹缝，翁法罗斯最隐秘的角落。也只有最为暴烈的意志，才能冲破忆域，照亮她的去向……
E: She hides in the crevices of Time in the most concealed corner of Amphoreus. Only the most ferocious will can break through the Memory Zone and illuminate her footsteps...

C: 飞霄将军多虑。我此番请缨，本就不求联盟内众口同声。
E: You're overthinking it, General Feixiao. When I volunteered for this task, I never expected unanimous support from the Alliance anyway.

C: （游侠们向来神龙见首不见尾，这也理所当然。）
E: (Of course, we would never know the Rangers' comings and goings.)

C: 布洛妮娅小姐，这场灾难恐怕会比你们想象中更加可怕，请务必听从托帕小姐指示，做好万全准备。
E: Miss Bronya, I'm afraid this disaster will be far more terrible than you can imagine. Please be sure to follow Miss Topaz's instructions and make thorough preparations.

C: 「哎呀，我可是练习了好久……」
E: "Aw, I practiced so long for this..."

C: 「当然。毕竟权杖内外的时间流速差那么大，我们只能通过这种方式等候大家呀。」
E: "Yeah. After all, with such a huge time dilation between inside and outside the Scepter, this was the only way we could wait for everyone."

C: 是想跟咱们一决胜负呢。好啊，那就如他所愿，让智械哥自掘坟墓。
E: Guess he wants a final showdown. Fine, let the old Intellitron dig his own grave, just like he wants.

C: 等你们很久了，天外的英雄。
E: I've been waiting for you, heroes from beyond the sky.

C: 「嘿，我可没这么好说话。每次打我都重拳出击，懂不懂怜香惜玉啊？」
E: "Hey, I'm not that accommodating, y'know. You've never once pulled your punches. Ever heard of going easy on a lady?"

C: 那是白厄阁下残余的神性，「天空」只是映照出它的轨迹。
E: That's Lord Phainon's lingering divinity. The Sky merely reflected its tracks.

C: 或许是因为，白厄活跃的年代，与第一次逐火之旅相去甚远。
E: Perhaps it is because the era in which Phainon was the most active lies far removed from the days of the first Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 身陷樊笼，他依旧没有放下戒心，这是好事。
E: Even trapped in a cage, he hasn't let down his guard. That is a good sign.

C: 这座灵水盆，是每一世轮回的终点。
E: This spirit basin marks the end of every cycle.

C: 「当这一切全部散去，他能用来囚禁『毁灭』的力量，还剩下什么呢？」
E: "When all of this is gone, what will he have left to hold back the Destruction?"

C: 「焚风」？这名字像我跟小王子合体啊。
E: Zephyro? Sounds like someone fused me and the little prince into one name.

C: 似乎搞错了什么。
E: Seems like something got mixed up.

C: 果然，是{RUBY_B#「毁灭」的神血}「净世金血」{RUBY_E#}……
E: Yes, it's the {RUBY_B#the Destruction's divine blood}world-cleansing blood{RUBY_E#}...

C: 「此地没有黑潮……」
E: "There is no black tide here..."

C: 与我一同，成为英雄吧。
E: Stand with me, and become heroes.

C: 不要。向祂。低头。
E: Do not. Bow your head. To THEM...

C: 诚如涟漪所述，这是一段浪漫的旅途。
E: This is a romantic journey, just as the ripples stated.

C: 如此和煦的风，让我添上晨曦的微光吧。
E: What a warm wind. Let me add some rays of dawn.

C: 什么都不用管，奔跑吧。哪怕全银河都停下了脚步，所有人都被黑暗绊倒……
E: Don't think about anything else. Just run. Even if the entire cosmos has stopped. Even if everyone else is tripped by the darkness...

C: 哈…哈……
E: Hah... Hah...

C: 这话应该我来说。
E: That should have been my line.

C: 那，就和这故事里所有的「花」一起……
E: Then, join all the other "flowers" in this story...

C: 我…回到列车上了？
E: I'm... back on the Express?

C: 这列车上的饮品相当…独特，正方便聊些「符合微醺状态」的话题。
E: The drinks on this Express are quite... unique, perfect for discussing topics "befitting our tipsy state."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>沿着「记忆的涟漪」走向过去，将那些「神明显灵」的时刻一一串联起来。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Follow the "Ripples of Remembrance" into the past. Reconnect every moment in which "the gods made themselves known."</color>

C: 有什么不满，都跟六相冰说去吧！
E: If you've got a bone to pick, take it up with my Six-Phased Ice!

C: 带着它，回到<color=#dbc291ff>祝祭庭院</color>吧——
E: Take it with us, back to the <color=#dbc291ff>Sacrament Courtyard</color>...

C: 你…还在吗？
E: Are you... still here?

C: 坏消息是，他们可能对外来者怀有敌意。
E: We can only hope they're not hostile toward outsiders.

C: 「如那风中的歌谣所述，逐火是不断失却的旅途。」
E: "Just as the ballad blown on the breeze says: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning."</color>

C: 但其实，好朋友，在遇见你前，「哀怜」的因子也不懂得「爱」。
E: But actually, my good friend, the "Lament" factor did not understand what "love" was before she met you either.

C: …于是，撕开混沌的那道光，照亮了我的「记忆」。
E: ...So, the light that tore through the chaos illuminated my "memories."

C: 真是个好长，又不可爱的名字。和「迷迷」天差地别呀。
E: What a long name. And it doesn't even sound cute. The total opposite of "Mem."

C: 这是演的哪出？
E: What are you playing at?

C: 呵。吕枯耳戈斯或许不值得信任，但赞达尔言出必行。
E: Heh. Lycurgus may not be trustworthy, but Zandar always follows through with his words.

C: 与此同时，丹恒精神折跃回到列车，却发现了窃忆者入侵。众人此时觉察到「记忆」的势力早已渗透了翁法罗斯，并阻拦了外部介入…为了与我取得联系，丹恒决心立刻返回翁法罗斯。
E: Meanwhile, Dan Heng warped back to the Express via a spirit warp jump, only to discover a Memosnatcher invasion. Everyone then realized that the Remembrance's forces had already permeated Amphoreus and blocked outside intervention... To establish contact with me, Dan Heng was determined to return to Amphoreus immediately.

C: 放心，我没想着要打扰那位传奇人物。只是看你无功而返的样子，忍不住想调侃一下。
E: Relax. I'm not interested in disturbing that living legend. I just couldn't resist messing with you when I saw you come back empty-handed.

C: 不然……
E: Or else...

C: 机会来了█▀▄全体▄▄准备入轨！█▄▀▄▄█
E: That's our chance█▀▄Everyone▄▄get ready to link up!█▄▀▄▄█

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我问：若如此，你为何开拓？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I ask: If so, why do you Trailblaze?</color>

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 我姑且提醒一下。卡芙卡，这是个潜入任务。
E: Just a reminder — this is a stealth mission, Kafka.

C: {NICKNAME}，正好你来了，你怎么看？
E: {NICKNAME}, you arrive just in time. What do you think?

C: 左边？
E: The one on the left?

C: 军团雄赳赳，黑塔乱糟糟，奇物柜子全打翻，忙得不亦乐乎~
E: The majestic Legion, the chaos in Herta, the Curio Cabinet... We can never seem to get a break from it all~

C: …算了，你没事就好。
E: ... Forget it, as long as you're fine.

C: 所以，兜了这么一大圈，<color=#dbc291ff>「宝藏」</color>就是这张配方，{F#丫头}{M#小子}，你怎么说？
E: So, after all that... The <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure</color> is just this recipe, {F#lass}{M#lad}. What do you think?

C: 这样吧，手稿我留着，给你露一手别的功夫。
E: How about this. I'll keep the manuscript, and I'll show you something else.

C: 没办法了，老斑鸠遛了你这么久，结果这债还是要我来还。
E: Well... then I suppose there's no other choice. That old scoundrel... after all these years, I am still paying off his debt.

C: 如果贸然误伤友军，岂不是很过意不去？
E: Wouldn't it be a pity if I accidentally hurt my friends?

C: 有其企业家必有其文化。
E: Company culture stems from the company owner...

C: 一张超绝美丽电光四射的姬子姐姐大头照换「瓜田里猹」的小秘密。
E: A superbly beautiful, dazzling, electrifying portrait shot of Himeko in exchange for the secret behind Richard_Knowitall.

C: 哈，我就觉得她怪怪的……
E: Ha, I knew she was weird...

C: 重建工作才小有进展，最近局部又出现了裂界化的迹象……
E: And now any progress in rebuilding things has been ruined by the reappearance of the Fragmentum...

C: 第二重权限。
E: Tier-2 certification.

C: 我第一个赞成。
E: Hear! Hear!

C: 救命啊——
E: Help!

C: 您这是在锻炼身体？
E: Are you exercising?

C: 断断续续的宇宙无线电重复地叫着一个名字。没有回答。
E: Intermittently, a name is repeated on the cosmic radio. No answer.

C: 视概率而定。也许一劳永逸，她再度按照剧本生活。也许不尽如人意，她依然陷入失忆、求助、修正的循环。
E: There are many possibilities. Maybe she will finally live according to the script once and for all. Or perhaps she will continue the cycle, fall into another amnesia, and begin to seek help, until the next fix.

C: 谢谢讲解，我大概了解了。
E: Thank you for the explanation. I got the gist.

C: 为什么非得让我去…
E: Why me...

C: 嘿嘿，能者多劳嘛。再说啦，并不是我故意欺负你，我先前安排过防卫科员去调查，但他们统统失败啦。
E: Hehe, with great power comes great responsibility. Besides, I'm not just trying to take advantage of you. I sent people from the Security Department earlier, but they all failed.

C: 听你这么说，三个人好像都有点问题，可是理论上来说，应该只有一名真正的感染者。
E: So, all three of them sound unusual. But in theory, there should only be one person who is infected.

C: 不过呢，还是得麻烦您<color=#dbc291ff>明天再来</color>找我一趟了，到明天肯定是有算力的，这一点您放心！
E: However, I'm afraid you'll have to <color=#dbc291ff>come back tomorrow</color>. I'm sure by tomorrow there will have been sufficient computing power!

C: 这个舱段的裂界化程度非常严重，最近就连终端设备也坏掉了，只能重建远程连接，但这需要信标数据……
E: The extent of Fragmentum corrosion in this zone is very severe, and even the terminal devices recently broke. Establishing a remote connection is the only way to go, but that requires beacon data...

C: 恕我不能回答！
E: Forgive me, but I cannot tell!

C: 然后是从镜——像是镜面反射一样，亲自体验别人在职场中所面临的压力，从而多元地感知它。
E: Secondly, trial of the mirror. Like a mirror's reflection, one needs to personally experience the pressure others feel in a job in order to understand it.

C: 脚印
E: Footprint

C: 哎！放心放心！这东西本姑娘见得多了！一个两个的，问题不大。
E: Hey, relax! I've seen plenty of Stellarons — it'll be fine.

C: 我不会也不敢拒绝她…因为黑塔女士作为上司的压迫感，实在是太强了。
E: Even if I dared to refuse, I wouldn't know how. She's just... too overbearing.

C: 那些照片搞得科员人心惶惶。阿兰大哥，你说这事儿该咋办啊……
E: Those photos made every staff member anxious. Arlan, what should we do...

C: 对，想起来了，我放风打千儿时曾经随手翻过一本《星域界种指要》，上面记录了界种科某个名为「戏命鬼」的奇物信息……
E: Oh, now I remember. A while ago, when I was on a break, I came across a book named Species of the Galaxy, which does have a Curio entry called the Jinx...

C: 呜呜…对不起，我失态了……
E: *sniffle* ...Sorry, I lost my composure...

C: 呜。
E: Woo.

C: 呜！
E: Woo!

C: 那位科员的东西全被「军团」怪物抢走了，无论是我，还是其它呜呜伯，先前都费了好大的功夫。
E: That researcher's belongings have all been taken away by Legion monsters. All the other Wubbaboos and I have been spending a huge amount of time and effort on retrieving the taken items.

C: 或许不如意只是一时的。
E: Maybe his misfortune is only temporary.

C: 照片都拍好了。
E: The pictures are all done.

C: 作为这一切的见证者，有个小礼物要给你，{NICKNAME}。
E: This is a small token of appreciation for being such a kind witness to all of this, {NICKNAME}. Please take it.

C: 我也是。如果黑塔女士没有反应，就只有一种可能…
E: Me too. The fact Madam Herta hasn't responded to this can only mean one thing...

C: 那就是主控室也被骇入了。{NICKNAME}，我们应该过去确认一下。
E: ...that the main control room was hacked as well. {NICKNAME}, we need to go and take a look.

C: 不过好奇怪，虽然她暂停了终端传输，但本地数据却一点也没动。我是真的完全搞不懂这家伙了。
E: I am curious though. She paused the terminal transmissions, but didn't touch the local data at all. I really don't get her.

C: 只有一个办法了，接下来，我们去黑塔女士的办公室看看吧！
E: We have no choice but to check Madam Herta's office next!

C: 抱歉，黑塔禁止我提前透露任何信息。她说在这个计划中，重要的不是智慧，而是无知。
E: I'm sorry — Herta forbade me from disclosing any information beforehand. She made clear that knowledge would not be paramount to this operation, but rather the lack of it.

C: 这次我不打算做过多说明，你按自己的节奏来就好。一直往前走，你会看见一个醒目的标志——不用我多形容，你一眼就能看出来。
E: I don't want to explain too much this time, you can take your time to figure it out. Keep walking straight, you should see an eye-catching logo — something you can tell straight away without my description.

C: 再问点别的…
E: I want to ask about something else...

C: 你怎么不说话呀？没事啦，我看他也不像坏人嘛。你好，银枝！我是三月七。
E: Cat got your tongue? It's fine, he seems like a good guy. Hi, Argenti! I'm March 7th.

C: …你清醒点。
E: What are you talking about?

C: 它对我说，它了解我的过去…然后就停了。
E: It said it knew about my past... and then it stopped talking.

C: 原来如此。这样一来，我与维利特此前的遭遇也就得到了解释。
E: I see. That would explain what Velite and I experienced earlier.

C: 回想起来，当时「山洞」中，的确曾传出吞咽与蠕动的声音。
E: Now that I think on it, we did hear sounds akin to swallowing and other movements from the "cave..."

C: 噢？很好的回答。
E: Oh? That's a good answer.

C: 如此短暂…偶然的相逢。有幸认识列车组众人，你们的情感如此美丽。
E: So brief... so unexpected. The chance to get to know all of you on the Express... to witness the beauty of your emotions... is something I'll never forget.

C: 不，她并不在现场，只是从你口中听的转述——这无法构成证明。
E: A second-hand account, she wasn't at the scene. Hearsay hardly counts as compelling evidence, now, does it?

C: 失礼了，是我的坏习惯。从事学术研究的人，总会变得很难相信一件事。相反，质疑它要容易得多。
E: Apologies, it's an unfortunate habit of mine. When one is immersed in academic research, skepticism comes far more naturally than belief.

C: 啊这…不危险、哪有什么危险。
E: Ah, um... no! No danger. Of course, he's not in danger!

C: 哦，没错，那东西叫岁阳。硬要说的话，呜呜伯也算是岁阳的亲戚，都是一种<color=#dbc291ff>能量生命</color>。
E: Ahh, that's right. They're called heliobi. I guess you could say that wubbaboos and heliobi are sort of like cousins — both are types of <color=#dbc291ff>energy lifeform</color>.

C: 那必须是妥妥贴贴。毕竟只要钱到位，什么都好办。
E: It's all taken care of. As long as the money's there, it's all good.

C: 呸，这些个做管理的，行不行啊。
E: Tsk, those managers are useless.

C: （果然，我隐约记得阿兰又说了什么，和我忘记的事有关……）
E: (Just as I thought, I vaguely remember that Arlan said more... It's related to the thing I forgot...)

C: {NICKNAME}，没事的，告诉他吧。
E: It's okay, {NICKNAME}. You can tell him.

C: （这个证物的确有说服力……）
E: (This piece of evidence is indeed more convincing...)

C: 你对我做了什么…
E: What did you do to me...

C: 什么？空间站收容「危险实验品」的地方？
E: What? A place where the space station stores "dangerous experimental results"?

C: 嗯…还得再加点好东西。别洒多了……
E: Hmm... we need to add some other good stuff in. But don't go overboard...

C: 肯定：除模拟宇宙外，我们少有彼此交流的契机。我很期待这次碰撞会带来怎样的思想火花。
