E: Affirmative. Discounting our discussions on the Simulated Universe, our interactions are scarce. I look forward to the innovative ideas that may emerge from this juxtaposition of minds.

C: …你要把斯蒂芬踢出局？
E: ...You wish to kick Stephen out?

C: 但宇宙间的命途并非只有「智识」一条，如果抛却理性，在其他路径上是否存在更原始、也更纯粹的「令使」？
E: However, Erudition isn't the only Path in the Universe. If we set logic aside, would there be more primitive and pure "Emanators" on other Paths?

C: 「微不足道的一步」——和预想中一样的答案。
E: Haha, and it was "a minuscule step" — just as I had predicted.

C: 阮•梅女士的生命培育。嘶嘶。
E: Madam Ruan Mei's cultivated lifeforms. *buzz*

C: 已完成星穹列车航线数据的同步。已锁定第一个目标地点：贝洛伯格-行政区-中央广场。
E: Synchronization with Astral Express navigation data complete. Locked on to first target destination: Belobog Administrative District — Central Plaza.

C: 当前目标人物为「华劳斯」。
E: Current target: "Wallace."

C: 好久不见了塔米拉，试唱还顺利吧，我可是连庆功的鲜花都买好了。
E: Long time no see, Tamila. Your audition went well, I assume? I even bought you some flowers to celebrate!

C: 可如果是有人故意惹事——有{NICKNAME}在，他们也翻不出什么波浪。
E: But if it's someone deliberately causing trouble... {NICKNAME} will be able to stop them before they can do anything bad.

C: 我就是个开茶庄的，还是老老实实泡茶吧。
E: I'm just a teahouse owner. I'll just stick to brewing tea.

C: 确认。已掌握{NICKNAME}的行为模式，今后将自主执行力所能及的善意行为。
E: Affirmative. I have studied and ascertained {NICKNAME}'s behavioral patterns and will independently carry out acts of kindness within my ability in the future.

C: 你忍着不出声也没用啊……
E: Holding your breath won't help...

C: 真可惜！好不容易能来一次不带包袱的旅行……
E: Pity, he's gonna miss out! We never get the chance to go on a stress-free adventure.

C: 好耶！贝洛伯格，准备好再迎接本姑娘一次吧！
E: Belobog, here we come!

C: 直到「星核」危机解除，公司才发现贝洛伯格居然一直存续到了现在…于是就派了托帕小姐前来催债。
E: ...It wasn't until the Stellaron crisis was resolved that the IPC discovered that Belobog had survived...

C: 大守护者小姐，还请你认真考虑一下我的方案。如果雅利洛-Ⅵ还想在未来重建与银河众星的联系…你们在公司这里的信用记录会无比重要。
E: Please consider my plans carefully, Supreme Guardian. If Jarilo-VI wants to rebuild its connections with the rest of the galaxy, your credit record with the IPC will be of great importance.

C: 哇，看！这是雅利洛-Ⅵ上的小动物吗？
E: Wow, look! Is that little critter native to Jarilo-VI!?

C: 但这不影响恐慌情绪在人们心中堆积…大家都有些不知所措，不知道陌生的黑衣人从哪来、他们究竟抱有什么目的。
E: Still, that hasn't stopped panic from building... People are confused — they don't know where these strangers in black came from, nor what their intentions are.

C: 托帕给的期限很紧，我猜她是想让我尽快做出决定。
E: Topaz hasn't given me much time to consider. She wants me to decide as soon as possible.

C: 我看到过几组观测数字，按照现在寒潮消退的速率，至少要再过三四代人的时间，笼罩城市的风雪才能完全停歇。
E: I've looked at some of the climate reports, and based on the data I've seen, it'll take three or four more generations for the snow to completely subside.

C: 克拉拉的想法也很重要。
E: Clara's opinion is just as important!

C: 这才是最需要领袖站出来的时候呀……
E: It's times like these that a leader must stand up and do what's needed...

C: 算了，权当摸鱼…
E: Forget it, they're just slacking on the job...

C: 歌蒂家的太阳薄饼~
E: Gertie's suncakes are fresh out of the oven⁓

C: 不是因为参加「互助会」吗？
E: Soooo nothing to do with you joining the mutual aid society then?

C: 我听人说，瓦赫医生离世跟他妹妹娜塔莎有关。说是那个女人嫉妒瓦赫医生抢走了自己的病人，所以才……
E: I heard that Natasha had something to do with Dr. Vache's death. They say she was jealous that her brother had stolen her patients, so she...

C: 被生活逼迫到那种地步的人，任何放在眼前的机会都不会放过…哪怕是要他们拿命去赌。
E: When life forces you to the edge, you'll throw yourself at any opportunity... even if it means risking it all.

C: 先去告诉娜塔莎吧。
E: Let's tell Natasha first.

C: 那是瓦赫说的话，跟我们「互助会」没关系。
E: You sound like Vache. That isn't how the mutual aid society works.

C: 您还没自我介绍。
E: You haven't introduced yourself yet.

C: ——更不会容忍你这种骗子！
E: ...And she'd never work with an impostor like you!

C: 不…但我一直以为，我们的关系比同父同母的兄妹更亲密。
E: No... but I used to think we were so close that we may as well have been...

C: <size=36>比赛，现在正式开始！</size>
E: <size=36>The match officially starts now!</size>

C: 很有意思的定律！
E: That's an interesting law!

C: 你可别小看人。
E: Don't underestimate me.

C: 小朋友，你迷路了吗？
E: Hey, are you lost?

C: …不对，我不能从这里离开。他和姐姐，他们中只要有一个人在就好了…他们一定能解释清楚……
E: ...No, I can't leave this place. If only either he or my sister were here... they'd be able to explain everything to you...

C: 这事说来有点不可思议…
E: Well, actually, this matter is a bit strange...

C: 这个敌人盘踞在道路上…只有打倒它才能前进了。
E: The enemy is guarding this path... Looks like we have to defeat them to go forward.

C: （查宝好像有反应了，在这附近仔细搜索吧。）
E: (Findie seems to have found something. Let's take a look around here.)

C: 把那株花送给哥哥的时候，我看到他露出了笑意。你肯定想不到，要让那个人笑一笑是件多难的事。
E: When we gave him the flower, he failed to hide his smile. You can't imagine how hard it was to get him to smile.

C: 听说「球牡丹」的花语是「永不磨灭的爱」——用这几个字来形容他们的婚姻，的确再合适不过了。
E: I heard that Ball Peonies represent "love that knows no end..." It does fit their marriage.

C: 或许吧，但如果他写下这些字的时候还清醒着…
E: It's possible. But what if he was still sane when he wrote this down...

C: 真贴心，好意我先心领了——但你可别小看了「地火」领袖的体质啊。
E: Hehe, that's very kind of you. Don't you underestimate the leader of Wildfire.

C: 你也看到了吗？那怪物身后好像有什么东西。
E: Did you see that? There's something on the monster's back.

C: 我要带走这些实验记录和资料，继续瓦赫未竟的研究。总有一天，最完美的「风雪免疫」将会问世。
E: I'll take his records and data with me and continue what he started. One day, the world will see a perfect Blizzard Immunity.

C: 话说回来，墓碑上一般都会有题字，对吧？让我想想……
E: People write things on headstones, right? Let me think...

C: 挑好了吗？让我看看你选了什么花吧。
E: All done? May I have a look?

C: 不怎么顺，但还过得去。
E: Things could be better.

C: 欢迎光临，{NICKNAME}。这里就是贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。
E: {NICKNAME}, welcome to Belobog's History and Culture Museum.

C: 「有意者请联系——」
E: "If interested, please get in touch..."

C: …你知道「齿轮与智慧」从最初的设计稿到最终建成，一共花了多久吗？
E: Let me ask you something — do you know how long it took to make Gears and Wisdom from initial design to completion?

C: 史瓦罗先生已经执行了几次集体扫描了…但还是查不出故障的源头。
E: Mr. Svarog scanned the robots for irregularities, but the results all came back normal.

C: 不能坐视不理。
E: Sounds like they could use our help.

C: …初次见面，你好，史瓦罗先生。
E: ...It's nice to meet you, Mr. Svarog.

C: 没错，真是救命了。
E: Yes, you two are real lifesavers!

C: …不是啦，那种东西随时都能补拍，你以为我不知道吗？
E: No. As you just pointed out, that kind of thing is easily replaced.

C: 你知道文物失窃的事吗？
E: Do you know anything about the stolen museum artifacts?

C: 谈不上有直接联系，但我那位失联的朋友以前确实喜好逛展，也经常和我们一众茶友聊起相关的话题。
E: I can't say for sure that it's directly related, but a friend of mine I no longer hear from used to frequent the museum, and often talked about its exhibits with a group of us tea lovers.

C: 为什么去那里？
E: Why there?

C: 这么说来，这位诺尔伯特公子真的很有可能是我们要找的文物大盗咯？
E: ...So this Mr. Norbert could well be the museum thief we're looking for?

C: 进来吧，赶紧进屋来，咱们好好讨论下接下来的生意怎么进行。
E: Here, hurry up and come inside. We need to discuss the details of our next operation.

C: 「有需要的话随时打我号码，你的老朋友保证随叫随到！放心吧，干一行爱一行，我很有敬业精神的——绝对连展品的一根毫毛都不碰。嘿嘿。」
E: "What I mean to say is, If you're ever in need of a passionate and professional individual — one with an inside knowledge of museum security blind spots — I'm only a call away! Don't worry, my exhibit smuggling days are behind me, hehe..."

C: 很久吗？真的？你要不要再考虑考虑？
E: Really? A long time? Does time flow differently for you?

C: {NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，我先带虎克去做入职前的准备工作了——谢谢你，陪我们完成了这次面试……
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I'll take Hook with me to prepare her for the job. Thanks for being with us during the interview.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 还有你——面试官布洛妮娅，你倒是说词儿啊！
E: And you, Lady Bronya. Why don't you say something?

C: 不管怎么样…只要她满意就够了。
E: Anyway... Everything's fine as long as she's happy.

C: …嗯，连结车体跟底盘的「销子」坏了，后轮的「轮对轴承」也断了。一看就是史瓦罗的喽啰干的。
E: ...Hmm. Even the pin connecting the body to the chassis is broken, not to mention the rear wheelset bearing. This looks like the work of Svarog's minions.

C: 我检查一下……
E: Let me see...

C: 前面的矿道估计已经被机器人占领了，走路小心点儿。
E: The robots will have seized the road ahead by now. We should go carefully.

C: 啊，对了！在来矿区之前，虎克还在路上看到了桑博叔叔…这件事会不会跟他有关系啊？
E: Oh yeah! I saw Mr. Sampo on the way to the mine when I came here... Could he be involved in this?

C: 咳、咳…一点擦伤而已。虎克呢？你还好吧？
E: *coughing* ...Just a few scratches. How about you, Hook?

C: 哎，我想什么呢？指望那帮混蛋懂得感恩……
E: *sigh* I was so naive... How can I expect those rascals to know anything about gratitude...

C: 没错！虎克觉得，事情不能就这么结了！
E: Yes! We can't just stand by and do nothing!

C: 先冷静点，等消息吧。
E: Just stay calm and wait for the news.

C: 藏宝图？我听着像诈骗…
E: Treasure map? That sounds like a fraud...

C: 我就知道，咱俩谁跟谁啊，你肯定会帮我的！
E: I knew it! We are such close mates. I knew you'd help a brother out!

C: 杂乱的矿具遮挡住了机械矿稿的存在，一不仔细看还难以分辨它的身形…这么看来，桑博先前的说辞应该是真的。
E: The mess of mining tools obscures the pick from view. It would be difficult to spot it at first glance... It seems what Sampo said earlier was true.

C: 哦哦，原来是你，娜塔莎医生派来的外来者！太感谢了，没有你的话，我接下来这一个月怕是都睡不上安稳觉了……
E: Oh, it's you! The outsider sent by Dr. Natasha! Thank you so much. If not for you, I'm afraid I wouldn't be able to sleep for a whole month...

C: 告诉你们一个天大的好消息。
E: Wanna hear something really great?

C: 我只是觉得难以置信，他竟然能不假思索地执行可可利亚的封锁令……
E: I just couldn't believe that he never lifted a finger to oppose Cocolia's order to seal the passageway...

C: 裂界怪物也会使诈？
E: A trap laid by a Fragmentum monster? Are they that smart?

C: 那就交给你啦——我会乖乖跟着你的。
E: I'll leave it to you then. I'm gonna follow right behind you.

C: 这是…一捆红肠？
E: ...Are these sausages?

C: 至于这捆红肠…还是留在这里，等物主来拿吧。
E: Let's leave the sausages here, I think someone might be missing them if we take them.

C: 你为什么会在这里啊？！
E: How did it get here!?

C: 你的哥哥姐姐派我来的。
E: Serval and Gepard sent me.

C: 家人就是这样的。
E: That's how families are.

C: 是啊……
E: Yeah...

C: 怎么会呢——只要玲宝她能保护好自己，不管做什么，我都支持！
E: No way. As long as Lynxy can protect herself, I'll be supportive in all her ventures!

C: 然而，那位受佩妮娅女士委托的同事，在返程途中遭到了裂界生物袭击。
E: But that colleague was attacked by Fragmentum creatures on his way back to the city.

C: 你还好吗，玲可？
E: Lynx, are you okay?

C: 只剩这里没找了…但愿我没记错。
E: We've looked everywhere but here... I hope my memory is right.

C: 哼，安抚我不会，打醒你要几次都行。
E: Hmph. I'm no good at consoling, but I can hit you on the head a few times. No problem.

C: 啊？你怎么连这都不知道，难道你没玩过打弹珠游戏嘛？
E: What? Hee-hee, you don't know? Have you never played marbles before!?

C: 不对不对…这个世界上才没有那种东西……
E: No, no, no... Ghosts don't exist...

C: 虽然你们的计划跟矿工喝醉以后的胡言乱语差不多，但至少指了条路。下层人早已无路可走，事已至此，我宁愿在你们身上赌一把。
E: Your plan sounds a bit like the ravings of a drunken miner, but at least you're offering a road forwards. We Underworlders haven't had a road to anywhere for a long time now, and you can see how things have become. I'm willing to give you guys a shot.

C: 请伸出右手。
E: Please extend your right hand.

C: 你说这个？喏，你看。
E: You mean this? Here, look.

C: 你这是凭空污人清白！
E: Ahh, you're just salty, my friend!

C: …怕是没你想的那么轻松自在。
E: ...It wasn't as fun as you think.

C: 果然不该放你一个人乱跑，实在太危险了。话说回来，你在这里找什么啊？
E: You shouldn't be running around by yourself. It's too dangerous. What are you looking for here?

C: 机器人也有脸色呀？
E: Isn't a robot shoulder cold to begin with?

C: 喂，你去哪！眼下还有更重要的事吧，别到处神游啦！
E: Hey, where are you going? We have more important things to do. Stop dilly-dallying!

C: 别理他了…
E: Just ignore him...

C: 没这回事，绝对没有…
E: No, of course not...

C: 大熊玩偶？我看到过，就是缝着黑宝石的那个对吧？我本来是想买的……
E: The teddy bear? I've seen it. The one with the erebus eyes, right? I was planning on bidding for it...

C: 奶奶，奶奶，就是那个小妹妹和{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}救了我。
E: Grandma, grandma! They're the ones who saved me.

C: 求、求求娜塔莎姐姐啦！只要肯帮我，虎克就主动帮你打扫诊所半个月！
E: Pleeease Natasha! I'll help you clean the clinic for... half a month if you help me!

C: 想找机器人外壳的话，机械墓场附近应该会有现成的吧？虽说大家都叫它「墓场」…但那里其实藏着不少有用的部件呢。
E: There must be some robot shells lying around the machine graveyard. Everyone calls it a graveyard, but there are actually lots of useful parts buried there.

C: 您好，克拉拉小姐的客人，不好也行，您请便。很高兴为您服务。
E: Hello, guest of Miss Clara. Please do as you wish! It's my honor to serve you.

C: 克拉拉说你有些简陋…
E: Clara described you as primitive...

C: 您是否需要开启「超级加速」模式？若是，请原地逆时针旋转十周后再顺时针旋转<unbreak>270</unbreak>°以确认。
E: Would you like to engage in Super Speed mode? If so, please confirm by spinning counterclockwise <unbreak>10</unbreak> times, then clockwise by <unbreak>270</unbreak> degrees.

C: 克拉拉，到休息时间了。我反对在负面情绪影响下维修机械，这将对你的身体和精神状况造成损伤。
E: Clara, it's time for a break. You shouldn't repair machines when you have negative emotions. It's bad for your physical and mental health.

C: 克拉拉将帕斯卡的核心移植到了报废的自动机兵「灰熊」体内……
E: Clara transferred Pascal's Core Module into the scrapped Automaton Grizzly...

C: 你忍心亲自抹除它的数据吗？
E: Can you endure the thought of erasing his data yourself?

C: （听起来似乎有点残忍，但这个办法或许确实可以根除帕斯卡带来的安全隐患……）
E: (Although it may sound cruel, this approach best prevents Pascal from posing a threat...)

C: 你可以考虑下克拉拉的方案吗？
E: Can you give Clara's idea some thought?

C: 理解。敌意侦测模块目前亦无反应。
E: I understand. I also do not detect any hostility from him.

C: 「克拉拉的决心」——该条目包含的信息难以量化，可能会导致计算阻塞。
E: "Clara's determination." This entry contains information that is difficult to quantify and may cause computational difficulties.

C: 这是对帕斯卡盗窃的惩罚。
E: This is Pascal's punishment for stealing.

C: 我，我，我！很，好！
E: I, I, I! Very, good!

C: 拜托，这是技术部门的事，你守门的知道了能干嘛？行了，快让我进去吧。要是半夜供暖出了问题，冻死人了你负责吗？
E: Oh please, this is a Technology Division issue. Why would they tell you guys? Come on, let us in already. If the heating system goes down in the middle of the night, are you gonna be responsible for all the frozen corpses?

C: 你清醒一点…
E: What are you talking about...?

C: ——但布洛妮娅小姐是前线实际上的指挥官。根据军规，当前线指挥与后方筑城者的指令发生冲突时，应原地等待进一步的指令。
E: But... Lady Bronya is the commanding officer for the front lines. According to military protocol, if the front line directives of the commanding officer clash with those of the Architects behind the lines, a soldier must remain at their post and await further directives.

C: 嗯？茉莉怎么跑来了，还先了我们一步？
E: Huh? Why is Molly here? And she got here before us?

C: 是不是还有其它的装置？
E: *sigh* Are there other units around?

C: 成功啦！这下机关门应该就被破解了，可真是费了不少功夫啊……
E: Done! It took some effort, but we finally cracked these mechanisms...

C: 咝！这也是残影吗？
E: *gasp* Are these echoes too?

C: …姬子，是姬子！
E: ...Himeko, it's Himeko!

C: 母亲…不知道你最后有没有从梦里醒来……
E: Mother... Did you ever finally wake up from that dream...?

C: 希儿！别激动。
E: Seele! Calm down.

C: 谢谢你们，三月，丹恒，还有{NICKNAME}。我知道这颗星球只是你们旅途中的小小一站，但你们做出的贡献一定会被贝洛伯格人永远铭记。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}, March, and Dan Heng. I know this planet is just one small stop on your long journey, but your help will be forever remembered by the people of Belobog.

C: 哔嘟…这里不是「星际和平家电」门店。
E: Beep, beep, beep... This is not an Interastral Peace Appliances store.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你需要在规定时间内，记下往来这里的所有星槎的型号和颜色。等到结束之后，我会向你提问。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will need to remember the models and colors of all starskiffs that pass by within the specified time period, and I will ask you a few questions at the end.</color>

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>客运型的星槎</color>根据虽然各不相同，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有蓝、绿、白三种颜色。</color>
E: Although <color=#dbc291ff>passenger starskiffs</color> do vary, they generally come in <color=#dbc291ff>blue, green, or white.</color>

C: 幸好我们来得及时，我已经联系了丹鼎司医馆，急救小队一会儿就会赶过来。
E: Luckily we got here in time. I contacted the Alchemy Commission's apothecary and an emergency dispatch will be here soon.

C: 能告诉我你亲属的联系方式吗？
E: Do you have any family you can contact?

C: 我问的是联系方式。
E: I'm asking for a contact.

C: 梅姐这人确实挺笨的。
E: Mei does seem a little dense.

C: 怎么开始说梅姐坏话了？
E: Why are you bad-mouthing Mei?

C: 你们真的不是一家人吗？
E: Are you really not family?

C: 啊，我还想到了一点有用的信息，我这个人天生听力很好…「咚——」、「哐——」、「咔嚓咔嚓——」、「咣——」。
E: Oh, I recalled some information that may be useful. My hearing had always been good... I heard something like "thud," "crash," "whoosh," and "clang!"

C: 我找到了一些。
E: I found some of them.

C: 不好意思，请让我插一下话。我是天舶司测速员檀檀，我想问问在刚才事故的情况……
E: Sorry to interrupt. I am Tantan, Speed Tester from the Sky-Faring Commission. I would like to ask about the incident...

C: 梅姐被摔糊涂了吗？
E: Did you get hit on the head too hard, Mei?

C: 这个角度上看，不同星槎的颜色很明显。
E: From this angle, the colors of the different starskiffs are obvious.

C: 我比对了好几次，结果好像不太对。我是说有没有一种可能是…推理本身出问题了。
E: I checked it several times and it didn't seem quite right. I mean, is it possible that... there is something wrong with the reasoning.

C: 哈？我没有听错吧，不会是有人嫉妒我吧。
E: You are just jealous of me.

C: 你问的这个我实在不知道，你还是去问其他人吧。
E: I really can't answer this question. It's better if you ask other people.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 听说你有事求人？
E: I heard you needed help?

C: 唉，可我有需要它忧郁的理由，只好苦一苦这台机器了。
E: *sigh* I have my reasons for wanting it to be depressed, so I'm stuck bringing despair to this bot.

C: 柳林琼浆饮千杯，冲打陷阵胡不归！
E: At the Nectar of Willow Woods drink ye deep, rush headlong into battle to meet that eternal sleep!

C: 咳，这…先生的想法虽然极尽浪漫，只恐《罗浮治安管理条例》不肯。
E: Ahem, that's... Sir, that's an extremely romantic idea you have there, but I'm just worried that the Luofu Public Security Management Regulations will not agree.

C: 没错，就是这样的。
E: Yes. That's it.

C: 你没有押韵，我必须惩治你。但我念你还未把握情况，便再给你一次机会。
E: You did not rhyme with my line, and I must punish you for that. However, considering that you haven't got the swing of things, I'll give you another chance.

C: {NICKNAME}，你能帮我补充一句吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, could you add one sentence for me?

C: 我可没说我想追求静斋。
E: I didn't say I was interested in Jingzhai.

C: 我本来也觉得这样的感情浪漫又有趣。他曾是云骑军，曾和我一起占卜，也曾为我写过诗……
E: I thought it was romantic and fun too in the beginning. He was a Cloud Knight at some point, and a diviner working with me at some other point, and was also once a poet who wrote poems for me...

C: 谢谢你，你就是我的知音。
E: Thank you, you're the only one who understands me.

C: 我看上去有这么闲的吗？
E: Do I look like someone who's got nothing better to do?

C: 那么调查结果呢？这个「美丽狐仙聊天」到底是真的是慰藉心灵的秘密聊天，还是纯纯的跨星际诈骗呢？
E: What's the result of the investigation? Is this Foxian Beauty Chat really a secret online counseling chatroom, or is it a plain and simple interplanetary scam?

C: …你现在开始怀疑公职人员了吧。
E: ...And now you're defaming a public official.

C: 啊，全让他们给跑了…他们真的是云骑军？
E: Agh, they ran away... Are they really Cloud Knights?

C: 很显然不是。
E: Obviously not.

C: 真的吗？
E: Really?

C: 那你肯定是想去地衡司报案吧！
E: So you must be going to the Realm-Keeping Commission to report her!

C: 你得到了「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相，去把它带给艾丝妲吧。
E: You have uncovered the truth behind the Foxian Beauty Chat. Go and inform Asta.

C: 「虚张声势」可不是什么好话…
E: Calling it a "charade" doesn't sound like a good thing...

C: 我觉得你有问题。
E: I think you have a problem.

C: 那位科员内心可脆弱了，我们又不是为了取笑他才做了这么多的调查。
E: That researcher is a little soft on the inside. And we didn't do all of this investigating just so we could mock him for it, right?

C: 你又在四处张望什么？
E: Why are you looking around?

C: 他说自己还见到了沉睡在水底的<color=#dbc291ff>持明卵</color>，我不知道他到底用什么法子钻进海里了？难不成他也能分开海水？开个玩笑，他多半是穿上了潜水服。
E: He also told me that he had seen a sunken <color=#dbc291ff>Vidyadhara egg</color> underwater. I wonder how he got into the sea. Could he have controlled the water and moved it away? Just kidding. He must have worn a diving suit.

C: 如果这些图样描绘了仙舟历史的重要阶段，那么它一定不止三个。{NICKNAME}，接下来咱们可以深入探一探鳞渊境。老师去过那儿，一定留下了其他痕迹。
E: If these drawings are about the important moments in Xianzhou history, there must be more than three. {NICKNAME}, let's go deeper into Scalegorge Waterscape and explore. Since my master went there before, he must have left some other clues.

C: 狐人虽然长寿，终究无法迈过死亡的大限。仙舟人拥有无尽形寿…却换来了疯狂。
E: The foxians have a long lifespan, but they aren't immortal. The Xianzhou people have an endless lifespan, but it has driven them to madness...

C: 陶德抬起自己曾经干瘪枯瘦的手，那些皱纹已然消失，露出白皙光滑的肌肤。
E: Todd raised his once dry and skinny hand to show that his wrinkles had disappeared, revealing fair, smooth skin instead.

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈哈……
E: Ha... Hahaha...

C: 你有某种与生俱来的正义感？还是你相信了仙舟人禁绝丰饶的那套说辞？唉，这都不重要了。
E: Do you have some sense of innate justice? Or do you believe that rhetoric about how the Xianzhou people forbid Abundance? *sigh* None of that matters now, anyway.

C: 拜托，{NICKNAME}，什么都不用做。你能来和我聊聊，我已经很高兴了。
E: Please, {NICKNAME}. There really is no need for anything. Just coming to chat with me is cause enough for celebration.

C: 【奇怪的药方】
E: Strange Prescription

C: 这么说来，你真是「药王秘传」的人？哼，半夏姐姐是个骗子！大骗子！
E: Banxia... are you really from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus? Hmph, you're a liar! A great big liar!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我的确就是「药王秘传」的人。</color>那个丹鼎司的医士，也确实是他们派来抓捕我的。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I am a member of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus,</color> and that doctor from the Alchemy Commission was sent to catch me.

C: 这种事情，我怎么会知道啦。他们又不会在脸上写着「我是药王秘传」。
E: How should I know? It's not like commission members walk around with "Disciple of Sanctus Medicus" on their foreheads.

C: 大海似在呼唤着孩子。
E: The sea seems to be calling for the child.

C: 你已经为我做了很多很多了。比我的老师和弟子们加起来都多。而我已不需要再麻烦任何人了。
E: You've already done so much for me. More than my teachers and apprentices combined. And I don't want to bother anyone else anymore.

C: 貘馍卷！鸣藕糕！琼实鸟串！来看看哎！
E: Tuskpir wrap! Songlotus cake! Berrypheasant skewers! Come and get 'em!

C: 孩子一溜烟跑得不见踪影了。
E: The boy vanished without a trace.

C: {NICKNAME}快帮忙，让她先在这里休息一下，我来想点办法。
E: {NICKNAME}, let her rest here for a while. I'll think of something.

C: 喂！
E: Hey!

C: 你说，半夏姐姐算是见到了她心上人最后一面了吗？
E: Do you think she saw him one last time?

C: 她已经做到了。
E: She succeeded.

C: 在此之前…请问这位是？
E: Before this goes ahead... Oh, who might this be?

C: 是你教给我用来修复封印的那股力量吗？
E: You mean the power to repair the seal? The power you taught me?

C: 一手交钱，一手交货。这么简单的规矩，您不会不懂吧？
E: Not before I see the money. I'm sure you understand the rules of such a transaction?

C: 小心点，这东西很危险。告辞。
E: Be careful, dangerous is an understatement with this item. I'll take my leave.

C: 杨叔，咋啦，这人不对劲吗？
E: ...What's wrong, Mr. Yang? See anything fishy?

C: 该怎么解释呢…因为他的长相……
E: How should I put this... He just looks kind of...

C: 然后他跑到码头上，捡了一堆行李？
E: And then he runs to the dock and picks up some luggage?

C: 写这本书的苏芳老师本身就是丹鼎司医助，在医学原理的设定上还是很严谨的。
E: Su Fang, the author, was a medical assistant in the Alchemy Commission. The medical principles in the novel are strictly grounded in reality.

C: 原来只是恰好同路…那你有没有注意到那个金头发的化外民在做什么？
E: So you just happened to be going the same way... Did you see what the outworlder was doing?

C: 这么奇怪的事情，我竟然忘得一干二净…可能是隔天建木生发，出现了太多惊人的事，让这件事都显得微不足道了吧……
E: I can't believe I'd forget something like that... I guess the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection the day after pushed everything else to the back of my mind...

C: 罗刹撕书没有来由，必有深意。
E: It might seem like a random action at first glance, but there has to be more to it.

C: 卖星核的小罗刹？
E: So Luocha's an impoverished Stellaron peddler now?

C: （我一直都很有逻辑！根据推演，假扮执事这一招是行不通的。）
E: (I'm always logical! And based on my deduction, pretending to be an officer isn't gonna work...)

C: 晴霓小姐不必担心，我们经历过比这更危险的情况。
E: Don't worry, Miss Qingni. We've been in worse danger.

C: 不，晴霓小姐不必多礼，只是举手之劳罢了。
E: No need, Miss Qingni. It was nothing.

C: 确实，如果光看外表，谁也没法想象仙舟长生种活了几倍于我们的人生。
E: ...but you're not wrong. Appearances seemingly tell us little about the lives of the Xianzhou's leaders, no matter how long those lives may have been.

C: 如果妈妈还眷恋天空，她又为什么不再飞行了呢？
E: If Mom still longs for the sky, then why does she no longer fly?

C: 妈！
E: Mom!

C: 去你的吧。我看你是太久没机会和我一起飞行，现在才这么激动的。是不是想我想得不得了？
E: Oh, shut it. I think you're just excited because you haven't flown with me for so long. Did you miss me?

C: 啊？真的吗！谢谢妈妈！谢谢妈妈！谢谢妈妈！
E: Huh? Really!? Thank you, Mom! Thank you, thank you, thank you!!!

C: 晴霓小姐，别说傻话。我们不会丢下你的。
E: No can do, Miss Qingni — we're not abandoning you.

C: 你应该清楚我为什么要阻止你…如果你离开，往后的故事是真的，真的从你的未来里消失，它会变成无法更改的过去，再也没有反悔的机会。
E: You know why I'm trying to stop you, right...? If you leave, the story that follows will vanish from your future. It will become an unalterable, irrevocable past.

C: （「卡芙卡」的事情）
E: (Ask about Kafka)

C: （云骑把守着这里，也许我可以偷偷破坏那具金人？）
E: (There are Cloud Knights guarding this place. Maybe I can destroy the aurumaton in secret?)

C: （我想要再见到卡芙卡）
E: (I want to see Kafka again)

C: …等等，你不走？
E: ...Wait, you're not leaving?

C: 我等接到密信，前来捉拿通缉要犯！乖乖放下武器，束手就擒！
E: We've received an order to capture the wanted criminal! Put down your weapons and come with us!

C: 我愿意转做污点证人…
E: I'm willing to become a prosecution witness...

C: 好奇怪的云彩…
E: Strange clouds...

C: 有人动了流云渡的操纵台，用货箱堵住了路。
E: Somebody used the Cloudford control panel to block the road with containers.

C: 呃欸欸欸！竟然还有个这么大的靠山！
E: Ahhhh! There's an even bigger monster protecting this one!

C: 喔，说说而已。小弟弟，不必这么如临大敌。我只是在缅怀旧日时光。
E: Relax — you needn't be so cautious, young man. I'm just reminiscing about the old days.

C: 嗯？
E: Hmm?

C: 漂亮，漂亮，这步棋，下得精彩。
E: Splendid, well done. This was a spectacular move.

C: 戳一戳…
E: Poke...

C: （放下小说）
E: (Put the novel down)

C: 景元教过你斩杀孽物…
E: Jing Yuan taught you how to slay abominations...

C: 这位异邦的客人，请留步，你渴望长生吗？
E: Excuse me, guest from another world. Please spare me a moment of your time. Do you yearn for immortality?

C: 嘘，说话小声些…这帮家伙可不是吃素的，要是让他们发觉咱俩是卧底，那一个也跑不了。
E: Shh, keep your voice down — these disciples don't miss much. If they discover us, we won't make it out of here.

C: 嘘，说话小声些…这帮家伙可不是吃素的，要是让他们发觉咱俩是卧底，那一个也跑不了。
E: Shh, keep your voice down — these disciples don't miss much. If they discover us, we won't make it out of here.

C: 我有长期合作的伙伴…
E: I have a long-term associate that handles problems like this.

C: 吓死我了，咱们可是一条绳上的蚂蚱。
E: Gah, enough with the jokes already — it's a miracle either of us is alive.

C: （这里有一封信，信封上写着…「灰牡丹」？这是绿芙蓉给我的信吧。）
E: (There's a letter here... What's this on the envelope? "Gray Peony..." This must be from Green Hibiscus.)

C: （似乎不在这个物流鸟架上，找找其他的吧。）
E: (It doesn't seem to be on this Cycrane Stand. Let's check out another one.)

C: 到日子是什么意思？
E: What do you mean by "her day"?

C: 负责开药方的人，身份大都比较敏感…虽然我知道他们的身份，但为了他们的安全，我不能告知任何人……
E: That's sensitive information... I know who they are, but for their security, I can't reveal their identities...

C: 眼下有几位可靠的丹士正驻留长乐天，要请你跑一趟，向他们咨询这方子的细节关窍。这样神策府也好有的放矢，备制解药……
E: There are a few reliable alchemists that reside in Exalting Sanctum. I'd like to ask you to consult with them on the particulars of the prescription. This will allow the Seat of Divine Foresight to have a clear target for creating an antidote...

C: 我甚至都很难想象，她竟然是一位目不能见的天缺者……
E: All the more amazing given her sightlessness, wouldn't you say?

C: 在下听其他丹士说了，你有药方要我鉴定？读给在下听听吧。
E: I heard from other alchemists you have a prescription you wish me to assess... can you read it to me?

C: 你要留在这儿？不成不成，工造司也不够安全了。这样吧，我就再辛苦一阵，护送你和罗刹先生一段路。
E: You want to stay here? No, no, the Artisanship Commission isn't safe enough. How about this — I'll escort you and Mr. Luocha a little further.

C: 太卜真是神算无误。
E: You really do live up to your title.

C: 怎么又是你？我回忆过去关你什么事，为啥要阻挠我！
E: You again? What I do with my past is none of your business! Why do you have to make things difficult!?

C: 再等等。
E: Wait.

C: 若要解决星核灾变，首先便要厘清一个问题：问题的关键究竟为何? 我们一般认为，抓住了问题的关键，其他一切就能迎刃而解。
E: If we want to resolve the Stellaron crisis, we must refine the question: What is the crux of the problem? Generally, it is believed that when one seizes on the crux of a problem, the problem will split open like bamboo on the edge of a knife.

C: 好复杂，听得我都要长脑子了…有没有更简单的解释？
E: Umm, this is getting a little complicated... Is there a... simpler explanation?

C: 以前是歌德宾馆，现在是桑博宾馆了啊！老歌德年老体衰，无力经营这么大的产业，就把它托付给了自己最信任的年轻人——桑博！
E: WAS Goethe Hotel, hehe — now it's the Sampo Hotel! In the autumn of his years, Old Goethe got too old to run this place — so he handed it down to his most trusted young confidant — Sampo Koski!

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 你被籍籍无名之辈们拣到，抚养。你是唯一的救主，重生的许诺。
E: You were found and raised by strangers. You are the only savior — the promise of rebirth.

C: 聊聊宝剑。
E: Let's talk about the sword.

C: （再观察一下）
E: (Observe a bit more.)

C: 我虽然听不清他们详细交谈了什么，却仍记得含光锻出旷世神兵，求剑的异邦旅人则浮现出笑容——我曾以为匠人是给人带来幸福的职业。
E: I didn't catch all the details, but I do remember seeing him forge those amazing swords while the visitors watched with smiles on their faces. I used to believe that craftsmen brought happiness to others.

C: 仙舟人铸造剑器时会赋以简单的灵智，便于士兵操纵。但要克服恐惧，培养敏锐的临战判断，仍需要漫长的时间不可，所以——
E: Usually, Xianzhou swordsmiths infuse a basic level of awareness into their swords to make them easier to wield. But even then, soldiers need to experience countless battles to overcome fear and sharpen their instincts, so...

C: 你刚才说，这是一场孤独的战争。
E: You said it was a lonely war.

C: 一点点苦涩的怜悯，一点点滚烫的勇气，你心底最大的渴望是结束战斗。
E: A hint of bitter compassion and a touch of scalding courage. Your heart's deepest desire is to end war once and for all.

C: 你在难过个什么劲啊，小丫头。是感到后悔了吗？
E: Why the long face, my child? Are you feeling regret, perhaps?

C: 这一路上谢谢你的劝诫，{NICKNAME}。无以为报…不知道你是不是有兴趣和三月一起在我这儿学剑？
E: Thank you for your guidance, {NICKNAME}. I'm truly grateful... By any chance, would you be interested in taking sword lessons with me, like March?

C: 不知在下是否能有幸得知你的名字？
E: May I have the honor of knowing your name?

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 要是你万策尽了，记得联系我哦。我这个人很重视情谊。
E: If you're all out of options, please get in touch with me. I'm the kind of person who values friendship highly.

C: 「我在奥帝购物中心附近给你留了道谜题，解开它，证明你有能力取悦我。如果你能做到…我们也不是不能谈谈。」
E: "I left a puzzle for you near Oti Mall. Solve it and prove that you're capable of pleasing me. If you can solve it... then we can talk."

C: 钟珊这人胆子比较小，遇见山贼转身就跑，结果撞到了山岩上，<color=#dbc291ff>整张脸都破相了</color>。可惜可惜，以前他可是城中难得一见的美男子啊。
E: Then there's Zhongshan — this guy's a coward who ran away as soon as the group spotted some bandits along the road. He ended up smashing into the side of a cliff and <color=#dbc291ff>getting his face disfigured</color>. It's a real shame, as he used to be one of the rare handsome men left around town.

C: 她人还怪好的哦……
E: Seems quite nice of her, if you ask me...

C: 当然不，警长阁下，您说话的方式比我外婆家后院苹果树上趴着的猫还要稀松平常。
E: Of course not, Sheriff. The way you talk is no stranger than the cat that climbs the apple tree in my grandma's backyard.

C: 这人我印象很深，「阿佑」的<color=#dbc291ff>腿断了</color>。
E: I remember this one best. Wright has a <color=#dbc291ff>broken leg</color>.

C: 下次能不能想点有创意的遭遇战呀！
E: Ugh, can't we run around to them for a change!?

C: …什、什么？什么有魔力的字眼？
E: ...Wh—What? Which magic word?

C: 「穷观阵」能否运行，事关重大。我在此拜请各位，帮助符太卜完成阵仪。景元感激不尽。
E: Everything hinges on restoring the Matrix of Prescience, which is why I would like you to help Diviner Fu complete the setup. I am eternally grateful for your assistance.

C: 万一它算错了呢？
E: What if its calculations are incorrect?

C: 我们奉太卜之命前来启动阵法，是熟客不是生人啦。
E: We're here by order of the master diviner to restart the Matrix of Prescience — friends not foes.

C: 谁要听这些鬼话！
E: Do you believe all this nonsense?

C: 噢，开始了！
E: Aha, it's begun!

C: 危机也是转机，知道问题所在，一切都好办了。
E: Every crisis is a turning point. A problem is easier to resolve when you know where it lies.

C: 平时你却不让，这回突然…明白了，就依你说的办。
E: You've never given me the opportunity, and now suddenly... Understood, as you wish.

C: 我已嘱托符玄，她会打开太卜司的捷径，为各位行个方便。
E: I have asked Fu Xuan to open a shortcut to the Divination Commission for you.

C: 小女子明白。罗浮悬危，六司成员应该齐心协力。
E: I understand. The Luofu is in danger, and members of the six commissions should stand united.

C: 结论嘛…从结果上来说，在下并不认为「龙蟠虬跃」拥有「解药」。甚至在可预见的未来，也不会有任何「解药」。
E: The conclusion... Put simply, I don't believe that the Draught of Draconic Surge holds the cure to the mara. Even in the foreseeable future, there will likely not be any such cure.

C: （奇异的药方，外加丹鼎司洞天无由失联，其中的麻烦看来真不是一星半点。）
E: (A strange prescription and a sudden loss of communication with the Alchemy Commission delve... It seems there's more going on than meets the eye.)

C: 关你啥事？你是她亲戚？不像吧？呵，真有意思，见义勇为到咱们「罗浮三少」头上来了。
E: What's this gotta do with you? You her family or something? Cause you don't look like it. Hmph, you're just trying to be a hero. You sure you wanna mess with the Luofu Trio?

C: 我我我我我妈经常和我说，反物质军团会吃掉不听话的小朋友…这该不会是真来了吧……
E: M—My mom told me the Antimatter Legion eat children who misbehave... It's not true, is it?

C: 你骗了我。
E: You lied to me.

C: 功德？可以吃吗？
E: What's merit? Can you eat it?

C: 净砚听后，意味深长地叹了口气。
E: After listening to you, Jingyan heaves out a meaningful sigh.

C: 干、干掉了？你竟把我放生那些小狼们都干掉了？这是何等残忍的行径啊！
E: E—Eliminated them? You killed the wolves I released? How brutal!

C: 唔，索赔对象可千万别把我算进去。
E: Um, please don't count me in when you ask for compensation.

C: 这些机兵会不会太危险了…
E: These automatons won't pose a threat, will they...?

C: {NICKNAME}？你怎么在这儿？
E: {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here?

C: 我先说好，这回你和你的老师可别想撺掇我放生什么奇怪的生物……
E: Let me make this clear — You and your tutor better not think of persuading me into releasing some bizarre creatures this time...

C: …第一次遇见我们？
E: ...The first time you met us?

C: 嘁，给老子支楞起来啊。
E: Quit stalling and get on with it!

C: 你不信任我也没关系，毕竟你也摆脱不了我，哈哈哈。
E: In any case, It doesn't matter if you don't trust me. It's not like you can be rid of me, hahaha.

C: 久而久之，绥园幽幽鬼火忽明忽暗，悲泣幽咽之声凭空回荡，「绥园闹鬼」的消息在罗浮仙舟居民间不胫而走。
E: Over time, Fyxestroll Garden became full of flickering ghostly flames, and weeping lamentations echoed through the air. The rumor that the garden was haunted spread like wildfire among Xianzhou Luofu residents.

C: 大人，都是桂乃芬的主意！
E: Your Honor, it was all Guinaifen's idea!

C: （嘻嘻，声带可是人类身上最容易操纵的肌肉。）
E: (Hehe... Did you know that the larynx is the easiest muscle to control in the human body?)

C: 关了许久，难得放松一下嘛。你不都把符纸贴上了吗？我现在乖乖的呢。
E: Hehe, I'm simply enjoying my freedom. Didn't you use the talisman already? I'm tame as a kitten...

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 没错，这面镜子的对面，一定是雪衣大人。
E: That's her! This has to be Madam Xueyi behind the mirror...

C: 抱歉，我最近可能有些太累了…那个，请问您有什么需要的吗？
E: Sorry, I've been a bit tired recently... So, how may I assist you?

C: 等到天边的光芒出现…等到……
E: Just got to wait till the light appears over the horizon... Till then...

C: 感觉她变得有些精神恍惚。
E: It feels like she's become somewhat dazed.

C: 原来已经那么破旧了啊…那天我把它弄丢之后，就再也没想过能找回来。
E: To think it is really this worn-out... After I lost it on that day, I had never thought I would ever get it back.

C: 少女的歌声轻轻地回荡在这片区域。它久久不散，仿佛在留恋着什么…然后，一段回忆从甜美的尾声中轻轻升起。
E: A young girl's singing faintly echoes across the area. It lingers for a long while as if longing for something... And then, a memory rises from the sweet epilogue.

C: 给我看看嘛…哪怕就透露一下名字也行。
E: Come on. Let me take a peek... Even just a name will do fine.

C: 「都是为了我好」。
E: "It's all for my own good."

C: 无论如何，我还是希望能为自己留下一颗种子，留下一朵…未来的玫瑰。
E: No matter what, I still hope to leave behind a seed, a bloom... of a future's rose.

C: 那份甜蜜的冰激凌，仿佛在记忆中永不会融化……
E: That sweet ice-cream looks unmeltable in memories...

C: 娜娜，闭上眼睛——
E: Cocona, close your eyes...

C: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
E: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

C: 放手。
E: Let go.

C: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
E: Grab Cocona's hand.

C: 我知道您很强大…但不管您的力气有多大，也没法打败无形的敌人。
E: I know you're very strong... but no matter how powerful you are, you will never be able to defeat a formless enemy.

C: 柯柯娜的脸上露出了微笑——你确信那是发自她内心的，不掺任何杂质的笑容。
E: A smile breaks out on Cocona's face — you are certain the smile is coming from the bottom of her heart, unmarred by emotional complications.

C: 说来有些难为情，但我现在很想…唱歌。不知道您能不能理解我现在的心情……
E: It may be a little embarrassing to say, but I now really want to... sing. I don't know if you know how I feel right now...

C: 我可能有一条不那么好的消息要转告您：柯柯娜店长应该不会再回匹诺康尼了。这家奢侈品店很快就会有新的店主——
E: I may have some unfortunate news to tell you: Cocona is probably not returning to Penacony. This luxury goods store will have a new owner very soon...

C: 实在抱歉，客人…刚才说到哪了——哦对！这家店很快就会迎来新的店主了。
E: I'm really sorry... Where were we... Oh yes! This store will have a new owner very soon.

C: 普莱佐用力挤出一个生硬的笑容，脸上的褶皱拼凑出令人厌恶的纹路。
E: Prezzo squeezes out an unnatural smile with much difficulty, the folds in his face wrinkling into various grotesque patterns.

C: 感恩赞美您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！要不是您出手相救，我不知道那几个人会对我做些什么。
E: I am in your debt, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! If you had not rescued me, I don't know what they would have done to me.

C: 您说的也有道理，但……
E: You're right, but...

C: 我听说那位客人是因为赊欠房费被强行赶走的。他好像已经在匹诺康尼住了很久了…但他看上去实在不像什么有钱人。
E: I heard that this client was forced to leave as he was behind on his room fees. He had been in Penacony for a very long time... But he didn't look like a rich man to me.

C: 是向前看还是继续颓废，我们没法替他决定。但至少我们给了他一个机会，让他能直面自己的内心。
E: As for whether to move forward or continue to wallow, we cannot make that decision for him. But at least we have given him an opportunity to truly face what he feels inside.

C: 「我是谁」——自这具形体诞生之初，同样的问题就一直萦绕着我。
E: "Who am I"... This question has been following me since the moment I first took this form.

C: 的确，莱斯利•迪恩就是为了银幕而生的。那颗明星曾在夜空中闪耀过，就算转瞬即逝，也总会有人记得它曾经的璀璨。
E: Indeed, Lesley Dean was born for the silver screen. That star once shined bright in the sky. Even if it was just a fleeting moment, there are those who would remember his brilliance forever.

C: 和您经历过这一切以后，我感觉自己真正活过了一回。哪怕只是个错觉，我也会无比珍惜。
E: After experiencing all of this with you, I feel like I truly lived. Even if I am wrong, this is something that I will treasure above all.

C: 一号候选人「罗莎」，天环族出身，是业内闻名的「铁娘子」。
E: Our number one candidate is Rosa, a Halovian. She is known as the "Iron Lady" in the circle.

C: 这排场看着还不错。
E: This lineup looks pretty good.

C: 我建议您为未来的经营方向定个调，把飞艇的涂装定下来，不知您意下如何？
E: I suggest that you set the tone for future endeavors, and decide on a design for the airship. What do you think?

C: 有几件船务事项我必须向您汇报，这是在来空艇之处我注意到的问题——
E: There are certain ship-related matters I must report to you — these are problems I noticed when I set foot on the airship...

C: 我相信给予船员自主的空间能激发他们的潜力和创造力。只要能完成任务，他们可以有更多的自由来安排自己的工作方式。
E: I believe in giving the crew members their space with hopes of inspiring them to realize their own potential and creativity. As long as they are able to accomplish their task, they can have more freedom to organize their personal working style.

C: 我航行少，你不要骗我。
E: I don't have much experience in flying, so don't trick me.

C: 举手之劳嘛，这种小忙是我我也愿意帮。
E: It was a piece of cake. I'd be willing to help out too for something like this.

C: 呃…请问，您是对酒店提供的服务有任何意见吗？
E: Err... Do you have any issues with the hotel's services?

C: 「抱歉让你失望了，老朋友，」你在心中默念，「放心吧，以后肯定还有很多机会能让你大显身手……」
E: "Sorry to disappoint you, old friend," you lament in your heart. "Don't worry. There'll be plenty of other opportunities to flaunt your power..."

C: 坏消息：您的预约取消了。
E: Bad news! Your booking has been canceled.

C: ——你就不能少说两句？嗐呀……
E: ...Could you pipe down? For fork's sake...

C: 十分感、感谢您！
E: Thank you... thank you very much!

C: （等等，那是……）
E: (Hang on, that's...)

C: 现在，你要做的就是等待。
E: Now, all that's left is to wait.

C: 看到了吧？他只是想骗钱。
E: Hear that? He's just after your money.

C: 无妨，你可以多花些时间观察、思考。很快你就会发现，「四尺圣堂」是一片洁净的乐土，是每个彷徨灵魂追求的归宿。
E: But no worries, take your time to observe and contemplate. Soon enough, you will realize that the Four-Foot Hall is a true promised land, a place where all wondering souls can find solace.

C: 果然，经你之手的造物都被「纯美」所眷顾…我钦佩你，我的挚友。
E: Indeed, all your creations are blessed by the Beauty... You have my admiration, my friend.

C: 这次我在匹诺康尼的事都已经办妥，接下来就该上路寻找下一个目标了。伙计们，有缘再聚！
E: I'm done with my affairs on Penacony, and I'm ready to move on to the next destination. Till we meet again, folks!

C: 好啊，希望我们都能拼尽全力。
E: Alright! I hope we will all do our best.

C: 对了！我给大家准备了罗浮仙舟最地道的饮料——苏打豆汁儿，请大家不要客气，在路上口渴的时候喝！
E: Oh yeah! I brought authentic local drinks from the Xianzhou Luofu for you all — mung bean soda! Please don't hesitate to take one, and you can enjoy it if you get thirsty on your journeys!

C: 别担心，我会帮忙监督的。
E: Don't worry. I'll keep an eye on her.

C: 很好，看来你是一个真正关心罗浮的人。
E: Very good. I see you truly care about the Luofu.

C: …可是我只顾着贪生怕死，却把老师的手稿弄丢了，真是千不该万不该啊。
E: ...But I was doing just that, and still lost my master's manuscript. It is absolutely unforgivable.

C: 唉，老师的手稿本应该在仙舟历史中留下浓墨重彩的一笔…我却只顾着逃出生天，没能将手稿带出来，我真是，千～古～罪～人～
E: *sigh* My master's manuscript should have gone down in Xianzhou's history... but I was too busy saving my own skin and didn't take it out with me. I really am utt~er~ly~ use~less~

C: 青雀必须跟我一起去。
E: You must come with me.

C: 师傅的手稿可就拜托你们了，一定要平安地带出来呀。
E: Please, bring Mr. Ryan's manuscript back in one piece. I leave it in your capable hands.

C: 下一份。
E: Next.

C: 它和这份星槎手稿放在一起，总感觉有些关联，我还是带上一起吧。
E: It was placed alongside this starskiff manuscript. They seem to have a connection, so let's take it with us.

C: 不好，有怪物靠近了，{NICKNAME}小心！
E: Uh-oh, there're monsters nearby. Be careful, {NICKNAME}!

C: …糟、糟糕。我有一个坏消息。
E: ...D—Darn it. I've got some bad news.

C: 你们回来了，怎么样找到了我师傅的星槎设计稿了吗？
E: You're back. Did you find my master's manuscript for the starskiff?

C: 据说他本来就是研究材料的技术员。来罗浮求学一段时间后，被授予了匠人的身份，算是司里面给留学生学成的证明。
E: I think he was originally a materials researcher. After coming aboard the Luofu to study, he was granted the status of craftsman, which is proof of accreditation for foreign students.

C: 再加上，长生种工匠之间有着瞧不起短生种的氛围，言谈举止的傲慢，比「时间的鸿沟」更加尖锐伤人。我想，师傅一开始还是想要离开的。
E: Plus, the long-life craftsmen often look down on the short-life outworlders with an arrogant attitude that cuts deeper than the "gulf of time." It's no wonder my master wanted to leave at first.

C: 我看你们两个意气相投，而且迴星港我也不熟，要不…我就先回去了？
E: Seems like you two get along well, and I'm not familiar with Stargazer Navalia, so how about I head back first?

C: 要是能让铖杰打起精神的话，我还是去吧……
E: If I can cheer up Chengjie, then I'd better go...

C: 我根本看不懂！它和现在的星槎设计完全是两种思维方式！
E: I can't understand it at all! The concept it uses is totally different from the one adopted by the modern starskiff designs!

C: 你好，不管你是谁，请别在意，我只是想一个人在这儿躺一会儿。
E: Hi, there. No matter who you are, please don't be bothered by my presence. I just want to lie down and be alone for a while.

C: 多亏了你的灵机一动，就在你选择让星槎做出「钟型机动」之后，玦轮提供的反重力状态被迅速切断，星槎在出港口滑行了一小段之后，反倒是随着惯性掉了下去……
E: That's a brilliant move! After you made the starskiff do a bell maneuver, the anti-gravity function provided by the jade wheel was disrupted. The starskiff glided out of the port and fell off out of inertia...

C: 毫无正常体验。
E: It's not a normal experience whatsoever.

C: 就算老夫当着莱恩那小子的面，我也会告诉他说，不行，这个设计完全不行。你知道老夫从来对事不对人，希望你别往心里去。
E: If Ryan were here, I would have told him forthrightly that his design wouldn't work. I'm sure you know I have nothing against you. Please don't take this personally.

C: 开始接引吧。
E: Let's get started.

C: 原来我已死了……
E: Oh, I'm dead...

C: （这是不是有些太严重了。）
E: (Isn't that a bit too harsh?)

C: 反倒是因为没有了自责和愧疚，没有了突然的奋斗和努力，好像从背上卸下了一座大山，感觉自己轻飘飘的。
E: Without the guilt and the obligation to do my best, it's like a weight off my shoulders. My body feels light and airy.

C: 吾身归属十王司，公器私用，容吾拒绝。
E: Given that my body belongs to the Ten-Lords Commission, I will never use it for personal purposes.

C: 我也有的是时间。
E: I do have plenty of time...

C: 后来，大概是我收他为徒一年多以后吧…在一次熔锤镇的保卫战里，卢卡为了从裂界手里救下几个镇民，被弄废了一只手臂。
E: Then... about a year after I took him in, Luka lost one of his arms while rescuing townsfolk from the Fragmentum in Moltammerville.

C: 为什么不可能？
E: Why isn't that possible?

C: 漂亮！咱们这位神偷朋友认怂了，「大奔」看上去也完好无损。冠军试炼的第一步圆满完成！
E: Nice! Our thieving friend surrendered, and Big Ben looks to be in one piece. The first step of the champion's training is complete!

C: 你还敢说自己没毛病？！
E: Are you sure you're thinking clearly!?

C: …随时随地！
E: ...Whenever you are!

C: 喂，太近了，退回来点！
E: Hey, that's too close! Step back a bit!

C: 姬子姐和杨叔可是去正经搞科研呢！古兽化石哪有看演武斗剑好玩？
E: Himeko and Mr. Yang will be busy with serious research. Besides, fossils can't compete with martial contests when it comes to fun, right?

C: 这算是将军对你的考验吗？
E: Is this some kind of test from the general?

C: 混蛋！你说谁是狗？怎么…又是你啊？！
E: You jerk! Who are you calling a "dog?" Wait... wh—why are you here!?

C: 你这家伙是赖在仙舟不走了是吧？真是祸不单行啊，遇上你准没好事……
E: You're staying on the Xianzhou, are you? What terrible luck. Wherever you go, disasters aren't far behind...

C: 我就纳闷了，就算是危险武器，关你们屁事啊，又不是运往罗浮？我们修好船就走，不会在这儿卸货的。
E: Even if there are dangerous items, what do they have to do with you? It's not even being shipped to the Luofu. We'll just fix the ship and be on our way, we won't unload our cargo here.

C: 我明白了…安全检查应该不需要拆解货物吧？
E: I understand... but we don't need to disassemble the cargo if it's just a security check, right?

C: 让他回忆起难堪往事
E: Remind him of his embarrassing past.

C: 另外，这艘运输舰上的货物归属于博识学会。你们要想检查，是不是至少也要召来一名博识学会的委托人在场？
E: Besides, the cargo on this transport vessel belongs to the Intelligentsia Guild. If you want to inspect the cargo, shouldn't you at least call in a member of the Intelligentsia Guild to be present?

C: 东拉西扯，连博识学会的人都被你搬出来了。看来你是毫无解决问题的诚意啊。
E: You're pulling out all the stops, and you've even dragged members of the Intelligentsia Guild into this. Seems like you're not interested in resolving this at all.

C: 算你有见识，你是谁？
E: Yeah, you've got some insight there. Who are you again?

C: 妾身本以为将军的扈从都是昂藏武夫…没曾想，彦卿大人竟然如此……
E: I thought the General's retainers were all burly martial masters. I didn't expect Yanqing to be so...

C: 你们三位，也要一起来喔。
E: And you three are coming too, right?

C: 司鼎大人所言极是。那…我就继续替您应付他们了。
E: You're right, Cauldron Master. In this case... I'll continue handling them on your behalf.

C: 感谢您宽宏大量，请到这边稍事休息。
E: Thanks for understanding. Please have a rest over here.

C: 古海恒常，潮来潮去，对于我们持明而言，没有比这更值得怀念的故土了。
E: The tides come and go, but the ancient sea remains the same. For us Vidyadhara, there's nothing more nostalgic than our homeland.

C: 可叹，世事无常又如此相似。我与丹恒先生一样，远游他乡。如今归来目睹旧时景色，心中难免有些感慨。
E: It's kind of sad, isn't it? Everything changes but somehow remains familiar. Just like you, Dan Heng, I traveled far from home, and now I've returned. Seeing the familiar scenery brings back a hint of nostalgia.

C: 云璃，怎么不在爷爷身边呆着，却跑来丹鼎司闲逛。
E: Yunli? Why aren't you with your grandpa? What brings you to the Alchemy Commission?

C: 我听司里的报告说，丹鼎司洞天周遭至今仍有孽物出没。想来是我的前任们在丹鼎司里留下不少烂账。你们若想比出胜负高下，何必要将刀剑往彼此身上招呼？
E: I've received reports that the delves near the Alchemy Commission are still infested with abominations. Seems like my predecessors left quite a mess. So, if you two want to determine who's better, why not focus on them instead of each other?

C: 小云璃，这也是为你们好。你俩有心比出胜负，但刀剑无眼，伤到谁都不好。
E: It's for your own good, little Yunli. While you desire to compete against each other, I don't want to see either of you getting hurt.

C: 遇上我是你的运气。我对你那把又大又沉、锈迹斑斑的铁剑不感兴趣。我也没有夺人武器，顺手牵羊的爱好。
E: Consider yourself lucky that I'm not interested in your rusty sword, as I don't have the nasty habit of snatching other people's weapons.

C: 她这算是道歉的态度吗？拿回了剑，彦卿也该回神策府复命了。飞霄将军，彦卿先行告退。
E: This is how she apologizes? Now that I finally got my sword back, I should report to the Seat of Divine Foresight. I'll take my leave, General Feixiao.

C: 在客人面前都给我消停消停！老朽送出宝剑，是想为仪典增光添彩，不是想听你们彼此争吵，有伤盟谊。
E: Quiet down! We have other guests here! I've prepared this sword to add some excitement to the ceremony, not to have you two squabble. It's not a good look for the Alliance.

C: 狐人与仙舟盟誓共讨孽物，除了解放同胞，求的还有正义：那只狼牙恶兽应当永远被关在幽囚狱里，日日受罚。
E: The foxians and the Alliance made a pact to combat the abominations, aiming to achieve justice and free their kin. That werewolf monster is to be forever imprisoned in the dark recesses of The Shackling Prison, facing unending retribution.

C: 勾魂使金属的头颅中似乎仍然闪动着一丝火花，它在击毙数倍于己的敌人后终于丧失了还手之力，惨遭拆解。
E: Sparks continue to fizzle atop the spectral envoy's metal head. Despite having killed enemies that outnumber them, they were eventually left without the means to fight back before being wrecked to pieces.

C: 我答应了怀炎将军，要让三月小姐学会云骑剑术，登上演武仪典，以及至少击败一位对手。我一定会竭尽所能施教，但要是你有违师长教训……
E: I promised General Huaiyan that I'd teach you Cloud Knight swordplay, so you can participate in the Wardance and defeat at least one opponent. I'll do my best, but if you break your master's rules...

C: 说起来，云璃呢？
E: By the way, where's Yunli?

C: 噗…「粉毛狐狸」…
E: *chuckle* "Pink-haired fox..."

C: 成年人想从孩子手里找回场子…唉。
E: Seriously, trying to save face in front of kids? *sigh*

C: 我从小时候起就明白，许多人的手中根本不配持有任何武器。准许他们握剑，就是对无辜之人的残忍。
E: Since I was a kid, it's been clear to me that not everyone deserves to have a weapon in their hands. Giving them a sword is no different than being cruel to the innocent.

C: （这天击将军说起话来竟也头头是道。眼下她来意不明，景元又希望我们据实回答…<color=#dbc291ff>也许只说知道的事实就好？</color>）
E: (The Merlin's Claw is quite articulate. Right now, her intentions are unknown, and Jing Yuan wants us to be honest... <color=#dbc291ff>Maybe I'll just stick to the facts we know?</color>)

C: 幻胧是曾和仙舟为敌的能量生命，「岁阳」的一员。这东西变化无常，难以捉摸。
E: Phantylia is one of the heliobi, the energy lifeforms that once fought against the Xianzhou. They're known for their unpredictable and elusive nature.

C: 你沉默地盯着天击将军，嘴角勾起一丝挑衅的笑意。
E: You silently fix your gaze on the Merlin's Claw, a trace of a provocative smile playing at the corners of your mouth.

C: 探视重犯，每条规矩都关乎汝等安危。
E: When it comes to visiting criminals, there are rules in place to ensure your safety.

C: 幽囚狱内地势险怪，稍有不慎便会坠入深处。运气要是背些，只怕在救援赶到前，会被冻入幽邃坚冰里，又或是被焦炎烧成炭烬。
E: The terrain inside the Shackling Prison is treacherous. One wrong move, and you could end up plunging into the depths. And if you're really unlucky, you might be frozen solid or burned to a crisp before anyone can help you.

C: 像你这样靠狡诈求生的弱者，居然在计划中表现出近乎愚蠢的勇悍。你会得偿所愿的…所有都蓝的崽子都会得偿所愿的。
E: A sneaky weakling like you is actually showing some reckless bravery with this plan. Fine, you'll get what you want... and all of Duran's whelps will too.

C: 不幸中的万幸，被困幽囚狱的两位无名客安然无事。
E: The good news is, the two Nameless who were trapped in The Shackling Prison are safe and sound.

C: 驭空，把接下来的安排告诉她们。
E: Yukong, please explain to them the rest of the arrangements.

C: 容妾身提醒将军一句，我刚才所说的一切，至多只能算是推论。刑狱公案，讲究的是一个铁证如山。若要闯入持明的洞天拿人问罪，总得让他们哑口无言才是。
E: Please remember, General, that everything I've mentioned is mere speculation. We need concrete evidence for a public trial. If you want to interrogate someone within the Vidyadhara's ranks, you'll need irrefutable proof.

C: 眼下整个罗浮都被那个愚蠢的演武仪典吸引了注意力，正是我们逃离罗浮的最佳机会。一旦您回到忠诚于您的领地，您对仙舟的复仇也将指日可待。
E: Right now, everyone in the Luofu is distracted by the stupid Wardance, so this will be the perfect chance to escape. Once you've returned to your territory, your revenge against the Xianzhou ships will be within reach.

C: 在我面前转悠干什么？
E: Why are you wasting time here?

C: 是战首叫我来看看情况的。
E: The Warhead sent me here to check on the situation.

C: 狩猎还没结束。椒丘，你可一定要平安无事啊……
E: The hunt is not over yet. Stay safe, Jiaoqiu...

C: 长乐天
E: Exalting Sanctum

C: 非要问我的弱点的话…我一开口就会导致冷场，这算是弱点吗？
E: If I had to think of a weakness... Whenever I open my mouth, I make things awkward. Does that count as a weakness?

C: 选手们全都很可靠。
E: These contestants all seem very reliable.

C: 汪汪，汪汪汪汪？
E: Woof woof, woof woof woof woof?

C: 一想到怀炎将军交代的使命，我的心就一直扑扑直跳，云璃师父，怎么办啊？
E: As soon as I think about the mission General Huaiyan gave me, my heart starts racing like crazy! What do I do, Master Yunli?

C: …好可怕的一击。
E: ...What a terrifying attack.

C: 跟我走，咱们去引擎室瞧瞧！作为整艘舰船的核心设施，我们优先确保那儿的安全！
E: Come with me, we need to check the engine room! It's the heart of the ship, so we need to prioritize its safety!

C: 能有炎老担当这最后的保险，晚辈就放心了。
E: Knowing that Elder Huaiyan is part of our last line of defense is a great comfort.

C: （低吼）！
E: *roaring*!

C: 小崽子们，尽全力挥剑吧！
E: Swing with all your might, dear cubs!

C: 我已经准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 而我，一个被关押七百年的囚徒，连荣耀战死都求之不得的战犯，一旦回归族群就会成为受人摆布的傀儡。我绝不接受这样的命运！
E: And I, a prisoner who was held captive for over seven hundred years, a criminal of war who was deprived even an honorable death in battle, would become a puppet upon my return, at the mercy of others. This is a fate that I will never accept!

C: 吞天之兽，彻地而来！
E: Devour the heavens and envelop the earth!

C: 我想听听他们作何解释。
E: I'd like to hear their explanations.

C: 龙师涛然，在此恭迎灵砂小姐。
E: Welcome, Miss Lingsha. I am Preceptor Taoran.

C: 最后我要提醒将军…我听闻呼雷脱狱，直奔竞锋舰而去，血洗演武仪典的惨状恐怕不难想象。也许在我被判罪之前，联盟的弹劾会先让将军焦头烂额吧？
E: Lastly, a word of caution to you... I heard that Hoolay has escaped from prison and is headed directly for the Skysplitter. The bloodshed at the Wardance is bound to be gruesome. Perhaps, even before my trial, your impeachment will have you in dire straits first?

C: 要换我在擂台上，一棒下去，就算十个呼雷也要给我趴下。
E: If I had been in the ring, I could've knocked down ten Hoolays with just one strike.

C: 真巧啊，这里还有一位不听医嘱的人。
E: What a coincidence! Someone else who refuses to listen to the doctor's orders.

C: 太无礼了…在你面前的是蒂索克二世陛下，「黄金的时刻」的「皇帝」。虽然「家族」未见得承认，但她在我们群众心中可是当之无愧的真龙天子。
E: How rude... The Emperor of Golden Hour, Her Majesty Tizocic II stands before you. The Family may not recognize her sovereignty, but in the hearts of her subjects, she is none other than the true descendant of the dragon.

C: 我知道的就只有这些了…您还有别的事吗，陛下？
E: That's all I know... Did you wish to know anything else, Your Majesty?

C: 嘿嘿，我下次注意～
E: Heehee, I'll be mindful in the future!

C: 我信{F#她}{M#他}，伊里潘。那…就看你的本事了，无名客。你呢？你同意吗？「皇帝」？
E: I trust {F#her}{M#him}, Illifan. Now... it's up to your skills, Nameless. How about you? Do you agree? Emperor?

C: 陛下折煞我也。能替陛下效力，我只有荣幸，哪儿来的辛苦一说。
E: Your Majesty has naught to do but command me. It is my utmost honor to serve Your Majesty. I do not deserve any praise.

C: （蒂索克二世的回忆都混在一起了…找找看她在哪吧。）
E: (Tizocic II's memories are muddled... Let's see where she's gone.)

C: 成王败寇，这很公平。但请你放过我的家人，尤其是那些孩子…他们不知道什么政治、什么反叛、什么战争……
E: There are winners and losers in war. This is only fair. But please release my family, especially those children... They know nothing about politics, treason or war...

C: 朕已经杀了。用半系统时前的那杯酒。
E: I already have. With that wine glass half a system hour ago.

C: 你和她不一样，你是个能讲得通道理的人…所以，你应该明白我们必须这么做。
E: You're different from her in that you can be reasoned with... Which is why you should understand that we have to do this.

C: 灰骑士…朕还有个问题想问你……
E: Gray Knight... I still have a question for you...

C: 曾经，我只凭名字就大概能猜到一个人来自哪里。但你…你很特别，孩子。
E: I used to be able to tell a person's origin from their name. But you... You're special.

C: 我可什么都没干。
E: I didn't do anything.

C: （天才俱乐部的查德威克…以前的确没听过这号人物。）
E: (Chadwick from the Genius Society... I haven't heard of him before.)

C: 查德威克博士…
E: Dr. Chadwick...

C: 哈哈哈…像，你们和他真的很像。我相信各位与博士共事的时光一定会十分愉快。
E: Hahaha... You guys are just like him! I believe you will have a great time working with Dr. Chadwick.

C: 我也一度这么以为。命运无常，但它终于还是向你我展现了它善意的一面。
E: I once thought so too. Life is unpredictable, but it has eventually shown us its benevolent side.

C: 我很…荣幸……
E: I'm... honored...

C: 我会尝试和家族的高层斡旋，争取能将查德威克的忆泡带离匹诺康尼。
E: I'll negotiate with the upper echelons of The Family toward the aim of taking Chadwick's Memory Bubble with me.

C: 阿锡卡叹了口气，转身离开了……
E: Asika sighs, then turns and leaves...

C: 他最优秀的四个学生被赋予了「折纸筑梦师」的称号。他们是建筑师，更是征服梦境的伟大逐梦客。
E: His four most outstanding students were coined the Origami Dreamweavers. They were architects, but first and foremost, they were great Dreamchasers who conquered the Dreamscape.

C: 但可怜的孩子，它还没学会找到回家的路，就在捉迷藏时走丢了……
E: But this poor child hasn't learned the way home, and it got lost in the labyrinth...

C: 扉页上一行字尤为醒目：「筑梦千万条，有趣第一条！」
E: A line stands out on the title page: "There are countless guidelines to dreamweaving, but making it interesting is the top priority!"

C: 哼哼，你说的也是，毕竟…咱俩也算不上什么正常人啊。
E: Heh-heh, you're right, I mean... neither of us is anywhere close to normal.

C: …乔伊，冯恩…我记住了。
E: ...Joey, Vaughn... I've got it.

C: 但哪怕我知道这是梦，也不愿选择醒来——
E: Even though I know this is just a dream, I don't want to wake up...

C: 没错啾。
E: That's right, tweet.

C: （似乎已经进入湛蓝爵士的回忆中了…先确认一下这是哪里吧。）
E: (Looks like I'm inside Dr. Blues' memories already... Better check where this is first.)

C: 就拿这大壮来说，它一旦受到惊吓就吃不进饭；吃不进饭，就没力气驮人；它不驮人，我一天就要少赚许多钱！
E: Like Bossman here, it loses its appetite when it's frightened. Without food, it won't have strength to carry people, and if it doesn't work, I'll lose that much more money in a day!

C: …直到那位先生为它按摩，鳞片表面的泥土被抖落，伤痕才随之显现。
E: ...Till that gentleman gave it a massage, causing the mud on its scales to be kneaded off, and thus was the scar revealed.

C: 我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
E: My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.

C: 是你啊，小友。快下来吧，这里的水温刚刚好。
E: It's you, young friend. Come on down, the water is just right.

C: 谢谢你，小友…真是麻烦你陪我跑上跑下了。等这件事结束后，我一定会认真向你道谢的。
E: Thank you, young friend... I really appreciate you accompanying me on my errands. When this is all over, I have to thank you in earnest.

C: 好…好……
E: Okay... Okay...

C: 考虑好了没有？过了这村没这店了！
E: Done thinking 'bout it? It's now or never!

C: 妈妈，苹果，是苹果！
E: Mama, apple, it's an apple!

C: 为了帮外邦人找到药品，我溜进了圣城存放物资的仓库。
E: To help the outlanders secure medicine, I slipped into the holy city's supply warehouse.

C: 坚持正确的事也要付出代价，何况我只是为了满足自己的施救欲，并不能代表正确。我已做好了接受惩罚的准备。
E: The price must be paid for doing the right thing, even more so for an ambiguously moral act like mine conducted to sate my own savior complex. I am fully ready to accept its consequences.

C: …退一步说。假如苏克提瑞斯真是善心泛滥，看不得外邦人受苦，那他为什么不自掏腰包？
E: ...I'll take a step back and assert this: If Soctires was really overcome with compassion, unwilling to further witness the outlanders' plight, why did he not use his own assets?

C: 此话一出，不光拉莱德，在场公民们的表情也变得无比复杂。你的观点大概不会有人反对，但绝对不会有人支持。
E: With these words, not just Liluder, but the expressions of everyone present become indescribably twisted. Your standpoint will probably not be challenged, but it definitely won't be favored by any either.

C: 哥们说话有股味儿…
E: His lines are pretty cringy...

C: 太好了！雅努斯都不给开的门你给开了，你比雅努斯还牛！
E: Oh felicitations! You opened the door that not even Janus would! You are greater than Janus themselves!

C: 感谢俄诺涅元老！您的善良令刻法勒的胸怀显得更加宽广，令这圣城更加高贵！
E: Thank you, Elder Oenone! Your kindness broadens even the heart of Kephale and crowns this holy city with even greater nobility!

C: 我不需要。
E: I don't need it.

C: 我等受尼卡多利的金血浇灌，无需外物维生，只以纷争为食。
E: We are bathed in the golden blood of Nikador. We need no external objects to sustain ourselves. We feed only on strife.

C: …阿卡迪亚？
E: ...Arcadia?

C: 无论她是敌人还是异类，我都希望自己能成为浪漫的眷属，亲自将那美好的金丝缠在那位旅伴的身上，绞断她原本冰冷的命运。
E: Be she an enemy or an outsider, I hope that I could become her romantic companion. That I could wind that perfect golden thread around her body and finally break the cold fate she once faced.

C: 我很好奇，现在的你在战场之上，还是否能将剑刃劈向相同的面庞？
E: I cannot help but wonder... If you were on the battlefield now, could you swing your blade at something with her face?

C: 说的也是，她应该也没走出云石天宫。
E: I guess you're right. I doubt she left Marmoreal Palace.

C: 虽然不知道是什么意思，但是咱们的恩人已经做好了示范，该你了！
E: I'm not entirely sure what that means but... Our savior has led by example. It's your turn!

C: 永远…见不到…那该死的墨涅塔……咳！
E: May you never... lay eyes on... your godforsaken Mnestia... Ahhck!

C: 这只若虫在悬锋城中格外醒目。你知道，弥漫血腥味的废墟并不是浪漫眷属乐意造访的地方。
E: A nymph is an unfamiliar sight to the streets of Castrum Kremnos. As you know, ruins stained with the stench of blood are not a place that the Titankin of Romance would happily visit.

C: 这玩意儿和之前的解密一样吧…
E: This is the same puzzle as before, surely...

C: 真拿你没办法…人家记得这里的士兵都是靠殿中的「神性」驱动的，但好像储存神性的雕像都没启动……
E: You're hopeless... I remember that the soldiers here rely on the "divinity" within the shrine to function, but it seems none of the statues storing divinity are activated...

C: 真是反反又复复啊。
E: So many twists and turns.

C: 赶上了！你上气不接下气地跑到帕西提亚面前，此时此刻，空白的大脑里只有一句话。
E: You made it! Panting heavily, you stop in front of Pasithea, with only one thought echoing in your blank mind.

C: 听说你梦见了幽灵。
E: I heard you dreamed of ghosts.

C: 你真认为我们能找到新的圣女吗？
E: Do you really think we can find the new Holy Maiden?

C: 你在熟悉的地方醒来，还记得发生了什么吗？为了从命运中逃离，帕西提亚，你背叛了欧洛尼斯，咽下毒药，转而投向塞纳托斯的怀抱。
E: You awaken in a familiar place. Do you still remember what happened? To escape destiny, Pasithea, you betrayed Oronyx, imbibed poison, and turned yourself into Thanatos' embrace.

C: 向祭司说谎。
E: Lie to the priest.

C: 家里的食物已经见底了，母亲正竭力以挨饿的方式令你远离饥饿。你第一次注意到，她的身形已是那样枯槁。
E: The food in the house has already been depleted, and your mother is enduring hunger to protect you from it. This is the first time you notice that her figure has become so emaciated.

C: 那我就不客气了。
E: Then I'll gladly accept it.

C: 翁法罗斯也是如此。同为发展中的文明，我们愿意为它的未来出一份力。善意就像火炬，传递下去才能烧得更旺。
E: The same goes for Amphoreus. As a similarly developing civilization, we are willing to contribute to its future. Goodwill is like a torch. It can only burn brighter when it is passed on.

C: 哈哈， 今天也没抢到《如我所书》的另一卷，看来我还是来得不够早啊。
E: Haha, I couldn't snag another volume of As I've Written today either. Guess I still didn't show up early enough!

C: （沉默）。
E: (keep silent)

C: 说不定，我还准备了一份粉色的小礼物呢♪
E: Who knows, I might have prepared a little pink present for you ♪

C: 正在研究学习计划……
E: Reviewing curriculum...

C: 古恩先生…好的，老师好，请多指教。
E: Mr. Gunn... Okay, {M#mister}{F#miss}, please teach me.

C: 总感觉你好像学废了…
E: I get the feeling you've been led astray...

C: 我觉得可以这样…
E: How about this...

C: 这个…好像不错。
E: This... This one's great.

C: 他没有注意到周围环境的漆黑是多么诡异，也没有注意到走廊尽头伫立的…「马桶」！
E: He didn't notice how bizarre the darkness of his surroundings had become, nor did he notice the item looming at the end of the corridor... It was a toilet seat!

C: 奇怪了，他们人呢？怎么还没来？
E: Weird. Where are they? Why are they still not here?

C: 听说已经有科员染了这两种发色，我真想亲眼瞧瞧。
E: I heard some researchers have already dyed their hair these colors. I'd love to see them for myself.

C: （这头发的颜色不对吧，以斯帖想参考的是<color=#dbc291ff>蓝色</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>棕色</color>。）
E: (This isn't the right hair color. Esther wanted references for <color=#dbc291ff>blue</color> hair and <color=#dbc291ff>brown</color> hair.)

C: 呃，你有什么事吗？
E: Um, what do you want?

C: 还有别的款式推荐吗？
E: Do you have any other recommendations?

C: 潮流就是个噱头！
E: Fashion is not real!

C: 不行，我不能答应！麻烦你转告华劳斯，就说我倍感荣幸…但果然我们两家还是保持距离为好。
E: No, I can't be friends with him! Please tell Wallace that I'm flattered, but it's better for us to keep our distance.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 费尔多不想和你做朋友…
E: Furdo doesn't want to be your friend...

C: 拍完了？让我看看……
E: Done? Let's have a look...

C: 好了，该去帮我找朋友了。和以往一样，要找的人由我来指定。
E: All right, it's time to help me make friends. Just like before, I will decide who I want to make friends with.

C: 告诉你吧，今天我们要执行一项绝密任务！你作为鼹鼠党的「荣誉队员」，现在被我征用了！
E: Let me tell you, today we have a top-secret mission! As an honorary member of The Moles, you are now being commandeered by me!

C: 咦？怎么回事，你怎么一副很着急的样子？还有这位小朋友，为什么要跑来聚落……
E: Huh? What's wrong? Why do you look so anxious? And this kid, why do you come to the settlement...

C: 总而言之，看在我的面子上，这事你可要跟「鼹鼠党」的孩子们保密啊——就让他们继续保持这股子乐于助人的热情吧。
E: Anyway, for my sake, please keep this a secret from The Moles kids — just let them keep up their enthusiasm for helping others.

C: 唔，我还答应了阿丽娜，今天晚上要带她去吃火激凌…荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，我们今天就选一份快递派送吧！要送哪份就交给你决定！
E: Well, I promised Alina that I'd take her out for Fire Chillin' Ice Cream tonight... So, honorary member {NICKNAME}, let's pick one package to deliver today! I'll leave it up to you to decide which one!

C: 地址倒是能勉强看清…是娜塔莎姐姐的诊所！让我猜猜，这快递应该是要送给某个病人的吧？
E: The delivery address is still readable... Natasha's clinic! Let me guess. Could it be sent to a certain patient?

C: 好吧，让我想想……
E: Alright, let me think about it...

C: 怎么没人给我发勋章呢？
E: Why is no one giving me any medal?

C: 你和我想的一样。这么多年没见过面的家人，哪儿会在意什么战功勋章呢？
E: That's what I was thinking. After so many years of being apart, his family would not be concerned with these military accolades.

C: 哎，原来是那档子事…到底什么时候能有消息啊…上回那个政务部的不是说，会帮我们递交申请吗？这么久了还没个回信，怕不是又要石沉大海了。
E: Oh, you mean that paper we handed over to the Administrative Department earlier. Haven't heard a thing from them. Didn't they promise they were gonna process the submission request for us? Or did they completely forget about this again?

C: 哎，很可惜，答错了。看来也没有必要继续问下去了。
E: Ah, how unfortunate, that's incorrect. It seems like there's no need for us to continue.

C: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
E: Until we meet again, youngster.

C: 请您慢走。
E: So long.

C: 你就知道？
E: You knew?

C: 请您慢走。
E: So long.

C: 那什么，他们出了一道难题来刁难你，是吧？快给我讲讲，说不定我能帮你解开……
E: What is it? They asked you a difficult question, right? C'mon, spill it. Maybe I can help you get to the bottom of it...

C: 只隔了这么点时间，他应该还没跑吧？赶紧动用你的三寸不烂之舌，一定要让他通过我的论文申请！我的前途可就托付给你了！
E: It's still early, and he can't have gotten far. Quick, go put that gilded tongue of yours into action and get him to pass my paper! My fate is in your hands now!

C: 呃…您好歹听我把题面念完好不好？
E: Um... could you please let me read out the question in its entirety?

C: 当然没问题！您尽管看，慢慢来。
E: No problem at all! Just take your time and think things over.

C: 那我当然不能让您失望。正好，我这边准备了一些进阶的测验题目，您要不要试试？
E: Then I absolutely cannot let you down. I just so happen to have some advanced quiz questions right here with me. Would you like to give them a try?

C: 我想再看一次题面…
E: Let me see the question again...

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 第十五天。
E: Day fifteen.

C: 灵魂？
E: Soul?

C: 需要我们送到府上吗？
E: Do you need us to deliver it to your residence?

C: 不过不要抱太大期望哦~毕竟隔行如隔山…对吧。
E: But don't get your hopes up~ We come from different professions... right?

C: 出于职业道德，我一般是不会随便给人开具证明的…但「会社」的大家都有苦衷，这点我也明白。
E: I usually don't write such letters because of professional ethics... But I know everyone in the Society has their own reasons.

C: 哦？你认识那位大作家啊，他怎么了？
E: Oh? You know that famous author? What about him?

C: 哈哈，这可说来话长了。我想想怎么组织语言……
E: Hahaha, that's a long story. Let me think about where to start...

C: …呃，总感觉忘了点什么事。是什么来着？
E: ...Um, I feel like I forgot something. What could it be?

C: 那为什么要请我喝茶？
E: Then why are you inviting me to tea?

C: 哈哈，既然你如此执着，那我今天便提早些回去吧。
E: Haha, I'll head back early if you insist.

C: 啊！年轻人，请等等……
E: Ah! Wait. Kid...

C: 在你面前的孩子嚎啕大哭了起来。当你正准备俯身、想要摸头安慰她时，却见自己的指尖穿透了她幼小的身躯。
E: The child before you starts to wail. As you bend down and try to pat her head in comfort, you see your fingers go through her small figure.

C: 难道说——我变成裂界里的怪物了吗？
E: Did I... become a Fragmentum monster?

C: 你打得很勇敢。
E: You were brave.

C: 总之，麻烦你去海滩上走一遭了。
E: Either way, please do another patrol across the beach for me.

C: 另外，护珠人已经认可了你的能力。<color=#dbc291ff>以后有巡逻任务的时候，你不必专程先来找我，直接去海滩就好，报酬不会少你的。</color>
E: Also, the Pearlkeepers have recognized your abilities. <color=#dbc291ff>From now on, you will no longer need to report to me before a patrol. You can go directly to the beach, and you will still be compensated for your efforts.</color>

C: 你对这种「避世隐居」的生活表达了羡慕之情，能进一步想想，到底是为什么吗？
E: You express a feeling of envy for this kind of "hermit lifestyle." Could you think a little further into why this is?

C: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
E: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

C: …总算是醒了，刚才喊了你半天也没能叫醒你。
E: ...But thankfully, you've woken up. I've been shaking you for quite a while.

C: 众民的壁画
E: Mural of the People

C: 年幼的王储在高悬的铁链间穿行，步履轻盈。
E: The young crown prince walks lightly on his feet, traversing the iron shackles above.

C: 因为…它或许不必面对自然。
E: Because... perhaps this way it does not have to face nature.

C: 你是为此而来？
E: Is that why you are here?

C: 谢谢你的好意。或许我本可以逃开，但…有些时候，命运看似给你开启了好几扇门扉，其实能走的，只有一条路径吧。
E: I appreciate your intentions. Perhaps I could run away, but... Sometimes it seems as if although fate has opened many doors to you, there is still only one path that you can actually walk.

C: 你记住了「曾与万敌交谈过」
E: You remembered "Talking with Mydei."

C: 据说银河中最大的水力发电机修建在一颗被潮汐锁定的星球上——在晨昏线上，融化的冰川水永无止境地流向它们沸腾的方向。不知道{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}全世之座{RUBY_E#}会不会对这种工程项目有兴趣。
E: It is said that the Cosmos' largest hydroelectric station was built on a tidally locked planet — At the terminator line, melting glaciers endlessly flow towards their boiling destinations. One wonders if {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}the Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#} would find such engineering feats interesting.

C: 直至现在，红发的小信使依旧奔跑在路上，怀揣着沉甸甸的过往，以及理想的轻盈未来。
E: Even now, the little red-haired messenger runs tirelessly, carrying the heavy weight of her past and the feather-light future of her dreams.

C: …怎么样，取到那个能被定义为「树种」的物品了吗？请交给我吧。
E: So? Did you retrieve the object defined as a "Tree Seed"? Please hand it over to me.

C: …愿雅努斯揭示你的路径，柯德克斯。
E: ...May Janus guide your path, Codex.

C: 虽然那束光并不耀眼，有些昏淡…但对我来说，已经足够温暖了……
E: Though it was actually somewhat dim, not overly bright... To me, it was all the warmth I needed...

C: 冥界再见吧，老提图斯…保重。
E: Let us meet again in the nether realm, Old Titus... Take care.

C: 这座圣烛安置在偏殿拱门旁，金色的光芒为四周的壁画镀上一层柔和的光晕。
E: This holy candle is placed next to the side hall archway. The golden glow casts a soft halo over the surrounding murals.

C: o((■ω■- )o「桀桀█——当你们面对███现世，你█还镇得住豹吗？！」)∋
E: o((■ω■- )o "Hehe█ — When you face███the present world, can you█still hold me back!?" )∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「选择不止有一种！」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "There's more than one choice!" )∋

C: 嗷呜嗷呜～
E: Awoo-awoo~

C: 但是，克莱门汀小姐，这是你和风堇小姐好不容易才选定的昏光庭院新址。
E: But Miss Clementine... this is the new location for the Twilight Courtyard that you and Miss Hyacine spent so much time selecting.

C: …嘿嘿，这是兴奋的抖擞，大姐头。不出意外的话，这是我们最后的骗局了吧？
E: ...Heh. I'm shaking from excitement. Boss, If all goes well, this should be our final trick, right?

C: 您…还是对「再创世」的愿景有所不安。
E: You... You are still uneasy about the vision of the Era Nova.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>止步吧</color>卑劣残缺的胎生种卑劣残缺██止步胎生种止步卑劣残缺█胎生种止步卑劣残缺的胎生种止步████止止卑劣残缺卑劣残缺卑劣残缺<color=#eb4d3dff>卑劣残缺胎生种</color>！
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Cease your advance</color> vile and flawed mammals vile and flawed██Cease your advance vile and flawed mammals Cease your advance vile and flawed█Cease your advance vile and flawed mammals Cease your advance████Cease Cease vile and flawed vile and flawed vile and flawed<color=#eb4d3dff>vile and flawed mammals</color>!

C: 它的信徒们相信，只要你够虔诚，就能听见海螺壳对你诉说自然的美好。
E: Their followers believed that if you were devout enough, the conch shell would whisper the beauty of nature to you.

C: 聆听「冬」。
E: Listen to "Winter."

C: 哼，这就跟发信息一样的，不超出一段时间就可以撤回。
E: It's just like sending a message — if you don't leave it in too long, you can still unsend it.

C: 小妖精们住在树洞里——不是泥土做的洞，也不是那种肮脏、湿漉漉的洞。
E: Fairies live in tree hollows — not dirt holes, and definitely not the dank, muddy kind.

C: 专门为小妖精设计的信箱，你从杂乱的信件中发现了属于自己的一封——
E: A mailbox designed specially for fairies. As you dig through the chaotic pile of letters, you spot one addressed to you.

C: 「勿要打扰妖精的安眠，否则厄运将降临汝身。」
E: "Disturb not the slumber of the fairy, lest misfortune befall thee."

C: 蜜酿、果品、珍馐、美馔，此处应有尽有，在斯缇科西亚要格外注意肠胃健康。
E: Honey brew, fruits, rare delicacies — Styxia has it all. Just be kind to your stomach while you're here.

C: 这里是炼金术入门的课程，而这门课的内容是关于灵魂本质。我的名字叫阿那克萨戈拉斯，首先我要说的就是，不许用「那刻夏」称呼我。
E: This is an introductory course in alchemy, and the subject matter deals with the essence of the soul. My name is Anaxagoras, and let me make it clear from the get-go — you are not to refer to me as "Anaxa."

C: 我的课堂百无禁忌，你们也无需遵守什么繁文缛节。如果听不懂，你们可以随时打断我，不过最好不要随意插话，而是举起手——这就是全部的规矩了。
E: My classroom is free of restrictions and there's no need for you to abide by formalities. If something confuses you, you are welcome to interrupt me any time. However, I would advise that you raise your hand instead of speaking freely. That's all the rules.

C: …以沉默彰显立场，也算是我从大地兽身上学到的优点。
E: ...Expressing a stance through silence. That's something I've learned from the dromas.

C: 迈德漠斯，挺起胸膛，让你的步伐动起来！你身上流淌的{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}血脉会指引你还乡……
E: Mydeimos, stand tall, and let your steps move forward! The bloodline of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#} flowing within you shall guide you home...

C: 是吗！那可是*我们*最喜欢的告别辞呢。每当说再见的时候，*我们*就会大大方方地说，明天见！
E: Really? That's our favorite goodbye! Every time we part ways, we would say, "See you tomorrow!"

C: …嗯，阿格莱雅。
E: ...Sure, Aglaea.

C: 长夜月…又回来了？
E: Evernight... is back again?

C: 不留下点让人猜不透的事情，我怎么甘心就此消失呢？
E: How could I just vanish without leaving behind a few lingering riddles?

C: {RUBY_B#它在提示你怎么出去}去改换昼夜吧，你会发现，出路或许就在我的身下。{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#It's telling you how to get out}Change between day and night, and you'll find your exit path right under where I stand.{RUBY_E#}

C: 这是我一只虫的朝圣…
E: This is the pilgrimage of a lone nymph...

C: 糟了糟了回不去了喀，不知道哥怎么样了…
E: Oh shoot oh dang, I can't go back, crrk... I wonder how my brother is...

C: 呀，你也回来啦…辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Oh hey {NICKNAME}, thanks for coming!

C: 有一面奇怪的镜子…
E: There's this strange mirror...

C: 想起来了吗？
E: Do you remember now?

C: 我没问题了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 北边前线传来消息，残响回廊里的怪物似乎又卷土重来了。
E: News from the northern front informs that the monsters at the Corridor of Fading Echoes are mounting a comeback.

C: （「分装快乐」表面有打开的痕迹，该不会……）
E: (There are signs that the Joy Filtration Set has been opened. It couldn't be...)

C: （放心！这套设备非常稳定！）
E: (Don't worry! This device set is super stable!)

C: 诶？
E: ...Hmm?

C: 我和大家…都是被它赶出来的，它不让我们回去。
E: Everyone and I... were driven out by it. It wouldn't let us return.

C: （它在转移话题，<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证明可以反驳它吗？</color>）
E: (It tries to divert the conversation. <color=#dbc291ff>What evidence do we have to present as rebuttal?</color>)

C: 怎么不说话了，哑巴了？
E: Speechless? At a loss for words?

C: 佩佩试图与它继续沟通，但它不再予以回应。
E: Peppy attempts to communicate with it, but it refuses to respond.

C: 我、我…不…你别过来…呜……
E: I—I... No... Don't come closer... Urk...

C: 虽然还没睡醒，但很少能在早上见到{NICKNAME}呢。不是一天将要结束，也不是偶然遇到……
E: Even though I'm not fully awake yet, it's rare to see {NICKNAME} in the morning. It's not the end of the day, and it's not just a random encounter...

C: …我们是要一起开始一整天！一想到这个，人家的心都开始跳个不停了呢！
E: ...We're going to start the whole day together! Just thinking about it makes my heart race!

C: 不过，这也算是心有灵犀？{NICKNAME}总会在人家还没准备好的时候现身。
E: Still, isn't that a sign we're in sync? {NICKNAME} always manages to appear before I'm ready.

C: 唔…人家听说，在走到生命的终点前，墨涅塔的信徒都会献上自己最美的作品。
E: Hmm... I heard that before reaching the end of their life, the followers of Mnestia would offer their most beautiful creation.

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 喂，这玩笑可开的不太妙啊。这一路来我可从没短了你的酬劳。你瞧，下次若有类似的活计，我一定会拉上你的。
E: Hey, that's not funny. This whole time, I've never held back any money from you. Look, if there are any similar jobs coming up, we can work together on them.

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 哇哦，真不愧是我命中注定的对手。
E: Whoa. I know you were my fated nemesis for a reason.

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 岂有此理，竟敢亵渎我们神圣的、伟大的、其乐无穷的「寻径指津」，今天我必让你输得彻彻底底。
E: Why, you little... You'd blaspheme against our greatest, most sacred, and most delightful "Pathfinder"!? Mark my words: I shall see you utterly defeated today!

C: 在牢里开发不需要和别人开那些没完没了的会，也不用加班，自己想做就想休息就休息，也没有什么死线压力，真是太美妙了。
E: In fact, it's oddly liberating to develop games in prison. No more endless meetings or overtime. I have the freedom to develop at my own pace, taking breaks whenever necessary, and being free from the relentless pressure of meeting deadlines.

C: 普通的就好。
E: Just normal will do.

C: 其实不管选择什么，只要它能给你带来乐趣，那就再好不过。这也是我们共同的……
E: In truth, no matter what you choose, as long as it gives you enjoyment, that is the best outcome. This is also our shared...

C: ——来自迷钟的赞许，游客！
E: ...A nod of approval from the ticker, guest!

C: 话说回来…都到这个点了，交班的人哪去了？还得等多久啊，真遭不住。
E: Anyway... Just look at the time. Where's my replacement gone to? How long is it going to take? I really can't take much more of this.

C: ……嘎吱…██……重新启动中……
E: ...Rearrrr... ██... Restarting...

C: 嗯…有位织者向往传说、渴望和英雄们一起冒险。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一幅壁画上</color>，把自己想象成画中蝶呢。你得擦亮眼睛才能发现它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns for legends and adventures alongside heroes. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>within a mural</color>, imagining themselves as the butterfly depicted there. Look closely to find them.

C: 我找到了许多若虫。
E: I have found many nymphs.

C: 眼下衣匠已经为你揭露了一只若虫的位置。在找到它之前，其他若虫的信息就暂且保密吧。
E: The Garmentmaker has already revealed the location of one nymph to you. Until you find it, the whereabouts of the other nymphs will remain a secret.

C: 桀桀桀…到时候，我就把整条街买下来，想偷哪家偷哪家。您呢，想举会儿黎明机器玩也行~
E: Hehehe... When that time comes, I will buy this entire street and steal from any house I want. As for you? If you wanted to hold the Dawn Device for a bit to play, that would be perfectly fine~

C: 我来自世界之外。
E: I come from beyond worlds.

C: 「现在，死亡的果核将在你身体里发芽。你的恶作剧会让大地倾覆、你的玩笑能让生灵涂炭。而这一切，都将成为我的助力。」
E: "Now, the seeds of death grow within you. Your pranks will upend the lands, and your tricks will wither all life. And all this will be in my service."

C: 「现在，死亡的果核将在你身体里发芽。你的恶作剧会让大地倾覆、你的玩笑能让生灵涂炭。而这一切，都将成为我的助力。」
E: "Now, the seeds of death grow within you. Your pranks will upend the lands, and your tricks will wither all life. And all this will be in my service."

C: 「智慧让你远离愚钝，愚钝让你靠近幸福。」
E: "Wisdom brings you farther from foolishness, but foolishness brings you closer to happiness."

C: 桀桀桀！这币子赔给你！
E: Hehehe! Take these coins as compensation!

C: 嘶…你这笑容怎么有点瘆人啊。
E: Yeesh... that smile of yours is rather disturbing.

C: 桀桀，以后可有你好看的…就像这满屋子的书，终究也难免付之一炬哦。
E: Hehehe, you'll see... Like all these books here, everything turns to ash eventually.

C: 偶尔我会想象自己是一只蝴蝶…能飞多远并不是它最关心的事，它只在乎自己能不能自由自在地舞蹈。
E: Sometimes I imagine myself as a butterfly... It's not about how far you can fly — it's about dancing freely through the air.

C: 那是自然，毕竟钱财对于死者毫无意义！不过说到这个，巴特鲁斯也有自己的困惑……
E: Of course, since riches mean nothing to the dead! But that reminds me, I've been pondering something myself...

C: 咱只是有种古怪的感觉，总觉得世界上其实有许许多多的{NICKNAME}和巴特鲁斯，每一组他们都玩着同样的寻宝游戏。
E: I just have this weird feeling that there are countless {NICKNAME}s and Bartholoses in existence, each pair playing the exact same treasure-hunting game.

C: 多半是在你肚子里。
E: Probably sitting in your stomach right now.

C: 有人知道自己知道，有人知道自己不知道，有人不知道自己知道，有人不知道自己不知道。不过还有一种人，他们知道自己不知道自己不知道——那才是最厉害的。
E: Some know they know, some know they don't, some don't know they know, and some don't know they don't. But the most impressive are those who know they don't know they don't know.

C: 你也是分身？
E: Another projection, huh?

C: 行吧……
E: Fine...

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 可泰坦的神谕绝不会出错，可她，我、我应该…如何是好啊！
E: But the Titan's prophecy cannot be wrong. Yet... she... What... What should I do?!

C: 居然还有这种事，我开始好奇辅祭你的来历了…但别灰心，命运泰坦们并没有否定你的寻求，我相信，将来某日，你一定会得知它的所在。
E: Unbelievable! I'm growing curious about your origins, acolyte. But don't lose heart — the Fate Titans have not denied your pursuit. I'm sure you'll find your answers one day.

C: 太感谢了！愿天父看护您！
E: Thank you! May the sky father watch over you!

C: 这难道是个圈套…
E: Could this be... a trap?

C: 他以这种方式为自己写下了最后的结局。
E: This is how he chose to write his final chapter.

C: 太感谢了！愿天父看护您！
E: Thank you! May the sky father watch over you!

C: 有脚，是真人没错。
E: She's got feet. No doubt she's a real person.

C: 办完任务我找谁交啊？
E: Who do I report this to when I'm done with the mission?

C: 持明嘛，他们…就比较神秘了。听说持明活得久了，又或受伤濒死，会化作一颗珍珠般的蛋，然后以幼子形貌破壳新生……
E: As for the Vidyadhara, they're... more mysterious. They say that when a Vidyadhara is very old or has a fatal injury, they turn into an egg that looks like a pearl. When the shell breaks, they come out looking young again...

C: 你的身体还在办公室里，这里是根据记忆生成的模拟宇宙，现在，试着随便走走。
E: Your body is still sitting in the office. This is a Simulated Universe generated from your memories. Now, try to walk around.

C: 不过嘛，至少这一次你有我的保护，也没什么可担心的啦。选吧。
E: On the other hand, you at least have my protection. So you've got nothing to worry about. Come and pick one.

C: 「是啊，是啊，就当是新手福利吧。等你熟悉了『模拟宇宙』，我就不会再频繁打扰你啦，还有那么多事情要干呢，你就自己玩吧。」
E: "Yup, sure am. Just treat it as the perk of being a rookie. Once you're familiar with the Simulated Universe, I won't bother you too much. There's so much to get done, so just play around by yourself."

C: 「是么，我忘记了。」她毫无感情地道歉，「真抱歉，让你不舒服了。再等一会，我再收集点Ⅸ的数据，然后马上把你弄出去。」
E: "Yeah, I forgot." She apologized emotionlessly, "Sorry for making you uncomfortable. Give me a sec. I'll collect some more data on IX, and then I'll get you out right away."

C: 「就这样吧{NICKNAME}，再继续你可能撑不住了。」黑塔啧道，「靠近Ⅸ这家伙身边就会这样，祂好像也不是故意的。辛苦你了，干得不错！」
E: "Stop, {NICKNAME}. You won't be able to hold it anymore." Herta says, "human minds will break when people get near IX, but IX doesn't seem to do it on purpose. Thank you for your hard work, you did a good job!"

C: 听不出你很开心…
E: You don't sound happy...

C: 战胜这个家伙吧，让我们结束这趟旅程。
E: Beat this entity, and let's end this trip for now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「那个东西。」</color>黑塔不耐烦地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「就是你平时走在路上，会用球棒打破的玩意儿。你怎么不去打它了？没看见吗？」</color>
