E: <color=#dbc291ff>"That thing."</color> Herta says impatiently. <color=#dbc291ff>"You usually smash it with a bat when you walk past. Why didn't you go and hit it? Can't you see it?"</color>

C:
「汝终应吾之邀请…克里珀；搅局者无有规法慎独，其行不将饶恕。」
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Jme-Clent-A. I. Vadnbg。<unbreak>1635</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>
「掌控嬗变之意志——琥珀王，汝本将重责无当。」
♬" Qecréiat Ineional es mpers"。<unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬
E:
"You have finally accepted my invitation, Qlipoth. The troublemakers go against the rules. Their actions are unpardonable."
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖ ♬ Jme-Clent-A. I. Vadnbg. <unbreak>1635</unbreak>-<unbreak>1942</unbreak>
"Amber Lord, as one that controls the will of transmutation, you bear great responsibility."
♬" Qecréiat Ineional es mpers." <unbreak>1894</unbreak>-<unbreak>193</unbreak>
(♯1 - -·♭6 | ♭<unbreak>6 1</unbreak>· - - | - - - - ‖♬

C: 「好吧…停。『秩序』被『同谐』所同化，这我倒不意外。」黑塔摊手，「只是不知道发生在什么时候。莫非『秩序』的消失也和列神之战有关？唉，家族对此只字不提…我还挺想再见次太一，哪怕祂有点死板。噢，{NICKNAME}，要是让我转述这段八卦，我会这么说：希佩和阿哈还有你，为了塔伊兹育罗斯绞在了一起！」
E: "Okay... stop. I'm not surprised to see Order being assimilated by Harmony." Herta spreads her hands. "But I just don't know when it happened. Could the disappearance of the Order be related to the battle among Aeons? Ahhh, The Family doesn't say a single word about it... I'd really like to meet Ena again, although THEY are a bit rigid. Oh, {NICKNAME}, if I have to tell someone about this gossip, I'd say Xipe, Aha, and you have come together because of Tayzzyronth!"

C: 你和医院的医生们一起撑了二十一天，直至大拉铂尔星宣布全球沦陷，请求星际支援；运输船到来时，你正扛着物资与第一批逃生者撤离，你听到一些与众不同的窃窃私语——他们正劝一个疯女人离开这里；她并不愿意开门，而她的窗户正在漏风。
E: You hold out with the doctors at the hospital for twenty-one days until the Lapole Major government officially announces the planet's fall and requests interstellar rescue. As transport ships arrive to evacuate the first batch of survivors, you hear whispers among some of the refugees, urging a distraught woman to flee the area. She refuses to open the door, and her window lies shattered.

C: 你很有礼貌，但礼貌闻起来并不美妙。
E: Your manners exude politeness, but manners absent of scent cannot be considered quite so splendid.

C: 这位领袖…不知为何，他总能获得成功与好运。这令他愈发贪婪、自以为是，他如此坚信自己无所不能——哪怕「征服」一个又一个星球、建立起庞大的「文明」。他想得到的都能得到，但…他永远弄不清自己究竟想要什么。
E: This leader... has always managed to succeed against all odds, and his triumphs have filled him with avarice, hubris, and an unwavering belief that he can conquer any planet and erect unprecedented civilizations. While he can get whatever he desires... he has never discovered what he really wants.

C: 他居然对你表示感谢，微笑，接着对你破口大骂！
E: To your surprise, he thanks you and smiles at you. But then, he lets out a torrent of furious curses!

C: 你听着众人闲谈，突然玩味地察觉…在那灾虐五纪的祸患中，宇宙<color=#dbc291ff>「双害」</color>的争斗不止不休，无数星系遭遇沦亡命运。期间究竟有多少生命消逝…你无从知晓了。
E: As you listen to their casual chat, you suddenly realize that... During the calamity that lasted five Amber Eras, the ceaseless battles between the <color=#dbc291ff>Two Scourges</color> plunged countless star systems into destruction. As for how many lives perished... the actual number is simply beyond your comprehension.

C: 你怀疑自己真的有点享受被阿哈作弄的快感了。
E: At that moment, you suspected that you were actually enjoying the thrill of being deceived by Aha.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群哭泣的伶人。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice changes into a chorus of weeping Mourning Actors.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 异妙的啼哭突然出现，你确信那是婴虫对空气的第一声吮吸。连带赤蝶嗜吸百合的音节，一些不同味道的唾液滴落…它有橙味、血液或是热带水果的不同气息，让你误以为自己身处汽水的海洋中。
E: A peculiar cry suddenly comes from somewhere, and you are certain it is the first suckling sound of an infant insect to the air. Along with it comes the melodic tone of red butterflies sucking honey from lilies. The saliva of different scents such as the scents of orange, blood, and tropical fruits is dripping, making you feel as though you were immersed in an ocean of soda.

C: 我也要加入其中！
E: I also wish to join!

C: 「机器头！」黑塔还是被震慑了一下，她罕见地收起不屑的态度，犹豫着如何表达，「嗯，机器头，好久不见…我该寒暄一下？我不擅长这个。啊——等等，我看到了！」
E: "Droidhead!" Herta is still momentarily shocked. Her usual scorn is missing, and she struggles to find her words. "Yes, Droidhead. Long time... I should say hello to you? I'm not good with these things. Ah — Wait! I see it!"

C: 「嗯，但其实你没得选…你的感受对机器头来说可无所谓。好吧…斯蒂芬掉线了。」黑塔面带愠色，「{NICKNAME}，我们先向前走吧，你想躺会儿也行。反正，「博识尊」的计算结果是不可违逆的，你什么时候走到祂面前，也在祂的计算之中；你在这过程中能见到什么，祂也一清二楚。」
E: "Sure, but you don't have a choice, actually... Your feelings don't matter to Droidhead. All right... Stephen got disconnected." Herta's face is slightly gloomy. "{NICKNAME}, let's keep moving forward first. You can lie down for a bit if you want. Nous's calculations are unavoidable anyway. When you meet Them is also within Their calculations. What you will see during the course, THEY are also lucidly clear."

C: 它近似于断壁残垣，但仍旧庄严肃穆。它巨大的躯壳上留有战争的痕迹，而其背后的象征远比战争更加悲壮。它是无机军团的*皇帝*，亦或是它们的*信仰*本身！在它陷入沉睡后，机械帝国也一度陷入崩溃。
E: It is broken, yet holds a solemn face. Its massive shell bears the marks of war, and the symbols on its back are far more tragic than the war itself. It is the Inorganic Legion's *Emperor*, or *Faith* itself! After it falls into a deep slumber, the Machine Empire also falls into ruin.

C: 不向祂发问。
E: Do not ask THEM questions.

C: 「阿基维利。」
E: "Akivili."

C: 『政宣部』特劳拉•法恩莎。
E: Telora Farnsha from the Outreach and Engagement Division.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我服从「时刻」。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I obey the "Instant."

C: 重建图书馆。
E: Rebuild the library.

C: 在高速运动的视线里，远处的那片硝烟离你越来越近，仿佛不是你在奔向它，而是战争在撞向你。它一路飘散，沿着光鲜亮丽的王城外壁，渗透进焦黑的土壤。
E: As you move at a high speed, your eyes discern that the trail of smoke in the distance is drawing nearer — as if warfare were steaming towards you, rather than you speeding towards it. It drifts along the bright exterior wall of the imperial city and permeates into the scorched earth.

C: 发生了什么？你的思考能力不足以让你理解当前的事实，哪怕这是再简单不过的问题。一位垂垂老矣的旧王，和身强力壮的精英。孩子们都平静地望着它，任凭它杀死种群的母亲和父亲。
E: What happened? Your capacity for thought is not enough to understand what's going on, despite the simplicity of the question. An old, dying king and a strong, hardy elite. The kids all look at it calmly as they let it kill the mother and father of the clan.

C: 在四台生命终结单元的围捕下，你一路奔逃，轰开脚下的障壁，纵身跳进飞船的引擎舱里。终结单元的武器装备再先进，也不敢在这样危险的狭小空间里施展。除非它们的主人愿意和你这小小的游侠一起同宇宙吻别。
E: Surrounded by four life termination units, you flee and blow away the obstacles beneath you, leaping off into the engine room of the spaceship. No matter how advanced the termination units' weaponry is, they wouldn't dare to wield it in such confined space. That is, unless the owners want to kiss goodbye to a little ranger like you — and the rest of the universe, with it.

C: 密集的射线精准地落到你的身上，被散射力场偏折向四周，只差一点儿就能给反物质引擎做个理发。
E: The dense rays fall with precision onto your body as the force field scatters the rays out just enough to give the antimatter engine a haircut.

C: 怎会有真理因愚人而生？
E: How could there ever be a truth born from foolishness?

C: 现在我该离开了。
E: I should leave now.

C: 冷静点，今时不同往日。
E: Calm down. Things have changed.

C: 学士点点头，踱出控制室，重新合上了门。
E: The scholar nods, walks out of the control room and closes the door behind him.

C: 「关键时刻数据库因为存储元件故障而报销；团队里的核心研究人员在假期旅行中遭遇船难；粒子转化实验中，误触导致的坍缩……灾难总会在恰到好处的时刻出现，粉碎我的努力。」
E: "The database would break down due to memory element failure at a crucial moment. The spaceship that key personnel in the research team were on during their vacation would get wrecked. A collapse caused by an accidental touch during a particle conversion experiment... Disasters would always happen at the right time to absolutely shatter my efforts."

C: 逃向中转区域。
E: Run to the transit area.

C: 你想起了她的名字，<color=#dbc291ff>波尔卡•卡卡目</color>，杀死帝皇的凶手。
E: You remember her name: <color=#dbc291ff>Polka Kakamond</color>, the murderer who killed the Emperor.

C: 「居然能从第一次帝皇战争活到第二次帝皇战争，她这时候到底多少岁？难道说，第Ⅸ机关的传言…」好吧，你永远弄不清黑塔的兴趣到底会落在哪儿。
E: "To have lived from the First Emperor's War to the next one... how old is she exactly? Could it be that the legend of Device IX..." All right, you'll never be able to fathom what piques Herta's curiosity.

C: 学士们的歌声愈发高昂，它拂过伤员的面庞，飘出伊斯梅尔的过滤层，一直飞到许多个琥珀纪后的时光。
E: The scholars' song becomes more sonorous. It grazes past the faces of the wounded, drifting beyond Izmael's filtration layer, till it flies into a time many Amber Eras later.

C: 你无法要求刀耕火种的人学习反物质引擎的原理。哪怕为他们展示了聚变炉的火花，也没人会把它和头顶的恒星相互联系。
E: You cannot ask a simple farmer to understand the principles of the antimatter engine. Even if you were to show them the sparks of the fusion furnace, no one could relate it to the stars that burn above their heads.

C: 「在离开前，我会给你们一点厉害的东西，像平时那样。」
E: "Before leaving, I will give you all something quite powerful, just like how I usually do."

C: 继续回溯。
E: Continue backtracking.

C: 帝皇的衣冠冢，自我加冕的终点。不巧的是，有人比你们来得更早。挣扎的瞬间，定格在希望破灭的刹那，将成为蝴蝶最美丽的时刻。
E: The Emperor's cenotaph, the end of self-coronation. Unfortunately, others came earlier than you. That flash of struggle, suspended in that instant of hope's decimation — Will become the butterfly's most beautiful moment.

C: 「大块头，往里面看！」喧闹声在回路深处响起，你感到些许烦躁，但更多的却是安心。你将目光转移向自己的内部，绚烂的光球上，巨大的城市屹立其间。在那里，渺小的有机体们在向你挥手。
E: "You big idiot, look in here!" You hear a call resound deep in your circuits, which irritates you slightly, but brings a greater sense of relief. You cast your gaze inside yourself, and atop a shining sphere of light stands a great city. In this city, tiny organic organisms wave back at you.

C: 这次阮•梅想培育「博识尊」，而螺丝咕姆一直对无机生命的起源很感兴趣，于是我们一拍即合，选取了#27鲁珀特死亡前的时间。
E: Ruan Mei plans to cultivate Nous, and Screwllum has always been interested in the origins of inorganic lives. So, we quickly found ourselves on the same page and decided to focus on the time before the death of #27 Rubert.

C: 你身处一个漆黑的房间。面前的电视机正放映购物频道——来自星际和平公司传统项目部门。
E: You are in a pitch-black room. The television before you is showing an infomercial channel funded by the IPC Traditional Project Department.

C: 你陷入了沉思中。
E: You are lost in thought.

C: 你获得大量宇宙碎片。
E: You have obtained a large number of Cosmic Fragments.

C: 「秘密情报，S级招募——雪原深境牦牛，极高报酬。这里竟然这么冷，能借我你的皮毛吗？」你目光落在他胸前*斯诺德兰动物保护协会*的徽章…
E: "According to a secret source, the S-rank bounty for Snow Plains Yaks comes with a handsome reward. I'm surprised by how cold this place is. Could you lend me your fur coat?" You catch sight of the Snowland Animal Welfare Association badge worn on the man's chest...

C: 这是你获得升职的第一天！你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的「P<unbreak>-16</unbreak>」正式职工，带领好手下新来的临时雇佣工。你的目光已经投向更高的金字塔顶尖…
E: This is your first day after being promoted! Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent official P<unbreak>-16</unbreak> employee and a good supervisor to the new temporary workers. You already have your eyes set even higher along the corporate ladder...

C: 烛火被你点亮，你期许着…
E: After lighting up a candle, you make a wish...

C: 残破的移动堡垒从你的头顶掠过，巨大的轰鸣让你的心脏都近乎停滞。
E: The battered moving fortress glides past the top of your head. Your heart almost stops beating because of the enormous roar.

C: 讲述朴实的生活。
E: Describe a simple life.

C: 你怀疑自己是忘了眨眼，仅仅一个瞬间，飞船便已把同行的对手远远甩在身后，以不到一秒的时间获得了胜利。
E: You wonder if you forgot to blink. In just a heartbeat, the ship had already long left its opponents behind and secured victory in less than a second.

C: 你失足踏入回收站的引力滑道，破烂的机械和废旧零件拥挤作河流，推搡着你向前，从烟囱里落入一个明亮的房间。
E: You accidentally step into the gravitational slide of the recycling plant. Broken machines and scrapped parts swarm into a river and push you forward, falling through the chimney into a bright room.

C: 愚人船一个急转弯，在胃液上打出不完美的水漂。你转头看向掌舵的愚者，这一颠一颤似乎让酒精在他的大脑里开起了派对，他狂笑着，将船驶向古板食人鲨的领域。
E: The Ship of Fools takes a sharp turn and skids imperfectly over the stomach acid. You turn your head to look at the Fool at the helm. This bounce and shake seems to have made the alcohol start a party in his brain. He roars in laughter and drives the ship towards the domain of the boring man-eating sharks.

C: 「干得好！经过我缜密的推理，犯人一定是在店中买到了过期的磁性牙膏，才做出了后续对受害者的报复行为。」侦探果决地投影出一把残留着机油的牙刷。
E: "Well done! Based on my meticulous deduction, the suspect must have sought revenge on the victim for the purchase of expired magnetic toothpaste in the store." The detective resolutely projects an image of toothpaste with machine oil residue.

C: 虽然你既不是朋克洛德的骇客，也不是迷思的虚构史学家。但你相信，凭借自己一身的艺术细胞，凭寥寥几笔把它画出来，根本是易如反掌。
E: Despite not being a Punklordian hacker or a Mythus History Fictionologist, you feel confident that completing this painting with your artistic talent would be a walk in the park.

C: 或许，它也做过些好事。譬如把一颗星星藏在湖底，诱惑贪婪的僭主溺死。或者让英雄的战车被石子颠簸，躲过弓箭。
E: Perhaps they once performed benevolent acts, like concealing a star at the bottom of a lake to drown a greedy tyrant, or unsettling a hero's chariot to help him evade an arrow.

C: 船上空无一物。
E: The boat is utterly empty.

C: 承受记忆的散失。
E: Endure the fading of memories.

C: 诅咒将折磨它的火种。
E: A curse will torment their Coreflame.

C: 它看见鸟儿衔来果实装点巢穴，将军向少女献出花朵，爱恋之情比火种还要灼热。
E: They see birds carrying fruits to decorate their nests, generals offering flowers to young maidens, their love burning hotter than any Coreflame.

C: 爱将跨越身份。
E: Love will transcend status.

C: 可惜，你已无法窥见那战船的影迹，它在黄金战争中被撕裂，成为夜空中的流星。
E: Regrettably, you can no longer see that warship. It was ripped apart in the Chrysos War, becoming a meteor in the night sky.

C: 「我能感受到财富已经汇聚在天平的一侧，待天平归正之时，我会再次找到你。」修士微微一笑，转身离开。
E: "I can already sense wealth gathering at one end of the scale. When the balance is restored, I will return to you." With a faint smile, the friar turns and walks away.

C: 大地兽发出一声低鸣，载着你一摇一晃地出发了。
E: With a low rumble, the dromas sways as it carries you off.

C: 即使是一捧微不足道的泥土，一朵转瞬即逝的浪花，一股若有若无的空气，都蕴含了塔兰顿精妙绝伦的平衡之道。
E: Even an insignificant grain of soil, a fleeting, tumbling wave, or an ephemeral gust of air bears Talanton's delicate balance.

C: 吉奥里亚这次要生气了。
E: Georios is going to blow a gasket this time.

C: 但是那一片片金色的麦田，一捆捆饱满的麦穗，一张张满足的笑脸，就是对这位泰坦最好的告慰。
E: But those patches of golden wheat fields, and those tight bundles of harvest, and smiling, satisfied faces are the best means of comfort for this Titan.

C: 所以吃了能变聪明？
E: So eating it will make you smarter?

C: 当死亡出现在世界上后，饥饿便也开始侵扰地上的生灵。为数众多的人子，不得不舍弃身为万物灵长的尊严，像野兽一样互相争斗，抢夺食物。
E: After death appeared in the world, hunger also began to afflict the beings of the earth. The numerous children of humanity, forced to abandon the dignity of being the most exalted of creatures, fought each other like beasts for food.

C: 当欧洛尼斯的幻夜尚且独占着天幕，无垠的永夜中，一只翅膀足以遮蔽大地的巨鸟睁开了眼眸。
E: When the phantom night of Oronyx still dominated the sky, in the boundless Evernight, a giant bird whose wings could cover the land opened its eyes.

C: 那哀嚎之声顷刻便弱上几分，于是艾格勒再闭上一双眼睛。
E: At that moment, the wailing grew a little fainter. So Aquila closed another pair of eyes.

C: 它找到天空之主，祈求它收回雷枪，令那神兵不再助纣为虐。但艾格勒不以为然——
E: Seeking aid, they turned to the Sky Titan, pleading for the return of the lightning spear, so that the divine weapon would no longer aid in destruction. But Aquila was unmoved —

C: 我始终认为，细节决定成败。年轻人就得保持谦虚，把姿态放低，这样才能看清脚下的路。
E: I always believe that the difference between success and failure lies in the details. Young people need to stay humble and put their heads down so they can see the road under their feet.

C: 温馨提示：想品尝更多美味，请提升自己的科员级别。
E: Tip: If you want to taste more delicious food, please upgrade your Researcher level.

C: 这声音似乎蕴藏着某种深意，但除了疑似「王」的发音外，你听不懂它在说些什么。空间站里有能翻译它的工具吗？
E: This voice seems to contain some kind of poignant meaning, but all you can make out is the word "King." Are there tools aboard the space station to translate it?

C: 恭喜，你学会了一门全新的语言！
E: Congratulations — you've learned a whole new language!

C: 既然植物都可以说话，那为什么不可以喝咖啡呢？你思来想去，决定让它品尝一下这份苦涩的美味。
E: If plants can talk, why can't they drink coffee too? You think it over before deciding to let it sample some of this beautiful bitter beverage.

C: 你猜测这张纸条或许来自某位密卷科科员的笔记本。
E: You surmise that this note could be from a Department of Insight researcher's notebook.

C: 好，我签。
E: Fine. I'll sign it.

C: 也就是宇宙的法则，世界的法则，唯一仅有牢不可破的法则。
E: It is the law of the universe and the world — the only unbreakable law.

C: 坐上去，按冲水键！
E: Sit down and flush!

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你很清楚他们在做什么：他们在呼唤祂，呼唤那位逆时而行的尊贵者…他们意图通过隐写某个神秘的通讯频道，将其编纂成仪式祷文——
E: It is apparent to you what they are doing — they are summoning THEM, the noble being who travels against time... They intend to treat a mysterious communication channel with steganography and craft it into a ritual prayer...

C: 你沉默地伸出手。她将指尖温柔地置入你的手心，卷起你的手指，收拢。她真的好用力，你想，一如既往。可她的身躯明明如此瘦小……
E: You reach out your hand silently. She gently laces your fingers together and holds your hand in a tight grip as usual. She is strong despite her slender and small body...

C: …你想起克洛多梅尔早已背叛了你——他以人性与数以亿计的生命为代价，自军团手中换得苟活的机会…你想起希尔德贝尼娅，想起洛塔尼娅……
E: ...You remember Chlodomer had already betrayed you. He exchanged his humanity and millions of lives with the Legion for his own survival... Then, you think about Hildebenia, and Chlodania...

C: 吃我的鳞粉吧~
E: Eat my wing powder~!

C: 嘿嘿，这就是穿墙术！不过现在的位置还不完美，等我挪动一下~
E: Hehe, this is the wall-phasing technique. But my current position isn't great. Let me move a bit.

C: 这些若虫原本亲密无间，却出于某种原因无法相见。礼赞命运，让我们再次看到了这幅场面。
E: These nymphs were once tight-knit as iron chains, but could not see one another for reasons unknown. Blessed is destiny, that we are able to witness their union once more.

C: 噢，不好意思…我将您错认成……
E: Ohh, my apologies... I thought you were...

C: 「干得好，小东西。」
E: "Well done, little one."

C: 好，拿去吧。记得这次要好好爱惜装备。
E: Alright, alright. Just take it. Remember to take good care of the equipment.

C: 真可惜啊，我本来以为「冷面小青龙」能席卷下层区，成为搏击界的超级新星……
E: What a shame though. I thought for sure that Cold Dragon Young could sweep the Underworld and become the new superstar of the fighting world...

C: …送、送给我们？
E: ...G—Give it to us?

C: 吃第一口。
E: Take the first bite.

C: 摊主的赞扬传进你的耳朵…但你此刻无暇接受任何人的吹捧。你只想做一件事……
E: The stall owner's praise reaches your ears, but you don't have the mental space to take it in. All you can think about is one thing...

C: 再说了，看{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}这一身光鲜亮丽的打扮…<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点肯定算不得什么高消费吧？
E: Besides, look at you, {F#sister}{M#brother}. You're wearing such glamorous clothes... <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits is probably nothing to you, right?

C: 你顺利通过了留言环节的考验，这张纸片上只剩下最后一格空白了。
E: You successfully passed the comment component of the test. There's only one blank space left on this piece of paper.

C: 对床铺舒适度的评价：<color=#dbc291ff>不满意 / 一般 / 很满意</color>
E: Your rating for the bed: <color=#dbc291ff>Unsatisfied / Neutral / Very satisfied.</color>

C: 呜呜…已经没希望了……
E: Boohoo... The game's basically over already...

C: 不、不好意思！我就是临时在这里停一下，马上就走！
E: S—Sorry! I'm just parked here for a bit. I'll move it right away!

C: 那个，这是我的一点心意…还请铁卫{M#大哥}{F#大姐}笑纳！
E: Umm. This is just a small token... Please kindly accept it, {M#Sir}{F#Miss}!

C: 救命！我感觉…希露瓦大人已经令我心律不齐了…我要把希露瓦大人的玉照挂在我的床头…这样我就能天天看着我的希露瓦大人了！
E: Save me! I think... Lady Serval has caused my heart to skip several beats... I want to hang Lady Serval's picture on my headboard... That way I can see her every day!

C: 噗啊——总算能喘口气了喀。为了跟那些石雕像比拼耐力，我已经保持不动好久了喀……
E: *puff* Finally, a chance to catch my breath. I've been standing dead still for ages in this competition of endurance against those other statues...

C: 啊？什么？你耳朵是不是不好，都说了我已经不鉴定……
E: Ah, what? Are you hard of hearing? I told you, I'm not an appraiser anymore...

C: 我从未发生过任何事。「后巷」不会发生任何事。
E: I've always been all right. Nothing ever happens in the "back alley."

C: 谢谢医生救我性命…
E: Thanks for saving me, doctor.

C: 不错，急流勇退。那么，选择哪里作为藏身处会更好呢？
E: Nice. A tactical retreat. Where would be a better place to hide?

C: 虎克真厉害！
E: Hook is incredible!

C: 别抖机灵，{NICKNAME}。你知道这是什么意思。
E: Don't get ahead of yourself, {NICKNAME}. You know what this means.

C: 那帮目光短浅的家伙喀！凭什么我就不能当祭司——不就是遵循「命运」的指引作出预言嘛，我早晚也可以的！
E: Those narrow-minded fools, crrrk! Who says I can't be a priest? Following Fate's guidance to make prophecies — piece of cake! I'd nail it eventually!

C: 这里和你记忆中的那片花海颇为相像，但又有些许不同……
E: This place resembles the sea of flowers in your memory, but there are some subtle differences...

C: 嗡嗡，有对情侣之前老在这说着天长地久的誓言，本蝶都快听腻了。
E: Hmph... There used to be a couple here, always whispering vows of eternal love. I heard them so much that I was sick of it.

C: 心事藏不住啊，看来你是一个关心我的人。好吧，我就再陪你聊几句。
E: You can't hide your feelings. I can tell you are someone who cares about me. Fine. I will take some time to talk with you.

C: 我现在打算回去再做做物流的工作，也许之前的生活也没有那么不堪。
E: I would go back to my courier job. Perhaps my former life was not so terrible.

C: 你稍等，我再查一下…等等，不好了！
E: Wait a moment. I'll check... Hold on. This isn't good!

C: 你是在叫我吗？
E: Are you calling me?

C: 你竟然这么爽快，甚至没有抱怨一下…真是意外。
E: You seem calm, like you're not even complaining... That's a surprise.

C: 我偏要在你们的地盘上闹事儿。
E: I'm just here to make a scene on your turf.

C: 编号是什么？我没有编号。
E: What number? I don't have a number.

C: 啊，这烈日骄阳！伟大的艾格勒啊，照亮我的面庞，灼痛我的背脊，用我滴落的汗水濯洗您蒙尘的眼睛——
E: Ah, this blazing sun! Oh great Aquila, shine upon my face, burn my back, let my falling sweat cleanse the dust from your eyes—

C: 信奉烈阳的异端，日日指责我们呼唤阴风，吹来秽雨沾染艾格勒的神躯……
E: The heretics who worship the blazing sun constantly accuse us of calling forth foul winds to bring cursed rain upon Aquila's sacred body...

C: 啧。同样都是天舶司的人，为什么他就能这么正大光明地偷懒？
E: Tsk, we're both working for the same Sky-Faring Commission, how is he able to slack off so openly?

C: 呃，打住打住——我知道客官您想说什么，但那种事情在我们仙舟可是明令禁止的！
E: Uh, hold it right there! I know what you're gonna say, but that kind of behavior is explicitly banned aboard Xianzhou!

C: 所以，老板我在三百年前效法兵书，引入了这套健全且刺激的「外交•作战」规则——
E: So, I started following the examples in this Compendium over <unbreak>300</unbreak> years ago and introduced this set of robust and exciting rules to the game: Diplomacy and Combat!

C: 眼下没人应征测试员，所以也就没得好挑啦，就等你了。
E: Since there's no other tester applicants, we don't have any other choice. It's all up to you.

C: 吾有一术，号曰「同心」。天符俱设，神魂相属。金铁有灵，禀受驱遣！
E: This technique hereby, have I named Hearts Aligned. With talismans bestowed by the heavens, thy spirits and soul are combined. Spirits of gold and metal, shall now obey thy commands!

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 奖励？哦，你不说我都忘了。
E: Reward? Oh, I almost forgot.

C: 这是你的熟人吗？居然会搞这么复古的恶作剧，这人看起来也不简单啊。
E: Is this someone you know? To pull off such an old-school prank... this person doesn't seem ordinary at all.

C: 看你的样子，你应该是个化外民吧——行，那我跟你说说倒无妨。
E: You look like an outworlder. Fine, it shouldn't hurt if I tell you.

C: 当然，也不排除只是用涂鸦替代了路标和指示牌，希望把来到此处的旅者引向某个秘密之地。
E: Of course, you can't rule out that the graffiti has been used to replace road signs and signposts in hopes of luring travelers to some kind of secret area...

C: 它就是那神秘的七井盖之一，虚无之井盖！
E: This must be one of the mysterious Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Nihility!

C: 在破损以前，广告牌先生是这条街上最靓的大众情人。
E: Before he was broken, Mr. Billboard was the biggest paramour on this street.

C: 我是夹缝中的观察者…
E: I am the observer in the cracks...

C: 等待并心怀希望。
E: Wait and hope.

C: 是啊，赞美刻法勒…
E: Indeed, praise Kephale...

C: 多泡几次，对身体好。
E: Try it a few times. It's good for your health.

C: 泡累了？吃点东西吗？
E: Tired from soaking? Want to eat something?

C: 要不要去摸大地兽？
E: Wanna go pat a dromas?

C: 你是说别吃果子吗？
E: You were saying not to eat the fruits?

C: 刻法勒的城邦…奥赫玛。
E: Kephale's city... Okhema.

C: 山之民的伤该怎么治…
E: How do we treat the Mountain Dweller's wounds...

C: 这是很正常的！帕姆过去也有这样迷惘的时刻，那时候，我彻夜无眠，仰望星空，探索…诶，好像背错了，后面该怎么说来着…
E: Why, that's normal! Pom-Pom remembers feeling similarly bewildered back in the day. I'd stay up all night, gazing up at the stars, exploring... Uh, whoops. How did that sentence go again...

C: （摘叶子）
E: (Pluck a leaf)

C: 而且…有些乘客不太喜欢和动物相处，所以帕姆在想，要不要在「列车行为准则」中加一条——「禁止携带宠物上车」。
E: Besides... Some passengers don't really like animals, so Pom-Pom wonders whether it's worth adding a line in the Express Regulations — No Pets on Board?

C: 一定是因为昨天睡姿问题导致的！落枕真是太痛了，脖子完全没有办法转动，更别提回头了！
E: I'm sure it's because of my sleeping posture last night! It's so uncomfortable to have a stiff neck. I can't even move my neck, let alone turn around!

C: 要是一直疼得慌，你再过来复诊吧。不过还是那句老话，这种小伤小病不可能给你开假单的。
E: Come back if the pain persists. Just so you know, I won't give you a medical certificate for a problem as minor as that.

C: 你也来啦？想听歌吗～过来一起听歌帕！
E: Hi there! Fancy some music? Let's listen to some songs together!

C: 听上去有点敷衍…倒也可以理解，毕竟…那种地方肯定没法跟列车上比。
E: You sound indifferent, which is understandable... After all, the place is nothing like the Express.

C: 感觉有点融不进去…
E: I had a hard time blending in...

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你如果决定好了就告诉帕姆你的答案吧！请公平公正地选出你最喜欢的那种配色！
E: {NICKNAME}, tell me your choice when you're ready! Please choose your favorite colorway in all honesty!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，机器人的事情有着落了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, how's the robot thing going?

C: 要管理列车…大概就是要有一定的觉悟。
E: Managing a train... probably requires a certain amount of awareness.

C: 结果那几个观众追着问他要续集，瓦尔特乘客就躲在列车里一连几天没下车，说是帮姬子修理列车上的什么东西了。
E: This resulted in a group of fans chasing after him to beg for a sequel. Welt hid in the Express for several days straight, saying that he was just helping Himeko do some repairs.

C: 丹恒乘客时常会用心保养擦拭他的长枪。虽然列车很安全，但他似乎还是没有放下防范之心。
E: Passenger Dan Heng often carefully maintains and polishes his spear. Although the Express is very safe, it seems that he is not willing to drop his guard.

C: 少喝机油。哈。哈。哈。
E: Drink less oil! ...Geddit?

C: 还要等多久……
E: How long am I gonna have to wait...

C: 哎…队长，迴星港什么时候才能复工复产啊？很多工人都靠这个生活呢，一直封锁着也不是个事儿啊……
E: Ah... Captain, when will the Stargazer Navalia resume operations? A lot of workers rely on it to make a living. Keeping it blocked off all the time isn't a solution...

C: 我要出——剪刀！
E: Scissors!

C: 噢，我输啦！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}太厉害了！
E: Oh, I lost! {F#Miss}{M#Mister} is just too good!

C: 按照我们「黑暗拳斗大赛」的规矩，你理应得到奖励！
E: According to the rules, you get a prize!

C: 你对这个有印象吗？
E: Does this ring any bells?

C: 滴答，滴答。
E: Tick tock, tick tock.

C: 嘿，你谁啊？
E: Hey, who are you?

C: …但这回它挑错了对手！你可是宇宙闻名的开拓者，黑塔空间站的守护神，末日兽的…呃…末日。对——今天就是你为民除害的日子！
E: It picked the wrong opponent to mess with this time. After all, you are the universally renowned Trailblazer, the guardian deity of the Herta Space Station, the Doomsday Beast's... um... Doom. Yep. Today is the day you purge evil for the greater good!

C: 我当然热爱秩序。
E: Of course, I love order.

C: 我…我不是故意的。
E: It... it was an accident.

C: …我想也是，那你出个价吧！我尽量凑钱给你……
E: ...That makes sense. Name your price, then! I'll do my best to put some money together for you...

C: 去吧，拿起那个…肮脏的听筒！听听这裂界到底想用什么故事刺激你的神经。
E: Now, pick up that dirty phone and hear what stimulating story the Fragmentum has in store for you!

C: 感性带来的冲动悄然退场，理智宣布了它的胜利。只是又一个裂界描摹现实产生的幻象罢了，它不值得你浪费宝贵的时间。
E: The impulse fades and sensibility takes over. It's just another Fragmentum illusion not worth your time.

C: 该不该试着打开它呢？老实说，那个史考特的态度奇差…你早就看他不爽了。
E: Should you open it? Frankly, you don't like Scott as it is...

C: 这块表是你的吗？
E: Is this watch yours?

C: 但这也不能细想，毕竟长乐天的行人们也很难想象你怎么能带着几袋垃圾满街跑。
E: But it's not something for you to ponder over. After all, pedestrians in the Exalting Sanctum also can't imagine you running all over the place with bags of trash.

C: 正因为那种东西，你才不得不奔忙于世间。你本可以将满足自身的渴望放在首位，却不得不为你的伙伴浪费短暂的生命。
E: It's because of those things that you have to busy yourself in the mortal realm. You could've put your own satisfaction first, instead of wasting this short life of yours on your companions.

C: 罐中仙不再说话。
E: The Immortal in a Vase stops talking.

C: 那么接下来，咱们就该用机巧鸟寻找失物了。准备好了吗？
E: Now, it's time to search for the lost cargo with the cycrane. Are you ready?

C: 这次我们要找的第一件失物，似乎是遗失在了<color=#dbc291ff>禨祥台</color>附近。飞过去找找看吧。
E: The first item we are looking for seems to be lost near <color=#dbc291ff>Fortuna Augurstead</color>. Let's fly over there.

C: 不必多说，带路吧。
E: Say no more. Show me the way.

C: 我应该没有说错吧？
E: I'm right, aren't I?

C: 钥匙虽然与铁盒钥匙孔匹配一致，但钥匙孔内锈蚀化严重，你注意到她尝试了几次终于打开了铁盒——究竟是锁钥匹配，还是强硬捅开，你不得而知。
E: The key apparently fits, but the inside of the keyhole is severely rusted. You notice that after several attempts she finally twists open the lid — but you'll never know whether the key fit, or whether it was forced open.

C: *仙舟粗口*！我想起来了！这家伙是景元的客人，是罗浮外面来的猎狗！
E: *Xianzhou profanity*! I remember now! This is Jing Yuan's guest, an Outworlder dog!

C: 呃…你怎么解开的这么快？
E: Ugh... How'd you solve it so quickly?

C: 大家取代号都挺随意的，有自己取的，比如「说书人」、「丹青师」、「机巧士」……
E: Everyone's code name is pretty random. Some pick names themselves, like Storyteller, Danqing Artist, the Ingeniator...

C: 装置的造型太单调了。
E: The device shape is too plain.

C: 不要以为我看不出你暗戳戳的讽刺。你已经打心眼里开始认同这种生活方式了，是不是？
E: Don't think I can't tell that's biting sarcasm. You've already started to endorse this kind of lifestyle from the bottom of your heart, haven't you?

C: 啊，这个…呃……
E: Ah, about that... Er...

C: 那个闹事的，之前不是早就处理过了吗？这回怎么又……
E: Didn't that troublemaker get taken care of? Again...

C: …糖浆呢，我的糖浆呢？哈…哈哈…你需要糖浆吗？
E: ...Syrup, where's my syrup? Ha... Haha... Do you need syrup?

C: 但我渐渐开始感到…迷惑…就像被巨浪来回拨弄的小船…它们实在太吵闹、太晃眼了…我渐渐开始感受不到自己了……
E: But I'm gradually beginning to feel... confused... like a tiny boat being tossed around on gigantic waves... they are simply too noisy, too blinding... I'm starting to lose any sense of self...

C: …现在的电影业已经堕落成这样了吗？什么滥竽都敢拿来充数——它配吗！
E: ...Is this what the movie industry has degraded to? They'll use any old token to fill in the gaps — is that deserved?

C: 她没得罪我。
E: She hasn't offended me.

C: 计算机解析了样本成分，测得碎片诞生于十多个琥珀纪前——那个时期发生了一件大事，你应该知道。
E: The computer analyzed the sample composition, and found that the fragments were formed over <unbreak>10</unbreak> Amber Eras ago — a huge event happened back then, which you should know about.

C: 公司与巡海游侠合作，真少见…
E: The IPC and the Galaxy Rangers working together? That is rare...

C: 不如爱情故事。
E: I prefer love stories.

C: 不要以为斩首很容易。战舰的雷达就是韦兰的双眼，战舰的火炮则是他手臂的延伸。想要登上这样一艘怪物，没有过硬的驾驶技术可办不到。
E: Don't think a beheading operation is easy. The battleship's radar was Wyland's eyes. Its cannons were extensions of his arms. Boarding such a monster as this requires perfect mastery of piloting.

C: 愤怒？似乎不仅如此…还有一股力量，能驱使人前进的力量。
E: Is it anger? It's more than just that... There's a force, one that motivates.

C: …但谁知道要见他一面居然这么麻烦。你也读过他留下的谜语吧？真■■绕啊！
E: ...But who knew it would be such a huge pain to meet him. You've read the riddle he left behind, right? So ■■■■■■■ puzzling!

C: 说到底，你们俩就是想要钱吧？
E: Speaking of which, you two want the money, right?

C: 真的？成交！
E: Really? Deal!

C: 不过，如果他们一直在门外骚扰的话，我估计也没法安稳入梦…多亏你出手相助。
E: However, if they kept bugging me outside the door, I probably wouldn't be able to sleep well too... so thanks for your help.

C: 那应该是做过加密，让我看看……
E: It might be encrypted. Let me see...

C: 虽然我的理想已经不再闪亮，但我还是希望理想的行为能得到回报。
E: Despite my ideals being far less glittery now, I still hope that ideal behavior can be rewarded.

C: 因为我感到愤怒，也可以说是我的矫情心在作祟。
E: Because I was enraged. You could also say my impetuous nature played a role.

C: 没什么。
E: It's nothing.

C: 那些整天吹捧的家伙，我真怀疑他们到底有没有亲自去那地方转过一圈。反正我去过了，感觉一般。
E: For those who are full of praise, I doubt whether they have really been there. I visited the place, and I must say I'm not impressed.

C: 真让人感慨啊——我还记得好多年前，《班尼古堡》横空出世的时候，我当时还采访过奇迹本杰明工作室。那个时候他们可真是行业里的翘楚。
E: Years ago when Benny's Castle was released, I even did an interview with Miracle Benjamin Studio. At that time, they were indeed a leader in the industry.

C: ——他是个擅长制造「噱头」的人。
E: ...He's a master at creating gimmicks.

C: …别用那种眼神看我！我们…奇迹本杰明团队，会完成应尽的职责，建设好这座城市。
E: ...Don't give me that look! We, the Miracle Benjamin team, will build a fine city, as per our duties.

C: 放到以前，《班尼古堡》刚上市的时候，谁敢质疑我们的能力？唉…想当年，光靠每年推出一个新版本都足够维持团队生计了……
E: Back in the days when Benny's Castle was just released, who would have doubted our abilities? At that time, we had enough to sustain the team by just releasing a new game version every year...

C: …外人谁都别想对我指手画脚！别想！
E: ...No one is in the position to speak ill of my accomplishments! Nobody!

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 我？我很好，简直不能再好了——我终于明白了，哈、哈哈！
E: Me? I'm good. Never better! I've finally got it! Hahaha!

C: 没错！虽然才入职没多久，但我已经敏锐地发现了匹诺康尼潜藏的商机。于是我经过缜密调查与分析，好不容易设计出了一份精彩绝伦的活动企划。
E: Bingo! Although I was new to the company at that time, I was sharp enough to discover the potential business opportunities in Penacony. After conducting a thorough investigation and analysis, I finally came up with an incredible event proposal.

C: 呵，我就知道这个老东西肯定会说我坏话……
E: Hmph, I knew that old guy would talk bad about me...

C: …哈？怎么回事？我感觉…我突然感觉棒极了！
E: ...Huh? What's going on? I... I suddenly feel wonderful!

C: 来吧，我给你看一样东西……
E: Come. Let me show you something...

C: 你得给我指定几样东西…
E: But you've got to give me some more details...

C: 「二十分之一」？
E: Wait, one-twentieth?

C: 人的一生注定会经历许多次的一见钟情…谁叫宇宙间充斥着如此之多的美丽之物？
E: Life is full of moments where you fall in love at first sight... I mean, there are so many beautiful things in the universe!

C: 所以我才会成为一名经纪人，逼着这些年轻人适应圈子里残酷的规则，让他们变成不会被梦想击垮的样子。
E: That's why I became a manager. I will force these kids to adapt to the cruel rules in this industry and make them indomitable before their dreams.

C: 雅利洛…哦！你难道就是帮助冰封世界结束大寒潮的无名客吗？
E: Jarilo... I see! Were you the Nameless who helped that icy planet to end the Eternal Freeze?

C: 至于这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}…既然你这么执着，我就让出三分钟时间吧——我倒是想看看家族要怎么把自己的员工抢回来。
E: {M#Sir}{F#Madam}, since you're so persistent, I'll give you three minutes to present your case. Let's see how The Family is going to get their employee back.

C: 抱歉，打扰了。
E: Sorry. I'll get going.

C: 啊，看来您并不了解我的音乐呀。让我来介绍一下吧——不知您是否听说过「门达希亚」这个名字？
E: I see, you are not familiar with my music. Let me introduce it to you: Have you ever heard of the name "Mendasia"?

C: 纯美的仙境已逝，如果它残存的艺术也随之凋亡，宇宙艺术的冠冕上定会失去一颗耀眼的明珠。每多一位听众，它存续的火光便会亮上一分——所以希望您能支持我的演出。
E: The enchanting realm of the Beauty has faded, and if its remaining art withers away, the crown of cosmic art will lose one of its brightest jewels. With each additional listener, the enduring flame of art will shine brighter. So, I hope you can support my performance.

C: 我想是因为「谐乐大典」快开始了，所有的宾客都在期盼知更鸟前辈登台，对其他演出却不屑一顾……
E: I believe it's because the Charmony Festival is approaching, and all the visitors are eager for Robin's performance, but not so much for the other acts...

C: 拉洛丝恬静的面孔忽然洋溢出欢快的神色，她启口而歌，用你从未听过的声调唱出无法理解的语言——
E: All of a sudden, Larose's serene face lights up with joy as she opens her mouth and sings in an unfamiliar language, in a tone you have never heard before.

C: 你准备拿这首歌来演出？
E: Will you perform this song at your concert?

C: 很好听。
E: It's beautiful.

C: 什么东西啊，太难听了……
E: Oh man... This is terrible...

C: 一位女逐梦客站在栏杆外，对着下方的车流陷入沉思，看架势似乎是要跳下去。
E: A female Dreamchaser stood at the edge of the railing, lost in thought as she gazed upon the flowing traffic below, poised as if contemplating a leap.

C: 醒来…是啊，这不过是毫无意义的表演罢了。
E: Wake up... Indeed, this is nothing more than a meaningless show.

C: 现实远比梦境更加沉重。我在那里有酒、有诗，唯独没有死去的勇气。
E: Reality is way bleaker than dreams. I have the company of wine and poems there, and lack only the courage to finish things up.

C: 是故意的还是不小心？
E: Did you do it on purpose or was it an accident?

C: 你为什么来到梦境？
E: Why did you come to the Dreamscape?

C: 我怎么感觉一头雾水？
E: Why am I still confused?

C: 上次我喝苏乐达的时候，特意听了听酒馆里其他人在谈论什么。真是不听不知道，一听吓一跳！
E: The last time I was here drinking SoulGlad, I pricked my ears to listen to what everyone else was talking about. I was shocked by what I heard.

C: 有人说要带着怪物搞破坏，有人说要捣毁飞车的自动驾驶系统，还有人甚至要把整个匹诺康尼都烧成灰！
E: Some said they wanted to commit vandalism with their monsters, some planned to destroy the autopilot system of a flying car, and some even aimed to burn all of Penacony to the ground!

C: 时刻记得，你所行之事足以让宇宙免于毁灭。
E: Always bear in mind that your actions are enough to spare the universe from destruction.

C: 的确有可能，毕竟那改造所需的技术…十分精妙。
E: Maybe. After all, the technology required to pull off that transformation is... intricate.

C: 机会难得，就让我也送你一些馈赠吧。
E: Since fate brings us together, I shall offer you some gifts.

C: 实际上，那不是后天刻上去的——它就是我身体的一部分。
E: Well, actually, I was born like that.

C: 准备好了就告诉我一声，我带你去安全的地方。
E: Let me know when you're ready. I'll take you to a safe place.

C: 我也只是个普通人啊……
E: I'm also just a normal person...

C: 奇怪，信号好像出了点问题…你切勿随意走动，我先联系*罗斯玛丽*带你出去。
E: Strange. Something's wrong with the signal... Please don't wander. I'll contact *Rosemary* to bring you out.

C: 偷走情绪才是恶劣的行为。
E: Stealing emotions is evil.

C: 你或许在期待一场热血澎湃的战斗，可惜，我们的奥科萨娜女士既不热血也不澎湃。
E: You may be anticipating a heated battle, but unfortunately, Miss Oksana offers you neither heat nor battle.

E: Turns out there are so many beautiful, romantic things happening beyond even the farthest reaches of the sky...

C: 献给尼卡多利的祭典仍在继续，疯狂的泰坦与城邦还远远没有走到尽头。
E: The sacrifices to Nikador continue. The mad Titan and the insane city are far from done.

C: 你不明白它为何会出现在这里。能勉强与这匹木马扯上关系的唯有{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，可命运三相殿早已荒废，那位孩童模样的半神同样不在此处。
E: You cannot understand why this would appear here. This wooden horse could only feasibly be connected to the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, but the Temple of the Three Fates has long since fallen into ruin, and that child-like demigod is nowhere to be seen.

C: 行吧，正好我现在还有些空闲。你想听哪个神驹的故事？
E: Alright, I can spare some time. Whose tale would you like to hear?

C: 「泰坦是奇美拉编造的谎言」
E: Titans are propaganda made by chimeras

C: 熄灭了……
E: Extinguished...

C: 他们当然也不是无事可做了。大地兽越来越多，城邦里一半人忙着喂养大地兽，另一半人则分别是鞣革制鞍的工匠、锉磨病牙的兽医、修剪蹄子的蹄铁匠……
E: Of course, they were not without tasks. As the dromases grew in number, half the city-state's people were busy feeding them, while the other half were divided among saddle-makers tanning leather, veterinarians filing down diseased teeth, and farriers trimming hooves...

C: 能看到光的舱段，应该很有趣吧。
E: It must be really cool to have a well-lit cabin.

C: 这里还有多久可以恢复原样？
E: How long will it take to complete the restoration?

C: 感谢你的理解，希望你远离还未开辟的受灾区域，注意自身安全。
E: Thank you for your understanding. Please stay away from the affected areas that have not opened up yet. Stay safe.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 年轻人的问题问得很犀利啊。
E: Kiddo, your question is very sharp.

C: 但这些都不重要！重要的是，袭击发生后的现在空间站会发生什么样的改变！
E: But none of this matters! The only thing that matters is the changes brought to the space station by this attack!

C: 倒是你的存在有些特殊且刻意…我闻到了阴谋的味道。嘘，不要打扰我思考。
E: If anything, your presence is somewhat peculiar and deliberate... I smell a conspiracy. Shh, don't interrupt my train of thought.

C: 每次我想她的时候，我就会把她的容貌雕刻在这些石头上——你看！
E: Every time I think about her, I carve her face on a rock. Look at these rocks!

C: 哼，总算是问完了。亏世玲还大费周章地给你科普空间站的常识，没想到你倒是想知道更多不该知道的东西！
E: Phew, finally. I spent so much effort introducing the basics of the space station to you, but you're interested in things you shouldn't know!

C: 很好！一切都井然有序！现在就是最佳的科研时光~
E: Good! Everything's in place! Now, this is the best time for scientific research.

C: 你算是问对了人，我就是负责这个的。顾名思义，就是「公司」代理的购物系统，只对空间站的员工开放。
E: You've come to the right place. That's my line of work. Just as the name suggests, it's a purchase system subcontracted to the IPC that's only available for space station staff.

C: 小年轻，你好像是个生面孔啊？要不要来和我聊聊？
E: Kiddo, you don't look like you are from here? You wanna chat with me?

C: 任何外部攻击都是难以击垮空间站的，这一点我深信不疑。
E: I had no doubt that any external attack will be unable to destroy the space station.

C: 你为什么要呆在空间站？
E: Why did you choose to work at the space station?

C: 嗯好，下次再聊，下次…下次你可以给我讲讲空间站的见闻。
E: Sure, let's talk again soon. Next time... you can share your experience at the space station with me.

C: 啊，你好！我还是第一次见到…阮•梅女士以外的人，但你身上好像有熟悉的味道——呜呜！是她的味道，我闻得出来！
E: Hello! This is the first time I've met someone besides Miss Ruan Mei, but your scent smells familiar to me... Oh! It's her scent! I can tell!

C: 我最深爱的造物主抛弃了我，因为我从内而外都是眼泪的味道，连她都不爱我了…你让我怎么振作得起来。
E: My creator, whom I love deeply, has abandoned me because I taste like tears from the inside out. Even she doesn't love me anymore... How am I supposed to pull myself together?

C: 一点也不丢人。
E: This isn't shameful at all.

C: 哦对了，你有预约吗？你这没有预约，咱们得长话短说——没办法，我的日程表总是排得满满当当。
E: Oh, by the way, do you have an appointment? If not, we'll have to make it quick. I have a busy schedule, you know.

C: 做事，咳，做事得排个轻重缓急先来后到，遵守社交礼仪，这样才能跟大家打好关系。
E: Ahem, I handle things according to my priorities and with good manners. That's how I get on good terms with everyone.

C: 你的好意我心领了，生命中有些路必须独自行走，这样才能找到我想要的答案。
E: Thanks for your kind offer, but some paths are meant to be taken alone. That's how I can find the answer I'm looking for.

C: 在第<unbreak>190</unbreak>次无视了「阮•梅」造物们的互动请求后，它们为小机器人取了一个饱含负面情绪的名字——「不可直视之物」，用以「表彰」它的无趣与呆板。
E: After the little robot ignored the creations' request to interact for the <unbreak>190</unbreak>th time, the creatures gave the Little Robot a name full of negative sentiments — The Unviewable — to "honor" how boring and rigid it was.

C: 你好，陌生的来访者。我叫阮·梅，对于我本人…没有什么可介绍的。很高兴认识你。
E: Hello, my name is Ruan Mei... I'm not one for introductions. It's nice to meet you.

C: 我还能再见到你吗？
E: Will I see you again?

C: 你不敢确定矛和盾究竟谁能赢，但你绝对相信，没有人比这位大工匠更懂得兵器铸造。于是你向他说明了事情来龙去脉。
E: You can't be sure who will win exactly, but you're absolutely certain that no one knows arms forging better than this Grand Craftsman, so you elaborate the details to him.

C: 等着再被抓吧！
E: Just wait till you get caught again!

C: 树根将某些物品拱了上来，像是推到你的脚下。你抬头望了望树身，印记绘制的眼睛似乎正注视着你，又似乎望着某些破碎的异象。
E: The tree roots push a few items towards you, as if trying to leave them at your feet. As you raise your head to look at the tree, the painted eyes engraved on its trunk seem to be both looking at you and staring off at some broken alien vision.

C: 将其转换为更直接的论题，便是——<color=#dbc291ff>纯粹的「阿卡索斯」是否真实存在？</color>
E: If we were to convert it into a more direct topic, it would be: <color=#dbc291ff>Does a pure "Icatus" truly exist?</color>

C: 抛开事实不谈，你的论证方式本身就有问题。想要证明某个事物存在，只用找到一个证据就够了，即便现在没有，也无法否认未来可能会出现。
E: Putting the facts aside, your method of proof itself is flawed. If you wish to prove the existence of something, you only need a single piece of evidence. Even if that evidence is not presently available, you cannot deny that it could appear at some point in the future.

C: 你别再无理取闹了，不就是替换了一些无关紧要的物资吗，我有分寸。
E: Stop being so unreasonable. It's just replacing some not-so-important supplies. I know when to stop.

C: …不行，不能坐以待毙……
E: ... No, we can't just sit here on our butts and do nothing...

C: 嘶…她老人家这么大年纪了，还出面揭发，那估计没跑了。不过真没看出来啊……
E: Sss... If she still came forward to expose the truth despite her advanced age, I'm guessing it must be true. But I really can't see him as a bad guy...

C: 怕什么，光明正大地告诉他们！
E: What are you so afraid of? Be up front and open with them!

C: 所以…我们必须离开。
E: So then... we have to go.

C: 对，离开，置身险境，逼迫那些老古板低头认输。我们会凯旋，然后将这场爱情的胜利献予泰坦，但不是向墨涅塔，而是向最公正的塔兰顿。
E: Yes, leave — to put ourselves in danger and force those stuffy old fogeys to bow their heads in defeat. We will return triumphant, and then dedicate the victory of our love to the Titan — to fair and just Talanton, instead of Mnestia.

C: 一定可以的。
E: For sure.

C: 听！
E: Yes!

C: 才不会被你抓住！
E: There is no way you could catch me!

C: 你记得自己「阅读」过这段回忆：身为黄金裔的姐姐奋力抵抗，却没能挡住黑衣剑士的一击；而不善战斗的妹妹执起姐姐的剑，站在尚有余温的尸身与怪物之间。
E: You recall "reading" this memory: The elder sister, a Chrysos Heir, fought courageously but couldn't survive the black-clad swordmaster's blow. Her younger sister, though no warrior, took up the fallen blade and stood guard over her sister's barely-cold body against the monsters.

C: 那不然呢？休息时间看小说有错吗？
E: What else? Is it wrong to read while on a break?

C: 你偷偷告诉我，到底是怎么做到的吧？
E: C'mon, tell me your secret. How'd you do it?

C: 「你的声音像闹铃」？
E: You mean "Your Voice is Like an Alarm"?

C: 我最近又给她写了几首情诗，你帮我看看感觉如何。
E: I've written her a few more love poems. Tell me what you think — how does it feel?

C: …喊维修人员过来吧。
E: ... Call the maintenance staff over to take a look.

C: 喂，别破坏气氛好吗？
E: Hey, read the room, will ya!

C: 我们不属于奥赫玛。
E: We don't belong to Okhema.

C: 可你要是真的杀了我，剧情就不存在了，埃德加也就不存在了，就只有你伊俄了！
E: But if you had actually killed me, the story would cease to exist, Edgar wouldn't exist, and only you, Eio, would remain!

C: 她是凯妮斯的孙女。
E: She's the granddaughter of Caenis.

C: 你将守卫的建议告诉希瑞雅，并与她约定明天门扉时碰头。
E: You pass the guard's suggestion on to Serena, and agree to meet her tomorrow at the Entry Hour.

C: ——哦，是你啊，我的崇拜者。抱歉，今天不能给你签名。
E: —Oh, it's you, my admirer. Sorry, I can't give you an autograph today.

C: 呵呵，没错，就是以吉奥里亚指甲制成，什么都能抵挡住的「最强之盾」——
E: Hehe, that's right, the "strongest shield" made from Georios' nails, capable of withstanding anything—

C: ——拭目以待吧！
E: Here, watch this!

C: 您还有什么事吗？
E: Do you need something else?

C: 「——我曾造访过塞纳托斯的冥府，那是一片宁静的花海，所有灵魂都会化作花种，得到死亡泰坦的温柔照拂——」
E: "—I visited Thanatos's netherworld. There was a sea of tranquil flowers, where all souls will become floral seeds to receive the care and light of the Death Titan—"

C: 我不擅长应付这种，找别人吧。
E: I'm not good at this kind of stuff, ask someone else.

C: 啊，那、那好吧，打扰{NICKNAME}了……
E: Oh, w—well then, sorry to bother you, {NICKNAME}...

C: 那家伙，该不会是潜逃了吧？
E: That idiot, did he just run away?

C: 小维吉妮娅，你……
E: Little Verginia, you...

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 如此一来，在这片幻境中，回味便与心酿无异。
E: So in this illusion, everyone tastes the drink exactly what their souls have brewed.

C: …那瓶「神血蜜露」的味道？
E: ...the Dew of Divine Blood that Hysilens let me try?

C: 看着就很贵。
E: Whatever it is, it looks expensive.

C: 如果在列车的这个位置布设空间望远镜，应该能观测到更短的波长……
E: If a space telescope were deployed at this location on the Express, it would almost certainly be possible to observe shorter wavelengths...

C: 当然不是啦。我又不是以工作名义来参观的，而是受到了{NICKNAME}的邀请，对吧？
E: Of course not — I'm here on your invitation. Isn't that right?

C: 给你带了点小礼物。
E: Here's a little gift for you.

C: 就像当时期待贝洛伯格的天空一般，当我站在列车上时，我能感受到其实你们也和我们一样，正凭借自己的力量在宇宙中创造未来。
E: It's just like waiting for Belobog's skies back then... When I stand aboard the Express, I can feel that you and I are really the same — manifesting our own futures in this universe to the best of our abilities.

C: 所以…如果你将来经历了其他有趣的冒险故事，请一定要讲给我听哦？我会忠实地转述给孩子们的。
E: So, do let me know when you have more stories to share. I'm sure the kids will love them.

C: 哎呀呀，抓不到！
E: Ugh, if only I could grab them!

C: 荣誉队员！你快过来，虎克大人有问题要问你！
E: Honorary member! Come over here! Hook has a question for you!

C: 「我还要继续监测影响贝洛伯格存续的相关风险因子，不能离开雅利洛-Ⅵ。」史瓦罗先生说：「但克拉拉可以将自己所见转述给我。我会将结果录入数据库。」
E: He said: "I must continue to monitor the risk factors endangering Belobog. I cannot leave Jarilo-VI." But he also said that I could recount my experience on the Express and he'd store the information in his database.

C: 唔…克拉拉想要进引擎室看看的时候，帕姆生气的样子确实很恐怖……
E: You're right... I poked my head into the engine room and Pom-Pom acted like an angry puppy...

C: …但是…但是帕姆还是很可爱的！
E: ...Anyway, it's nice to spend time with such a cute conductor!

C: 只是此事我一人说了不算。我还得将提案整理好，与布洛妮娅、佩拉和其他尉官商议才是……
E: Only thing though is, I can't make the call. I'll need to write a report and discuss it with Bronya, Pela, and others first.

C: 没闯进资料室吧？
E: You didn't break into the archives, did you?

C: 人生就是场没有终点的旅行。
E: Life is but a journey without a destination.

C: 当然，我也可以选择加入公司，或者巡海游侠，甚至利用一下泯灭帮，只要能让我奔向银河，走哪条路都可以。
E: Of course, I could have also joined the IPC, the Galaxy Rangers, or even the Annihilation Gang. Whatever road takes me across the galaxy is the one I'm willing to travel on.

C: 人呢？！
E: Where did she go?

C: 逃跑了？！
E: She made a run for it?

C: 总之，今天开心！送你一份小礼物，希望你也能和我一样顺利。
E: Anyway, have a happy day! Here's a little gift for you. I hope everything works out as well for you as it has for me.

C: 我有一些问题…
E: I have some questions...

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我还想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you more.

C: 现在还不行，我要学的东西还有很多。在罗浮上和人比试，输了也就输了。要是在域外输了，那可是丢将军的脸。
E: Now's not the time — there's still more to learn. If I lose to someone on the Luofu, it doesn't matter, but if I lose to an outsider, it would disgrace the general.

C: 你还挺忙的。
E: You seem busy.

C: 呸呸呸！世玲与你无冤无仇，你怎么能用这么晦气的名号来称呼世玲呢？
E: Bah! I've never wronged you, so don't give me a title that brings bad luck!

C: 可惜写作进度太慢了，都怪阿德勒每天来烦我，不然世玲早就写完发到空间站的匿名论坛里去了。
E: Pity that I'm writing so slowly. I blame Adler — he comes to bother me every day, otherwise I'd have finished this ages ago and published it on the space station's anonymous forum.

C: 真是不理解那帮人！像卡波特这样的混账东西还有什么值得关心的？搞不懂，真搞不懂！
E: I don't get those people at all! Scoundrels like Capote don't deserve any care! I don't get it. I really don't!

C: 人跑哪里去了……
E: Where is everyone...

C: 好了，没别的事你就先走吧。我还要等三月七呢……
E: Alright, if there's nothing else, then move along. I'm waiting for March...

C: 等到我把这颗星球的秘密全部勘明之后…就和你们一起，向宇宙的更深处进发吧。
E: Once I've discovered all the secrets on this planet... I'll go with you to head deeper into the universe.

C: …真期待以后的天外探险啊。
E: ...I can't wait to explore beyond the sky.

C: {NICKNAME}，来得正好！我正想给列车组提提意见呢。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here right on time! I was about to give some feedback to the Express Crew.

C: 哎呀，看来账账不太喜欢这个呢……
E: Hmm, afraid Numby's not a fan...

C: 它是不是特别可爱！
E: Isn't Pom-Pom cute!?

C: 我好像也遇见过…
E: I think I encountered it...

C: 无法下决定的人，要么想得太多，要么脑袋空空。
E: People who struggle with decisions are either overthinkers or lack thoughts altogether.

C: 即使未被「博识尊」选中，我留下的实绩也不会失去价值。
E: Nous or no Nous, my contributions remain invaluable.

C: 列车的大门会一直为你敞开。
E: You'll always be welcome on the Express.

C: 不不…我喜欢了解陌生的东西。
E: No, no... I actually enjoy discovering new things.

C: 当然算！恶人该治！
E: Of course it counts! Evildoers must be punished!

C: 不行，只送东西不够有诚意…还是去找列车长道个歉吧。
E: No no, just giving gifts isn't sincere enough... I should personally apologize to the conductor.

C: 嘿嘿~温情的诉说时间结束！
E: Heh heh, storytelling time is over!

C: 所以…是真事吗？
E: So... is that a real thing?

C: 真的是…助手？
E: Will you really be an... assistant?

C: 哦？相当聪明呢~不过在打开福袋前，一定要做好入睡的准备哦。
E: Oh? I guess you're pretty clever. But before you open the pouch, you'll have to be prepared to fall asleep very quickly.

C: 你就拥有了整个宇宙。
E: You would possess the entire universe.

C: 我刚刚闻到那个味道的时候，就清醒了…闻上去和丹鼎司熬制的汤药一样苦！
E: I just got a whiff of it, and it woke me right up. It smells like medicine brewed by the Alchemy Commission!

C: 只要你想来，列车随时欢迎你！
E: You're free to come whenever you want!

C: 这家伙神神叨叨的，我看到它就觉得讨厌。
E: This guy talks so much. Just looking at him gives me a headache.

C: 你是几号机？我才是一号机！
E: Which number are you? I'm number one!

C: 或许我们可以推进一个项目，模拟出一个微缩宇宙……
E: Maybe we can advance the project and simulate our own nano-universe...

C: 啊，说起来，我有个好人选…
E: Aha! On that note, I do have a good candidate in mind...

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 哈哈，你还是太年轻，思维太浅，格局小了。这世界上没有这么简单的事，一切的背后都有权力和资本的推动……算了算了，我要洁身自好。
E: Haha, you're too young and too naive. Nothing is that simple. Everything here is driven by power and capital... Anyway, I choose to preserve my moral integrity.

C: 而且，我向你承诺，你只要投资了，不管有没有人接手，你只要打算卖，我就会按涨幅<unbreak>13%</unbreak>的价格给你挂牌——
E: Tell you this, if you buy the property and decide to sell it at some point, no matter if you find a potential buyer, I'll list it for you <unbreak>13%</unbreak> higher than the current price. You have my word.

C: 可我没攒够买房的钱…
E: But I don't have enough money...

C: 你这是花钱买舆论啊。
E: You are buying public opinion, aren't you?

C: 只是开开嗓而已，没有必要占着排练室。
E: I'm just warming up. No need to be fussy.

C: 哎？对不起，我走神了。
E: Huh... Sorry, I got lost in thought.

C: 只是导演说塔米拉小姐的声音「听了很出戏，一点也不少女」——然后才让小女子来配音的。
E: It's just that the director said that Tamila's voice isn't catchy and girly enough, so he invited me to do the singing.

C: …或许是小女子想多了吧？最近排练的时候，总感觉塔米拉小姐不太愿意对口型了……
E: I don't know... Maybe I'm overthinking it but during the rehearsals recently, I felt that Tamila didn't want to lip-sync...

C: 看来你是真的什么都不懂——别走，今天我就得好好给你上一课！
E: Hmm, you really don't know anything. How about I give you a lecture right now!

C: 他们居然好意思写出这种东西？这上层区的供暖从来就没有让人放心过，年年坏年年修——
E: They sure have tough skin, printing something like this. The Overworld's heating system has always been a headache with its constant need for repairs.

C: …你在这发什么呆？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 那你很有可能就是「深蓝骗局」的潜在受害者。
E: You are likely a potential victim of the Dark-Blue Scam!

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: …咳咳，不论如何，现在的贝洛伯格可在风口浪尖上——我们这行可得好好抓住这个机会哪！所谓「机不可失，失不再来」…您说是吧？
E: ...Ahem, well no matter what, Belobog is in the teeth of a storm now — and in this line of business, you've got to take ya chances! You know what they say: "An opportunity lost is an opportunity wasted"... right?

C: 呃，等等，你是问我上面的现况吗？那我还真不知道，要不你给我讲讲？
E: Uh, hang on — do you mean up above right now? I really don't know. Could you tell me about it?

C: 用大人的话说，这就叫「追求」吧？其实我也不太懂啦……
E: Grown-ups call that "pursuing someone," but I don't really understand...

C: 你不用上班吗？
E: Don't you have to work?

C: 是长在矿坑里啊。这附近只有地髓矿洞，长在同一片土壤上，「伴生」不就是「一起生长的同伴」的意思……
E: That's right. The Geomarrow mine is the only mine in these lands, and the moss also grows around here. So if they are on the same soil...

C: 「提高记忆力与专注力」？
E: What about "improve memory and help focus"?

C: 当然啦，我才不是什么「千面尤利安」呢。
E: Of course. I'm not "Julian of a Thousand Faces."

C: 难道最近还有什么大新闻吗？有的话就快告诉我，我要赶紧向虎克老大报告！
E: Why, has something really big happened? If so, please tell me — and I'll report back to Hook about it!

C: 大、大部分地底人一辈子都没见过从外面来的人，觉、觉得奇怪也正常吧……
E: M—Most undergrounders have never seen anyone from the outside, not in their entire lives. S—So it's quite normal for me to find you strange...

C: 应该没有吧。
E: I don't think so.

C: 是张生面孔呢…找我有什么事吗？
E: You seem new here... What can I do for you?

C: 造出带有人类情感的机器人…那就是我作为业余机械师的终极梦想！
E: I want to create a robot with emotions... it's my ultimate goal as an amateur mechanic!

C: 附近有什么好吃的吗？
E: Any recommendations on food around here?

C: 你想聊点什么？
E: What do you want to chat about?

C: 哟，你们回来啦。怎么样，累不累？奥列格大哥没为难你们吧？
E: Ah, you're back. How did it go? Are you tired? How did Oleg treat you?

C: 那你认识上层区的老歌德吗？
E: Do you know Old Goethe from the Overworld?

C: 啊！我想起来了！抱歉，我的视力很差，居然连自己的救命恩人都没看清楚！
E: Ahhhh! I remember now! Sorry, I have poor vision. Can't believe I didn't recognize the person who saved my life!

C: 前线发生什么变化了？
E: What's changed on the front line?

C: ——你之所以无法寻见它的踪影，是因为「存护」的恩典早已与我们熟悉的世界融为一体：它弥散于空气，夹带于光明，自人类降生之际便温柔地将它裹于怀中。
E: ...The reason why you struggle so to find it, is because Preservation's grace is integrated with the world we know, diffused throughout the air we breathe, refracted through the light we see. It has gently embraced us in its bosom since the very dawn of our existence.

C: 难道是可可利亚？
E: Could it be Cocolia?

C: 如今我们已经展现了重建家园的决心。这份合作是我们赢来的，不是他们的施舍。
E: Today we have shown our determination to rebuild our home. This cooperation was won by us. It was not their charity.

C: 我就想和你聊聊天嘛～
E: I just want to chat with you...

C: 唔…谢谢{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！
E: Ooh... Thank you {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}!

C: 温室效应装置？
E: Greenhouse effect device?

C: 确认无误——但我也已按照克拉拉的请求，备份了该个体核心模组内全部信息。
E: No errors found — But I have made a copy of this machine's entire information on this core module according to Clara's request.

C: 憋半天就憋出这么一句…
E: That's the best you could come up with...?

C: 鼹鼠党都有谁？
E: Who are in The Moles?

C: 唔…不过希儿姐姐偶尔也会陪虎克玩，还会带我到处逛逛。所以鼹鼠党平时不会把她当做坏人啦。
E: Uh... but Seele sometimes also plays with me, and takes me out shopping. So The Moles don't really see her as a bad guy.

C: 我猜，她一定找到了更好的办法，对吗？
E: I imagine she must have found a better solution, right?

C: 耶，耶~
E: Yeah, uh-huh~

C: 寒风吹过，银光闪烁，难以强撑的意识渐弱
E: Howl of the wind, silvery light, hold on to sanity keep up the fight

C: 被剥夺尊严的人，凭惯性在雪中流浪
E: Dignity stolen, we drift now that it's snowing

C: …不过这也是我道听途说来的，不是很清楚其中的细节。你就当是个幻想故事吧，别放在心上。
E: ...But these are just baseless rumors, and I don't really know the details. So, don't take this wild story too seriously.

C: 不过，听说在我加入乐队以前，乐队应该还有一个人——那人好像是贝斯手，后来失踪了，据说和姐姐、还有可可利亚大人有些联系……
E: But from what I heard, there was actually another member before me, a bass player I think? But then they just disappeared, and I heard they had some connection with my sister and Madam Cocolia...

C: 为了节约算力，太长时间没有更新系统版本的终端会被标记为「已弃用」，这些手机的机主将无法享受最新推出的系统功能和优化……
E: To save computing power, the IPC has marked devices as "discarded" if their system hasn't been updated in a long time. As a result, the owners of those devices can't enjoy the latest features or optimizations...

C: 有时这些星球会向公司借一笔起始资金，梦想着一两个琥珀纪之后能成为数一数二的贸易枢纽。
E: Sometimes, those planets will borrow startup funds from us, dreaming of becoming major players in the galaxy in an Amber Era or two.

C: 这样自不量力的星球，最后也往往会成为我们部门的工作对象。
E: However, these planets bite off more than they can chew, and they often end up becoming targets for my department.

C: 全面改装，包你满意。
E: I'll give it a full remodel. I guarantee you'll love it!

C: 这片场地现在归我负责，但我不会干涉你们举办的娱乐活动。
E: I'm in charge of this venue now, but don't worry, I won't interfere with your entertainment.

C: 我还是挺享受这份工作的：累虽然是累了点，但托帕总监对我们还不错；我那弟弟给另一位总监「翡翠」打工去了，听他每天叫苦不迭，日子貌似挺不好过……
E: To be honest, I enjoy my job. While it can be exhausting at times, Director Topaz has been treating me well. My brother is now working for another director named Jade, and he's having a hard time...

C: 一个巨大的喷嚏...幸亏以太灵没有鼻涕。
E: It is a gigantic sneeze... Thankfully Aether Spirits don't have snot.

C: 哼，哼哼！哼——
E: Oink, oink oink! Oink...

C: 先不陪它玩了。
E: Ignore it for now.

C: 嗯…感情似乎到位了。
E: Well... at least you got the sentiment right.

C: 妈妈，他们怎么还没到呀？
E: Mom, why aren't they here yet?

C: 哎，就那个《雪国冒险奇谭》二次创作知名作者嘛……
E: Hey, it's the well-known re-creator of that Tale of the Winterlands...

C: 请将您的「存护」之力赐予我那不成器的儿子…使他免遭伤害……
E: Please bestow your powers of Preservation upon that useless son of mine... And deliver him from suffering...

C: 大概吧……
E: Probably...

C: 不知道矿队还招人不……
E: I'm not sure if the mining team is still hiring...

C: 这玩意也能吃？
E: Is that even edible?

C: 你就是累了，多休息吧。
E: You're tired. Go and get some rest.

C: 哼，我就知道，想靠抓洞螈来钱根本不现实……
E: Hmph, I knew catching Olms was never going to be a realistic way of making money...

C: 再讲一个，再讲一个！
E: Another, another!

C: 坚持住呀，哥哥！
E: Hang on, big bro!

C: 我在值岗，没空聊天。
E: I'm on duty. No time to chat.

C: 都给我听清楚了！
E: Listen up and pay attention!

C: 身边的人才最重要。
E: What matters is enjoying the game with the ones you love.

C: 这可是个大工程。
E: This is a huge project.

C: 博物馆是做什么的？
E: What does the museum do?

C: 大人您请问。
E: Please go ahead and ask your question.

C: 有些鸟儿终究是关不住的，它们生来自由…不过，关不住的鸟，就只好用弓箭对付了。
E: Some birds are never meant to be locked up in cages. They were born to be free... But those that cannot be locked up will have to be shot down with a bow and arrow.

C: 那你去忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to work then.

C: 老板您无论是打算择吉避凶、还是想查个生辰八字、或者卜个姻缘、甚至只是求个名字，小店都将竭诚为您服务。
E: Whether you're seeking fortune or safety, or simply wish to check your horoscope, to find love, or even to request a name for a child, I am humbly at your service.

C: 你自己最喜欢什么菜？
E: What's your favorite dish?

C: 练了这么多年拳法，咱在这方面直觉还是很准确的…那东西带有过于强大的生命力，几乎可以摧枯拉朽……
E: After all these years of boxing, my intuition is still dead-on about this kind of thing... That thing is so packed full of vitality that it could almost raise the dead...

C: 我只不过是朵不会作诗的蘑菇。
E: I'm just a mushroom who can't write poems.

C: 你们是做什么的？
E: What do you guys do for a living?

C: 客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
E: Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!

C: 好在净砚比较能干，松烟…也还行吧，让我现在不至于焦头烂额。
E: The good thing is that Jingyan is very capable, and Songyan is... doing okay. Thanks to their help, I'm not overwhelmed by the workload.

C: 我也这么觉得，可地衡司的人不这么认为——他们拼命催我参加成年审核，但又就是不给我发「成年资格」……
E: I think so too. But the people at the Realm-Keeping Commission don't — they keep on urging me to take the rite of passage examination, but they won't let me pass and get my qualification...

C: 你这明知道我没成年，还故意来问我年龄，这不就是存心找茬吗？
E: You know I haven't passed my rite of passage examination yet, but you still ask me my age. If that isn't the definition of picking on me, what is?

C: 爹娘开心，我也省心…就这样吧，挺好的。
E: My parents will be happy, and I'll be relieved too... It's great, right?

C: 魔阴身产生的根本原因，在于无意义记忆的过度累积。仇恨、痛苦、烦躁这些并不被需要的感受和记忆，是让人堕入魔阴身的罪魁祸首！
E: The root cause behind mara-struck is the excessive collection of meaningless memories. Hatred, hurt, and irascibility are all unnecessary memories and emotions and are the main culprit of becoming mara-struck!

C: 这有什么区别？
E: What difference does the change make?

C: 然而，如今仙舟上做这行当的人实在太多了。想要脱颖而出，就得在其他方面做文章。
E: However, there're too many people doing this on Xianzhou now, so if you want to stand out from the crowd, you have to do something else.

C: 关于你的学生…
E: What about your apprentices...

C: 但他记录下的一切，足以在他的故乡掀起一场技术革新。
E: But all of his notes were enough to trigger a technological revolution back in his homelands.

C: 静斋最近还好吗？
E: How is Jingzhai doing these days?

C: 好呀，有事儿的时候去找净砚，没有事儿的时候来找我就行。
E: Alright, if you have problems need solving, trouble Jingyan. And if you have time need killing, you're welcome to chat with me.

C: 嗯…你走吧，别把时间浪费在一个罪人这里。
E: Mmm, you go then. Don't waste your time here any longer with a criminal.

C: 别的地方我管不到，但在这流云渡我说话还是有点分量的。您要是有什么需要，我一定优先为您处理。
E: I'm no use elsewhere, but at least here in Cloudford my words still hold some weight. If there's anything you need, you'll be my top priority.

C: 我不是域外行商，不做生意。
E: I'm no Outworld traveling merchant, and I'm not into business.

C: 你认识一位带着棺木的行商吗？
E: Do you know of a traveling merchant with a coffin?

C: 啊…是您啊，打扰啦，我今天还没开单呢，反正闲着也是闲着…您要是感兴趣，我可以跟您介绍一下我的业务——我敢说罗浮上，没人比我更精通货物装卸的事项了。
E: Ah, It's you. I haven't even made a sale yet today and I'm just chilling. If you like, I can tell you a little bit about my work. And I'll bet there's nobody else aboard the Luofu who's better at handling freight than me.

C: 总之，您有需求的话请随时来找我，我会给您打折的！
E: So if you have any orders, come find me any time. I'll even cut you a deal!

C: 每次对接工作，我都会要求保留交流记录…事后证明，这样做切实地提高了沟通效率，我正建议整个司部里推广呢。
E: Every time I hand over any work, I'll keep a record of all communication... It's been proven to improve communication efficiency, and I'm in the process of recommending the entire commission to adopt this practice.

C: 前些日子你来找我打听过一回，今日又来…前不久还有个蛮帅气的男孩子过来找她…莫不是……
E: You came to ask about Jingzhai a few days back, and now you're here again... There was a good-looking guy who came for her too not long ago. Could it be...

C: 大人请慢走。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 那边的持明好像在嚷嚷什么，我也不清楚。
E: There're some Vidyadhara yelling about something over there. I don't really know what.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 药不能乱吃，话也不能乱说，懂吗？做人不应该这样。
E: You can't just randomly take any medicine, just like you can't randomly talk nonsense, okay? Have a little integrity, please.

C: 你在碎碎念什么呢？
E: What are you muttering about?

C: 先不打扰你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you for now.

C: 很久以前，我在机缘巧合之下遇到过一位「方壶」护珠人，叫做粼汐。她的云吟术出神入化，几乎到了艺术的境地。
E: A long time ago, I had the pleasure of meeting a Pearlkeeper from the Xianzhou Fanghu named Linxi. Her cloudhymn magic was superb, almost transcending into the realm of artistry.

C: 你想问什么？
E: What do you want to know?

C: 想问问您那位朋友的事…
E: I'd like to ask about your friend...

C: 星际和平公司缺钱吗？
E: Is IPC short on cash or something?

C: 你这人也太变态了吧！
E: You're a pervert!

C: 你具体是做什么的？
E: What exactly do you do?

C: 看你对「正经工作」如何定义了。
E: That depends on how you define "respectable."

C: 哦对了，有个细节别忘了，放生矿泉水的同时记得把瓶子捡回去，可不能乱扔垃圾。
E: Oh! But don't forget to bring the bottle back with you when you're done. Trash can be harmful to the environment.

C: 业缘是什么意思？
E: What do you mean by "karma"?

C: 虽说都是吃喝玩乐，但我和某些肤浅的游客可不一样，星槎海里某些专做观光客生意的店可入不了我的眼。
E: Sure, I'm here to enjoy myself, but I'm different from those superficial tourists. I'm not interested in the Starskiff Haven shops that only pander to visitors.

C: 哎，我就喜欢这市井长巷里的烟火气，这年头可不好找，难得罗浮上还有金人巷这么有意思的地方……
E: I just love the atmosphere of ordinary life in this alley. It is not easy to find something as interesting as Aurum Alley these days on the Luofu...

C: 来仙舟旅游该买什么纪念品？
E: What souvenirs should I buy on my Xianzhou trip?

C: 不，这就是茶。
E: No, this is tea.

C: 不过那一天如果真能到来，准是好事一件，我也不会难过的。
E: But I wouldn't fret if that happened. Who wouldn't want a world free of troubles after all?

C: 信不信由您了。
E: It's up to you to believe it or not.

C: 这里就是陈机铺？
E: Is this Oldies Depot?

C: 不便之处是指？
E: What do you mean by inconveniences?

C: 我没什么想问的了…
E: That's all I wanted to ask...

C: 登云群阁这地段确实不错，无论投资还是自住都是笔好买卖，好好的搞什么限购呢……
E: The Skyward Pavilions neighborhood is a great place to invest or live in. If only the properties there were not limited for purchase...

C: 不知道你对银河的历史有多少了解，在久远的过去，曾经有过一场寰宇浩劫，那是由无机生命的「帝皇」鲁珀特发起的战争。
E: I wonder how much you know about the history of the Cosmos. Once upon a time, there was a catastrophe, a war started by Rubert, the emperor of inorganic beings.

C: 我的回答可能来自书籍、邸报、网络、以及各种公共领域的信息，你可以相信我，就像你相信书籍、邸报和网络一样。
E: You can trust me as much as you can trust books, newspapers, the Internet, and various common fields of information, since that's where I draw information to formulate my reply.

C: 公司并不是「一个活生生的人」，也不会只有「一张面孔」，公司显然是一种更为复杂的东西，既不是猛兽，也不是善人…你理解吗？
E: Obviously, a corporation is not a "living being," nor does it have only one "face." It's something more complicated. It's not a ruthless beast or a righteous person... if you know what I mean.

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 噢，是这样吗…那真是不好意思了。
E: Oh... is that so...? I'm so sorry about that.

C: 我这节目可多着呢，你听我说与你听啊——
E: You're asking the right person! I have a whole bunch of shows for you!

C: 为什么要开杂技团呢？
E: Why did you start your acrobatic troupe?

C: {NICKNAME}来啦！是不是咱们捉鬼小队又有新任务了？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here! Are we gearing up for another ghost-hunting mission?

C: 有什么抱怨就说吧，我不告密。
E: Just get everything off your chest. I won't say a word to anyone.

C: 逃出幽囚狱后，「我们」将有机会重新迭代载体，彻底毁灭仙舟联盟。
E: Once we break out of the Shackling Prison, we will be able to update our repository and destroy the Xianzhou Alliance.

C: 可憎的有机体，记住：「我们」的战斗至死方休。
E: Never forget this, loathsome life form: Our fight is to the death.

C: 你们是谁制造的？
E: Who created you?

C: 可憎的有机体，记住：「我们」的战斗至死方休。
E: Never forget this, loathsome life form: Our fight is to the death.

C: 既然医生说让你吃，你谨遵医嘱就得了嘛…你要不信，我给你讲讲药理。
E: Just follow the prescription. Listen to the doctor! If you don't believe me, then I'll explain its pharmacology to you.

C: 对不起！忘记笑了！
E: Sorry! I forgot to laugh!

C: …她应该给自己放个假了。
E: ...She should give herself a holiday.

C: 进去了，你还会放我出来吗？
E: If I go in, will you let me back out?

C: 您问吧，反正我现在也没有什么事情。
E: Ask away, I have nothing else to do at the moment.

C: 您看，十王司并非是战士，而是专家。
E: You see, the Ten-Lords Commission are not warriors, they are professionals.

C: 十王司请我来，你要赶我走？
E: The Ten-Lords Commission has invited me here. Are you chasing me off?

C: 仙舟人自是毫不介意…在下看客官是化外之民，不好虚掷光阴，这里就不展开谈了。
E: The Xianzhou natives don't mind this story at all... but seeing as you are an Outworlder, I don't want to waste your precious time — so I will spare you from it.

C: 老板娘不会在欺负我不懂茶吧？
E: You won't bully me for not understanding anything about tea, right?

C: 哪一家不好吃？…笑死了。
E: Which one's bad? ...You're funny.

C: 嗯嗯，我知道你这样的化外民肯定有些好奇的。
E: Sure, I know you Outworlders are always curious.

C: 俗话说得好，浮名惹祸啊。几年后来了个地方官，想查清我到底是什么来路。
E: As they say, "fame invites trouble to your door." A local official came by a few years later to investigate my origins.

C: 我俩能力一般、水平有限，原本发个录音就当做是玩闹了。
E: We weren't any good as crosstalk comedians, so we only recorded our performance for fun.

C: 我看这鳞渊春就不错，暂点一杯也无妨。
E: This Whale-Tide Spring is awesome, and I'll sit on a pot of this for a while.

C: 公司来仙舟的贸易活动…
E: You came to Xianzhou on a trade mission for the IPC...

C: 不过，我相信仙舟不是一个保守的地方，「功夫不负有心人」，事情总会有突破的。
E: But I trust that Xianzhou isn't a conservative place. Hard work always pays off — and breakthroughs are always possible.

C: 好！虽然咱年纪不大，可是知道很多神仙姐姐的故事哦。咱想想，嗯…讲这个故事吧。
E: Sure! I'm young, but I know lots and lots of stories about the celestial lady. Let's see, hmm... I'll tell you this one then.

C: 神仙姐姐本来不打算帮忙，但她听了乡亲们的求告，又知道周大善人乐善好施，最后还是生了慈悲心。
E: She didn't want to help him at first, but she listened to everyone who put in a word for Kind Zhou about how he helps everyone, so she had mercy on him in the end.

C: 这也就导致仙舟上的「历史学」和我们短生种理解中的「历史学」根本不是一个东西…我就这么说吧，他们缺乏对历史的敬畏心！
E: This means the study of "history" on Xianzhou is completely different from what we consider as "history"... or put simply, they lack respect for the past!

C: 比如之前有位化外民老板有份兼职，让我给一些热门短视频刷评论。这个很简单没有什么门槛，我就试着做了做。
E: An Outworlder business owner had me write fake comments for short videos as a part-time gig. It was simple and entry-level, so I gave it a shot.

C: 「持明时调是持明族的传统戏曲，起源于持明民歌，风格普遍忧伤婉约。」
E: "Vidyadhara elegies are the traditional music of the Vidyadhara people. Originating from their folk songs, the style is generally that of mournful dirges."

C: 你这么捧我，有什么目的？
E: What are you up to, lavishing me with such praise?

C: 没想到，你这人还挺温柔？
E: Didn't peg you for the kindly type.

C: 我当过矿工，也干过雇佣兵，经济宽裕之后，甚至玩过几年的星际荒野求生。
E: I've worked as a miner and a mercenary. After my fortunes turned, I even spent a few years playing survival in the wild in the cosmos.

C: 你一直在做这种事吗？
E: Have you always been doing this sort of work?

C: 这只谛听名叫「宝萝」，曾是太卜司符玄大人的宠物，由于终日陪伴在太卜左右，耳闻目染之下具备了预知未来的能力。
E: This Diting is called Baoluo. It used to be the pet of Lady Fu Xuan from the Divination Commission. As it was always by the master diviner's side, under her influence, it gained the ability to foretell the future as well.

C: 彦卿大人真是一个关爱粉丝的优质偶像，啊…你就说谁会不喜欢他！
E: Master Yanqing is truly a top-class idol who cares about his fans. Ahh... Who wouldn't like him!?

C: 你这苏乐达正宗么？
E: Is your SoulGlad authentic?

C: 那时还不叫浥尘客栈…
E: Back then, it wasn't called the Petrichor Inn.

C: 不就是货运星槎吗？
E: Isn't that a freight starskiff?

C: 一旦接受自己的软弱…
E: Once you accepted your weaknesses...

C: 街上怎么没啥人了？
E: Why are the streets empty?

C: 驭空大人好冷静…
E: Madam Yukong is so cool...

C: 等到什么时候啊！
E: Until when!?

C: 没关系的，不看比赛，也有可以问的。
E: No problem. I have a separate list of questions for interviewees who don't watch competitive sports.

C: 嗐，其实我也没有见过他本人，只是星际暗网上认识的「网友」。说实话，我俩也不算熟悉，网友嘛，都是因为共同的爱好聚集一起的。
E: *sigh* I've never actually seen him in person, he's just an internet friend I knew on the interstellar dark net. Honestly, we're not even that close. We only connect because of shared interests.

C: 再搞一只学舌妖回来好了…啊，恐怕会有生态问题。
E: Bring back a Parrot Goblin too... Ah, but there'll probably cause an issue with the ecosystem.

C: 观众席和引擎舱之间隔了好几层甲板，你不会是开着导航迷路的吧？
E: The spectator floor and engine room are separated by several levels. You got lost with your Navigation on?

C: 别担心，我拒绝未成年者学习。
E: Don't worry, I forbid underage kids from learning my art.

C: …有关那艘船的记忆得到了满足，已经航行离开了。你可以称呼我为明桴。
E: ...That ship's memory was satisfied, and it already embarked on its next voyage. You may call me Regratta.

C: 若昔。
E: Ruoxi.

C: 你瞧那使剑的小子侥幸胜得一招半式，便彻底否定老夫存在的意义吗？！
E: So, you just saw the boy with a sword win one round against me, and now you will immediately invalidate my entire existence?

C: 你想问就问，我爱答不答。
E: Ask me whatever you want, and I'll answer if I feel like it.

C: 对吧？如果是这样的话，我也喜欢。
E: Is that correct? If it is, I am the same.

C: 说来惭愧，虽然妾身还算是精通医道，但若与那些第一流的医士相比，还是稍逊一筹。
E: Though it pains me to say it, though I am proficient in medicine, I still have a way to go to catch up with the elite healers.

C: 抱歉，眼下还不是随便打听的时候。不过，本座保证，等到可以分享情报的时候，我们肯定会告知星穹列车，毕竟你们是仙舟联盟的盟友。
E: My apologies. Now is not the time for such casual inquiries. However, please rest assured that when I am able to share my information, I will inform the Astral Express, as you are allies of the Xianzhou Alliance, after all.

C: 啊！花！你是多么地花！
E: O flowers! How flowery you are!

C: 我也会变成那样吗？
E: Will I become like that, too?

C: …您还不够年龄。
E: ...And you're not old enough.

C: 「一零一零一零」者…
E: As a "<unbreak>101010</unbreak>" person...

C: 整点油炸土豆条。
E: To get some fried potato sticks.

C: 花钱不多挺实惠。
E: And they don't cost you much.

C: 赛飞儿说的句句都是大实话。
E: Cipher's speaking nothing but the truth.

C: 她对我们这一行，缺乏最基本的尊重嘛！
E: She has zero respect for what we do!

C: 那就，明天再见啦。
E: Well then, see you tomorrow!

C: 好呀。小灰想玩的时候，要记得来找*我们*！
E: Sure! When Little Gray wants to play, remember to come find us!

C: 原先，我想把「侵晨」托付给你，但它见证了太多无谓的杀戮，恐怕不是件合适的礼物。
E: Originally, I wanted to entrust Dawnmaker to you, but it has witnessed too much pointless bloodshed. I fear it wouldn't make for an appropriate gift.

C: 所以我总是在想，你是不是也想要试试呢？
E: So I'd always wondered, would you like to give it a try too?

C: 不过灰宝，缇安老师和飞宝看起来这么有活力，也没必要担心啦。
E: But Grayie, Trianne, and Ciphie look so full of energy, there's no need to worry!

C: 我还会来庭院做客的。
E: I'll come visit the courtyard again.

C: 用你那些欺瞒的伎俩，换几百年苟且偷生？人皆有一死，但切不可失却尊严。
E: Using your deceitful tricks for a few hundred years of mere survival? All men must face death, but never should they forfeit their dignity.

C: *狠狠地用手比了一个数字*
E: *Fiercely indicates a number by gesture*

C: 它所使招数也超出寻常人关节的运动范畴，也没人类能学得来。就在它要危害四方时，却被「无罅飞光」刺中了维生装置。
E: The moves it had were also beyond the limits of human joints, and no human could learn such movements. However, as it was about to lay waste to the land, the Transcendent Flash ran her sword through its life-support device.

C: 没事，可以先学，反正是速成班，一学期很快的。
E: It's fine. You can just learn the swordplay first. It's a crash course anyway, and the semester will be gone before you realize it.

C: 消除恐惧最好的办法是面对它。
E: The best way to overcome your fears is to face them.

C: 步离巢父，行则战至，祸乱诸界，判绝足禁闭，不得受生。
E: The Borisin Brood Lord, with him came war and a scourge upon all worlds. His sentence is to be eternally detained and imprisoned, never to be reborn.

C: 请选择「当前可选的调查模式」确认囚室信息。
E: Please select from the "currently available investigation modes" to confirm cell information.

C: 你猜，我想不想猜。
E: Guess if I want to guess or not.

C: 寒假练习册。
E: A homework exercise book.

C: 我是～双身人！
E: I am~ The Twin-Vesseled One!

C: 这世上存在着不可宽恕的罪
E: There are sins in this world that cannot be forgiven

C: 大吼大叫的鼓励师。
E: A motivator who shouts really loud.

C: 我是～嘴硬的药王秘传！
E: I am~ A stubborn disciple of Sanctus Medicus!

C: 有没有这样一种可能——这台古筝底部的支架实为可以随意屈伸的机械四肢，而这台古筝实为某种造型独特的机械宠物？
E: Could the stand be a flexible mechanical arm, and the guzheng be a mech-pet with a unique design?

C: 立正——稍息！
E: Attention! At ease!

C: 加油啊卢卡！我看好你！
E: All the best Luka! I'm rooting for you!

C: 好紧张…放松，放松…
E: So nervous... Relax, relax...

C: 都是自己人，谁赢都一样！
E: We are all on the same team, so it doesn't matter who wins!

C: 刚才的比赛太精彩了！
E: The match just now had me on the edge of my seat!

C: 旨在防止无关人员随意触摸精密仪器的宣传画。这种做法很有道理，毕竟谁也不能保证自己能打得过工造司制造的精密仪器。
E: The poster is designed to deter unauthorized personnel from touching the precision instrument. It is a reasonable measure, as no one can be sure that they can overcome the precision instruments made by the Artisanship Commission.

C: 不会动的金人就是好金人。
E: An aurumaton that doesn't move is a good aurumaton.

C: 「在上述星球的毁灭进程中，军团极为缓慢地推进阵线，构筑优势，施加压力，蚕食抵抗者，又如同观察蚁群一般，观察受难文明在各个结构上的瓦解。」
E: "During the destruction of the above planets, the legion advanced, dominated, pressured, and devoured the resisters at an extremely slow speed. They took their time to watch the structural collapse of civilization during a disaster like observing an ant colony."

C: 宣传栏上写有大量有益于生活的小技巧，其中预防诈骗相关的内容约占八成。
E: Many life hacks are written on the bulletin board, eighty percent of which being related to fraud prevention.

C: 想去更刺激的社团…
E: I want to go to a more exciting Club...

C: 好困…呼…呼……
E: So tired... Zzz... Zzz...

C: 从仙舟法律有关财产所有权的条目出发，任何寂寞无主的小快递箱都应归属于发现它的第一个人。
E: The Xianzhou property law places the right to ownership of any unowned courier package on the first person to find it.

C: 猝不及防，你经历了一堂严肃的人生通识教育课，眼角微微湿润。
E: Blindsided, you feel as though you've learned a valuable life lesson. Your eyes are glistening.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵下，一点闪光抓住了你的眼睛。
E: Beneath this crystal clear and luminous egg, a glimmer catches your eye.

C: 你轻轻敲了敲持明的卵壳，久违地感觉到了虚无，它似乎空无一物，对你的探知毫无反应…也许卵中持明早已离去？
E: You gently tap on the Vidyadhara eggshell and experience an emptiness you have not felt for a long time. The egg seems empty, as it does not respond to your contact... Perhaps, the Vidyadhara inside has long gone.

C: 任何保有理智的生物都会选择避开它；但如果你的勇气甚于理智，那么也可以打开它看看——毕竟，它或许还没过保质期，对吧？
E: Anyone with a sane mind would stay away from it. However, if your courage prevails over your sanity, you may open it further and take a look. Perhaps the food hasn't gone passed its expiry date yet, right?

C: 「鹤运物流，啥都能寄。」
E: "Heron Express — We Mail Anything."

C: 据说「尚滋味」燕翠师傅是以拳法闻名的厨师，以自己击败的星际猛兽入菜肴——但从广告上看，「尚滋味」也卖普通餐品嘛。又也许看似普通的包子里塞了飞天水螅肉馅。
E: Chef Yancui of Spices Supreme is supposedly famous for her fighting techniques, and she uses intergalactic beasts she has defeated in her food. Although, the ad looks like they do normal dishes, too. Either that, or those normal-looking dumplings are filled with flying polyp meat!

C: 这封信到此就结束了。
E: That is the end of the letter.

C: 让本乐队高手来品鉴下。
E: I will ascertain their caliber for myself.

C: 嗬，要有好戏看了。
E: Heh, we're about to see a big show.

C: 为你们鼓掌一次！
E: A round of applause for you!

C: 那你只要找个人寄生就好。
E: You just have to leech off of someone, I guess.

C: 你就知道在学堂里瞎混…
E: You keep faffing around at the lyceum...

C: 即便在群星云集的匹诺康尼，一辆斯坦威游隼也会是彰显您高贵品位的最好标识。
E: Even amidst the star-studded Penacony, a Steinway Falcon is the epitome of showcasing your class.

C: 匹诺康尼常见的自助推车，主打一个方便快捷、数量繁多。
E: A self-serve goods trolley. It is a common sight in Penacony with its convenience, speed of service, and ubiquitousness.

C: 匹诺康尼街边的自助餐车。不知为何总有人试图闯进车厢，看看里面究竟有什么。
E: A roadside self-serve food truck in Penacony. For some reason, people keep trying to barge into the car to see what is inside.

C: 「就凭我们，你疯了吗？！■■会把我们撕成碎片！」
E: "With just us? Are you crazy!? ■■ will tear us to shreds!"

C: 只要你愿意遵守梦境的规则，梦境就会不遗余力地给予你回馈。
E: As long as you're willing to abide by the rules of the Dreamscape, it will provide you with as much as it can.

C: 啊，实在有趣。你已经见过很多所谓的「大人物」了…未来的可能性不可限量。
E: Ah, this is very interesting. You've met a lot of the so-called big shots... The future contains endless possibilities for you.

C: 不是只要努力就能发财吗，我明明…付出了这么多，千里迢迢到这里，花大价钱和家族的人处好关系，入住酒店都是用房产做抵押的……
E: Doesn't hard work translate into wealth? I obviously... gave up so much, traveled all the way here, spent a fortune getting cozy with The Family, shacked up in this hotel using my own house as collateral...

C: 我是橡木家系的派诺！我以我的姓氏为荣！
E: I am Paino of the Oak Family! I wear my family's name with pride!

C: 啊。可那些真正有企图的人，都不会直接说出来。
E: Ah. But those who really have a motive won't admit it upfront.

C: 星穹列车到匹诺康尼了！
E: The Astral Express has arrived at Penacony!

C: 我知道呀。我还知道那位小姐，和她的家人之间，似乎闹了点…小矛盾。
E: I knew that. I even know that lady has had some... disagreement with her Family.

C: 好吧…我必须承认，您确实带来了惊喜。
E: Fine... I have to admit that you have surprised me.

C: 简单来说呢，就是人们相遇便会有故事；而了解他们的故事，才能创作出更有趣的故事。您说是吧？
E: Simply put, interactions must be encountered to create stories. And it is through understanding their stories, that one is able to create even more compelling tales. Don't you think so?

C: 不过嘛…您若是对此类题材感兴趣的话，我倒是推荐您读一读埃德加•卡特的作品，他的故事有种难以言喻的美感，相信您会喜欢的。
E: But... If you're interested in such topics, I can recommend you read Edgar Carter's works. His stories have an inexplicable beauty to them — I trust you will like them.

C: 明明光是素材就已经收集了十几个书架了…难道我真的在这方面毫无天赋吗？
E: I've collected dozens of bookshelves worth of material... Do I really not have the talent for this?

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 说到做到。
E: I keep my promises.

C: …皮皮西人是全宇宙最可爱的种族。
E: ...The Pepeshi people are the cutest species in the universe.

C: 噢，很遗憾听到这个消息…但您的商品已经寄出，拦截非常困难，除非——
E: Oh, I'm sorry to hear that... but your item has already been shipped and cannot be intercepted, unless...

C: 好吧，每个人都有被认可的需求，你确实觉得这种感觉…还不错。
E: Fine, everyone has a need for validation. You come to realize that this feeling... really is not bad.

C: 又开始了，又开始了。人造的就不是命？铁打的就不是命？那自主觉醒的呢，宇宙自然形成的呢，星神创造的呢？
E: Here we go again. Can't the artificial still be a life? Can't metal make a life? What about those that reached enlightenment themselves, that were naturally created by the universe or created by the Aeons?

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达…不对，这又不是上节目。
