E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, make your dreams a blast... Wait no, I'm not live on stream right now.

C: 这未免太不负责了吧？
E: Isn't this grossly irresponsible?

C: …你没事吧？
E: ...Are you okay?

C: 随便你怎么说，反正也没有第二个了。
E: Whatever. I don't have another cone for you anyway.

C: 你知道吗？我第一次画画是在两岁的时候…那时的我连一句完整的话都不会说。
E: Do you know? I started painting when I was two... I couldn't even complete a sentence then.

C: 或许，我是说或许…嘿嘿，下次见面的时候，她也愿意和我共舞一曲吗？
E: Maybe, just maybe... Hehe... Next time we meet, she would be willing to dance with me?

C: 话虽如此，它的制作技法早已脱离了钟表本身的概念…又或者，钟表本身也不该被局限在某个固定模式中。我所追求的极致工艺亦是如此。
E: Saying that, the way it is crafted had long since exceeded the concept of "clock"... Or perhaps "clocks" should never have been restricted to a set style. This is exactly the exquisite craftsmanship I was searching for!

C: 什么都好，快让我想到几个好玩的段子吧！
E: Just let me come up with some new jokes! Anything will do!

C: 那波浪正因轻抚而欢悦、因敲击而昂扬。于是你看见金色音符盘旋升起，喧嚣又美丽。
E: Within those waves, joy resides, carried by each stroke that sends golden notes soaring, resounding with beauty.

C: 见你傻愣愣站着不动，一旁的青年——或者说架子鼓——终于忍不住了，扬起支闲着的鼓槌，在你手臂上不轻不重地敲了一下。
E: Seeing you still standing there, the young man on the side, more specifically, the "drum," raises his idle drumstick and gives you a not-so-gentle tap on the arm.

C: 在偌大的宇宙中，个人的力量实在太过渺小。唯有相互帮扶，万众一心，凡人才可能做出非凡的壮举。
E: In the vast universe, the strength of an individual is insignificant. Only through mutual help and binding our hearts as one, can humans perform superhuman feats.

C: 暂时没有问题了。
E: I have no questions right now.

C: 现在的家族成员，真是一代不如一代……
E: The caliber of The Family's members is really going down the drain with each generation...

C: 你的尾巴…
E: Your tail...

C: 我先走啦。
E: I'll be heading off now.

C: 我也想要一条尾巴啊…谁不喜欢毛茸茸软乎乎的大尾巴啊……
E: I want a tail too... Who doesn't like a poofy fluffy tail...

C: 哈哈，你说可笑不可笑……
E: Haha, I'm sure you find it funny...

C: 哼，一点也不夸张，只是你还没有感受到！
E: Hmph, it's not an exaggeration! You just can't feel it yet.

C: …我吗？您说笑了，本车行的豪车都是为您这样尊贵的宾客准备的，我连乘坐的机会都没有，怎么可能还会驾驶呢。
E: ...Me? You must be kidding, the luxury cars at this dealership are exclusive to VIPs like yourself. I don't even get to sit in them, let alone drive them.

C: …有时候真觉得很累啊。
E: ...It does feel exhausting sometimes.

C: …都是些什么破规定！
E: ...What kind of crap rules are these!

C: 为什么人只有在梦中才能放松自己呢……
E: Why is it that I can only ever relax inside the dream world...

C: 仿佛播碟机切到了一张劲爆的摇滚专辑，丹西的脸突然换上了一副激动的表情。
E: Dancy's expression suddenly became super excited, as if a jukebox had suddenly started blasting an electrifying rock anthem.

C: 你真有意思，我怎么会是二次元角色呢？人家二次元角色要么酷炫要么可爱，我配吗？
E: What a strange thing to say. How could I be an anime character? Anime characters are all either cool or cute. You think I live up to that?

C: 这件事说来话长…我以前是常盘国教育科学省的大臣，任期结束后，就来到匹诺康尼，研究本地的动漫产业。
E: It's a long story... I was once the Minister of Education and Technology in Tokiwa. Once my time in that capacity ended, I came to Penacony to research the local anime industry.

C: 所以长久以来，动漫创作是常盘国人的普遍教养。任何知识分子都会画漫画，民众也不会给没参与过动画制作的政治家投票。
E: So, for a long time, making anime has been part of the Tokiwa people's upbringing. Any educated person can draw manga and the people would never vote for a politician who hasn't been part of an anime's creation.

C: 只是我的那些有机学生们实在太不开窍，让我这铁疙瘩憋了一肚子火，这才忍不住口出暴言。
E: It's just that my organic lifeform students just don't understand what I'm teaching them. It has lit a fire in my stomach, and I could not help but blurt out these harsh words.

C: 为了您个人的安全着想，请尽量减少与波奇先生，以及他身边那位老先生的接触。
E: Out of consideration for your personal safety, please make sure to limit your interaction with Mr. Bocchi and that old guy around him.

C: 您好，请问有什么需要帮助的吗？
E: Hello, is there anything that I can help you with?

C: 另外，正在维护或修缮中的梦境相对不稳定，为了您的安全，请勿靠近该类区域。
E: In addition, areas undergoing maintenance or repair tend to be unstable. For your safety, please avoid approaching such areas.

C: 嘿嘿，别看我这样，在母星也是数一数二的人才呢~
E: Heehee, maybe you don't know, but I'm one of the most talented individuals on my home planet!

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 这个季度的部门差旅经费报表还没核算。我自己弄恐怕来不及了…交给账账吧。
E: The departmental expense and travel expenditure reports for this quarter have not been verified. I probably don't have enough time to handle it myself... I'll let Numby do it.

C: 只要购买我们的乌通蓬自动车，你就能以王者姿态享受到真正的美梦！现在还有促销哦。
E: By purchasing our Utopon Motion Maverick, you'll enjoy a kingly experience in your dream! There's a promotion for this vehicle now!

C: 不用感谢我，做好事是疾风侠的职责！
E: There's no need to thank me. Offering help is my job!

C: 本型号独轮飞车采用开放式车厢设计，您可在蹬踩过程中轻松欣赏沿途风景，绝不会乏味。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
E: This vehicle has an open carriage design that allows you to admire the scenery along the way while pedaling. Your journey will never be dull. Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 这次先放过你。
E: I'll show you mercy this time.

C: 滴答滴答，这尊雕像的秘密可不止这些！接下来我要说的话，就只讲给能看见我的朋友听！
E: Tick-tock, tick-tock, there are more secrets about this statue! Next, I'm going to tell you things I only reveal to my friends!

C: 谁曾想他被嫉妒占据了头脑，居然在半路截杀了一位来宾，夺取了对方的邀请函……
E: Who knew envy would take over his mind, intercepting and killing a guest on the way, then stealing the victim's invitation...

C: 不对，好像突然有一股奇怪的情感涌上心头。按理说不该发生这种事的……
E: Hold on. I can feel a weird sentiment getting stronger. This isn't supposed to happen...

C: 有什么推荐的游玩项目？
E: Are there any fun activities you'd recommend?

C: 啊？哦，抱、抱歉，我没注意到…你是想和卡通角色互动吗，那边还有其他演员……
E: Huh? Oh, s—sorry, I didn't notice you... Did you want to interact with one of the characters? There are more actors over there...

C: 汽水先生，我的好朋友，滴答！他又勤劳又机灵，人也特别善良，每次有卖不完的快餐都会留给我，还不要我的钱，滴答！
E: Mr. Soda is my good friend, tick-tock! He is hard-working, intelligent, and really kind. Whenever he has leftovers, he leaves them for me and doesn't ask me for money, tick-tock!

C: 是么？不管好与坏，这里都是我没法离开的地方。
E: Really? Well, love it or hate it, I cannot leave this place.

C: 哈，才刚回来不久，我就已经开始在厌恶它了。
E: Ha, I've just gotten back, and I've already started to hate it.

C: 没问题，您快去忙您的吧。
E: Alright, I'll let you get back to your business.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 为什么橡木家系家主要在公馆玄关摆这么多隐夜鸫雕像？真是令人费解。
E: Why would the Oak Family Head have so many Nightingale Statues in the foyer? It really is incomprehensible.

C: 象征猎犬家系的徽记，被绫罗绸缎包围的猎犬仍旧忠心不移。
E: A crest that symbolizes the Bloodhound Family. Wrapped in silks and satin, the loyal hound remains faithful still.

C: 那位神秘酒保，和我的爱人有着相似的魅力，温柔，又是如此英姿飒爽！可惜我的心早已被她占据，容不下其余对象了。
E: That mysterious drinksmith, she has a similar charm and kindness as my beloved, yet she is heroic and bold, too! It is a shame that my heart has already been taken, and I have no space for another.

C: 你尝试向眼前的顾客搭话，但对方似乎沉浸在酒吧的悠闲氛围中，并未注意到你。
E: You attempt to engage in conversation with the customer before you, but they seem immersed in the leisurely ambiance of the lounge, oblivious to your presence.

C: 我猜这不是你的真面目…
E: I guess this isn't who you really are...

C: 稍有疏忽，不忠的种子就会在家族里生根发芽…要撕破他们的伪装，让他们露出丑恶的真面目，可不是个容易活。
E: If we aren't vigilant, the seeds of disloyalty will take root in The Family... Ripping off their disguise and exposing the truth of their wickedness is easier said than done, though.

C: 这、这是我最喜欢的匹诺康尼小吃，一周才能吃上一次的那种——一点心意，还请你笑纳！
E: This here is my favorite local snack here in Penacony, the kind of treat I only splash out for once a week — just a little token of thanks for you!

C: 他们面对红巨星的时候怂了吗？没有，那咱们也不能怂！鸢尾花的评委毁灭不了一整个星系…他们连根毛都算不上！
E: Were they scared when they faced down the superstar? No — so neither should we! The Iris Family judges can't destroy an entire star system... They're small fry.

C: 我无意针对任何人，但必须得说，会场里进行的那些挑战都极其愚蠢，毫无技巧可言。
E: I don't mean to criticize, but I have to say that all the challenges were so stupid that they barely took any skill.

C: 哎，还没完。那个时候啊，有个不知道天高地厚的银头发小姑娘跑来挑战我，哼，我稍微动了动手指，就把她的游戏账号全注销了！
E: Ah, I'm not done. Back then, there was a silver-haired girl who was full of herself who tried to challenge me. Hmph, with a swipe of one finger I just cancelled all of her gaming accounts!

C: 既然能在此时此地遇见，就说明我们之间还挺有缘分的，所以…稍微来聊几句怎么样？
E: Seeing as we've managed to meet up here and now, there must be some level of destiny between us. So then... how about a little chit-chat?

C: 这是什么匹诺康尼时兴的开玩笑方式吗？为什么你也要问啊。
E: Is that some kind of Penaconian joke that I don't understand? Why would you ask that?

C: 所有人都觉得我是个疯子…但我发誓，我看到了…我全都看到了，真的！
E: Everyone thinks I am insane... but I swear I saw it... I saw all of it, honestly!

C: 而且我还看到有其他人走了进去…呃，或许是人吧。然后那幢房子开始蠕动，就像是在…消化。我等了很久，那个人始终没有出来。
E: Then, I saw someone enter it... Um, they might have been a person. Then, the house began to squirm, and it was like it was... digesting? I waited and waited, but that person never came back out.

C: 好啊，你起头吧。
E: Alright, you start.

C: 于是我直接在梦里闭目养神，睁开眼就发现自己到这来了。很神奇，不是吗？顶级的谜语有时只需要最简单的解题方式。
E: So, I closed my eyes to quiet my mind, and when I opened them, here I am. Isn't it mysterious? Sometimes the hardest of riddles are solved in the simplest ways...

C: 梦境给了我一个重新尝试的机会…我已经开始享受这种感觉了。
E: The Dreamscape has given me a chance to start again... I have already come to enjoy this feeling.

C: 突然想起一件好笑的事情——我在这边给自己安排的假身份，是一个离家出走的叛逆少女。
E: I've just realized something funny... The false identity I gave myself here is that of a rebellious young girl that ran away from home.

C: 说不准，应该因材施教。
E: Maybe they should be taught according to their individual skills?

C: 流梦礁所在的地方不太稳定，经常会有忆域迷因闯入城镇。您有遇到过迷因吗？
E: The location of Dreamflux Reef is somewhat unstable, and Memory Zone memes often break into town. Have you ever encountered a meme?

C: 我没遇到过。
E: Nope. Never met it.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 独特的口味…听说橡木家系的人能面不改色地吞下一整块呢。
E: What a unique taste... They say that members from the Oak Family can swallow a whole piece of the cake without batting an eyelid.

C: 感谢那条猎犬，看来他的「谎言」放在现实里也能生效。
E: I'll have to thank that Hound. Looks like his "lie" also works in the real world.

C: 嗯…有只爱听故事的小鸟，一直在<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」的身旁</color>待着，它大概还在期待钟表小子的下一场冒险吧。
E: Hmm... There's a birdie who loves listening to stories — it's just been hanging out <color=#dbc291ff>by the Watchmaker's side</color>, probably looking forward to Clockie's next adventure.

C: 啾？还有别的问题吗？
E: Tweet? Is there something else?

C: 所以我们搭建了这个锻炼身体的赛场，只要大家变得比谁都厉害，坏蛋就不敢欺负我们了啾。
E: So we built this racetrack to train our bodies. As long as everyone became stronger than everything else, baddies wouldn't dare bully us again, tweet.

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 啾！是魔法硬币啾！
E: Tweet! A magic coin, tweet!

C: 我深知此非坦途，前路必将艰辛漫长、无法仅凭理论与知识畅行其上，但我愿将余生投注于此，见证它生发成长……
E: I know it won't be easy, and the path ahead will be arduous and long, that it cannot be built with theories and knowledge alone, but I'm willing to spend my life to achieve this, to witness its growth...

C: 不是每位智械都有螺丝星臣民那样精妙的结构，我们的很多族群曾经也只是有机生命的「玩具」。所以在我们眼中，探索玩具也是在把玩与自己同源的一具躯体……
E: Not every Intellitron has the structural intricacy of Planet Screwllum's citizens. Many of us were once "toys" to organic lifeforms. In our eyes, tinkering with toys is also playing with a framework that has the same origin as us...

C: 你都卖些什么玩意儿？
E: What do you sell?

C: 哎呀！那就是他们在痛苦中无路可走，最后爆发出来的样子！
E: Oh no! That's the result of them having nowhere to turn to in their constant suffering!

C: 狗策划，原来是你！
E: So you were that cursed game designer!

C: 嗯，想聊点什么？
E: Mm, what do you wish to talk about?

C: 要想带走这份纪念品，就请给我你的「黄金限定•艾迪恩代币」吧，那东西在某个「时刻」能派上想不到的用处。
E: If you want to take this souvenir with you, you'll have to give me your Aideen Token (Golden Limited Edition). That item will become useful in a way beyond your imagination in a certain "Moment."

C: 在那颗星球仇视火焰的蒙昧时代里，这才能被称作一种传统。
E: Had the planet been in an age of ignorance where they still detested the concept of flame, then the dish would hold traditional significance.

C: 硬要说起来，那位竟然还真有些眼熟……但也实在讨厌。
E: To put it bluntly, he seemed familiar... and really annoying.

C: ——那种力量连它们自己的身体都无法承受。
E: Their bodies just don't have the capacity to contain so much energy.

C: 免费的我都有兴趣。
E: I'm interested, as long as it's free.

C: 美食是一种体验——这是我尝遍天下后，最大的感悟。
E: Gourmet is an experience: This is what I learned after sampling food from across the cosmos.

C: 可我现在能在到处旅行，全因为在部门年会上抽到了特等奖——那是方案中涵盖了十四颗星球的超豪华单人游…几乎没有哪位同事不想抽到手。
E: The only reason I'm able to travel now is that I won the grand prize at our department's annual party. It's an ultra-luxurious solo travel package spanning <unbreak>14</unbreak> planets... The prize all my colleagues had their eye on.

C: 不会又让我…
E: Surely you're not asking me to...

C: 我没什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 不知道他们处理这单顾客投诉要多久…啊，我的好评率又掉了…我这个月的工资……
E: I wonder how long they'll take to process this complaint...? Oh no, my rating has fallen again! So will my salary this month...

C: 贩售船长周边是我们的传统，我的初衷只是想留住一些关于船长的美好回忆，没有想到会造成这样的误会……
E: Selling the captain's merchandise is our tradition. I only wanted to leave something to remember our last captain by. I didn't think it would cause so much trouble...

C: …老实说我是为了生计才到这里调饮…如果口感不佳，还请见谅……
E: ...To be honest, I'm only concocting drinks to make ends meet. Please forgive me if it doesn't taste good...

C: 好的，目前我们有三套不同的储备方案，分别是：
E: Sure, we have three different designs to choose from:

C: 方案三，命名为「飞翔时针号」，尾翼配以钟表小子模样的涂装。
E: Choice three, The Soaring Clock Hand. It features an insignia designed after Clockie on the tail of the airship.

C: 我选钟表小子！
E: I'll go with Clockie!

C: 我思考了小半辈子，对当年的所作所为心中早有论断。但年轻人，记住了——
E: I've had half of my lifetime to think about this and I've made my peace with what I did back then. But remember, young one...

C: 和我谈「梦想」？那我可不困了。
E: Want to talk about "dreams"? Well, I'm wide awake now.

C: 有意思，我猜是边远星系的高级品牌？可惜我还没入职，不然就拜托公司的前辈去联系合作了。
E: Oh, that's new. A luxury brand from one of the fringe planets? Too bad I'm not onboarded yet, or I'd suggest for my seniors in the IPC to work out a collaboration with them.

C: 问谐乐学院首席车手这个问题？认真的？
E: You're asking the lead driver of Charmony Academy this question? Are you serious?

C: 他们都清楚怎么利用我这样的人——皮皮西人，有点天赋，有些成绩，非常冲动，有些孤立无援。
E: They know full well how to make use of someone like me... I'm a Pepeshi. I've got a little skill and some success. I'm impulsive and slightly isolated...

C: 你好！是游客对吧！请问你对展览感兴趣吗？筑梦学院新一届概念艺术展再过几个月就要举办了。如果有时间，请务必来参观！
E: Hello! You must be a visitor! Are you interested in exhibitions? Dreamweaver Academy's newest conceptual art exhibition is going to be taking place in a few months. If you have time, you must come and check it out!

C: 只靠学院的成绩，恐怕竞争力不太够，我需要志愿者的经历来填补简历空白。
E: Just relying on my academic grades alone will not give me enough of a competitive edge. I need to fill the blanks with volunteer work.

C: 总之，我准备对「睡蕉小猴」进行更深入的调查。但当务之急…我需要一个得力助手。
E: Either way, I'm going to do further research into Slumbernana Monkey. However, given the urgency of the task, I need a capable assistant...

C: 怎么样，心动了吗？机会难得，可千万别错过啊！
E: What do you think? It's a great honor, right? This is a rare opportunity, make sure you don't miss out!

C: 不过…时代在变，环境在变，我们喜剧社也不一样了。靠销售梦泡基本能达成收支平衡，还有植入广告之类的花样手段来赚钱，比过去的状况好多了。
E: But... times have changed, so has our environment, and so has the comedy club. To be able to sell dream bubbles to make ends meet and earn some cash with product placements and other similar tactics... We're much better than in the past.

C: 而且观众们骂归骂，前辈们那几期演出还不是爆火了？电视台还上门拉我们签合同呢，这样下去，说不定哪天…我们社团在匹诺康尼电视台就拥有专属节目了！
E: Even with all the complaints from the audience, the previous few shows from the seniors still went viral! The TV station even came to us with a contract! If this continues, who knows... maybe our club will have our own show on the Penacony TV Station one day!

C: 但…把兴趣当职业，是不是有点太理想了？要是火不起来怎么办，赚不到钱，甚至连票都卖不出去又该怎么办？光是想到这些，我就开始害怕了。
E: But... to turn my interest into a job... is it too idealistic? What if I don't become popular? What if I can't earn any money or even sell any tickets? Just thinking about this makes me afraid.

C: 不用客气！
E: No worries!

C: 好，那下次再聊。
E: Okay, chat next time.

C: 但如果大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}能给我留言几句，到时候年鉴刊发出来，全校师生都看得到！
E: But if the renowned {NICKNAME} can leave a short message for me, then everyone in school will be able to see it when the yearbook gets published!

C: 我就知道，我能考进折纸大学财富学院，果然还是有天赋的！嗯，这档子生意如果能稳定地经营下去…我想想……
E: I knew it. I got into Paperfold University's Fortune Academy because I have talent! Hmm, if this business can continue at this pace... let me think...

C: 我还有话要跟你说…
E: I have something else to tell you...

C: 我要窥视命运！
E: I want to glimpse into my destiny!

C: 想聊聊焚化工…
E: About The Cremators...

C: 朴素到有些扎嘴的糖浆药水，在监狱时期却是难得的美味。
E: A simple and tongue-prickling syrupy medicine that was a rare flavor during the Prison Era.

C: 餐厅以现场烹制「鸟巢炒蛋」的表演为噱头，以此证明餐品不是预制菜——哪怕是在梦境中，类似的声明也是极为必要的。
E: The restaurant's marketing gimmick is cooking "fried nested eggs" on the spot to prove that their dishes aren't prepared beforehand. Even in the Dreamscape, such repute must be kept intact.

C: 泰坦们浴血捍卫那柄刺向深渊的利剑，见证你们踏上征程。
E: The Titans fought tooth and nail to defend that sword pierced into the Abyss, bearing witness as you embark on your journey.

C: 伤痕痊愈，却余有幻痛，医者便会轻抚琴弦，演奏蓝天。
E: Though wounds heal, phantom pain lingers still. The healer gently strums the strings, playing a melody of blue skies.

C: 这才八点啊。
E: It's only eight o'clock.

C: 我们一起去看吧！
E: Let's go watch it together!

C: 抱歉，我不会…
E: Sorry, I can't...

C: 多长个心眼。
E: You ought to be careful.

C: 您别激动，我会把您的意见向家族反映的。
E: Calm down. I'll pass your feedback to The Family.

C: 老婆，你看这件衣服…
E: Babe, check out this dress...

C: 冰~淇淋！
E: Ice cream! Ice cream!

C: 你站地上再看看？
E: You stand on the ground and take another look, huh?

C: 这电话能窥探梦境…
E: If this phone peeks into dreams...

C: 下面真的有许多车在飞诶，好壮观！
E: There are really so many cars flying down there. What a spectacle!

C: 你能不能稍微有点素质…再说了，你会游泳吗？
E: Can you at least have some standards... and do you even know how to swim?

C: 那边围了这么多人…
E: There are loads of people here!

C: 这才多久啊。
E: It's not even been that long.

C: 我们诚邀您加入家族。
E: We'd like to invite you to join The Family.

C: 各位观众，这里是热砂的时刻，让我为您带来达乐苏盛会海选的现场报道…
E: Dear viewers, this is the Moment of Scorchsand. Let me bring you the official on-site details from the SoulGlad Festivity Auditions...

C: 是啊，棋差一着。
E: Yeah, it was a close one.

C: 你觉得，就咱们这种小作坊，雇得起盛会巨星？
E: You think a small studio like ours can afford a Festive Superstar?

C: 作为匹诺康尼影视界的龙头大哥，本次海选中，是否也有让希米亚影业心动的选手？
E: As the leader of Penacony's film and television industry, have there been any participants who have caught Himemia Films' eye?

C: 怎么会有这么不讲理的事情！
E: How could such an unreasonable thing happen!

C: 据我同事听来的猎犬内部爆料，这很可能是一场有预谋的政变，就是几大家主为了对付橡木家系搞出来的。
E: According to insider gossip I heard from my coworker about the Hounds, this could be a premeditated coup by the major family heads against the Oak Family.

C: 真的吗？太令人难以置信了！
E: Really? That's wild!

C: 现在咱们就不是谈生意了，朋友与生意，我向来分得很清。
E: We aren't talking business anymore. I've always been clear between friends and business.

C: 非常抱歉，夫人…谐乐大典的事超出了我们的职权范围…恐怕……
E: I'm truly sorry, madam... The Charmony Festival exceeds our permitted authority... I fear...

C: 别急，在看了在看了…
E: Don't panic. We're already looking...

C: 我、我可没偷听！
E: I... wasn't eavesdropping!

C: 财富学院有早八的课吗？
E: Does Fortune Academy have eight AM classes?

C: 他们没有表情，并非活物，仅仅摆出简单的姿势，就成为了一副情感充沛的画面——这便是想象力的作用，也是艺术的根源。
E: They are expressionless, inanimate, only capable of posing in simple movements, yet becoming a scene full of emotion — This is the power of imagination, and the source of art.

C: 无趣，就没有什么难题能刺激下我的大脑吗？
E: How banal. Is there no conundrum to stimulate my brain?

C: 厄琉斯，我的厄琉斯…
E: Aelius, my cherished Aelius...

C: 我的陶罐自然也沾染了这份荣耀，如今每到发售日，黄金裔的崇拜者都要将我这小店围得水泄不通。
E: Naturally, my dolia carry this same honor. Now, fans of the Chrysos Heirs flock to my humble shop on sale days.

C: 不是，我就不明白了，躺着吃饭已经够离谱了，怎么同一道菜里的不同配料还得按顺序吃啊？
E: Hey, I just don't get it. It's odd enough to eat lying down, and now I have to consume the ingredients in a specific order in a single dish!?

C: 在顺应时代需求的基础上，对传统美食文化做出改良与推广——这就是我的人生目标。
E: My goal is to preserve and modernize traditional food culture while keeping pace with the new world.

C: 人的大脑在理解一些事情时，会根据已经捕捉的信息进行理解，这是正常现象。安心闭上眼睛，我为你施一些加天空的赐福，过一小会，就起好来啦！
E: The human brain tends to fill in the gaps when processing information, based on what information we already have — it's a natural phenomenon. Close your eyes and relax, I'll grant you a blessing of Sky, and soon, you'll be feeling better!

C: {NICKNAME}退化——法吉娜圣兽小海豹！
E: {NICKNAME} regresses — The baby seal, sacred beast of Phagousa!

C: 哈哈，倒也不必较真！俗话说，「矫枉必须过正」——要是没有我们站在风俗的另一端，圣城奥赫玛，恐怕难免要变得过于神圣…那住着多难受啊？
E: Haha, no need to get all serious! Like they say, "when you push something, you gotta push it far." Without us standing on the other side of morality's scales, the holy city Okhema would become far too holy... and that'd be a pain to live in, don't you think?

C: 别误会——我不缺钱。事实上，我们家在{RUBY_B#上面}黎明云崖{RUBY_E#}的庄园一切如旧；而且，通过这几年的教育，那些仆人也学会了不去关心他们的主人身在何方。
E: Don't get me wrong: I'm not hurting for money. In fact, our family's mansion in the {RUBY_B#up above}Dawncloud{RUBY_E#} hasn't changed. Over the years, our servants have also learned to not care about where their masters may be.

C: 啊，外面的事吗？其实老身也知道，这年头除了{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}，四下里的确是乱得很。那个黑潮更了不得，哗地一下就淹过去，除了随身细软，那是什么也带不出来。
E: The outside world? Well, I know it's pretty chaotic out there everywhere except in {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}, and that black tide is a real menace. In the blink of an eye, it can swallow a whole city, and you'll barely have enough time to run for your life.

C: 失乡人啊，你的前路应往何方？\n黑潮汹涌，混沌肆虐生死惶惶
E: Homeless, where should you find your way?\nIn black tide and despair, where shadows play.

C: 「荒野支离，纷争的铁蹄粉碎明日的希冀；家园破碎，空洞的眼眶盈满冰冷的泪滴……」
E: "Homes razed, lifeless eyes shedding icy tears. In a shattered world where hope disappears..."

C: 听着哗啦啦的水声，很多理不清的思绪都会迎刃而解。代价就是经常被管理员念叨：「消极怠工，小心塞纳托斯上身」。
E: Myriad knotted thoughts will undo themselves when I listen to its constant splashing barrage. The only price I have to pay is the manager's constant yammering: "Keep slacking off and Thanatos shall take you away."

C: 云石天宫的历史能追溯到几千个光历年前——对外是这么说的，实际上应该没有这么久。但另一方面，这反倒更加凸显了建造者们的才华。
E: We claim that the Marmoreal Palace's history dates back to several thousand Light Calendar years, but its history is technically shorter than that. The fact that it's younger than as claimed has only highlighted the talent of its builders.

C: 当生存的危机悬于头顶，是求饶苟延，还是拔剑赴战，即使你不是悬锋人，想必也能给出正确的回答。
E: When a threat to your survival looms over your head, you have but two options: To beg for mercy and buy time, or to draw your sword and go into battle. I'm sure you do not have to be a Kremnoan to know the right answer.

C: 这也无可厚非，因为我是圣城的「入殓师」，曾经…更是哀地里亚的督战圣女。在大家眼中，我就是行走的死亡使者。
E: They cannot be blamed for this. I am the "mortician" in the holy city. I was also once... the holy maiden who oversaw warfare in Aidonia. In their eyes, I am no more than a walking envoy of death.

C: 啊，抱歉，一不留神我居然这么多话，耽误了阁下好多时间。我很少有机会能和朋友如此畅聊…真的很谢谢你。
E: Ah, my apologies. I got caught up in my stories and ended up rambling. I'm so sorry to have wasted your time. I rarely get an opportunity to speak so freely with a friend... I am truly grateful.

C: 只有喝下它，我才有勇气四处开巡回演讲。哎…虽然它喝起来无色无味，但这它的神奇毋庸置疑。
E: Drinking it is the only thing that grants me the courage to go on tour with my speeches. Ah... Though it may seem unremarkable when you taste it, its magic is undeniable.

C: 诶呦喂，怎么一个两个总问这个。不如这样，异乡的年轻人，老婆子我先给你讲个故事吧：
E: Ahh, hey — why do people keep asking that? How about this, then, youngster from a faraway land: Why don't I tell you a little story...

C: 得了吧，用不着吓成这样，我一向懒得给自己找麻烦，所以也没打算举报你。但是你再和我耗下去……
E: Now, there's no need to get so worked up. I do not make a habit of making trouble for myself, that's why I do not plan on reporting you. However, if you keep wasting time here...

C: 此时一位卫兵恰巧路过，见男子神情激愤，便上前稍作盘问。岂料男子情急之下竟试图袭击这名守卫，于是不出片刻，男子便被制服押走。
E: At this very moment, a guard happens to pass by. Seeing the man's anger, they approach to ask him what is going on. Unexpectedly, the man tries to launch a desperate attack on the guard and is quickly restrained and taken away.

C: 不用了，没兴趣。
E: No thanks, not interested.

C: …这话本身没错，但窗户只是用来看风景的。能从窗户翻出去的狠人，从来都是少数中的少数。
E: ...That's true in and of itself, but windows are only for appreciating the view. The ruthless few who can climb out that window are a minority indeed.

C: 不过，最有意思的还是一个老掉牙的传言。说是当大地泰坦开始沉睡的时候，大地兽就会闹腾。就好像在家长睡觉后偷偷恶作剧一样。
E: However, the most interesting one is also the ancient rumor: It claims that when the Earth Titan begins to slumber, the dromases will make a ruckus, like how children can prank the household after the parent has gone to sleep.

C: 能聊聊吗？
E: Can we talk?

C: 而我要教你的第一课，就是别被荣耀束缚……
E: And my first lesson for you is to not allow yourself to be bound by honor...

C: 悬锋军视「在战场上战死」为最高荣耀，「凯旋」次之。「宁战死，毋荣归」是他们最喜欢的口号，而在床榻上了却一生则是最为人所不齿的结局。
E: The soldiers of Kremnos see "death in battle" as the greatest honor. "Triumphant return" is a close second. They like to say: "valorous death before glorious return," believing that peacefully passing away on your deathbed is the most contemptible ending.

C: 你是什么东西？
E: What are you?

C: 神性、王威、人情，那些血锈，许多异味交杂。
E: Divinity, majesty, compassion, there are. Rusted blood, many strange scents, mixed they are.

C: 为什么会选择开店？
E: Why did you choose to set up a shop?

C: 哎，我只能安慰自己，这份永恒的清醒能让我更好服务迷醉的客人，也算是对法吉娜大人的一种侍奉了。
E: *sigh* I can only comfort myself with the thought that this eternal sobriety helps me better serve inebriated guests — a form of servitude to Phagousa, at least.

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 委屈哭泣…
E: Wail like you're wronged...

C: 帕西提亚的脸上似乎蒙了些阴霾。她垂着头，轻吁了一口气。
E: Pasithea's face appears to be clouded by a gray haze. Her head is bowed, and she sighs lightly.

C: 能够享受这份足够顺遂的「无聊」，不也是一种幸福吗？
E: To be able to enjoy this fortuitous "humdrum." Is that not a form of joy as well?

C: 你不禁祈祷——别破，别破，别破……
E: You can't help but pray — don't break, don't break, don't break...

C: 那么，你想听闻哪段天外之音呢？
E: So, what kind of celestial echo would you like to listen to?

C: 「好帅的头盔！」
E: "What a cool helmet!"

C: 时间之外，当然有物存在。我们度量时间，能从一数到十，正是因为在数到后面的数时，前面的数并未消失。有数在先，才能有数在后。
E: Of course some objects exist outside of time. When we measure time, we can count from one to ten precisely because the earlier numbers still exist by the time I have reached the later numbers. I must count the earlier numbers to reach the latter.

C: 哟，难得有给悬锋人说好话的。
E: Wow, it's rare to hear someone speaking well of the Kremnoans.

C: 喔，你人还怪好的咯。
E: Oh... you're surprisingly kind.

C: 我、我哪有羡慕他们！我正在准备树庭的考试，我要成为学者，才不要做这种肌肉发达，头脑空空的人！
E: I—I'm not jealous of them! I'm preparing for the Grove exams. I want to become a scholar, not someone with big muscles and an empty head!

C: 面前的人向你搭话，他一侧的胳膊被一只栩栩如生的义手代替，看上去十分独特。
E: The person in front of you strikes up a conversation. One of their arms has been replaced with an extremely lifelike prosthetic — it looks very unique.

C: 剩下的就是进一步测试，得找位有活力的年轻人帮我测测，孩子，你乐见帮我这个忙吗？
E: Now, the rest is just further testing, and I need a young, energetic person to help me out. Kid, would you like to lend me a hand with this?

C: 那有什么「大发明」吗？
E: Any "great inventions"?

C: 除了那件辅助装具之外，我还在研究人的眼睛，想着什么时候摸透了，能做个真正能看见东西的假眼睛，但总也不顺利……
E: In addition to that support device, I've also been studying the human eye, hoping that one day I'll figure it out and create a real prosthetic eye that can actually see, but it's always been unsuccessful...

C: 你将自己和同伴们这一路的开拓之旅，「略加修饰」了一下，讲给了眼前兴致盎然的男人。
E: You "slightly polished" your trailblazing expedition experiences with your companions and told them to the exuberant man.

C: 真稀奇，你走过的那些「城邦」，我可是一个都没听说过呢。
E: How strange. I have never heard of any of these cities you've been to.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 你认错人啦。
E: You must have mistaken me for someone else.

C: 啊，界域定锚…
E: Ah, the Space Anchor...

C: 不过，能让您感到愉悦，也是我的荣幸。
E: But, it is my honor for you to have felt joy.

C: 是吧！可惜成为园丁需要很长时间的培训，不然，我得要让所有奥赫玛的人们都来亲身领略奇美拉的可爱之处！
E: I know, right! A pity it takes a lot of training to become a Gardener, otherwise I'd make sure everyone in Okhema gets a chance to experience how totally adorable chimeras are!

C: 没什么感兴趣的。
E: Nothing that interests me.

C: 那太好了，就让我从黑潮的威胁开始说起吧。
E: Wonderful, I'll start from the threat of the black tide.

C: 你是说鲜血蜜酿？哈哈…嗝…告诉你一个吓人的秘密——以前这玩意可不是石榴做的。是真是假我不知道。
E: You mean this sanguine honey brew? Haha... *hic* ...Lemme tell you a horrifying secret — this stuff didn't use to be made from pomegranates, though I wouldn't know if this was true.

C: 哟，这位勇士，看你面相年轻，想必也是来参加王的试炼吧？
E: Ooh, you look rather young, warrior. I suppose you're here to join the King's Trial?

C: 怎样，是不是感觉力量从脚底板涌上了额头？这可是老奥卢斯特别调制的配方，保准你吃一顿热乎一整天。
E: How was it, ya feel your strength surging from your soles to your head? This is Old Aulus' special recipe, guaranteed to power you through the day with just one hearty meal.

C: 光芒散去后，一只可爱又奇特的生物出现在了你面前！
E: As the light dims, a cute but strange creature appears before you!

C: 目前我觉得最大的变化是——我开始有了自己的想法，就像现在，我可不想这么扫兴地跑去扫地，我只想陪着你。
E: The biggest change I've noticed — I've started forming my own thoughts. Like now, I don't want to just sweep floors in this dreary mood, I'd rather stay here with you.

C: 话是这么说，但是他都已经延期退役好几次了，每次都说部队离不开他，不知道的还以为他是将军呢。
E: He keeps postponing his retirement, saying the unit can't function without him. Honestly, you'd think he was a general or something.

C: 我…来此觐见圣女，希望能领受泰坦指示。
E: I... I came to see the Holy Maiden. I wish for guidance from the Titans.

C: 我一心只为雅努萨波利斯，客观上也确实需要替自己赢取些钱财造势，让我能在教会中为命运泰坦们做更多的事。
E: I am truly dedicated to Janusopolis alone. It is an objective fact that I also need to earn a certain amount of fortune and renown for myself that I am able to do more for the Fate Titans within the church.

C: 啊呀，又见到你了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，我就说，今天也是不错的一天呢。
E: Ah, there you are again, {F#my girl}{M#my boy}. I knew today was going to be good.

C: 考虑到这里是「过去」的空间，稍微透露些应该也不要紧，但你并不了解他所熟知的那位圣女，那么……
E: Considering this is the "past," revealing a little should be fine, but you don't know which Holy Maiden he's referring to, so...

C: 想听听缇宁经历的故事。
E: I want to hear about Trinnon's experiences.

C: 握个手试试？
E: How about a handshake?

C: 你们的大表演家，那刻夏。
E: The Great Performer among you, Anaxa.

C: 用棺材。
E: With coffins.

C: 尽管我不算个好学生，但我很喜欢那刻夏老师…如果不用考虑我那糟糕的成绩，我还是想继续待在树庭里钻研学业。
E: Even though I wasn't the best student, I really liked Professor Anaxa. If it weren't for my poor grades, I'd have loved to stay in the Grove and focus on my studies.

C: 有没有什么元老院的黑幕？
E: Any scandals of the Council of Elders you can share?

C: 比如说…信徒担心学者的研究让城市神秘不再，学者担心勇士的冒险为城市树立了过多敌人；勇士又讨厌弄潮儿的奢华，弄潮儿厌恶信徒的不思进取…诸如此类。
E: For example, believers fear that scholars' research will strip the city of its mystery. Scholars worry that warriors' adventures bring too many enemies to the city. Warriors resent trendsetters for their decadence, while trendsetters despise believers for their complacency.

C: 嗯嗯，我完全理解了。
E: I completely understand.

C: 需求明确。
E: A demand proclaimed.

C: 你见过其他祭司吗？
E: Have you met other priests?

C: 无需忧心，我的「店铺」已经在筹备中了。虽说我的侍从一直念叨「进货也需要钱」之类的怪话，但这都是小事。我相信，一切很快会步上正轨。
E: Worry not, my "store" is already being set up. Though my attendant keeps uttering strange things like "We need funds for the inventory," I pay these trivial matters no mind. I believe everything will soon fall into place.

C: 没事了，祝你好运。
E: That's all from me. Good luck.

C: 衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 我想起来了…有位织者一见月亮就格外欢喜，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>适合观月的台阶尽头</color>，欣赏双月同天的景象呢。
E: I remember now... A weaver is overjoyed at the sight of the moon. It is admiring the sight of two moons in the sky at the <color=#dbc291ff>end of the moon-viewing steps</color>.

C: 然后怪物就出现了！多亏轮班的卫士们正好在泡澡，再加上「虹彩色的薄膜」阻挡了怪物的攻击，大家才能及时撤离。
E: Then the creatures appeared! Thanks to the guards who were bathing during their shift, plus the "rainbow membrane" that blocked the creatures' attacks, everyone managed to evacuate in time.

C: 这更可笑了——看看四周吧，世界在破碎，时间也早已脱轨。而我们呢，在诡辩中等死。你的灵魂一定喝蜜酿喝昏头了，才想要实现自己的这样的潜能。
E: Preposterous! Look around — the world shatters, time derails. Yet here we await death through sophistry. Your soul must be pickled in honey brew to seek such actualization!

C: 太可怕了。
E: That's truly disturbing.

C: 呵呵，你和恩维尔一个反应。
E: Hehe, you and Avilius have the same reaction.

C: 「在这映不出容貌的水中，有全世界所有人的面孔。」
E: In this water that mirrors no face, all the world's countenances reside.

C: 悬锋古语么？给我看看吧，我姑且还算精通。
E: Ancient Kremnoan language? Show me — I'm rather well-versed in it.

C: 不怎么好，但也没差到哪去。
E: Not great, not terrible.

C: 抱歉，艾格勒并不欢迎金丝的探访，没有记忆残晶，金丝无法违逆它的权柄。
E: Sorry, Aquila does not welcome the visit of the golden thread. Without the Memory Crystal Shard, the golden thread cannot defy their authority.

C: 哎…又摆弄你那些个黄金战争时期出土的宝贝呢。实话说了吧，就你那爱不释手的小瓦罐，我估计多半是披索他爷爷当年用过的腌菜坛。
E: Hah... Messing with those ancient treasures from the Chrysos War again, weren't you? Be honest, that little clay jar you're so obsessed with? I'd bet it's just Piso's granddad's old pickle crock.

C: 呵呵，有志气当然是好事。不过…我还听说，神悟树庭崇尚辩论与独立思考，学术风气极为自由，各种惊世骇俗的理论层出不穷。
E: Hehe, that's the spirit. But... I've also heard the Grove of Epiphany places great value on open debate and independent thinking. The academic scene is extremely free — so much so that bizarre and radical theories pop up all the time.

C: 不要敲了迷！这个点正是大家打盹的时候。
E: Stop ringing that, mem! This is prime nap time for everyone.

C: 与此身躯一并继承的，还有感知织者的能力，以及搜集若虫的使命。想必贵客对我往昔的作用印象深刻。
E: In this form, I inherit the ability to sense weavers and the duty to collect nymphs. I'm sure you recall my former purpose.

C: 衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 没问题！闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
E: Absolutely! And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

C: 什…什么边角料！我可是逐火军的将领，凯撒亲封的冬霖爵！保留后半句就可以了。
E: Wh—What leftover! I am the general of the Flame-Chase Army, instated Dux Brumalis by the Imperator herself! Just keep the second half.

C: 才、才不是呢， {NICKNAME}阁下！情诗，这段日子里写得够多啦，也不能忘了本职工作呢……
E: N—No, it's not, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}! I've written enough love poems these days. I can't slack off on my job...

C: 将来…我没有仔细想过啊。或者说，其实我不、不大敢奢望梦想中的将来吧。
E: My future... I haven't given it much thought. Or rather, I d—dared not to hope for the future I desire.

C: 聊聊你的将来吧。
E: Let's talk about your future.

C: 哎哟，这柱子，还，还会说话，你跟本狮，咱俩，是，是不是老乡啊吼。
E: Oh, th—this pillar can even speak. Do we come from the same homeland?

C: 讲讲蜜酿的功效？
E: Tell me about the positive effects of honey brew?

C: 嗯…有位织者喜欢沉底。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>眠宫长廊的池底</color>，享受被水淹没的感觉呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who enjoys sinking. The golden thread brings tidings: They are lying at <color=#dbc291ff>the bottom of the Slumbering Palace Corridor's pool</color>, relishing the feeling of being submerged.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 「虽然当你看到这封信的时候，我或许已经离开了这座村庄……」
E: "By the time you read this letter, I may have already left the village..."

C: 「怀揣关乎身边重要之人的珍贵回忆，坚定地向前迈进，直到再度相会时，听到一句久违的问好♪」
E: "Cherish memories of those dear, and press ever forward. Someday, when we meet again, may it begin with a long-awaited hello. ♪"

C: 辛苦你了，大哥，五次比平均水平要少了，恭喜你啊！
E: Good work, big bro. That's still below the average retest records, so congrats!

C: 生活的意义…大祭司大人也是明了此般，才会令我们迁来刻法勒的圣城吧。
E: The meaning of life... The High Priest probably understood this as well, which was why he bade us move to Kephale's holy city.

C: 哼，出发前信誓旦旦地说能找到应对黑潮的方法，结果就带了些破石头回来？
E: Hmph, they solemnly swore to find a way to counter the black tide before they left, and now they return with a bunch of useless stones?

C: 阿米库斯，你得学会和大地兽相处，在外面冒险的时候，很多事情都要指望它们。
E: Amycus, you have to learn how to get along with dromases properly. You'll have to rely on them a lot when you're out adventuring.

C: 这个秘方我也听过，但我记得那根本就不是用来喝的，是用来泡澡的。等等，你那什么表情，你该不会也跟着学了吧…
E: I've heard of that trick before, it's not a recipe for drinks but for preparing a bath. Waitasec, the look on your face... Don't tell me you did the same thing...

C: 你听到了清亮的弹唱声——
E: You hear a resonating string instrument performance—
...Huh?

C: 下次一定！
E: Next time! Promise!

C: 带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…
E: Taking care of a grandson is way harder than just taking care of your own son...

C: 休假时候，该做什么呢？
E: What should I do during my break?

C: 咕咕！新生里果然卧虎藏龙。
E: Hoot hoot! There are indeed hidden talents among new students.

C: 咕咕——好好学习，可是成为厉害的折纸小鸟的第一步哦。
E: Hoot hoot... Study hard. That's the first step to becoming a strong origami bird.

C: 就是你我二人脚下站定的位置，黑塔科员向「反物质军团」组织反击的据点。
E: It is the very ground on which we stand. The stronghold from which the space station researchers fought back against the Antimatter Legion.

C: 我理解你的意思，之前也有很多人说过类似的话。
E: I understand what you mean. Many people have told me the same thing.

C: 我还有一些问题想要问…
E: I still got some questions for you...

C: 我没啥文化，不像是古恩看得明白愚人戏。我大半辈子都搞机修，和载具称兄道弟，老了也只会折腾点这个。
E: I never got a proper education. I wouldn't understand Fool's Play like Gunn does. My life's work has been all about repairing and handling machines and vehicles, and now that I'm old, that's still the only thing I do.

C: 你认为莱斯莉喜欢洛奇吗？
E: Do you think Lesley likes Rocky?

C: 乖乖小年轻，你在忙什么？有什么事情需要我帮助吗？
E: Kiddo, what are you up to? Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 你是谁？请支持安提西尼！
E: Who are you? Please support Antisthenes!

C: 噢，我的瑟希斯啊，我从没有见过那样大的洞，这太惊虫了…
E: Oh my Cerces, I've never seen a hole that big before, this is absolutely bug-tastic...

C: 不过，如果这个洞是设计给虫的…
E: But if this hole was designed for bugs...

C: 感谢你回应了我的请求，贵客。在虫儿齐鸣时，我在众多预言中寻得了其中一则的灵感。
E: Thank you for answering my request, honored guest. As the insects chirped in unison, I found inspiration in one of the many prophecies.

C: 奇拉拉要何去何从呢？
E: What will become of Chirara?

C: 怎么说话呢你，在你眼中，它是张破椅子；可在我的眼中，它是世上最伟大的小窝。再说了，你那箩筐又好到哪去……
E: Watch your mouth! To you, it may be just some ratty old chair, but to me, it's the greatest little nest in the world. Besides, your junk basket isn't any better...

C: 哪来的图纸…等等，你又想整什么幺蛾子了？！
E: Where'd you get that blueprint... Wait, what kind of crazy scheme are you cooking up now!?

C: …虽然没太听懂你具体在说什么，就权当您的赞美吧。
E: ...Well, I don't quite understand what you were saying, but I'll take it as a compliment.

C: 所以，你是在教他做生意？
E: So, you're teaching him how to do business?

C: 原来两位也认识吗？那就更该来一场宴会了！交给我们姐妹俩，你们就放心吧——保证歌舞不歇，秘酿不限，让大家都玩得尽兴！
E: So you two know each other, too? That makes a party even more necessary! Just leave it to us sisters. We'll keep the music playing, the dancing going, and the ambrosia flowing until everyone's had their fill of fun!

C: 厄琉斯，我的厄琉斯…即便黑潮与死亡也无法将我们分开……
E: Aelius, my beloved Aelius... Not even the black tide and death could do us part...

C: 刚才那句话也还给你：让你这样道貌岸然的虫豸当祭司，简直有辱命运三泰坦的威严！
E: I could throw those words right back at you. Letting a sanctimonious worm like you serve as a priest disgraces the dignity of the Three Titans of Fate!

C: 驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大做了个后空翻，空中转体三周半。
E: Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas pulls off a triple backflip with a half twist.

C: 期待你们的演出。
E: Looking forward to your performance.

C: 那我呢，总不会又让我跑腿吧？
E: What about me? Don't tell me I'm running errands again?

C: 你怎么知道的？
E: How do you know that?

C: 我收到了一封「遐蝶小姐亲启」的邀请函，上面写了手工制品交流会的时间和地点，还盖上了元老院的火漆印。
E: I received an invitation addressed "Dear Miss Castorice," with the time and location of a handicraft exchange meeting, sealed with the Council of Elders' wax seal.

C: 但愿它也能让你平安归来。
E: I hope it brings you back safely, too.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 嗯…有位织者遍寻天下奇珍。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>那与树相融的巨剑脚下</color>，鉴赏宝物的价值呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's searching far and wide for rare treasures. The golden thread brings tidings: They're at <color=#dbc291ff>the foot of that giant sword entwined with the tree</color>, appraising the value of treasures.

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 不怕你笑话，我曾经安然过了八年这样「无聊」的生活。两点一线，朝九晚五，一度甚至以为自己可以永远这样生活下去。
E: I don't care if you laugh, but I once lived eight boring years like this. Just a straight line from home to work and back again, working from nine to five. I once thought I could live that way forever.

C: 你的表情…怎么，有这么令人意外吗？
E: Your expression... What? Is it really that surprising?

C: 我超喜欢的！
E: I love it!

C: 他们是一个魔法学院的同学…
E: They are a trio that went to a wizarding school...

C: 咋就不行了？
E: What do you mean by that?

C: 这助教当得可真辛苦…
E: Being an assistant instructor isn't easy...

C: 嗯？怎么想起来问这个？
E: Hmm? Why the sudden interest?

C: 没什么事了。
E: It's nothing.

C: 噢，对了。好像是得把空载的矿车送到这里……
E: Oh, right. I think we take the empty carts here...

C: 老大吩咐过我，要考虑每位客人的喜好，所以客人你要是有忌口的话，记得提前跟我说喔！
E: Boss instructed me to take note of the preference of each guest, so if there's anything that you need to avoid, do let me know beforehand!

C: 什么也没有发生，这只是一台平平无奇的电脑。
E: Nothing happened. It's just a normal computer terminal.

C: 「嗯，再见啦。」
E: "Okay, seeya later."

C: 不过，你倒是来得正好。鄙人刚完成了这幅风景画——贝洛伯格的远景——我准备给它起名为《晨曦》！
E: But you've got great timing. I've just finished with this landscape — a vista overlooking Belobog — and I'm gonna call it Ray of Dawn!

C: 你来了，{NICKNAME}。这次又准备收集<color=#dbc291ff>「贝洛伯格风景画」</color>了，对吗？
E: Hi there, {NICKNAME}. You're here to collect <color=#dbc291ff>Belobog Landscape Paintings</color> again, right?

C: 啊——肚子饿了…画不出来……
E: Oh — I'm so hungry... I can't paint anymore...

C: 哎，行吧行吧。反正我也画完了——把说好的稿费交给我，你就可以带着他要的画走人。
E: Ack, fine then. In any case, the painting's finished — hand over the payment, and you can leave with his painting.

C: 哈哈，我懂你。那咱们也别折腾，干脆就叫它《黄金歌剧院》吧。
E: Haha, I get it. Then let's spare ourselves the trouble and just name it Golden Theater.

C: 你有些疑惑这样普通的东西为什么会出现在旧照片上，或许是你的考古水平不够，看不出它隐含的价值。
E: You're slightly confused about why such an ordinary item thing would be captured in those old photos, but perhaps that's just because you don't have the archeological knowledge to realize its hidden value.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们刚刚在整理展品的时候发现了一张藏宝图。
E: {NICKNAME}, we just stumbled across a treasure map while going through the collection.

C: 与上一件宝藏一样，你看不出来它的宝贵之处。如果旁人路过，只会觉得它是一件垃圾。
E: Like the last treasure, you cannot see the value in this. To a spectator, this would merely look like a pile of trash.

C: {NICKNAME}！太好了，我正急着找帮手呢！
E: {NICKNAME}! Great, I'm desperate for help!

C: 「可她肩上的担子实在过于沉重——她试图从乱线中编织出冬城的命运，却也被它压垮。她渐渐变得无情而寡欲，但人们依旧紧密团结在她的身边。」
E: "But the burden on her shoulders was too heavy. She tried to weave the fate of Everwinter City from chaos, but was crushed by it. She gradually became ruthless and indifferent, but people still rallied closely around her."

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。我与其他筑城者将仔细考虑你的意见，最终定稿。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. The other Architects and I will carefully consider your opinion before finalizing the draft.

C: {NICKNAME}…你说，<color=#dbc291ff>「愚者希莉儿」</color>画像的描述与事实不符？
E: {NICKNAME}... Did you say that the description of <color=#dbc291ff>Cyrille the Fool's</color> portrait deviated from the truth?

C: 这里似乎摆放着博物馆志愿导览员的简历。如果你想，你也可以翻阅看看。
E: The resumes of the museum volunteer guides seem to be placed here. You may peruse them if you want.

C: 笨重粗犷的操作杆台座。它能用来驱动许多机械结构，而你也确实如是做了——主要是那些升降台和矿车轨道。
E: A bulky and rugged operating lever base. It can be used to drive many mechanical constructs, and many of which you used — mainly of elevators and mine cart tracks.

C: 巨大的矿脉俨然岩层下的另一轮太阳——它照亮了地下矿区、上下层的街道，以及整座贝洛伯格。
E: The massive mineral vein is like an underground sun buried in stone — it illuminated the mines, the streets in both the Overworld and the Underworld, and the entirety of Belobog.

C: 一台精致的放映机，出自黄金歌剧院的慷慨借用。
E: An exquisite projector, on generous loan from the Golden Theater.

C: 一台民用放映机，比黄金歌剧院出借的款式要简陋。
E: A civilian projector, cruder than the one on loan from the Golden Theater.

C: 放心——它只是一尊模型，应该不会引发你幻听的症状。
E: Don't worry, it's just a model. It shouldn't cause you to have any auditory hallucinations... probably.

C: 她也不允许其他人去找幽灵星槎——说什么「不过是些怪力乱神，讨论它们只是在浪费时间」。
E: She doesn't allow the others to investigate it either... To her, it's "just some supernatural stuff, and it's a waste of time to discuss it."

C: 你们怀疑我被岁阳寄体了？
E: You suspect that I'm being possessed by a heliobus?

C: 走，追上去！
E: Come on. Let's catch up to her!

C: 你把虎克放了进来…
E: You moved Hook into the picture...

C: 有什么关系嘛！外出看诊的名医，也会对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方了如指掌啊。雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！
E: Yeah, so what? I go out all the time to see patients, so I know the food establishments around here like the back of my hand. I'm the best tour guide around!

C: 你要是想要激进的，就得尝尝「苏打豆汁儿」了。
E: If you're really feeling adventurous, you could try some mung bean soda.

C: 所以，码头真的还不上租金了吗？
E: So, is it true that the Merchant Guild can't pay back the lease?

C: 跟公司打赌的，是这位女侠。
E: This noble Cloud Knight here is the one who made the bet with the IPC.

C: 对呀，万一金人巷商会还上欠款了，学狗叫的就该是他们了。
E: Right — if the Merchant Guild pay back what they owe, the only one barking will be that IPC stooge.

C: 我们现在就去打开他的快递，肯定有鬼。
E: Let's open that package right here, right now — then we'll see what he's hiding!

C: …对、对不起。
E: ...Sorry, sir.

C: 金人巷码头运输效率低下、成交量低，根本没有创造价值，这就是经营不善的证据。
E: The inefficient shipping and low volume of transactions at the Aurum Alley dock — which does not create any value at all — are clear evidence of poor management.

C: 这件事应该问问商户们。
E: We should ask the merchants about this.

C: 这就是「心诚则灵」吗？
E: We convinced him!

C: 加入我们，我们让你包赚不赔！
E: Join us and profit!

C: 但是你想要的繁荣，与我们想要的不同？
E: Since we share the same passion, where is it that we disagree?

C: 没错，公司接手金人巷之后，他们可能关闭「同功坊」，而我们就不会。
E: That's right. The IPC will close down Artistry Hardware if they take over. We would never do that.

C: 这真的是正向宣传吗？
E: Are you trying to scare people away?

C: 金人巷越来越繁华……
E: The Aurum Alley is getting more and more flourishing...

C: 哟，哟，哟！
E: Yo yo yo...!

C: 可以，跟我去找小秘书吧。
E: Fine. Follow me. We're off to see the secretary.

C: 朋友，你这样说就有些不信任我了。
E: My friend, you don't sound like you trust me when you say that.

C: 我不想为难你，你把东西放下转身离开，否则，别怪我手段强硬了。
E: I don't want to trouble you, so just put the "goods" down, turn around, and walk away. Otherwise, don't blame me if I start playing hardball.

C: 怎么还有人不要香菜的……
E: Why do some people hate coriander...

C: 忙碌了半晌，你切身体会到了金人巷小吃街游人如织，往来不绝。
E: After a long period of hard work, you can personally feel that Aurum Alley is indeed pumping with throngs of tourists.

C: 但这不是我给她开病假证明的理由。
E: But that's not why I gave her a medical certificate.

C: 反正她只是个监工罢了，又不会下场干活。
E: Anyway, she's just a supervisor and would never roll her sleeves up and get her hands dirty.

C: 如果是这样的话，我倒是不想连累小天老板…我再想想别的法子吧。
E: If that's so, then I don't want to get Little Tian in trouble... I'll have to come up with something else.

C: 码头已经还上了。
E: We've already paid back the lease.

C: 什、什么？！那个老古董…仙舟人不是一直宣扬什么讲义气吗？我给他那么多钱，他转眼就把我卖了！可恶啊——
E: Wh—What? That little... Aren't the Xianzhou people always preaching about righteousness? I gave him all that money, and he sold me out in a heartbeat! Darn it...

C: 你注意到霄翰神情中有一丝动摇，这些话里肯定有些混淆视听的部分。
E: You noticed a hint of wavering in Xiaohan's demeanor, indicating that there were likely some intentionally misleading elements within the words spoken.

C: …我小心翼翼地问这几位云骑来小店是做什么的，他们就说「别问，公务」。
E: ...I ever-so-carefully asked these Cloud Knights what they were doing at the store, and they said "No questions. Official business."

C: 是有问题，这导航的数据明显对不上……
E: Yeah, my navigation data is obviously buggy...

C: 守灵有事便先行一步了。
E: Shouling has other matters to attend to and shall take leave for now.

C: 重新定义课题实验。
E: You wanna redefine the whole concept of research itself?

C: 哎哟…哎哟冷死我了。都赖你！我在雪地里潜伏了好久，差一点就抓到他了……
E: Oh... oh dear... so cold. It's all your fault! I'd been hiding in the snow for so long and almost caught him...

C: 但是邻居奶奶说，最近街上不太平，好像有怪物。
E: But granny said it isn't safe on the streets, there might be monsters.

C: （而且这个「小宇宙时间隧道」理论…听上去总感觉有点耳熟？）
E: (And this "small universe time tunnel" theory... sounds familiar?)

C: 小朋友们
E: Children

C: 你是谁？为什么一直盯着我们？
E: Who are you? Why do you keep staring at us?

C: 那帮老家伙，居然说我之前已经提交过一份类似的论文，还全都是错别字，让我别再添乱了！
E: Those old geezers said I had already submitted a similar paper and that it was full of typos. They said I should stop creating trouble for them!

C: 听起来不错，我想试试！
E: Sounds good, I'd like to try it!

C: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
E: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

C: 从未离开列车的帕姆
E: Pom-Pom, who can never leave the Express

C: 一周前，当上典狱长的石头老板宣布将苏乐达列为禁品——当时你可是愤怒到对空气挥拳、险些打坏吊灯啊。
E: A week ago, Boss Stone became the Prison Warden and listed SoulGlad as contraband. You flipped out over that decision so much that you kept punching the air and nearly broke the chandelier.

C: 结果…结果他们拿到积木以后都变得疯疯癫癫的，滴答，我已经收到好多宾客的投诉了！
E: But... But they all turned wonky after receiving the building blocks. Tick-tock, I've received too many guest complaints already!

C: 自从哈努兄弟用苏乐达拉拢了数个区划的囚犯后，你们的队伍一天比一天壮大起来。
E: Ever since Brother Hanu used SoulGlad to rope in prisoners from several areas, your team has been getting stronger and stronger by the day.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 明显是后期加工的…
E: Clearly, it's post-production special effects...

C: 给它点教训。
E: (Show them what you've got.)

C: 在过去，它们的情绪还正常的时候，都是相当乖巧懂事的孩子，很讨人喜欢。
E: When things were all good in the past, they were a bunch of lovely and sensible kids.

C: 我、我很无辜的呀。谁叫那个收音机…突然发出那么大的噪音，震得我的小心脏生疼生疼的，脚一滑，手一抖，就摔地上了。我也是受害者呜呜。
E: I—I'm innocent. That radio just randomly started blaring out loud noise. I was startled and slipped. My grasp on the radio loosened, and then it dropped. *sob* I'm a victim too.

C: 不管在哪，我都会找到你。
E: Wherever you are, I'll find you.

C: 新来的调饮师！我们去外面找舒翁吧！要是能帮上她的忙就更好了汪！
E: Hey, new drinksmith! Let's go outside and find Siobhan! It'd be great if we could help her out! Woof!

C: 汪！快看，是舒翁！旁边那个人好像在哪见……
E: Woof! Look, it's Siobhan! And the person next to her... I think I've met her before...

C: …别担心，忘了最初的表演课是谁教你的了？我当然会有分寸。
E: ...Don't worry. You haven't forgotten who taught you the basics of acting, have you? I will be careful.

C: 你在说什么蠢话？我从来没想过要抛弃你们。
E: What nonsense are you even talking about!? I never wanted to abandon you guys.

C: 哎呀，该不会是害怕说错了什么，更加激怒它们的情绪吧？
E: Is it because you're afraid of saying the wrong thing and making them even angrier?

C: 这是我的私心，你不觉得列车长很可爱吗?
E: That's just my personal preference. Don't you think the conductor is cute?

C: 不是你自己吗？
E: Didn't you send it yourself?

C: 被「秩序」压抑了欲望，躲得再久也不会有「闷」这种情感的。
E: With the Order suppressing your desires, a human won't feel "bored" no matter how long they spend holed up in hiding.

C: 究竟心里想的是秩序，还是自己的利益呢？
E: Were they thinking of Order... or self-interest?

C: （出示「钟表匠」的礼帽）
E: (Present the Watchmaker's hat)

C: 米莫萨不再理会你，她看着柜中的胶卷，陷入了沉思。
E: Mimosa no longer pays attention to you. She stares at the film reels in the cabinet, lost in thought.

C: 毕竟美梦是由家族管理的，即便是自由的匹诺康尼，也要遵守家族的底线。
E: After all, it's The Family that runs the Dreamscape. Even a place with as much freedom as Penacony has to go by its rules.

C: 抱歉，星穹列车的朋友，让你见笑了。
E: I'm sorry you have to go through this, my friend from Astral Express.

C: 你说得对……
E: You're right...

C: 再忍一下就拍完了…
E: Hang on a bit more. We're almost done filming...

C: 「但一路走来的同伴们也曾渴求着这份魔法。垃垃斯基希望让自己的垃圾袋内充满智慧、圆幕先生希望自己能有一颗稳定而开朗的内心，而气泡锂犬则希望获得比气泡更加真实的勇气。」
E: "But the companions who have traveled far also once thirsted for this magic. Lalasky hopes to fill its own trash bag with wisdom, Mr. Domescreen hopes to have a stable and carefree heart, and the Bubble Hound hopes to gain courage more reliable than a bubble."

C: 下次一定。
E: Next time, for sure.

C: 哇，有怪物，快帮帮小鸟！
E: Woah, monsters! Help the birdie now!

C: 出现吧——「经典苏乐达」——！
E: Come forth, Classic SoulGlad!!!

C: 天啊，噩耗来得如此突然，克劳克影业不如要了我的命吧！
E: No way, such terrible news and so soon. Clock Studios may as well just take my life and be done with me!

C: 是「星穹列车」！
E: The Astral Express!

C: 我再考虑一下。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 关于石头老板的原型。
E: About whom Boss Stone is based on.

C: 哼，哈努兄弟是美梦小镇的老大哥，在钟表小子的罗盘号抵达小镇之前，他就在带领镇民们反抗石头老板的暴政了。
E: Hmph, Brother Hanu was the top brass around Dreamville, leading the townsfolk to rise against Boss Stone before Clockie's Compass arrived in town.

C: 非常感谢大家的支持。
E: Thank you very much for all of your support.

C: （我没看错吧…那是……）
E: (Am I seeing things? Is that...)

C: 怎么这时候犯糊涂了…打起精神来，我们必须通过「盛会海选」的挑战，尽快进入匹诺康尼大剧院才行！
E: Why the sudden confusion? Stay sharp, we must pass the Festivity Auditions and enter the Penacony Grand Theater as soon as possible!

C: 前面的挑战一定很艰巨，我们去小吃摊补充些能量就出发吧！
E: The challenge ahead must be tough. Let's replenish our energy at the food stall and set off!

C: 欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的热砂盛典第一关：「戏梦奇战」！在这一关里，您可以选择「演技派」或「动作派」两种挑战。
E: Welcome to the first stage of SoulGlad™ Enterprises' Scorchsand Festival: Dreamplay Fantasia! In this stage, you can choose between two challenges: The School of Acting or School of Action.

C: 亲爱的朋友，欢迎光临「钟表匠」构造的美妙世界！在前方等待你们的，是钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟！
E: Dear friends, welcome to the enchanting universe created by the Watchmaker! Awaiting you is the morally dubious yet ever-charming character from the animated Clockie series — Hanu!

C: 据说，这些卡通人物的灵感都源于「钟表匠」的亲身经历。据钟表小子学家考证，现实中的哈努兄弟原型曾与「钟表匠」有着深厚的友谊，可谓是战友一般的存在。
E: It is said that these cartoon characters were inspired by the Watchmaker's own experiences. According to research by Clockie scholars, the original Hanu of reality shared a deep friendship with the Watchmaker, akin to comrades-in-arms.

C: 天哪，我第一次看见你蹲下。
E: Gosh, this is the first time I've ever seen you crouch down.

C: 又来…但没关系，我们已经完全习惯这支火箭筒了。
E: Here we go again... but no big deal, we're pretty handy with this bazooka now.

C: 啾！救救，救救啾！这家伙的身体也太烫了啾！
E: Tweet! Help, help help, tweet! This fella's body is boiling hot, tweet!

C: 但不管你怎么看，鄙人对这部作品的评价是：平庸至极，无聊透顶。
E: Regardless of your perception, I must say this about this art piece: Utterly mediocre, dreadfully dull.

C: 流萤
E: Firefly

C: 时间紧急，我们边走边吃吧！
E: Time is of the essence. Let's eat while we walk!

C: 螺丝咕姆，你怎么在这儿？
E: What brings you here, Screwllum?

C: 好嘞，走走走，我们这就去不夜侯！
E: Yeah! Alright, let's go! To the Sleepless Earl!

C: 仙舟和公司签署了互贸协议，这些人不敢随便造次，可这赌约倒是意料之外……
E: The Xianzhou and IPC signed a trade agreement, so those IPC people won't dare to cause any trouble. But I mean... a bet like this is quite unexpected...

C: 二位小师父请放心，你们可以不信我，但也要相信{F#她}{M#他}，我的好搭档！
E: Rest assured, masters, if not in me, at least place your faith in {F#her}{M#him}, my trusty sidekick!

C: 恭喜恭喜，恭喜你！
E: Yeah! Congratulations!

C: 而不是用这种肮脏的手段！
E: Instead of resorting to such despicable methods!

C: 你别赖别人，你不也被我打败了吗？
E: Hey, stop blaming others! Didn't you lose to me, too?

C: 我、我差一点就来晚了。
E: I—I was almost too late.

C: 银狼给我的要求是：「知己知彼，对手狗殆。」
E: Silver Wolf has told me: "Know yourself and know your enemy, and you'll never have to sleep in the doghouse."

C: 这怎么还能不记得呢？我瞧见你花大价钱买了「临终删除数据」服务，所以猜你存放在电脑里的东西一定很值得一看。
E: No idea, huh? I noticed you paid a hefty sum for the "end-of-life data deletion" service, so I'm guessing there must be something worth seeing.

C: 那你有什么建议吗？
E: So, any suggestions on what to do?

C: 哈——？！你又是谁啊，怎么，你们仙舟的人都这么喜欢不请自来吗？
E: Huh...!? Who do you think you are? Is it like a Xianzhou thing to just show up uninvited?

C: 所以，公司就不是你家！别再骗自己了。
E: Then the IPC isn't your family! Stop lying to yourself.

C: 我特意翘班出来，可不是来陪你写文章的，快点一起去打牌啦～快快快！搞快点！
E: I didn't skip work to watch you write a letter! Come on, let's play Celestial Jade together! Hurry up! Hurry up!
Eh!?

C: 别卖关子了。
E: Come on, don't keep me in suspense.

C: 那就麻烦你了，青雀。
E: I'm counting on you, Qingque.

C: 不好了，灵砂大人，你快看看三月七的情况。
E: Oh no, Master Lingsha! Please take a look at what's happened to March 7th!

C: 别担心，青雀小姐懂这么多歪理，肯定能帮到我的。
E: Don't worry Miss Qingque. With that twisted logic of yours, I know you'll be able to help me!

C: {NICKNAME}，看我光说了半天，你要不要实际上手试试啊？
E: Sorry, {NICKNAME}, I've been talking your ear off all this time. Would you like to give it a try for yourself?

C: {NICKNAME}，多谢你了。有了这些照片，我去收容那些忆质就方便多了。
E: Thank you so much, {NICKNAME}. These pictures will make collecting and containing the memoria much easier.

C: 宝力先生，让你见笑了。
E: I'm sorry about her, Mr. Pony.

C: 哇喔…没法想象。抱歉，曜青仙舟没什么人造雪景呢。
E: Oh wow... I can't imagine that. I'm sorry, the Xianzhou Yaoqing doesn't have much artificial snow.

C: 这听起来确实有些严重。
E: It sounds like your problem is getting serious.

C: 你可能已经在报纸上看到我们的广告了。有兴趣的话，可以参与一下。
E: You may have seen our ad we put out in the papers. You should join if you're interested.

C: 总之现在已经修复出来的内容就是这些了。我应该还能抢救出一些信息，不过需要几天时间。
E: Anyway, this is all the content that's been restored so far. I should be able to salvage some data, but I'll need a couple of days.

C: 这是所有部门里最小的一个？这、这真是难以想象……
E: This is the smallest of all departments? This... This is just unbelievable...

C: 那位医生让我在城里走走，多见见世面。
E: That doctor advised me to walk around the town, and see more of the sights.

C: 你…要挑战罗浮的守擂剑士？你要挑战…彦卿？这么看起来，咱们还挺有缘。
E: You... want to challenge the ringmaster of the Luofu? You want to challenge... Yanqing? It seems like our stars are aligned.

C: 卢卡，准备好对付波提欧了吗？
E: Luka, are you ready to go up against Boothill?

C: …我们的水平差得太远了。你知道吗，在靠近他时，我仿佛…看到了「死亡」！
E: ...He's way out of my league. I swear, getting near him, I felt like... I was staring "Death" in the face.

C: 你敢！
E: You dare!

C: 怎么样，准备好去展示你的美学了吗？
E: Are you ready to showcase your style?

C: 非常好！我果然没有看错人。你的技巧、智慧和勇气，都在彰显着身为武人的「纯美」。
E: Excellent! I wasn't wrong about you. Your skills, wisdom, and courage embody the beauty of a martial artist.

C: 哈哈…你说的话太有哲理了，我其实有点听不懂……
E: Haha... It's hard to understand your words when they sound so philosophical...

C: 他，还有许许多多像他这样的人，用自己的血肉之躯「存护」了「贝洛伯格」这座末日孤城。
E: He, along with many others like him, "preserved" the desolate city of Belobog with their flesh and blood.

C: 一位，是来自贝洛伯格的选手——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: The first contestant comes from Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 你错了，伊戈尔，「重要的永远是下一拳」。对我们的世界来说，重要的永远是未来。
E: You were wrong, Igor. "The next punch is always what matters most." For our world, the future is what truly matters.

C: 计时系统已经停止……我，休眠了多久？
E: The time feature has halted for... How long have I been dormant?

C: 咳，您教训的是。啊，这铁家伙醒了。
E: Ahem, your words ring true. Ah, that metalhead is awake.

C: 更伟大的力量？否定：除生物性武器外，我并未检测到你们装配其他类型的武器。
E: A weapon of even greater power? Negative: I have not detected any other type of weaponry amongst your equipment, besides biological weaponry.

C: 但你们的戒律，却严重阻塞了目标的达成。
E: But your commandments severely impede your objective from being fulfilled.

C: 从那以后，赏金猎人再也没有出现过。
E: From then on, no bounty hunters appeared again.

C: 这并非是为了杀戮或者胜利，只是希望有人能听见一座小小寺庙的坚持，知晓这一路请愿僧众的艰辛，还有一万三千名平民渴望活下去的执念。
E: We do this in the name of neither slaughter nor victory. We simply wish for people to learn of the perseverance of a small temple. We wish for everyone to know of the hardships of our petitioning monks, as well as the desperate determination of <unbreak>13,000</unbreak> civilians to survive.

C: 奢摩，你已尽力了。仙舟不是演武仪典的擂台，我们倾听的不止是胜利者的声音。我代表罗浮仙舟认可了你的决心。
E: Samatha, you've already tried your best. The Xianzhou is not an arena for the Wardance ceremony. We do not only listen to the voices of victors. I represent all of the Xianzhou Luofu in recognizing your determination.

C: 我准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 网上说「演武仪典都快成兵器展了，再这样下去歼星炮都要用上了」。
E: The internet says that "the Wardance is fast becoming an arms exhibition. At this rate, even star-destroyer cannons will get used."

C: 你请问。
E: Ask away.

C: 要我说，「纯美」首先应该是心灵美。我知道卢卡曾经与一位小女孩玛吉之间的故事，从那件事看出，卢卡实在是个心地善良的家伙。
E: I think that compassion and kindness should be the foremost benchmark of Beauty. I know of the story between Luka and Margie, a little girl he once met. Just off that incident alone, Luka is indeed a compassionate fellow.

C: 虽然卢卡选手成功返回赛场，但接下来的对手全是个顶个的强者，不知道{NICKNAME}教练对后面的比赛是否有信心获取胜利？
E: Though Contestant Luka has successfully returned to the tournament, the opponents lined up for him are all undisputed powerhouses. I wonder if Coach {NICKNAME} is confident of victory for the upcoming matches?

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 原来如此，虎克根本没有听懂。
E: I see. Hook didn't understand a word you said.

C: 杰帕德先生比我预想中还要强得多…不行，决不能输。
E: Mr. Gepard is much stronger than I expected... No, I can't lose.

C: 快逃吧卢卡，别过去，你会死的。
E: Run away, now, Luka. Don't go over there, you'll die!

C: 计算——这不是你当前的最佳水平，请认真与我战斗。
E: According to my calculations, this is not the best you can do. Please treat this battle seriously.

C: 两名战士已经就位！
E: Both fighters are ready!

C: 但现在，帝弓司命又不需要咱凡人建庙祭祀，自然也就没有什么「寺庙」了。
E: But now the Reignbow Arbiter no longer requires us mortals to build temples and offer sacrifices, and the need for temples naturally went away.

C: 真的吗？你喜欢就好！另一位客人听完就沉默了，搞得我差点就失去自信了！
E: Really? As long as you like it! The other guest didn't say anything. I almost lost all confidence!

C: 切！真拿你没办法！我这个故事超级可怕哦，小心别吓死你！
E: Tsk! Fine! This story of mine'll scare the color off of your skin, so watch out!

C: 这套「虚拟陪玩」系统，由阿合马负责台本包装，由我负责功能实现，所以你现在是在直面这款交感幻戏的开发者！
E: This virtual NPC system was made possible with Arma Correctional Group's writing and my development. You stand before the great creator of this Empathic Immersia!

C: 听说你要参加演武仪典，某两个家伙非让我过来看看你顺不顺利…麻烦死了，她们怎么不自己来？
E: I heard you were joining the Wardance, and two whose-names-I-won't-mention insisted that I checked in on you... So annoying. Why couldn't those girls make the trip themselves?

C: 喔，你通关速度比我想象中快多了。认真讲，还挺厉害的。
E: Woah, you're clearing levels faster than I thought. You're pretty good, if I'm being honest.

C: 别担心，没有任何危害。而且我刚刚已经删除掉了——木马和证据都删干净了。
E: Don't worry, it's harmless. I've just deleted it — both the trojan and any evidence.

C: 哇！这个魔方真的好好玩耶！
E: Wow! This magic cube is so fun!

C: 是时候展现我真正的技术了。
E: Time for a true display of skill.

C: 缭乱忍侠向在场的所有人行礼，乐队演出的相关事宜就这么顺理成章地决定了。
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero bows to everyone, and the matter related to the band's performance is decided without much fuss.

C: 排练时间不多，把作曲的事定下来吧。
E: There's not much time left to practice. Let's tie down the composition.

C: 主公！在下有要事委托。可否请你游历各地，<color=#dbc291ff>为在下收集谱曲用的灵感？</color>
E: Sound Master! I beseech you with a request: Could you <color=#dbc291ff>travel the worlds and collect music compositions for my inspiration?</color>

C: 谱曲之事就交由主公完成，至于诸位，请随在下返回道场，开启音律•修行。
E: Finding the compositions will be left to Sound Master, and as for everyone else, please follow me back to the training ground to commence sound training.

C: 此乃音忍的特制装束——「缭乱•忍法•缤纷万象武装」是也！
E: This is a sound ninja's tailor-made attire — the Vibrant Dazzling Ninjutsu Warsuit!

C: 哼哼哼哼哼哼——哼哼哈嘿！
E: Hhhnnnggghh-hnngh-hnngh-haahey!

C: ——音律•狩猎，开始！
E: ...Let the Sound Hunt begin!

C: 真要说的话…那个打碟的姑娘也太有活力了……
E: If I had to pick holes in it, though... That DJ lady had too much energy...

C: 音乐派对是彩梦校庆最盛大的活动，也是学生们最期待的时候！
E: The music party is the grandest event of the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration. It's also a time that all students look forward to!

C: 啾！啾啾！你在与折纸小鸟的合奏训练中取得了非常优秀的好成绩，恭喜你啾！
E: Tweet! Tweet tweet! You scored really high in the origami birds' ensemble training! Congrats, tweet!

C: 哼哼。
E: Heh-heh.

C: 在下绝不会食言——
E: I will not go back on my word...

C: 这个理论足以证明——实用与价值并非相等。即便是达凡绮这样的电子小垃圾，也能在音乐这项伟大的艺术事业上获得成功！
E: This theory clearly shows that practicality and value are not equal. Even a mini electronic trash like Dafanchy can achieve great things in the grand and artistic career of music!

C: 再等等吧…
E: Wait a moment...

C: 太好了！我是你们的粉丝，「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的单推！
E: Fantastic! We're Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party's most ardent fans!

C: 看来先前的两场演出，帮我们在学生里积累了相当高的人气啊。
E: Looks like our previous two shows really garnered plenty of support among the students for us.

C: 我这是什么乌鸦嘴啊！不管了，还好仙舟商会的朋友给我看过不少切片。走，我们上！
E: I wasn't being serious! Never mind. Good thing that the friend from the Xianzhou Merchant Guild showed me plenty of video clips. C'mon, let's go!

C: 对对，是会迟到。请各位等得莫心焦，且看我俩呢，来逗大家发发笑。
E: Yes yes, they'll be late. So don't fret, everyone. Wait till this dynamic duo turns those frowns upside down!

C: （闭幕演出就快开始了，时间确实很紧张。）
E: (The closing show is about to start. Time is definitely running short.)

C: …是的，我发现了这次校庆中的部分校方人员在滥用职权，但碍于嘉宾的身份，没办法下场帮助这些学生。
E: ...No. I noticed that some school authorities were abusing their power during the anniversary celebration, but as a guest-of-honor, I could not directly help these students.

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 你问我自嘲有什么窍门？我不是喜剧演员，哪知道这个。但我见过一些人，他们不在乎段子是否好笑，只想倾尽全力让别人听见自己的笑声……
E: What are some tips there for self-deprecation, you ask? I'm not a comedic actor, I wouldn't know. But I have seen some who disregard the comedy of their routines and only doing their utmost to let others hear their own laughter...

C: 你梦到自己失去了武器，这说明在内心深处，你一直感到恐慌和不安。
E: You dreamt you lost your weapon. This means that subconsciously, you've always been panicky and ill at ease.

C: 你的前任主人…我一定会找到他的。
E: Your previous owner... I will be sure to find him.

C: 列车需要一些*毁灭*。
E: The Express needs some Destruction.

C: 大减价大减价，正品公司货清仓大甩卖，全场<unbreak>10</unbreak>个信用点起，邀请好友拼单有机会获得半价礼金！机会难得，快来抢购吧！
E: Major sale! We're having a genuine IPC inventory blowout sale, everything starting at <unbreak>10</unbreak> credits! Invite your friends to order in bulk for a chance to get half-off gift money! It's a rare opportunity, so grab 'em whilst stocks last!

C: 往盆栽里倒点盐吧！听说蛞蝓最怕这个了…我倒倒倒！
E: Pour some salt into the pots! I hear slugs are most afraid of this... Drown them in it!

C: 我、我是一条好狼！
E: I-I am a good wolf!

C: 各位还记得吗？我们约好一个月后要去观赏「吾兰达扎尔超新星爆发」，几分钟后就要开票了。
E: Does everyone still remember that we agreed to go see the Urandazar supernova explosion a month later? Ticket sales are going to start in a few minutes.

C: 我也失眠了。
E: I can't sleep, either.

C: 「阿塔古丘铁砧队」不接受义体改造，竟然仅凭着纯粹的技巧就一路冲进了决赛！真是热血沸腾！一定要拿到冠军啊！铁砧队！
E: The Atakuch Anvil Team refuses artificial implant modifications, relying on sheer technique and skill to charge their way into the final! What an absolute thrill! They must win the final! Team Anvil!

C: 哎呀，你干嘛跟只垃圾糕一般见识？还是放人家回去吧。
E: Gosh, why are you stooping to the level of a trash-eating creature? Just let it go home.

C: 有什么需要注意的吗？
E: Is there anything I should look out for?

C: 品质保障！
E: Quality guaranteed!

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉！
E: Nanananana!

C: 快，{NICKNAME}，模仿秀的下半场马上开始。再不过去，就只能站在最后排啦。
E: {NICKNAME}, hurry, the second half of the show is about to start. We'll be standing in the last row if we don't go now.

C: 留下最好的照片。
E: ...Till the best photograph is left behind.

C: 天谴之矛，尼卡多利！你的英勇举世无双，你的长矛直入天际。
E: Lance of Fury, Nikador! Your valor is rivaled by none, your lance thrusting through the clouds.

C: 早些时候在市集消失的孩子，又突然出现在你的面前。
E: The child who disappeared into the bustling market earlier on suddenly appears before you again.

C: 唉，就知道「嗷呜嗷呜」叫，跟谁扮可怜呢？我是来监督你们干活的…干活，明白？要的是你的剩余价值，不是情绪价值！
E: Bah, wailing is all you know. Who are you trying to fool? My job is to monitor your work... So work, got it? It's your surplus value that's needed, not your emotional value!

C: 需要学奇美拉叫吗？
E: I need to mimic the sound a chimera makes?

C: 灰宝，我有点生气了……
E: Grayie, I'm getting angry...

C: 我决定了！
E: I've decided!

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 我早就说，{F#她}{M#他}管理的队伍绝对能击败你。我不会接受邀约，请回吧。
E: I already said before that {F#her}{M#his} squad will surely defeat yours. I'm afraid I'll have to decline your invitation. Please return.

C: 嗷呜！下班~开心~嗷呜嗷呜！
E: Awoo! Work is done, so happy! Awoo-awoo!

C: 形势很严峻啊……
E: This is a grave situation...

C: 总之，你的神识会在这里与传说同行，塑造你的德性，令你成为真正的智者，乃至，真正的英雄。
E: In any case, your soul essence will walk alongside legends here, shaping your virtue and forging you into a true sage — and, eventually, a true hero.

C: 我也会再去根系的内部找找，没准儿还能翻出些没被黑潮侵蚀的残篇。知识的继承者，愿瑟希斯荫蔽你的愚钝。
E: I will also return to searching within the root system. Perhaps I will uncover some remnant pages unsullied by the black tide. Heir of knowledge, may Cerces shield your ignorance.

C: 这附近一定有「贼灵」。
E: There's definitely a "Spirithief" around here.

C: 嗷呜~又在耍酷！泡泡才是主角，{NICKNAME}，我们必须狠狠击败它。
E: Awooo~ You're acting cool again! I am the protagonist here! {NICKNAME}, we need to defeat it.

C: 哼哼，不自量力了吧？现在你还有什么话说？
E: Hmph, what a fool. Got anything else to say now?

C: 让我们看看「十敌」选手带来的小海豹——哇，是一只冒着怒气的红色海豹！
E: Let's have a look at Yourdei's baby seal — incredible, it's a red-hot steaming seal!

C: …嗯？达利安人呢？
E: ...Wait, where's Dorian?

C: 你看，这是他给我的「银盏徽章」。
E: Look, I have his Silver Chalice Badge right here.

C: 巴特鲁斯根本就不是选手！
E: This "Bartholos" guy isn't even a contestant!

C: 那不就只剩质疑了吗？
E: Is there really so little love between us?

C: 啊这…咱们就聊一句，缇宁大人的小海豹看上去好个性啊，能讲讲吗？
E: Uh, well, we still need to have some kinda intro... Say, Lady Trinnon, that's quite a unique seal you've got there! Care to tell us about it?

C: 恭喜{NICKNAME}选手获胜！终结了幽灵海豹的不败传说！看来，幽灵海豹的怨念可以消散了？
E: Congratulations, {NICKNAME}! You've ended the Ghost Seal's winning streak! Is this enough to put an end to its obsession?

C: 我就勉为其难地说一声「恭喜」吧，冠军{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: I'll begrudgingly say "congratulations" to you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Champion.

C: 尽管远方的黑潮尚在威胁，但我们也希望奥赫玛的公民们，能借着比赛，畅快地宣泄心中压抑已久的情绪。
E: Even though the threat of black tide still looms, we hope that the citizens of Okhema can use this competition to release the pent-up emotions they've been holding in for so long.

C: 虽然这个名字，还真是法吉娜信徒的品味，不过，阿雅给的奖励可是很郑！重！的哦！
E: Though that name really does have the taste of Phagousa's disciples, the reward from Agy is quite... serious!

C: 第一，也许你不相信预言梦，但你将有机会验证它——
E: Firstly, maybe you don't believe in prophetic dreams, but you will have the chance to witness it come true —

C: 你还活着，别急着留下遗言了。
E: You're not dead yet. Let's take it easy with the last words, yeah?

C: 我明白了，我们也不会强求。
E: Understood. We won't force you to.

C: 小鱼干，逗猫棒…可不可以？
E: How about... dried fish treats and a cat stick?

C: 啊？原来{NICKNAME}早就听说这个预言了。
E: Ah? So {NICKNAME} already knows about the prophecy?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你一定会惩罚窃取奖杯的小贼，夺回你应得的荣誉。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will surely punish the trophy thief and reclaim the honor that's rightfully yours.</color>

C: 是啊，我的家族原本是帕拉黛星最受欢迎的艺术世家，出产过许多剧作。
E: That's right. My family used to be the most popular artistic aristocracy on Paradoxe with many theater works under our belt.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 不好意思，我有些记不太清楚。
E: Sorry, it's not ringing any bells.

C: 说是救命，不就只是在打游戏？
E: You call this "needing help," but you're just playing a video game.

C: 银枪•修罗殿下……
E: Lord Silvergun Shura...

C: …啾？啾！啾啾——
E: ...Tweet? Tweet! Tweet tweet—

C: 你想干什么？{F#奶奶}{M#爷爷}，我今天可真没招惹你吧！再靠近我就要喊猎犬过来了！
E: What do you want? Spare me, boss! I swear I didn't mess with you today! Get any closer and I'm calling the Bloodhounds!

C: 话说回来，帕姆有给我们交过五险一金吗？
E: By the way, did Pom-Pom ever sign us up for social security and employee benefits?

C: 哼，第一次上课就迟到，足见你没有时间观念。这实在是……
E: Hmm, late for your first class. Clearly, you have no concept of time. That really is...

C: 如无必要，勿增原料。下回少兑些水。
E: Don't add any ingredients unless they're necessary. Add less water next time.

C: 形而上学，不行就退学。
E: Metaphysics, drop out if you can't hack it.

C: 在黑塔的催促下，人偶第三次抿了一口调饮。
E: At Herta's urging, the puppet took a third sip of the drink.

C: 几个菜啊喝成这样。
E: What, a few sips and you're already this far gone?

C: 梦境里的大名人，窝在小酒吧里给人调饮…嘻，肯定有什么好玩的事瞒着我对吧？
E: The big-shot from the Dreamscape, slinging drinks in some back-alley dive? Heh, you've definitely been keeping something fun from me, I assume?

C: …佩佩会说话了？
E: ...Peppy can talk now?

C: 该找舒翁领工钱了！
E: Time to collect my pay from Siobhan!

C: 目光向我看齐，我宣布个事！
E: If everyone could please turn their eyes toward me, I have an announcement to make!

C: 喂，不许顶着我的脸说这种话。给我变回来！
E: Hey! Don't say such things wearing my face. Turn back into yourself!

C: 你们在朝露公馆团建？
E: You're having a team-building session at Dewlight Pavilion?

C: 虽然我也很想继续陪你进行模拟，但我们手头的工作实在太多。抱歉抱歉。
E: As much as I'd love to continue running simulations with you, we've got way too much work on our hands. We apologize.

C: 以我的经验，再往下就是遗迹的最深处了…听说有人在那边遇到过可怕的机械巨人，和之前沿路碰见的杂兵完全不一样，你可一定得保护好我啊！
E: Based on my experience, the next one down is the bottom floor of the ruins... Somebody once said they saw a terrifying giant robot down there, completely different from any pawns that we met before. You have to protect me!

C: 问吧，我很乐意为伙伴排忧解难！
E: Ask away. I'd be happy to help set you at ease, partner!

C: 都叫古代遗迹了，那当然是古代人造的呗。
E: We call it the ancient ruins because some ancient people built them.

C: 我没什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 不要这么说嘛！那主要是初代司鼎怕有用心不良的人滥用药材，为害仙舟…好像是有点牵强啊？没事，您先别在意，初稿、初稿，定稿时咱一定会改的。
E: Don't say that! The first Cauldron Master was thinking ahead about any misuse that might harm the Xianzhou, you see... Or is that a bit far-fetched? No problem. Don't even worry about it. This is just a first script, a first script I tell you. We'll just fix it in post.

C: 「此战之后，{NICKNAME}与丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝便成为歃血同盟，任谁也无法离间！」
E: "After this battle, {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe forged an alliance in blood between which none could ever hope to drive a wedge!"

C: 龙尊梦兆录？不，不是这本。偌大的持明族图书馆竟然没有实现自动化管理！可恶……
E: The high elder's dream divinations? No, not this one. How have the Vidyadhara not figured out an automatic file management system yet for their massive library!? Tsk...

C: 翻译翻译什么叫惊喜。
E: Define "surprise." Explain to me like I'm 5.

C: 戏霸…！
E: What a diva...!

C: 同样的套路是否太多了？
E: Isn't fetch quest a bit overused?

C: 谁说「碎星绝尘剑」就不能是一门激光炮了？现在市面上都是些乏善可陈的仙侠幻戏，观众早就看腻了。
E: Who said the Star-Shattering Blade of Truth can't actually be a laser cannon? The market is saturated with boring superhero Immersia, and the audience wants something new.

C: 不一会儿，他昂起自己骄傲的头颅，将稿子给了你。
E: Shortly after, he raises his proud head and hands over the manuscript to you.

C: 具体的工作内容我已经发送给你了，之后自己看着办吧。
E: I've sent the specific work details to you, so you can figure things out yourself later.

C: 嗯？你怎么在叹气，莫不是在下方才的评书出了什么问题？还是说你有什么别的问题？
E: Hmm? Why are you sighing? Is there anything wrong with my performance? Or are you worried about something else?

C: （转述西衍先生的说辞）
E: (Tell them Mr. Xiyan's words.)

C: 是这样的，我家这店原是卖文玩的，但这些年来总有化外民来我店里「淘宝」，说什么在这里低价淘到了古董。
E: Here's the thing: My store sells fandangles, but lately, more and more Outworlders have been flooding in, claiming they've bought precious antiques at low prices.

C: …咳咳，看来我们的「鉴宝人」有些激动了。大家放心，委托人提供的物件如有遭遇类似情况，我们一定会照价补偿…补偿从「鉴宝人」的劳务费里扣！
E: ...Ahem, it seems our "appraiser" got a bit too carried away. But rest assured, if we accidentally break a genuine antique, we will definitely compensate for it... and we'll be taking the cost out of our appraiser's paycheck!

C: 站住，我要用我爸爸送给我的超强以太灵打赢你！
E: Stop right there! I will defeat you with the super powerful Aether Spirit my dad gave me!

C: 哈哈，您说得对。这套技术本身发源自朋克洛德，但在公司和博识学会的不懈努力下，我们也初步了解了如何编辑以太。
E: Haha, you're right. The technology itself originated from Punklorde, but with the relentless efforts of the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild, we've also gained a basic understanding of how to edit Aether.

C: 我以自己的名誉做担保，这是全宇宙最尖端的娱乐形式！不好玩，你们找我！
E: I swear on my reputation that this game is truly the best form of entertainment out there! I'll take the rap if you don't like it!

C: 庆典就在这里举办吗？
E: Is the festival going to be held here?

C: 我想起来了！他们说过，自己是那位「托帕」的后援团成员…还说要把全宇宙最强力的以太灵全都搜刮过来，送给「托帕」…这样她就能在庆典上连冠了！
E: Oh, I know! They said they were members of Miss Topaz's "support squad"... They said they'd gather the strongest Aether Spirits from across the universe and give them to her... so she could win the tournament!

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 就决定是你了！
E: Nah, sounds fine to me!

C: 区区数值游戏罢了！
E: Just a simple game of numbers!

C: 哼，哼哼，哼……
E: Oink!!! Oink! Oink...

C: 哼哼！哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 哼哼…哼！哼哼！
E: Oink... Oink Oink! Oink!

C: 我们曾见过面的…
E: We've met before...

C: 哈哈哈哈，倒也谈不上欺负！老夫自以为刚才那场对决有来有回，到底还是旗鼓相当的！
E: Hahaha, now, now, far from it! Our duel was a balanced contest — both sides showed great prowess!

C: 哈哈哈，原来你们在意的是这件事啊。我向你们保证：我对两位没有任何恶意。
E: Hahaha, so that's what you were wondering about. Let me assure you both: I harbor no malicious intentions towards either of you.

C: 乔瓦尼先生果然是假面愚者的一员吗？怪不得……
E: So Mr. Giovanni really is a member of the Masked Fools? No wonder...

C: 哼，是星核小鬼和粉毛小矮子啊。怎么样，享受竞技协会布置给我和你们的愚蠢谜题吗？
E: Well, well, well, little miss pink and the twerp. Having fun tackling the ridiculous puzzles the Gaming Association cooked up?

C: 哼哼…哼哼！
E: Oink, oink... Oink, oink!

C: 你为什么会成为冠军候补？
E: Why did you become a championship contender?

C: 好吧，就连天才俱乐部的人都没头绪…次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神到底为什么会变成这样呢？
E: ...Not even the Genius Society can figure it out. Why did Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord end up this way?

C: 咦，又是维尔德嘛？他刚才是不是提到了「托帕后援团」和次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神？
E: Huh? Wilder? Didn't he mention something about Topaz's Support Squad and the Aether Spirit?

C: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，三月七小姐！感谢你们应邀前来。
E: {NICKNAME}, Miss March! Thank you both for coming.

C: …欸？可艾丝妲…还有次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神……
E: Hmm... Asta and Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord...

C: 没错，次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神可是我们的伙伴！才不会交给你们这种人！
E: Yeah, Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is not going anywhere!

C: 啧啧啧…三月七小姐，你太心急了。
E: Tsk, tsk... Patience, Miss March.

C: 哈哈，我已经确实了解了你们的「决心」…现在是时候将「答案」如数奉上了。
E: I've witnessed your unwavering resolve... Now it's time I revealed the answer to your questions.

C: 呜呜，呜！
E: Woo-woo, woo!

C: 呜！呜呜……
E: Woo! Woo-woo...

C: ...年轻人果真有活力。这样一来，我也能放心把贝洛伯格交给你们了......
E: ...You young people really have spirit. Looks like I can rest assured leaving Belobog in your hands...

C: 在它的嗥叫中，一股杀气传来，你定睛一看…它居然叼着一枚以太硬币！
E: From its barking, you can sense an intense will to fight. As you look closer you notice... it's got an Aether Coin in its mouth!

C: 这就是外面的世界所流行的游戏吗？真是神奇……
E: So this is the game that is so popular across the worlds beyond? How fascinating...

C: 呼哈哈哈…今日老夫有幸至此，一览异乡光景，还能与小友再次较量，真是好~生~快~活~
E: Fwahaha... I am truly blessed to be here today. I get to lay eyes on a foreign land and compete with you again, my friend. I'm truly living the~ good~ life~

C: 请问是在这里注册参赛资格吗？
E: Is this where we register for the competition?

C: 稍后再说。
E: I need more time.

C: 咳咳——能听到吗？喂喂喂——
E: Ahem... Hello? Testing, testing...

C: 原来倔强的星核猎手，也是会主动认输的呀……
E: So, even the mighty Stellaron Hunter is willing to admit defeat, huh...

C: 哼，哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 看来，这样就尘埃落定了。谢谢你陪我闹腾了这么久……
E: That settles it then. Thanks for sticking by me throughout all this...

C: 喂，你说雪是不是越来越大了？
E: Hey, is it just me or is the snowfall getting heavier?

C: 判官藿藿受命调遣各位，在岁阳相关的专业问题上，请你们务必配合她的指挥。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission has specially entrusted Judge Huohuo with commanding the ghost-hunting squad, so please make sure to follow her lead in all matters related to the heliobi.

C: 尾巴消失以后，我本以为自己会被辞退的。但不知为何…寒鸦小姐让我来带领大家，我也很意外。
E: After Tail disappeared, I thought for sure the Commission would ask me to resign... but for some reason, Madam Hanya asked me to be the leader of the ghost-hunting squad.

C: 且慢！在开始下一场战斗前，你要按约回答十王司一个问题。
E: Not so fast! Before we fight again, you need to answer one question, like you promised.

C: 只是和你打个招呼。
E: I'm just stopping by to say hi.

C: 那场大战结束后，英雄们无一生还，而燧皇也受了重创。这场交易便不了了之。人们也逐渐遗忘了这个故事。但岁阳却还记得。
E: When the fighting had ceased, none of the heroes survived, and the Flint Emperor was gravely wounded. Thus, the pact was unable to be fulfilled. As the centuries came and went, the story faded from memory. But the heliobi remember.

C: 有点残忍…
E: Sounds a little cruel...

C: 我都准备好了道歉的说辞…大姐姐，你把我的思路打乱了。
