E: I was ready to apologize to everyone... but now you've made me forget what I wanted to say.

C: 大人们总是说大人的生活更辛苦，可这很奇怪诶？
E: Why do grown-ups always say that life is harder for them. So weird...

C: 就是就是！
E: Exactly!

C: 一个灵感突如其来，你应该<color=#dbc291ff>打开这扇门</color>试试。
E: A flash of inspiration hits: You should try <color=#dbc291ff>opening this door</color>.

C: 老规矩，先试试向浮烟探探情况。
E: Mm, but let's talk to Cirrus again first.

C: 我觉得这么找没什么效率……
E: I don't think searching like this is the best way...

C: 我这才发现，那孩子竟然是将军的高足，彦卿小弟。
E: I realized the boy was the General's retainer, Yanqing.

C: 在无情的剑意之下，它们会有何等威力。
E: ...with merciless intent, how powerful I am.

C: 嗯，也许有人用尾巴的消息蒙骗了她，并且告诉她「只能一个人去」。嗯嗯，很像是某些绑票的坏家伙会用的招数。
E: Right, maybe someone deceived her with news about Tail — told her "she could only go alone." Sounds like a trick some nasty kidnapper would use.

C: 不许欺负藿藿！
E: Don't bully Huohuo!

C: 浮烟千算万算，显然无法想到尾巴早已回到了藿藿身边。这下它想要劫持判官的计划算是彻底失败了。要是让藿藿出现在它面前，想必能重挫它的斗志。
E: Despite Cirrus's scheming and calculating, they clearly didn't expect Tail to return to Huohuo... their plan to kidnap her was an utter failure. If they saw Huohuo as she is now, it would break their will!

C: 这小小岁阳不会被轻易消灭，只要时间足够长，无论出逃概率有多小，总有一天，又会逃出封印吧。不过，这就留给以后的将军来头疼了。
E: But the heliobus we dealt with will not be easily dismissed. Given sufficient time, and regardless of how slim the odds are, they will someday break the seal that binds them. However, that concern will fall to the generals of the future.

C: 你不是还有十王司的那几位前辈吗？
E: What about those Ten Lords fogeys?

C: 似乎尾巴无法与机关互动，也许应该找个附身后的人来启动机关。
E: Tail doesn't seem capable of interacting with mechanisms. Maybe we should find someone who's possessed to trigger them.

C: 既然是岁阳，那我去看看吧。
E: If it's a heliobus, I should go and check it out.

C: 到底是下棋还是解谜？
E: Wait, are we playing chess or doing riddles now?

C: 大人们请安排，卑职这就去办。
E: If you could please arrange, m'lord, I shall humbly oblige.

C: 万一…她真的活着呢？
E: Unless... she really IS alive?

C: 为什么…为什么不能放过我们……
E: Why... why can't you just let us go...

C: 我大概明白了。别担心，你们对这件事的处置毫无问题。
E: I think I get it. Don't worry. There's nothing wrong with how you're doing things.

C: 服下这药会好受很多…
E: Take this medicine here and you will feel much better...

C: 本座到没有自信到「这个事情一定是岁阳作祟」的程度，所以发帖试探了一下……
E: I am not yet entirely convinced that "this is undoubtedly the work of a heliobus," so I thought I'd make the post to investigate...

C: 我和那个赝品完全不一样啊！我还以为你一眼就看明白了呢！
E: I am nothing like that imposter! I thought such a thing would be clear to you at a single glance!

C: 起初，我这是在这里低价购置了一处房产，以为自己占了便宜。卖房以后，前房主音讯全无，后来我才知道过去每一任房主都没有善终。
E: At first, this was just a property that I bought at a low price, thinking I'd gotten myself a steal. But, after they sold me the property, I never heard from the previous owner again. It was later that I learned that every prior landlord had met with an unfortunate end.

C: （仔细检查）
E: (Investigate closely)

C: 岁阳为什么就不能害怕了，这里阴森森的，太吓人了。
E: Why shouldn't a heliobus get scared? It's dark and creepy in here. It's terrifying!

C: …这、这…不就是雷诺吗？
E: ...I—Is... Is it not Renault?

C: （用默契的眼神看向素裳）
E: (Silently look over to Sushang)

C: 岁阳应该是不能直接使用玉兆的，除非…除非它们附身在受害者身上…糟了！
E: Heliobi can't use jade abaci directly, unless... unless they take possession of a victim... Darn it!

C: 好了，该交代的我全部交代完了，你们到底帮不帮忙啊！
E: Alright, I've finished explaining everything to you. Now are you going to help me or not!

C: …你也保重，妹妹。
E: ...You too, little sister.

C: 快点进到葫芦里来！
E: Get into the gourd now!

C: 我已经想好下一篇怪谈该怎么写了！标题就叫……
E: I've already thought of the plot for the next ghost story! The title will be...

C: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
E: Cycrane, start!

C: 不要随便拿列车长开玩笑啊帕！
E: Don't you treat your conductor like a fool!

C: 嘿嘿，有时候朋友之间不用说太多话，一个眼神秒懂。看来咱们真是有朋友的缘分啊。
E: Hehe, that's what it means to be friends. There's no need for many words, and you can understand me instantly with a look. It seems like we are fated to be friends!

C: 你回过神来，依靠着自己超高的道德，以及这些日子相处下来对桂乃芬的了解，你不断翻看挑选着。
E: Coming back to your senses, you have come to rely on your own superior sense of morality. And based on your understanding of Guinaifen from these past few days, you keep flipping through the options.

C: 喵？
E: Meow?

C: 咻咻！
E: Swoosh swoosh!

C: …嗯，是我。你可能也看出来了，我身上的气息与特征，和阮•梅本人很像。
E: ...Well, it's me. You may have noticed that I have the same aura and traits as Ruan Mei herself.

C: {NICKNAME}，要听故事吗？我还有很多故事可以讲给你听。
E: {NICKNAME}, would you like to hear a story? I've got many more stories I could tell you.

C: 它给了我一片羽毛。
E: It gave me a feather.

C: 跑了多远？
E: Where did she go?

C: ——开始吧。
E: ...Here we go.

C: 哇咔咔。能不能…拜托不要告诉管理员，要不这样，我现在就飞去找前台……
E: Heh heh... Could we maybe... not involve the administrator? How about this? I'll go get the concierge right away...

C: 呵…贵宾，什么贵宾？告诉你吧，我不仅敢这么对你说话——还敢对你动手。
E: Heh... a guest of honor, huh? Well, I'll let you in on a secret. Not only do I dare to talk to you like this, but I also can do something about it.

C: 汪！我的名字是「司令」！好威风的名字，我好喜欢哇！
E: Woof! My name is "Mr. Bigwig"! An awesome name! I love it!

C: 不过没关系！因为我现在很无聊哇哈哈！就是特累！
E: But that's okay. I'm bored now. I'm feeling super worn out!

C: …您好？我听朋友说这儿新来了位调饮师，想必就是您吧？
E: ...Hello, there? My friend told me there's a new drinksmith here. That must be you, right?

C: （要是敢不付钱，你觉得我会让你离开吗？）
E: (Do you think I'd let you leave without paying?)

C: 你来，我就在。
E: Whenever you come, I'll be here.

C: 我这一生，尽是遗憾，你说我还能获得幸福吗？
E: Regrets have permeated my life. Do you think I can still discover happiness?
Phew...

C: （…它始终话里有话，舒翁没说过小星星这么难相处啊。）
E: (...His words always imply something. Siobhan never mentioned that Starlet could be so difficult to get along with.)

C: （感觉它不是光顾酒吧的客人，更像是…来试探我的？）
E: (Feels like he's not just here for a drink, but more like... testing me?)

C: （…没想到啊，情绪问题解决后，它的性格会变得这么正经。）
E: (...Didn't expect it to become so serious after resolving its emotional issues.)

C: 我很满足，嘿嘿。感谢您的馈赠！
E: I'm feeling so satisfied, hehe. Thank you for the treat!

C: 可惜，它被赶出来的时候，把那个盒子弄丢了。
E: Unfortunately, they lost that box when they got kicked out.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: …司令。
E: ...Mr. Bigwig.

C: 说不过就屏蔽哇。遇到你这种不讲道理的人，就算是宽容的汽水狗狗也没办法哇。
E: You resort to blocking me when you can't win. Even a tolerant Soda Doggo can't do anything about an unreasonable person like yourself.

C: （…怎么感觉它们的关系不太好？）
E: (...I get the sense that these two don't have a good relationship.)

C: 汪汪汪
E: WoofWoofWoof

C: 汪
E: Woof

E: Woof  Woof  WoofWoof

E: Pep<rhythm>py

E: Researchers <rhythm>are <rhythm>naughty

E: WoofWoof    Woof

E: WoofWoofWoof

E: WoofWoofWoof  Woof

C: 现在，换一种说唱节奏吧。
E: Now try a different beat to the rap.

C: 嗨，好久不见，想我了吗？
E: Yo! I haven't seen you in a while. Missed me?

C: 苜蓿草家系投资、鸢尾花家系研发制作，而公司负责运营——这么有趣的一组COMBO，我会好奇不也合情合理吗？
E: The Alfalfa Family invests in the game, the Iris Family develops it, and the IPC manages it. An intriguing combo, don't you think? It's only natural for me to be curious, no?

C: 嚯，这NPC还挺有个性…正好，*干扰插件*搞定了，我们也回去吧。
E: Oh? This NPC sure has a mouth... Okay, so... *disrupt plugin* and done. Let's go back.

C: 要是谣言能用熏香驱散就好了。
E: If only rumors could be dispelled with incense.

C: 没错。想一想，这次代言会带给你多大的好处？当众击败卢卡选手，被公司选为仙舟专属形象的代言人。
E: Bingo. Think about how beneficial this endorsement could be for you. Defeating Luka in public, and being chosen by the IPC as the exclusive face of the Xianzhou.

C: 不管怎么说，比赛都还得继续。哎…真心希望下次不要遇到这么恶心的对手了。
E: Regardless, the competition must go on. Sigh... I hope we don't encounter such vile opponents next time.

C: 相反，由我在外部维持与你的联系，监视系统的运行，至少能够保证你的个人安全。
E: On the contrary, if I were to maintain communication with you on the outside and monitor the system's operation, it would ensure your safety at the very least.

C: 够用了。诸位很清楚，我不是一个安于现状的人。我一直想突破既有的知识桎梏，寻到新的突破点，令全宇宙的知识总量再度跃升。
E: That's enough. I'm sure everyone here knows that I'm never one to accept the status quo. I've always sought to push beyond the existing boundaries of knowledge, find new breakthroughs, and advance the total knowledge of the universe multiple-fold.

C: 好啦，今天是个好日子，就不做什么批评教育了。让各位齐聚一堂，是因为列车长有事要宣布。
E: Alright, alright. Today's a happy day, so Pom-Pom won't spoil it with lectures. I've gathered everyone here today because I have an announcement to make!

C: 一，即使命途兴衰消长，开拓者应自有主张。二，即使面对惊涛骇浪，列车组应一致同向。
E: One, no matter the ebb and flow of fate, stop staying within the lines. Two, even in the face of tempestuous seas, we always align.

C: 这么多人一起上去，恐怕没处落脚。三月，和列车长陪{NICKNAME}上去看看新房间吧。
E: There won't be enough space to fit all of us. March, you and the conductor should go with {NICKNAME} to see {M#his}{F#her} new room.

C: 这就是多余的那份吧？
E: So, this must be the extra one, right?

C: 这谁知道？反正广告上是这么说的！
E: Who knows? Anyway, that's what the advertisement says!

C: 给我调回去！
E: Change it back!

C: 如今你们讨伐了疯王，他的眷属也不再像以前那样活跃。这正是外出探索的绝好时机！
E: His titankins are beginning to die down now that you've defeated the mad king, making this the perfect time to go on an adventure!

C: 但是就算继续深入，我估计也帮不上什么忙…不如以后我就在入口望风好了。万一有怪物逼近，我还能及时提醒你一下。
E: However, if we are to continue onward, I don't think I'll be of much help... Perhaps I should just stay by the entrance and act as a lookout. That way, if I spot any approaching monsters, I will be able to warn you in time.
Grumph? (Hmm...?)

C: 呜，呜嗡嗡？（真羡慕{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}…如果我也用两条腿走路的话，是不是就不用考试了？）
E: Grumphhhh? (I'm so jealous of you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}... If I walked on two legs, too, would I not have to take tests?)

C: 这就是几分钟前你的心理活动。其实回想这些没什么意义，因为你人已经在这了。
E: That was what went through your mind a few minutes ago. But reminiscences don't matter now. You're already here.

C: 是时候了，就在第一次监护人之旅中见证孩子的成长吧！
E: It's the moment to witness your child grow on your first trip as their guardian!

C: 嗯，明天见。
E: See you tomorrow.

C: 纯金制成的里拉琴最接近她的琴声，航海士们奏响它以祈求出海平安。但在法吉娜沉默后，这招对于悲伤的大海就不管用了。
E: A lyre made of pure gold comes closest to replicating her music, played by seafarers to pray for safe voyages. But after Phagousa went mute, this tactic no longer worked on the sorrowful sea.

C: 今天来得很早嘛。需要你看一个单耳水瓶，是翁法罗斯相当经典的器型。
E: You're early today. I have a single-eared amphora for you to check out — it's a classic piece from Amphoreus.

C: 您明白了吗？这梦泡并不是入梦者的不要笑挑战，而是神秘人的不要笑挑战！
E: You see? This dream bubble isn't a try-not-to-laugh challenge for dreamers. It's the challenge for that mysterious person!

C: 待会再来找你们玩吧。
E: I'll come hang out with you later.

C: 不愧是您！话说，里面究竟是什么东西啊？
E: That was quick! Any idea what's inside?

C: 嗯嗯，请您一定要收下！
E: Please take the gifts. We insist.

C: 那就来吧。
E: Then let's do this!

C: 嗯…我有许多故事可以讲述。但它们与「均衡」的关联，需要你自行参悟。
E: Hmm... I have many stories to tell. But their connection to the Equilibrium is something you'll need to figure out for yourself.

C: 万一睡着了怎么办？
E: What if I doze off?

C: 早听闻昔涟找了位合适的店长，这次得见，确有几分名士风采。
E: Word had reached me that Cyrene found an excellent manager. Seeing you today, I must say... you do have a noble bearing.

C: 长得这么快？
E: They grow that fast?

C: …感觉不太对啊。
E: ...Something feels off.

C: 哎，我还是自己判断吧。
E: Well, guess I'll just judge for myself.

C: <size=28>应当以「凯撒」作为主题！</size>
E: <size=28>The event theme shall be: "Imperator"!</size>

C: 那么，我继续宣布本次美食评审的结果。{NICKNAME}阁下，请收下这枚奖章。
E: Now then, let's wrap this up. {NICKNAME}, please accept this medal.

C: 食材质量是菜品的根本，而我对哀丽秘榭的麦田有信心。我很清楚，这片土地上的作物与肉类有多鲜美，独特的风味能让所有品尝者赞不绝口。
E: Great dishes start with great ingredients, and I believe in the wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae. I know exactly how flavorful this land's crops and meats are. Their unique taste is sure to leave a lasting impression.

C: 这个答案，感觉会让老师更生气……
E: I think that answer's only going to make the professor more upset...

C: 要的不多，一枚妖精金币足矣。不至于连这点小钱都舍不得吧？
E: I'm not asking much, just one fairy coin. You wouldn't deny me such a modest amount, would you?

C: 点点滴滴，都值得铭记在心。
E: All these small moments are treasures to be remembered.

C: 就是这儿的生活太清闲了，没有使命，也没有忧患，教人好不适应，就像做梦一样。
E: Life here is just too peaceful... no duties, no worries. It feels so strange, almost like a dream.

C: 最盛大的宴会正式开场。\n\n妖精们大快朵颐，所有人都沉浸在热烈的氛围中……
E: The grandest feast officially begins.\n\nThe fairies feast to their heart's content as everyone is immersed in the festive atmosphere...

C: 关于「大促销」…
E: About the Great Sale...

C: 那很有生活了。
E: Sounds like the good life.

C:
但生灵们的存在，
已无可分离。
仿佛生来，
便是我血脉的一道支系。
E:
And yet, the living beings of this world,
they are now inseparable from me.
As if from the very beginning,
they were a branch of my own bloodline.

E: Her golden-blooded comrades gathered about her,\nChanting her new name,\nUrging her to play that splendid music.

她终于不再犹疑，

奏乐、吟唱，一阙一梦、一笑一颦。
E:
She finally ceased to hesitate,
Drinking down all the honey brew in one swallow,
And leaped into the crowds.
She played music and sang, smiling and dreaming.

C: 多么温柔的祝福，\n人们说她定是济世的圣人，\n为大地带来<color=#9e5738>微光</color>。

C: 疗愈世界的宏愿，\n或许只是女孩的梦呓。

C: 「或许是我生来随性。」\n他的解释同样随意——

C: 「难道冥冥之中，\n我所行的道路并不正确？」

C: 她已不是那无助的姑娘，\n她已身负神通，践英雄之行，\n但还是挡不住纷争的灾殃。

Additionally, narrow the variable range due to excessive randomness in organic lifeforms.]

C:
汽水先生的故事要从钟表小子造访之前讲起。那时的美梦小镇还被称为『噩梦小镇』，镇民们被石头老板所奴役，而汽水先生是这里的青春偶像。

他组建了乐队「噼啪咕噜」，与开朗的瓶盖女孩和温柔的易拉罐妹妹一起为镇民带来快乐。但石头老板并不喜欢他们的音乐，总是在为难汽水先生，让他旗下的「甜鳄姐妹」抢光了「噼啪咕噜」的资源，汽水先生只能解散了乐队……
E:
Mr. Soda's story begins before Clockie's arrival. At that time, Dreamville was still known as "Nightmareville," and the townsfolk were enslaved by Boss Stone. Mr. Soda was a young idol there.

He established a band called "Fizzy Gulp," bringing joy to the townsfolk along with the cheerful Bottle Cap Girl and the gentle Miss Drink Can. However, Boss Stone wasn't a fan of their music. He always picked on Mr. Soda and even had the "Sweet Croc Sisters" working under his company seize all Fizzy Gulp's resources. Mr. Soda had no choice but to disband the group...

C: 对了，今天晚餐吃昨天剩下的列车锅。\n\n这碗列车锅被寄存在你的冰箱里，竟然没被你吃掉，列车长说它很欣慰。
E: By the way, we're having yesterday's Express Special leftovers for today's dinner.\n\nThe Conductor is glad that this bowl of Express Special in your refrigerator didn't get eaten by you, unexpected though that is.

C:
在钟表小子的动画中，有许多可爱的折纸小鸟，是它们建造了华丽的美梦小镇。这次，就让我们来讲讲折纸小鸟们的故事……

在噩梦小镇赶走石头老板，成为美梦小镇之后，钟表小子和哈努兄弟就开始思考，如何让小镇成为美梦一般的地方。

幸运的是，钟表小子曾经在旅途中结识的筑巢天才——猫头鹰老师意外来到了小镇。在猫头鹰老师的号召下，世界各地的小鸟们都来到了美梦小镇。
黄金公子、草绿经理、妃色夫人、赤红大哥，还有湛蓝爵士——这几只小鸟是猫头鹰老师最信赖的学生，在他们的带领下，折纸小鸟们很快就在美梦小镇中建起了各种漂亮的房子……

但折纸小鸟们很快就遇到了一个大难题——美梦小镇的领土不够大！为了扩张美梦小镇的领土，钟表小子喊来了远方的牛仔们开辟荒原，但放荡不羁的牛仔们不愿将开辟的土地归还给美梦小镇，这让木头老爷犯了愁。

聪明的折纸小鸟们飞入牛仔的领地，主动帮他们修筑住所与酒馆。牛仔们起初还有所提防，但看到自己占领的荒漠被小鸟们变成了美观的街道、木屋变成了雅致的洋房，顿时心花怒放，接纳小鸟成为了他们的同伴。
结果小鸟们悄悄修葺了让木头老爷进军的地道，一举剿灭了这群霸占小镇土地的家伙。

现在，小镇拥有了广阔的土地，但还需要更美丽的建筑与之相称。在猫头鹰老师的指挥下，妃色夫人建立了宏伟的小镇宾馆、草绿经理建造了肃穆的朝露小屋、赤红大哥建造了有趣的汽水赛场，而湛蓝爵士似乎在与钟表小子筹划一个秘密基地……

未来，相信他们会带领着更多的折纸小鸟，建设更美丽的美梦小镇……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: The Clockie's animation features a lot of lovely Origami Birds that built the magnificent Dreamville. Now, let us delve into their story... After ousting Boss Stone from Nightmareville and renaming the place Dreamville, Clockie and Brother Hanu racked their brains trying to transform the town into a truly dreamlike place. Luckily, Professor Owl, a nest-building genius whom Clockie met during his journey, made a surprise visit to the town. At Professor Owl's call, birds from all over the world flocked to Dreamville. Young Master Gold, Verdant Manager, Lady Vermilion, Boss Red, and Dr. Blues were Professor Owl's most trusted students. Under their guidance, it didn't take long for the Origami Birds to erect beautiful houses in Dreamville... But the Origami Birds soon found themselves in a dilemma — Dreamville was too small! To expand Dreamville's territory, Clockie enlisted the help of the cowboys from afar to explore the wilderness. Being unruly, the cowboys refused to return the cleared land to Dreamville, much to Old Man Wood's distress. The clever Origami Birds then flew to the cowboys' territory and helped them build houses and hotels. The cowboys were wary at first, but they were thrilled the moment they saw the barren land being adorned by beautiful streets and their wooded huts being turned into elegant mansions. Just like that, they accepted the Origami Birds as their friends. In actuality, the birds had secretly constructed an underground tunnel for Old Man Wood's army. Those baddies that occupied the land were thus defeated. Dreamville now has a vast territory, and it needs beautiful buildings to complement it. Under Professor Owl's leadership, Lady Vermilion has established the magnificent Town Hotel, Verdant Manager has constructed the solemn Dawndew Hut, and Boss Red has built the fun Soda Racetrack. As for Dr. Blues, he seems to be concocting a plan for a secret base with Clockie... In the future, they will lead more Origami Birds in constructing an even more beautiful Dreamville... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
在过去的动画故事里，一直有一位神秘的角色，那就是木头老爷。他是美梦小镇里最德高望重的存在，被钟表小子和镇民们所信赖，但他也隐藏了许多秘密…这次，就让我们来讲讲他的故事。

木头老爷曾经是木头王国的一位庸臣。在木头王国，每棵树都只说一种话、只懂一种道理，大树们认为这才是正确的，于是总在强硬地指导别人。

这天，一封信件被吹到了木头老爷的树冠上——这是一封来自美梦小镇的信件，信中说美梦小镇遇到了无法解决的危机，需要一位厉害的帮手。自大的木头老爷立刻动身出发，带着自己的小树苗们来到了美梦小镇。

木头老爷见到了自己的委托人——古灵精怪的钟表小子。两人一拍即合，很快就成为了好朋友。钟表小子和木头老爷一起解决了美梦小镇的危机，但木头老爷也表现出顽固刻薄的一面，让镇民们有所不满。

后来，美梦小镇变得越来越热闹，木头老爷也意识到扩张小镇领土的必要性。他让钟表小子广发布告，招来了天下各处的牛仔们，用丰厚的奖赏让他们开辟荒原。
然而好景不长，因为木头老爷严格的管理与约束，牛仔们开始顶撞这个多事的老木头。木头老爷不允许自己的权威受到挑战，严惩渴望自由的牛仔，最终引来了牛仔们勇敢的反抗——他们引爆了烟花，炸坏了木头老爷的树冠。木头老爷大发雷霆，将牛仔赶出了小镇。

然而，木头老爷的严厉并没有起到成效……后来的小镇愈发繁华，越来越多的人汇集于此，其中不乏石头老板的手下与各种臭名昭著的坏蛋，他们点燃了小镇宾馆，让镇民们陷入了危险中。木头老爷也被困在宾馆里，因为他过去总是待人苛刻，没有镇民愿意救他，他的树干都被烧空了！

从此，木头老爷变本加厉，他成为了美梦小镇的镇长，不允许任何镇民忤逆他。为了让小镇臣服于他，他成为了最严厉的家长，用枝干和木条锁住了镇民的思想。
失望的钟表小子在美梦小镇的旧址上建立了新的村落，聚集了渴望自由的镇民们，期待唤醒麻木的木头老爷……

木头老爷一直是一个死板的愚者——毫无疑问，美梦小镇只有砍掉这棵腐朽的大树，才能看到被树冠遮蔽的蓝天。

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: There is one mysterious character frequently mentioned in the previous animated stories — Old Man Wood. Although he is a well-respected figure in Dreamville much trusted by Clockie and the townsfolk, he also harbors a fair share of secrets... This time, let us elaborate on his story. Old Man Wood used to be a mediocre official in the Wood Kingdom, where all trees spoke the same language and harbored the same mindset. The great trees believed this to be the only way, so they always forced their thoughts on the others. One day, a letter landed on Old Man Wood's treetop because of the wind. It was a letter from Dreamville, describing the insurmountable crisis the town was currently facing and how they needed a capable helper. The arrogant Old Man Wood immediately set off to Dreamville along with his saplings. When Old Man Wood met the letter sender, the quirky Clockie, they immediately hit it off and became good friends. The two ended Dreamville's crisis together, but the townsfolk were not a fan of Old Man Wood's stubborn and harsh side. As Dreamville became more crowded later, Old Man Wood realized the importance of expanding the territory. He had Clockie issue a recruitment post, summoning cowboys across the lands to explore the wilderness in return for rewards. Yet, nothing good lasted forever. Unhappy with Old Man Wood's strict and controlling management style, the cowboys began to disobey the meddlesome old guy. Old Man Wood couldn't stand his authority being challenged and meted out severe punishment on the cowboys who longed for freedom. In the end, the cowboys mustered up enough courage to stage a rebellion — they set off fireworks to damage Old Man Wood's treetop. Old Man Wood, left frothing at the mouth, expelled the cowboys from the town. Unfortunately, Old Man Wood's iron fist failed to work... As Dreamville thrived, more and more people came, including the likes of Boss Stone's underlings and other notorious criminals. They set fire to the Town Hotel, endangering the townsfolk. Old Man Wood was trapped in the hotel too, but no one was willing to rescue him because he was always hard on them. In the end, his truck was burned hollow! From then on, Old Man Wood grew even more stringent. He became the mayor of Dreamville, forbidding anyone from disobeying him. To make everyone submit to him, he turned into the sternest parent in the world, shackling the minds of the townsfolk with his branches and wooden sticks. Disappointed, Clockie established a new village at the old site of Dreamville and gathered a bunch of townsfolk that yearned for freedom, hoping to bring the lost Old Man Wood to his senses... Old Man Wood has always been a rigid fool. Undoubtedly, chopping off the decayed tree is the only way for Dreamville to see the sky obscured by its canopy. (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「安全屋」</color>本层探索中，不会遭遇敌人。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Safe House</color>: In this level, there will be no enemy encounters.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「召集军团」</color>具有「召唤」能力的敌人，会根据你的行动在空白区域召唤同伴。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Army Assembly</color>: Enemies with the Summoning ability will summon their comrades on blank areas according to your actions.

C: 寻宝者每行动#1次，敌人会发起一次进攻，扣除寻宝者#2点耐力值。
E: For every #1 action(s) the Treasure Hunter takes, the enemy will attack once and reduce Treasure Hunter Stamina by #2.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>两件简易装备</color>可以合成一件<color=#f29e38ff>进阶装备</color>。\n可以点击简易装备，查看合成表。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Two basic equipment</color> can be synthesized into one <color=#f29e38ff>advanced equipment</color>.\nClick on the basic equipment to view the synthesis chart.

C: 拖动到进阶装备上，可升级该进阶装备，获得同名特权装备，大幅增强装备的属性数值和特殊效果。
E: Drag onto a piece of advanced equipment to upgrade it, obtaining the privileged equipment of the same name, which greatly enhances the equipment's stat values and special effects.

C: 一局中获得的总金币数量会极大程度影响对局的胜负。\n记得留<unbreak>50</unbreak>金币攒利息，可每节点获得5金币利息，积少成多！
E: The total amount of Gold Coins acquired in a match will greatly influence the match's outcome.\nRemember to keep <unbreak>50</unbreak> Gold Coins to accumulate interest, which grants 5 Gold Coins in interest per Node. Every little bit adds up!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>点击技能、使用快捷键</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>点击当前选中的目标</color>均可以施放技能。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tapping}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Pressing}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Clicking} an ability, using the corresponding hot key</color>, or <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tapping}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#pressing}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#clicking} the currently selected enemy</color> also allows you to use abilities.

C: 将球拖出道具栏，并{LAYOUT_MOBILE#松开释放}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#再次按下确认键}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#松开释放}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER_PS#再次按下确认键}，就可以将球抛出。球的出手点<color=#f29e38ff>高度越高</color>，球抛出的<color=#f29e38ff>距离越远</color>。
E: Drag the ball out of the item bar and {LAYOUT_MOBILE#release}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press the confirm button again}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#release}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER_PS#press the confirm button again} to throw it. The <color=#f29e38ff>higher the release point</color> of the ball, the <color=#f29e38ff>farther it will be thrown</color>.

C: 当【嗜血】达到指定层数时，将使其进入【月狂】状态。同时行动序列上出现【月狂】倒计时，倒计时回合开始时所有敌方单位解除【月狂】状态。
E: When "Bloodlust" reaches a certain number of stacks, the unit enters the "Moon Rage" state. At the same time, a "Moon Rage" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown's turn begins, "Moon Rage" is dispelled across all enemy units.

C: 自动使用状态下的消耗品，会在每场战斗开始时自动消耗，保持增益效果直至该消耗品个数用尽
E: Consumables in Auto-Use will be automatically used at the start of each battle, and their buff effects will be maintained until their quantity is depleted.

C: 能在墙上行走的机关「苏乐达地板」会在冒险开始时启动，踩踏过后就会消失，<color=#f29e38ff>无法二次使用</color>。
E: The SoulGlad Floor Tiles that allow you to walk on walls will activate when the adventure starts and vanish after being tread upon. <color=#f29e38ff>It cannot be used a second time</color>.

C: 在翁法罗斯，有些门只能在特定的时空开启。<color=#f29e38ff>亮着太阳灯纹的门，只能在白昼时空开启。亮着月亮灯纹的门，只能在永夜时空开启。</color>
E: In Amphoreus, some doors can only be opened in a specific space-time. <color=#f29e38ff>Sun-marked doors can only be opened during the day, and moon-marked doors can only be opened in the evernight.</color>

C: 持有追忆符文时，再次与基座交互可以放下符文，<color=#f29e38ff>奇迹宝珠的照射范围也会随之停止移动</color>。
E: With the Rune of Recollection in possession, interact with the rune base to drop the rune, and <color=#f29e38ff>the Miracle Orb's illumination radius will stop following your character</color>.

C: 十四行代数式屏障已解除。螺丝咕姆在δme<unbreak>-13</unbreak>数据空间中部署了多个<color=#f29e38ff>加速环</color>，以提高「槲寄生」号骇入效率。
E: The quatorzain algebraic expressions barrier has been deactivated. Screwllum has deployed multiple <color=#f29e38ff>Acceleration Rings</color> in the δme<unbreak>-13</unbreak> dataspace to enhance Mistletoe's hacking efficiency.

C: 击破火、雷、风、物理属性可以施加灼烧、触电、风化、裂伤<color=#f29e38ff>持续伤害</color>状态，在目标<color=#f29e38ff>行动开始</color>时，目标会受到对应属性的伤害。
E: Causing Weakness Break with Fire, Lightning, Wind, or Physical DMG will inflict Burn, Shock, Wind Shear, or Bleed <color=#f29e38ff>DoT</color> effects respectively. When <color=#f29e38ff>taking action</color>, the target will take DMG of the corresponding Types.

C: 通过扫描区域中的<color=#f29e38ff>「骇入声明」</color>涂鸦，可解析银狼使用的网络攻击算法。收集<color=#f29e38ff>「骇入声明」</color>可提高模拟算法的强度等级。
E: Scan the <color=#f29e38ff>hacking callcard</color> graffiti in the domain to decipher the attack algorithm used by Silver Wolf. Collect <color=#f29e38ff>hacking callcards</color> to increase Simulated Calculation's intensity level.

C: 当耐力值耗尽时，每次消耗耐力值，将扣除全队所有角色一定百分比的<color=#f29e38ff>生命值</color>。
E: When Stamina is exhausted, every subsequent use of it will deduct a percentage of <color=#f29e38ff>HP</color> from all characters in the team.

C: 具有<color=#f29e38ff>封锁能力</color>的敌人会封锁周围的区域，可通过战斗将其击败。
E: Enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>Lockdown Abilities</color> can lock down nearby areas, and can be defeated through combat.

C: 当我方角色的生命值<color=#f29e38ff>提升</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>降低</color>时，将积累「战意值」。
E: Grit Value accumulates when allies' HP <color=#f29e38ff>increases</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>decreases</color>.

C: 当玩家血量为0时，将进入<color=#f29e38ff>濒死</color>状态，再次<color=#f29e38ff>受到伤害</color>则会被<color=#f29e38ff>淘汰</color>。
E: When the player's HP is at 0, they will enter the <color=#f29e38ff>Near-Death</color> state. Taking <color=#f29e38ff>DMG again</color> will result in <color=#f29e38ff>defeat</color>.

C: 在模拟宇宙内，战胜敌人后可以选择<color=#f29e38ff>祝福</color>，祝福仅在本次探索内生效。

C:
当漫长的岁月在身后消融，化作流星落向未期，
该如何留下一枚音符、一句话？
该如何记忆一颗种子、一朵花？
也许，只需轻哼着歌谣走向未来，不必苦等。
因为在她诞生的地方，人们将「初见」，念作「重逢」。
E:
When arduous years dissolve behind us and become shooting stars falling toward the unknown,
How shall we leave behind a musical note, a sentence?
How shall we remember a seed, a flower?
Perhaps, we only need to softly hum a melody as we walk toward the future. There is no need to wait in anguish.
For where she was born, people pronounce "first encounter" as "reunion."

C: 你偷袭！
E: That was sneaky!

C: 如果换作是我在列车上醒来，什么都不记得了，肯定没法像小三月那样恢复过来。所以看她那个样子，我既佩服她，又担心她…我忙不过来的时候，你多陪她聊聊天吧。
E: If I woke up on the Express without any memories, there's no way I'd recover as quickly as March has. I admire her for that, but I also worry about her... If I'm ever too busy, please do take the time to chat with her.

C: 不必踌躇，我相信这远非你的极限。
E: No need to hesitate. I believe this is far from the limit of your power.

C: 被「星核」改变的世界…我的故乡也是其中之一。可惜了，没有亲眼见证那个时代是如何堕落的。
E: My home world is one of many planets changed by a Stellaron... *sigh* It's a shame I never got to witness how far it fell at the time.

C: 嗯？
E: Hmm?

C: 就这？
E: That's it?

C: 将我们所失去的，全部夺回。
E: We shall take back what we lost.

C: 我打头阵，布洛妮娅——记得保护自己。
E: I'll take the front line. Stay safe, Bronya.

C: 手感来了。
E: I'm getting the hang of this.

C: 身为银鬃铁卫，遵守誓言是因为相信我们不应违背，而不是因为害怕违背。
E: As a Silvermane Guard, I observe the oath not because I fear to go against it, but because I am obliged to uphold it.

C: 不能大意。
E: Don't get careless.

C: …麻烦了。
E: Eek ...Not good.

C: 即使是史瓦罗先生的「计算」，也不能脱离大家的「记忆」…所以，克拉拉绝对不会忘记大家的。
E: Memories are important. Even Mr. Svarog's calculations need to take them into account... I won't forget about you.

C: 克拉拉：我也想保护大家…
E: Clara: I want to protect everyone, too...

C: 克拉拉：不知道有没有帮到大家……
E: Clara: I hope I helped...

C: 小测验而已。
E: Just a little test.

C: 人生每一步就像出牌，惊险又刺激~
E: Life's just like a game of tiles, you never know what's gonna come up next~

C: 打牌别打人！
E: Sore loser!

C: 太卜大人说话虽然不留情面，但又句句在理，小女子斗胆说一句，这训斥听来真别有一番滋味……
E: The master diviner has a harsh tone, but she speaks sense. To be completely honest, her lectures are quite memorable...

C: 天舶司的诸位架势英武，小女子虽然百般仰慕，但也确实学不来…若是需要加加油添添醋，逞逞口舌功夫，倒还能使得上劲……
E: The Sky-Faring Commission are all very gallant. Though I admire them, I really can't imitate them... I'm a lot better at embellishing words and talking up a storm...

C: 起早赶路，昨晚睡得可好？
E: We got up early to press on with our journey. Did you sleep well last night?

C: 符卿的心思我明白，所以还得多让她等一等，她要是有耐心等下去，便到时机了。
E: I know what Fu Xuan is thinking of, so I must make her wait. If she is patient enough to wait, then that would be the time.

C: 敌阵进退，仰赖符卿卜测了。
E: Give us an analysis of the situation, Master Diviner.

C: 区区小伤。
E: Trifling.

C: 走吧，「魔阴身」发作的时候，最好别在我身旁。
E: Go. When the mara strikes, you don't want to be next to me.

C: 这是我原本的样子，持明族的姿态…不必担心，我仍是丹恒，是持明后裔，也是一名无名客。
E: This is my original appearance, that of the Vidyadhara... Don't worry, I'm still Dan Heng, a descendant of the Vidyadhara, and also a member of the Nameless.

C: 同样是狐人族，和驭空大人比起来，我看起来没有什么威严…其实我有自觉的，我只是…很羡慕驭空大人。
E: How come Madam Yukong has an air of authority, but I don't? I mean, we're both foxians. Actually... I know why, but I can't help being a little envious.

C: 承蒙诸位赏脸……
E: I'm honored by your presence...

C: 加点餐吧。
E: You need to get stronger.

C: 大捷，已定！
E: Victory is inevitable!

C: 幽冥，奔袭！
E: Darkness, charge!

C: 我是加拉赫，这儿的「猎犬」之一。欢迎来到梦想之地「匹诺康尼」，新手无名客。
E: Gallagher's the name, I'm one of the local "Hounds" around here. Step into Penacony, the Land of Dreams, Nameless one.

C: 丹恒先生虽时刻对旁人保有警惕，但其行为总是如此正派，他对自己的要求也正如恪守骑士道般严格；请允许我认为他同样是「美」的。
E: While Mr. Dan Heng consistently maintains a sense of wariness towards others, his conduct remains unwaveringly honorable, and his expectations of himself are as stringent as the chivalric code. He possesses a unique form of beauty, I must say.

C: 在忆者面前，没有哪个人不会被从里到外看个精光。能被她看上，说明她一定对你有所求咯？想想怎么利用这点吧。
E: Nothing remains hidden from a Memokeeper. If she's set her sights on you, it's clear she's after something. Consider how you might turn that to your advantage.

C: 给我一颗骰子，便能扭转胜负。
E: Give me a single die, and watch me turn the tables.

C: 难以领会的预言……
E: Such an elusive foretelling...

E: We all have to face reality after waking up from our dreams. Our... Brother's dream will also begin here.

C: 你所求的，便是你所得的。
E: What you seek is what you shall receive.

C: 工作总是令人疲惫。今天的对话份额已经用完了，明天再来找我谈合作吧。
E: Work is always exhausting. I've run out of chit-chat for today. Come back tomorrow to talk about collaboration.

E: Let's duel, fair and square!

C: 缇安：给我冲呀——！\n缇宝：BANG！

C: 我也曾与冥海的恶潮搏斗，深知绝望与死寂的滋味…也许这就是深海蜜酿为何尝起来如此苦烈的原因吧。
E: I also once fought against the malevolent tides of the Sea of Souls, and I know the taste of despair and deathly silence... Perhaps that is why the deep sea's honey brew has such a bitter and intense flavor.

C: 同僚评价我为「大表演家」——呵，说得太对了！难得见到这些人跳出典型的翁法罗斯思维。当然，他们的看法对我来说：无所谓、没必要、不至于。
E: My colleagues judge me to be "the Great Performer" — Hah, and they'd be right! How rare it is to see them think outside of the Amphoreus logic box. As to what I think about their assessment? I don't care about that at all.

C: 要是有一天我没回来，你就去奥赫玛下水道，沿着最粗的那根管子往前走到底，那儿有个小窝，告诉那些孩子别等我了，各谋生路吧。
E: If one day I don't come back, go to the sewers of Okhema. Follow the largest pipe all the way to the end. There's a little hideout there — Tell the kids there not to wait for me anymore and to find their own way in life.

C: 有猫腻！
E: Something's fishy!

C: 请就此凋零。
E: Please, wilt here.

C: 海洋的歌者，一同向凯旋进发吧。

C: 复仇的渴望一直支撑着我前行，即便心有不安，我也相信漫漫长夜的尽头，是光的方向。那光芒并非为负世而升的烈阳，而是点燃此身的怒火！
E: The hunger for vengeance has carried me through this journey. Despite my uncertainty, I still believe there's light at the end of the deepest dark. But that light is not the blazing sun that will bring a new dawn. It's a blazing anger that will set my very being aflame!

C: 没看错…是古籍中的记载之物！
E: Th—This is a treasure recorded in ancient texts!

C: 深海裂谷的千年蜜酿，浅酌一口便会沉醉，仿佛融化于洋流之中…地上的汁水确实稍逊一筹，大抵千杯，方能捕捉到一丝相似的体验。
E: The thousand-year-old honey brew from the deep-sea trenches... just one small sip is enough to make you drift away, as though becoming part of the currents... The brews on land are indeed far less exquisite. After a thousand cups, you might catch a fleeting trace of that same wonder.

C: 这尾粉色的小水母，竟能驯服岁月的逆流…她的光芒是如此活泼温暖，连我也会不由自主地一同随她遨游呢。
E: What a marvel that this pink little jellyfish was able to tame the countercurrents of Time... Her light is so lively and warm that even I can't help but follow where she goes.

C: 小心被那无声的浪花划开咽喉。
E: Careful. Don't let that silent wave open your throat.

C: 公正之秤的两端永远平衡，但为何世间从未公平？人与泰坦力量悬殊，翁法罗斯与银河也是如此…真正的「律法」，只能以战争与血火铸就。
E: The scales of justice are forever balanced, yet why has the world never been fair? The strength between a human and Titan is worlds apart, and so too is Amphoreus and the vast cosmos... True Law can only be tempered through war and fire.

E: In the ancient Era Creatura, Aquila, after forging the Dawn Device, collaborated with Kephale to bring forth the legendary beasts embodying the Titans. Today, the souls of those great beasts are now in utter chaos.

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n原本可用来经世济民的学识反转为文明的恶敌，擅长潜伏与博弈的它们如同贪婪的秃鹫，渴望为黑潮不断奉上新的牺牲。
E: A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.\nKnowledge that once could have served humanity has inverted into civilization's foe. Specializing in ambush and strategic maneuvers, they hover like ravenous vultures, craving to deliver fresh sacrifices to the black tide.

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志，此时获得强大力量的它，已经没有任何人可以阻挡。
E: A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed. Having now acquired immense power, none can stand in its way.

E: Legend has it that the plundering sea sirens can sing to lure sailors with wavering wills. Those who fall into madness will leap into the ocean and become a delicacy for the deep sea.

C: 她说，她叫康士坦丝。 那是我第一次见她。一袭白色的连衣裙，为刚刚从培养仓里醒来的我梳发。 她说，她叫大丽花。 那是我第二次见她。在一次任务里，她的白手套替我擦去血迹…就像姐姐那样。 「别害怕，我一直在你身边。」 她消失在美梦深处，只留下似有若无的花香。 盛会之星有许多怀揣热望的逐梦客，而她随心所欲地成为他人记忆的一部分。 我遵循剧本的指示而行动，她却从未将它当成一回事。 在这漫长的宴会中，她在命途的五线谱上来回辗转，似乎不会拒绝任何一位的邀请—— 她在「秩序」的乐章中穿行，却又忍不住触碰「同谐」的音符；她倾听着「繁育」的哼鸣，在命运的逗弄下，她主动被「虚无」的阴影吞没，又有意无意…沾惹了「记忆」的舞伴。 一如既往，她的兴致总是热烈而短暂。 她说，每一次将自己的生命置于刀尖，才能体会活着的喜悦。 所以，她看向我的眼神有些复杂—— 我读出了怜悯——怜悯我那注定的死亡。我也读到了愉悦，仿佛她又创造了一份美丽的记忆。还有好奇，好奇我会如何反叛自己的命运。 我拜托她烧掉无名客与「终末」相关的记忆，只因那份记忆太过危险。 她用魔尾上的火焰燎燃无名客的往昔，可又微笑着告诉我， 没有什么会被真正遗忘——即使经受最强烈的燃烧。 也许，她已经这样做过千百万遍。 她背弃了许多，只因她始终追寻着什么。 或许正因如此，她才要一次又一次赶赴宴会。即使筵席上众人窃窃私语，怒骂她是哀悼和枯萎的象征。鲜有人记起，哀悼是对生命的献礼，枯萎之物也有极尽繁荣的往昔。 ——来自某位星核猎手，一段受到扭曲的记忆
E: She said her name was Constance. That was the first time I saw her. Wearing a white dress, she was fixing my hair as I had just woken up from the incubation pod. She said her name was The Dahlia. That was the second time I met her. During a mission, her white gloves wiped away blood stains off me... just like my sister used to do. "Don't be afraid, I'll always be by your side." She vanished into the depths of the sweet dream, leaving behind only a faint trace of floral fragrance. The Planet of Festivities is full of eager Dreamchasers, yet she casually becomes a part of others' memories. I follow the script's directions to take action, while she never took any of it seriously. During this long banquet, she twirled along the musical stave of the Paths, seemingly unable to refuse any invitation... She traverses through the Order's melody, yet can't resist touching the notes of Harmony. Listening to the hum of Propagation, and under destiny's playful whims, she willingly lets herself be swallowed by the shadows of Nihility, while deliberately or not... becoming entangled with the dance partner of Remembrance. As always, her enthusiasm was intense, yet fleeting. She said that only by putting her life on the edge of a blade could she truly feel the joy of being alive. So, her gaze upon me was complex... On her face, I saw pity for my inevitable death. I also saw delight, as if she had created another beautiful memory. Not to mention curiosity, to see how I would defy my destiny. I asked her to burn away the Nameless' memories of the Finality, for those memories were far too dangerous. With the flames from her tail, she set the Nameless' past ablaze. Yet, she smiled as she told me, Nothing is ever truly forgotten, even through the most intense combustion. Perhaps she has done this millions of times before. She abandoned much, all because she was always searching for something. Perhaps this is why she keeps attending banquet after banquet. Even as the attendees whisper and curse her as the symbol of mourning and decay. Few remember that mourning is a tribute to life, that withered things once had their moment of glory. — A certain Stellaron Hunter's distorted memory

C: 你无法再回到往昔，但无论过去是否因你而改变，都会留下为人铭记的痕迹。
E: You can't return to the past, yet the past, regardless of whether you changed it, will leave traces to be remembered.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这是「剧本」预见的，你在「匹诺康尼」的另一种结局。但在很久以前，它已经被星核猎手阻止。</color>

E: Right...

C: 严格来说，是我的记忆。我不能擅自代表他人。
E: Strictly speaking, these are my memories. I can't presume to speak for others.

C: 既然我们无法改变结果，我又为什么，要阻止她选择过程呢？
E: If we can't change the outcome, why should I stop her from making her own choice?

C: 繁育？那才是格拉默铁骑的力量来源？
E: The Propagation? That's the true source of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry's power?

C: 那位星核{F#女士}{M#先生}，显然还不熟悉忆质，而那只自负的天鹅，一向顾及体面，不愿出尽底牌。只有黄泉在场，{F#她们}{M#他们}才能跨过死亡。
E: That {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron is clearly unfamiliar with memoria, and that arrogant swan, always mindful of appearances, is unwilling to show all her cards. Only with Acheron present can they cross beyond death.

C: 你不该知道那么多，迷路的自灭者。
E: You shouldn't know so much, lost Self-Annihilator.

C: 正因如此，我才说那一击并不光彩。探究你的秘密，是为了美梦；将你击落，却出于窥见永恒后的私心。
E: That's precisely why I said that strike wasn't honorable. I explored your secrets for the sake of the sweet dream, but striking you down? That came from selfish desires after glimpsing eternity.

C: 我要暂时取走你的一段记忆。使它搅动忆域，我便能顺着忆质的流动，灼烧出一条通路，再次打捞出过去的情景。
E: I'll need to temporarily take a piece of your memory. By letting it stir up the Memory Zone, I can follow the flow of memoria and burn a path through, retrieving scenes from the past once again.

C: 毁灭是壮丽的一瞬——作为冥火大公的「女儿」，我当然要让他的遗愿尽善尽美，就算只是暂时的身份。
E: Destruction is a glorious moment. As Duke Inferno's "daughter," I will see his last wishes carried out to perfection, even if my role as such is only temporary.

C: 哦，瞧我这记性——<color=#dbc291ff>我得去找回一样{RUBY_B#「翡翠」基石}「失物」{RUBY_E#}</color>。否则，会让另一位女士不高兴的。
E: Oh, silly me, I almost forgot — <color=#dbc291ff>I need to retrieve a certain {RUBY_B#"Jade" Cornerstone}lost item{RUBY_E#}.</color> Otherwise, there's a lady who won't be too pleased.

C: 存在于橡木公馆的不过是伪装——<color=#dbc291ff>藏于其中的，只有星核。</color>
E: What exists in Oak Manor is nothing but a disguise. <color=#dbc291ff>The only thing hidden within is a Stellaron.</color>

C: （指针转动的声效，沉重一些）滴答…滴答…滴答……
E: Tick tock... tick tock... tick tock...

C: 他说自己「力有不逮」，而非「希佩教导我等不应如此」。无论家族是何面目，此刻的歌斐木，也早已不是「同谐」的信者。
E: He claimed he was "powerless," not that "Xipe taught us we shouldn't do this." Whatever The Family's true face may be, right now, Gopher Wood is no longer a follower of the Harmony.

C: 可人们无法认出
E: Yet men discern it not.

C: 此时的星期日，你们根本无法战胜。而太一之梦是如此可怕，即便是忆者，也无法行动自如。
E: It was impossible for you to beat Sunday at that time. Ena's Dream was so terrifying that even Memokeepers could not act freely in it.

C: 我想，除了那唯一的一处破绽，你在美梦中经历的仍是真实发生过的。唯有如此，他才能让你抵达理想的终点：解救匹诺康尼的危机，踏上下一段「开拓」之旅。
E: I believe what you experienced in the sweet dream, except for that flaw, was real. Only in this way could you reach the destination, lifting the crisis in Penacony and embarking on your next trailblazing expedition.

C: 现在，我们还有一线生机。而要将它付诸现实…黑天鹅小姐，带我们去见见那些同样坚强的人吧。
E: We still have a chance, though. To make it happen... please, Black Swan, guide us to those with a strong will.

C: 看来该忙正事了，牛仔。
E: Time to get down to business, cowboy.

C: 我也一样。
E: Me too.

C: 无可奈何，甚至更加危险。
E: There's nothing we can do about them. They're even more dangerous.

C: 我们的一位合作者，正在十二时刻寻找另一个{RUBY_B#「秩序」之子}「同谐」神选{RUBY_E#}。
E: One of our associates is searching in the Twelve Hours for {RUBY_B#the child of Order}the other person chosen by the Harmony{RUBY_E#}.

C: 忆者女士，回忆的时候到了——在橡木之梦里，我对你们说过一句话。
E: Miss Memokeeper, it's time for a game of recall. I once said something to you lot back in the Oak Dream.

C: 你…做好准备了么？
E: ...Are you ready?

C: 这里是{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}的万千表征之一，但同样，也是清醒之人告别「虚无」的出口。
E: This place is one of the thousands of manifestations belonging to {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#}, and it's also an exit out of the Nihility for the awake ones.

C: 还差一线，迈过此处，你可以真正拥抱死亡。或者，你也可以就此回头。
E: Death is one step away from here. Step over this place, and you will truly embrace death. Or... you can turn back.

C: …一个平凡的女孩子。
E: ...Just an ordinary girl.

C: 加拉赫
E: Gallagher

C: 还没有结束，后来呢？
E: It's not over yet. What happened next?

C: 不过，我还是有一点小小的私心——我相信你不会忘记这一幕，但如果回想起来，我想让它轻松一点。
E: Still, I have a tiny, selfish wish. I know you won't forget this moment, but when you look back on it, I want it to feel lighter.

C: 但她回想今天，总会发觉一处遗憾，永远无法弥补。
E: But when she looks back on this day, she will always discover one regret that can never be mended.

C: （「奇美拉世界锦标赛」好像还有新的赛事活动，有空的时候再去看看吧。）
E: (Looks like there are new events in the "Chimera World Tournament." I should check them out when I have time.)

C: 反抗「终末」的同伴
E: Allies Against the Finality

C: 我方全体目标将分别在<color=#f29e38ff>两个战场</color>进行作战，不同战场的我方和敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>无法攻击</color>到另一战场的目标。开场时将选择我方半数角色前往黑斗士战场，其余角色前往白卫士战场。
E: All ally targets are split between <color=#f29e38ff>two battlefields</color>. Ally and enemy targets <color=#f29e38ff>cannot attack</color> targets on a different battlefield. Half of the characters will be selected to go to the Dark Duelist battlefield at the start, while the remaining characters will go to the White Guard battlefield.

C: 后排目标
E: Back Row Target

C: 暖龙龙的技能相当强力，要善加利用。
E: Toasty Dragon has rather powerful abilities. Make good use of them.

C: 危机提示
E: Crisis Alert

C: 哀歌塞壬
E: Elegy Siren

C: 修改设置后，会在下一次启动游戏时生效。
E: Changes to the settings will take effect the next time you start the game.

C: 角色满级
E: Max Level Reached

C: 迫不及待了？
E: Can't wait anymore?

C: 你说那个高傲的女人？虽然我对她故作正经的姿态敬而远之，但作为忆者，她为命运牵线搭桥，使璀璨记忆得以诞生的本领…连我也无法不赞叹。
E: That arrogant woman? I may shy away from her pretentious airs, but as a Memokeeper, her ability to open doors for fate and create resplendent memories... is something I cannot help but admire.
